                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        
        /* Tactile Shadows */
        .btn-primary-tactile {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #004b71;
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
        }
        .btn-primary-tactile:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        
        .btn-secondary-tactile {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #bec8d3;
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
        }
        .btn-secondary-tactile:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #bec8d3;
        }

        .card-tactile {
            box-shadow: 0 8px 0 0 #dee3e9;
        }

        /* Waving Animation */
        @keyframes wave {
            0% { transform: rotate(0deg); }
            25% { transform: rotate(2deg) translateY(-2px); }
            75% { transform: rotate(-2deg) translateY(2px); }
            100% { transform: rotate(0deg); }
        }
        .animate-wave {
            animation: wave 3s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        /* Rays Background */
        .celebration-rays {
            background: radial-gradient(circle, #fccc00 0%, #ffe084 100%);
            overflow: hidden;
            position: relative;
        }
        .ray {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: 50%;
            width: 200%;
            height: 100px;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
            transform-origin: 0 50%;
            animation: rotate-rays 20s linear infinite;
        }
        @keyframes rotate-rays {
            from { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(0deg); }
            to { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(360deg); }
        }

        /* Floating Confetti */
        .confetti {
            position: absolute;
            width: 12px;
            height: 12px;
            border-radius: 2px;
            animation: fall linear forwards;
            z-index: 5;
        }
        @keyframes fall {
            0% { transform: translate(0, 0) rotate(0deg); opacity: 1; }
            100% { transform: translate(var(--tw-translate-x, 0), 100vh) rotate(720deg); opacity: 0; }
        }

        /* Stamp Pop effect */
        @keyframes stamp-pop {
            0% { transform: scale(3) rotate(-20deg); opacity: 0; }
            80% { transform: scale(0.9) rotate(5deg); opacity: 1; }
            100% { transform: scale(1) rotate(0deg); opacity: 1; }
        }
        .animate-stamp {
            animation: stamp-pop 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275) forwards;
            animation-delay: 0.5s;
            opacity: 0;
        }

        /* Sparkle System */
        .sparkle {
            position: absolute;
            pointer-events: none;
            animation: sparkle-anim 1s linear forwards;
            z-index: 40;
        }
        @keyframes sparkle-anim {
            0% { transform: scale(0) rotate(0deg); opacity: 1; }
            100% { transform: scale(1.5) rotate(180deg); opacity: 0; }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-surface font-body-md text-on-surface min-h-screen flex flex-col overflow-x-hidden">
<!-- Top Navigation Anchor -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky z-50 bg-surface flex justify-between items-center px-container-margin py-unit h-touch-target-min border-b-4 border-surface-container-highest">
<div class="flex items-center gap-3">
<div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-primary-container flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden border-2 border-primary">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A cute, circular cartoon avatar of a young world explorer wearing a khaki hat and smiling warmly, digital art style for kids." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuDbdJvfW3devmQSNyIXe9zbiaHmLaC04EE2jKRLmkethcOWHAufBE8i7Tzh5cnMgQ8SP_9DUhLJ-kjBFpPfEPTdME_oXx0dqgwqBqPnalEDDTr2h7oBx__OaG7pH9s8alngscYJU_iRhIBIi8TnEIiOpiBkJqdDlt02qBX_EttbGc4bBAmE-_RjIdB99_XBMwjtzjj3GRwAUZUNqBRlUEjtbARPHp5l42IN7RDX6iq_CjreAVhFdt4C7SoVpvxglxw_YX9HKMlQU4c">
</div>
<span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md font-bold text-primary">Flag Explorer</span>
</div>
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-full mr-2 btn-primary-tactile active:translate-y-1 transition-all" style="background-color: rgb(252, 204, 0); box-shadow: rgb(115, 92, 0) 0px 4px 0px 0px;"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">notifications_active</span><div class="flex flex-col items-center leading-none mt-0.5"><span class="text-[8px] font-bold uppercase">¡Alarma!</span><span class="text-[6px] font-bold uppercase opacity-70">Alarm</span></div></button><button class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-secondary-container flex items-center justify-center btn-primary-tactile" id="speaker-toggle" style="background-color: #fccc00; box-shadow: 0 4px 0 0 #735c00;">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container">volume_up</span>
</button>
</header>
<!-- Main Celebration Canvas -->
<main class="flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-center relative p-container-margin celebration-rays">
<!-- Animated Background Rays -->
<div class="absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none" id="rays-container"><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(0deg);"></div><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(30deg);"></div><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(60deg);"></div><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(90deg);"></div><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(120deg);"></div><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(150deg);"></div><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(180deg);"></div><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(210deg);"></div><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(240deg);"></div><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(270deg);"></div><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(300deg);"></div><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(330deg);"></div></div>
<!-- Confetti Generator Script Container -->
<div class="absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none overflow-hidden" id="confetti-container"><div class="confetti" style="left: 74.6925vw; top: -5px; background-color: rgb(89, 190, 27); animation-duration: 2.26562s;"></div><div class="confetti" style="left: 55.2823vw; top: -5px; background-color: rgb(0, 100, 149); animation-duration: 4.60981s;"></div><div class="confetti" style="left: 97.9009vw; top: -5px; background-color: rgb(0, 100, 149); animation-duration: 4.26974s;"></div><div class="confetti" style="left: 21.7847vw; top: -5px; background-color: rgb(89, 190, 27); animation-duration: 3.2601s;"></div><div class="confetti" style="left: 75.3134vw; top: -5px; background-color: rgb(89, 190, 27); animation-duration: 4.91536s;"></div><div class="confetti" style="left: 81.1079vw; top: -5px; background-color: rgb(89, 190, 27); animation-duration: 2.16179s;"></div><div class="confetti" style="left: 78.1798vw; top: -5px; background-color: rgb(252, 204, 0); animation-duration: 4.26674s;"></div><div class="confetti" style="left: 40.9665vw; top: -5px; background-color: rgb(0, 100, 149); animation-duration: 2.90043s;"></div><div class="confetti" style="left: 77.3642vw; top: -5px; background-color: rgb(252, 204, 0); animation-duration: 3.92809s;"></div><div class="confetti" style="left: 7.6387vw; top: -5px; background-color: rgb(252, 204, 0); animation-duration: 2.55796s;"></div><div class="confetti" style="left: 64.6409vw; top: -5px; background-color: rgb(0, 100, 149); animation-duration: 4.60027s;"></div><div class="confetti" style="left: 99.097vw; top: -5px; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); animation-duration: 3.86828s;"></div><div class="confetti" style="left: 94.8115vw; top: -5px; background-color: rgb(186, 26, 26); animation-duration: 4.32388s;"></div><div class="confetti" style="left: 65.2384vw; top: -5px; background-color: rgb(0, 100, 149); animation-duration: 4.42441s;"></div><div class="confetti" style="left: 89.381vw; top: -5px; background-color: rgb(89, 190, 27); animation-duration: 2.67597s;"></div></div>
<!-- Central Content Card -->
<div class="relative z-10 w-full max-w-lg flex flex-col items-center text-center">
<!-- Mascot Cheering -->
<div class="mb-4 transform hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-300">
<img class="h-40 object-contain drop-shadow-xl" data-alt="A friendly, chunky 3D cartoon blue bird mascot wearing small aviator goggles, wings spread wide in a cheering pose with a joyful expression, premium children's app aesthetic." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuCoWy-zoxoduGDtDYh-tosoCt5W3XiFWxHtHYwjjMifyhWZh8Dx2UFdXUjyRRG_9l0twz30hyOfbLIK5kHHO0qqZa0qIbSw-kRl-wVU1yLvXHfLAepCqdrL4m5Oxr1NoktzE4ndLtYQ4k9JScWusgWuDQaPykaVSiqsNktaEIg60ynnbEzcSH0uqobv5ia2q4mEw2A2cOaCdpLrxMVWDegmeBi_P0vusErakTUaqKcPrqiRLBccti1n5PmXDnRhpNgWH8KzbE3hVJg">
</div>
<!-- The Flag Hero Section -->
<div class="bg-white rounded-lg p-card-padding card-tactile mb-8 animate-wave inline-block border-2 border-surface-container-highest relative" id="flag-card">
<div class="w-64 h-40 bg-white overflow-hidden rounded-md border-2 border-surface-variant flex items-center justify-center relative">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="The national flag of Mexico, vibrant green, white, and red vertical stripes with the national coat of arms centered, displayed in a clean, flat educational style." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuDEZ5OIuNzo550YG-prkLojh-xyGyLb0eAtRCtGTd_-PHHbhpreLhmuA8CNJ2LW7ZJASUyW8kKxirEyLjv4bk43XyirLvMR76e2tCU7eLrlOm2TyZrYDdohS49mp6-MFdwbmB_xutit8Fz6uJXkh3Fio9d79ztMcTHqweZsVB230cQl5g3gloDnOEOxxFt2i1eclE2UeCoaGgu3S1_PJeTVvAF3nGuxJ5PeTl6AiuOOvRDmmOhkoyLXkDCDfarCr8fFD7aTgshXm0s">
<!-- Sparkle target point -->
<div class="absolute inset-0" id="sparkle-origin"></div>
</div>
<h1 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile mt-4 text-primary">¡Lo lograste!<br><span class="text-body-md font-medium opacity-80">You Did It!</span></h1>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-surface-variant mt-2">¡México completado!<br><span class="text-label-bold opacity-70">Mexico is Completed!</span></p>
</div>
<!-- Passport Stamp Reward -->
<div class="relative mb-12">
<div class="animate-stamp flex flex-col items-center">
<div class="w-32 h-32 rounded-full bg-white border-8 border-tertiary-container flex flex-col items-center justify-center transform -rotate-12 shadow-2xl">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-tertiary-container text-5xl">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-tertiary-container uppercase tracking-widest mt-1">MEXICO</span>
</div>
<div class="absolute -top-4 -right-4 bg-error text-white px-3 py-1 rounded-full font-label-bold shadow-lg animate-bounce">¡NUEVO!</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Action Button -->
<div class="w-full max-w-sm mt-auto z-20 pb-10 flex flex-col gap-4">
<button class="w-full py-6 rounded-xl bg-primary text-white font-headline-md text-headline-md btn-primary-tactile flex items-center justify-center gap-4">
<div class="flex flex-col items-center">
<span class="">Siguiente Bandera</span>
<span class="text-label-bold opacity-80">Next Flag</span>
</div>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-4xl">arrow_forward</span>
</button>
<button class="w-full py-4 rounded-xl bg-white text-primary font-body-lg text-body-lg btn-secondary-tactile border-2 border-surface-container-highest">
<div class="flex flex-col items-center">
<span class="">Volver al Mapa</span>
<span class="text-label-bold opacity-70">Back to Map</span>
</div>
</button>
</div>
</main>
<script>
    // Configuration
    const colors = ['#fccc00', '#59be1b', '#006495', '#ba1a1a', '#ffffff'];
    const confettiContainer = document.getElementById('confetti-container');
    const raysContainer = document.getElementById('rays-container');
    const sparkleOrigin = document.getElementById('sparkle-origin');

    // Generate Rays
    for (let i = 0; i < 12; i++) {
        const ray = document.createElement('div');
        ray.className = 'ray';
        ray.style.transform = `translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(${i * 30}deg)`;
        raysContainer.appendChild(ray);
    }

    // Particle Systems
    function createConfetti(count = 50, burst = false) {
        for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
            const confetti = document.createElement('div');
            confetti.className = 'confetti';
            
            const startX = burst ? 50 : Math.random() * 100;
            const startY = burst ? 50 : -5;
            
            confetti.style.left = startX + 'vw';
            confetti.style.top = startY + (burst ? 'vh' : 'px');
            confetti.style.backgroundColor = colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)];
            
            const duration = (Math.random() * 3 + 2);
            confetti.style.animationDuration = duration + 's';
            
            if (burst) {
                const angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                const distance = Math.random() * 100;
                confetti.style.setProperty('--tw-translate-x', Math.cos(angle) * distance + 'px');
            }
            
            confettiContainer.appendChild(confetti);
            setTimeout(() => confetti.remove(), duration * 1000);
        }
    }

    function createSparkle(x, y) {
        const sparkle = document.createElement('span');
        sparkle.className = 'material-symbols-outlined sparkle text-secondary-container';
        sparkle.innerText = 'star';
        sparkle.style.left = x + 'px';
        sparkle.style.top = y + 'px';
        sparkle.style.fontSize = (Math.random() * 20 + 10) + 'px';
        sparkle.style.fontVariationSettings = "'FILL' 1";
        document.body.appendChild(sparkle);
        setTimeout(() => sparkle.remove(), 1000);
    }

    function flagBurst() {
        const rect = sparkleOrigin.getBoundingClientRect();
        for(let i=0; i<20; i++) {
            setTimeout(() => {
                const rx = rect.left + Math.random() * rect.width;
                const ry = rect.top + Math.random() * rect.height;
                createSparkle(rx, ry);
            }, i * 50);
        }
    }

    // Audio System
    function playCelebration() {
        // Voice-over text-to-speech (Fallback to native if no sound file provided)
        const msg = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance();
        msg.text = '¡Lo lograste! México completado! Mexico completed!';
        msg.lang = 'es-MX';
        msg.rate = 0.9;
        window.speechSynthesis.speak(msg);

        // Simulate Mariachi Trumpet / Joyful sound
        // In a real environment, we would use: new Audio('path/to/mariachi.mp3').play();
        console.log("SFX: Joyful Mariachi Trumpet Play");
    }

    // Initialization
    window.addEventListener('load', () => {
        // Initial burst
        setTimeout(() => {
            createConfetti(100, true);
            flagBurst();
            playCelebration();
        }, 300);

        // Constant light drizzle
        setInterval(() => createConfetti(15), 4000);
    });

    // Tactile Click Feedback
    document.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(btn => {
        btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            // Haptic vibration
            if (window.navigator.vibrate) {
                window.navigator.vibrate(50);
            }
            // Visual click sparkle
            createSparkle(e.clientX, e.clientY);
        });
    });

    // Manual Sound Toggle
    document.getElementById('speaker-toggle').addEventListener('click', () => {
        playCelebration();
    });
</script>


</body></html>

<!-- Interactive Celebration & Reward -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport">
<title>Flag Explorer - Mexico Paint Station</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif;
            cursor: none; /* Hide default cursor to use the Smart Brush */
            -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
            overflow-x: hidden;
        }
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        .smart-brush {
            position: fixed;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 9999;
            transition: transform 0.1s ease-out;
            filter: drop-shadow(4px 4px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.1));
        }
        .tactile-shadow {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
        }
        .active-paint-green { border-bottom: 8px solid #1a4600; transform: translateY(-4px); }
        .active-paint-white { border-bottom: 8px solid #bec8d3; transform: translateY(-4px); }
        .active-paint-red { border-bottom: 8px solid #93000a; transform: translateY(-4px); }
        
        /* Flag Section Transitions */
        .flag-section {
            transition: background-color 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275);
        }
        
        /* Floating Animation for Speaker */
        @keyframes pulse-soft {
            0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.1); }
        }
        .animate-pulse-soft {
            animation: pulse-soft 3s infinite ease-in-out;
        }
    </style>
<script id="tailwind-config">
        tailwind.config = {
            darkMode: "class",
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    "colors": {
                        "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                        "on-surface": "#171c21",
                        "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                        "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                        "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                        "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                        "error": "#ba1a1a",
                        "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                        "secondary": "#735c00",
                        "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                        "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                        "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                        "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                        "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                        "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                        "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                        "on-error": "#ffffff",
                        "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                        "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                        "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                        "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                        "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                        "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                        "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                        "surface-tint": "#006495",
                        "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                        "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                        "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                        "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                        "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                        "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                        "outline": "#6e7882",
                        "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                        "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                        "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                        "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                        "primary": "#006495",
                        "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                        "background": "#f7f9ff",
                        "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                        "on-background": "#171c21",
                        "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                        "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                        "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                        "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff"
                    },
                    "borderRadius": {
                        "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                        "lg": "2rem",
                        "xl": "3rem",
                        "full": "9999px"
                    },
                    "spacing": {
                        "container-margin": "24px",
                        "touch-target-min": "48px",
                        "gutter": "16px",
                        "unit": "8px",
                        "card-padding": "20px"
                    },
                    "fontFamily": {
                        "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                        "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                        "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                        "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                        "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                        "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
                    },
                    "fontSize": {
                        "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                        "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                        "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                        "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                        "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                        "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
                    }
                },
            },
        }
    </script>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background min-h-screen flex flex-col overflow-hidden">
<!-- Smart Brush Cursor Overlay -->
<div class="smart-brush text-primary hidden md:block" id="brush-cursor" style="color: rgb(43, 108, 0);">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined !text-5xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">brush</span>
</div>
<!-- Top AppBar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky bg-surface dark:bg-on-surface border-b-4 border-surface-container-highest dark:border-outline flex justify-between items-center px-container-margin py-unit h-touch-target-min z-50">
<div class="flex items-center gap-3">
<div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-primary-container flex items-center justify-center text-on-primary-container">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">stars</span>
</div>
<h1 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md font-bold text-primary dark:text-primary-fixed">Flag Explorer</h1>
</div>
<button class="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-full bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container border-b-4 border-secondary hover:scale-105 transition-transform active:translate-y-1 mr-4">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">notifications_active</span>
<div class="flex flex-col items-start leading-none">
<span class="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-tighter">¡Alarma!</span>
<span class="text-[8px] opacity-70 uppercase tracking-tighter">Sound Alarm</span>
</div>
</button><button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-surface-container-high text-primary hover:scale-105 transition-transform active:translate-y-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">close</span>
</button>
</header>
<!-- Main Canvas Area -->
<main class="flex-grow flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-container-margin relative gap-8">
<!-- Header Info -->
<div class="flex items-center gap-4 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur rounded-xl px-6 py-3 shadow-sm border-2 border-surface-container-highest">
<h2 class="font-headline-lg text-headline-lg text-on-surface"><span class="!text-5xl block">México</span><span class="text-headline-md opacity-70">Mexico</span></h2>
<button class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container flex items-center justify-center animate-pulse-soft hover:scale-110 active:scale-95 transition-all shadow-lg border-b-4 border-secondary" onclick="playAudio()">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined !text-4xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
<span class="absolute -bottom-6 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-tighter text-secondary">Escuchar</span></button>
</div>
<!-- Flag Canvas -->
<div class="relative w-full max-w-4xl aspect-[3/2] bg-white rounded-lg border-8 border-surface-container-highest shadow-2xl flex overflow-hidden">
<!-- Left Section -->
<div class="flag-section flex-1 border-r-4 border-surface-container-highest flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-surface-container-low transition-colors cursor-pointer group" id="section-left" onclick="paintSection('left')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-surface-container-highest opacity-20 text-6xl group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">format_paint</span>
</div>
<!-- Middle Section (Emblem) -->
<div class="flag-section flex-1 flex items-center justify-center relative hover:bg-surface-container-low transition-colors cursor-pointer group" id="section-middle" onclick="paintSection('middle')">
<!-- Emblem Placeholder -->
<div class="z-10 w-3/4 h-3/4 flex items-center justify-center">
<img class="object-contain w-full h-full drop-shadow-md" data-alt="A stylized, friendly, and colorful vector illustration of the Mexican national emblem featuring a golden eagle perched on a cactus eating a snake. The style is clean, modern, and educational, designed for a high-quality children's learning application with soft lighting and vibrant yet realistic colors. The background is a crisp white texture with very thin, subtle outline marks for coloring." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuCmeD1aBr7GvRU8UXODiHu42QJXaLwTxmnok-uKlH4ovYB-zrpRx0cA3NJQGPl9oU5Oj3Z9lGSZTRvm0VHITOPHT3q86-V0GBmfwrXDMPD5HLmRKF_L_8LWOPLONITf0Nu3THhwp4LO-wNGEv0hR4Xlis3IhHz-VzYbpTHzIXTSjv7oaKsD6-tXiEsv5HnRlmwdkWvV7aMjvzh9JgOH5yklDFvlpFfj2ZSeAQYKsViwNAGzmQJeTpppuGQY7w_6436cHsKf9CDq49Q">
</div>
<span class="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center material-symbols-outlined text-surface-container-highest opacity-20 text-6xl group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">format_paint</span>
</div>
<!-- Right Section -->
<div class="flag-section flex-1 border-l-4 border-surface-container-highest flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-surface-container-low transition-colors cursor-pointer group" id="section-right" onclick="paintSection('right')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-surface-container-highest opacity-20 text-6xl group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">format_paint</span>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Success Toast (Hidden) -->
<div class="fixed top-24 transform -translate-y-20 opacity-0 transition-all duration-500 bg-tertiary text-on-tertiary px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-headline-md flex items-center gap-3 shadow-xl" id="success-message">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">check_circle</span>
            ¡Muy bien! Perfect painting!
        </div>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation / Tool Palette -->
<footer class="bg-surface-container-lowest border-t-4 border-surface-container-highest p-6 flex flex-col items-center gap-6 z-50">
<p class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface-variant uppercase tracking-widest">¡ELIGE UN COLOR!<br><span class="text-sm opacity-70">PICK A COLOR!</span></p>
<div class="flex gap-8 md:gap-16">
<!-- Green Bucket -->
<button class="group flex flex-col items-center gap-2" id="bucket-green" onclick="selectColor('#2b6c00', 'green')">
<div class="w-20 h-20 md:w-28 md:h-28 rounded-full bg-[#2b6c00] border-4 border-white shadow-xl flex items-center justify-center group-hover:scale-110 group-active:scale-95 transition-all tactile-shadow active-paint-green">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white text-4xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">format_color_fill</span>
</div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">Verde / Green</span>
</button>
<!-- White Bucket -->
<button class="group flex flex-col items-center gap-2" id="bucket-white" onclick="selectColor('#ffffff', 'white')">
<div class="w-20 h-20 md:w-28 md:h-28 rounded-full bg-white border-4 border-outline-variant shadow-xl flex items-center justify-center group-hover:scale-110 group-active:scale-95 transition-all tactile-shadow">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-surface-variant text-4xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">format_color_fill</span>
</div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">Blanco / White</span>
</button>
<!-- Red Bucket -->
<button class="group flex flex-col items-center gap-2" id="bucket-red" onclick="selectColor('#ba1a1a', 'red')">
<div class="w-20 h-20 md:w-28 md:h-28 rounded-full bg-[#ba1a1a] border-4 border-white shadow-xl flex items-center justify-center group-hover:scale-110 group-active:scale-95 transition-all tactile-shadow">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white text-4xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">format_color_fill</span>
</div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">Rojo / Red</span>
</button>
</div>
</footer>
<script>
        let currentColor = null;
        let activeColorName = null;
        const brush = document.getElementById('brush-cursor');
        
        // Track mouse movement for custom brush
        document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
            brush.style.left = (e.clientX - 10) + 'px';
            brush.style.top = (e.clientY - 40) + 'px';
        });

        function selectColor(hex, name) {
            currentColor = hex;
            activeColorName = name;
            
            // Clear previous active states
            ['green', 'white', 'red'].forEach(c => {
                document.getElementById(`bucket-${c}`).firstElementChild.classList.remove('active-paint-green', 'active-paint-white', 'active-paint-red', 'border-primary', 'border-8');
            });

            // Set current active state
            const bucket = document.getElementById(`bucket-${name}`).firstElementChild;
            bucket.classList.add(`active-paint-${name}`);
            
            // Update brush color
            brush.style.color = hex;
            if (name === 'white') brush.classList.add('drop-shadow-lg');
            else brush.classList.remove('drop-shadow-lg');
        }

        function paintSection(sectionId) {
            if (!currentColor) {
                // Shake the buckets if no color is selected
                document.querySelectorAll('footer button').forEach(b => {
                    b.animate([
                        { transform: 'translateX(0px)' },
                        { transform: 'translateX(-5px)' },
                        { transform: 'translateX(5px)' },
                        { transform: 'translateX(0px)' }
                    ], { duration: 200, iterations: 2 });
                });
                return;
            }

            const section = document.getElementById(`section-${sectionId}`);
            section.style.backgroundColor = currentColor;
            section.querySelector('span').style.display = 'none';

            // Check if win condition met
            checkWin();
        }

        function playAudio() {
            // Audio simulation visual
            const icon = document.querySelector('.animate-pulse-soft span');
            icon.innerText = 'hearing';
            setTimeout(() => icon.innerText = 'volume_up', 1500);
            
            // Interaction feedback
            console.log("Playing: México");
        }

        function checkWin() {
            const left = document.getElementById('section-left').style.backgroundColor;
            const mid = document.getElementById('section-middle').style.backgroundColor;
            const right = document.getElementById('section-right').style.backgroundColor;

            // Simplified check against standard colors (hex values might vary slightly per browser if calculated)
            // Real apps would use data attributes to track logic
            if (left && mid && right) {
                const toast = document.getElementById('success-message');
                toast.classList.remove('-translate-y-20', 'opacity-0');
                toast.classList.add('translate-y-0', 'opacity-100');
                
                setTimeout(() => {
                    toast.classList.add('-translate-y-20', 'opacity-0');
                    toast.classList.remove('translate-y-0', 'opacity-100');
                }, 3000);
            }
        }

        // Initial state
        selectColor('#2b6c00', 'green');
    </script>




</body></html>

<!-- Flag Paint Station (Mexico) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="en"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport">
<title>Flag Explorer - World Map Hub</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@300;400;500;600;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif;
            -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
            overflow: hidden; /* Prevent scrolling for the map experience */
        }

        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }

        /* Tactile Elevation Utility */
        .flat-tactile {
            box-shadow: 0 4px 0 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
        }

        .chunky-shadow-primary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #004b71;
        }

        .chunky-shadow-secondary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #d6dae1;
        }

        .chunky-shadow-tertiary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #1a4600;
        }

        .active-press:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 0px 0 0 transparent;
        }

        @keyframes pulse-ring {
            0% { transform: scale(0.8); opacity: 0.5; }
            50% { transform: scale(1.2); opacity: 0.3; }
            100% { transform: scale(0.8); opacity: 0.5; }
        }

        .animate-pulse-slow {
            animation: pulse-ring 3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1) infinite;
        }

        @keyframes float {
            0% { transform: translateY(0px) rotate(0deg); }
            50% { transform: translateY(-10px) rotate(2deg); }
            100% { transform: translateY(0px) rotate(0deg); }
        }

        .animate-float {
            animation: float 4s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        /* Custom Clip Path for speech bubble */
        .speech-bubble-tail {
            clip-path: polygon(0% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 100%, 0% 0%);
        }
    </style>
<script id="tailwind-config">
        tailwind.config = {
            darkMode: "class",
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    "colors": {
                        "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                        "on-surface": "#171c21",
                        "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                        "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                        "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                        "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                        "error": "#ba1a1a",
                        "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                        "secondary": "#735c00",
                        "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                        "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                        "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                        "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                        "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                        "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                        "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                        "on-error": "#ffffff",
                        "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                        "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                        "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                        "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                        "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                        "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                        "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                        "surface-tint": "#006495",
                        "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                        "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                        "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                        "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                        "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                        "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                        "outline": "#6e7882",
                        "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                        "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                        "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                        "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                        "primary": "#006495",
                        "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                        "background": "#f7f9ff",
                        "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                        "on-background": "#171c21",
                        "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                        "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                        "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                        "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff"
                    },
                    "borderRadius": {
                        "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                        "lg": "2rem",
                        "xl": "3rem",
                        "full": "9999px"
                    },
                    "spacing": {
                        "container-margin": "24px",
                        "touch-target-min": "48px",
                        "gutter": "16px",
                        "unit": "8px",
                        "card-padding": "20px"
                    },
                    "fontFamily": {
                        "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                        "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                        "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                        "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                        "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                        "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
                    },
                    "fontSize": {
                        "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                        "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                        "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                        "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                        "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                        "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
                    }
                },
            },
        }
    </script>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background select-none">
<!-- Top AppBar Component -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky z-50 bg-surface flex justify-between items-center px-container-margin py-unit h-touch-target-min border-b-4 border-surface-container-highest flat-tactile"><button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-container-high rounded-full active:translate-y-1 transition-transform" aria-label="Salir del quiz">
  <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[32px]">close</span>
</button><button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center text-primary hover:bg-surface-container-high rounded-full active:translate-y-1 transition-transform" aria-label="Volver al mapa">
  <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[32px]">arrow_back</span>
</button>
<div class="flex items-center gap-3">
<div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full border-2 border-primary-container overflow-hidden flex items-center justify-center bg-primary-fixed">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A colorful, circular digital badge designed for a children's educational app. The badge features a stylized golden compass rose in the center against a soft blue gradient background. 'Beginner' text is elegantly curved at the top. The visual style is playful, premium, and utilizes a glossy finish with vibrant primary colors to signify achievement." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuAkXT3jXJeW-CTpU0yXOan55dUtRJyIo6VDirxnnlQ9qAt3VaZ2Zym2q0MHu780u1tjA-WLpFPR-ruBdxpxSWNH7v2fCqyw0SjXbxjfllv5o3baWCM0XEjSrX8SPv4N6hiVYXnPtJH2syNFlLqFgGv1Wd3qmVYb5oxEhEqibihidShaueITMrEKR5DFMlkFsavqaO391zl9J1uLcBfDQlTNrU_EX8ubqojnu966CkPn7JnMixeCwRuICCtZWCGt1YzqCgv3Zvy63Fw">
</div>
<h1 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md font-bold text-primary">Explorador de Banderas</h1>
</div>
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex flex-col items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-surface-container-high text-on-surface-variant hover:scale-105 transition-transform active:translate-y-1 mr-2" title="Salir / Exit">
  <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[24px]">lock</span>
  <span class="text-[8px] font-bold uppercase leading-none">Salir</span>
</button><button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex flex-col items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container hover:scale-105 transition-transform active:translate-y-1 shadow-[0_4px_0_0_#735c00] mr-2">
  <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[24px]" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">notifications_active</span>
  <span class="text-[8px] font-bold uppercase leading-none">Alarma</span>
</button><button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-surface-container-high text-primary hover:scale-105 transition-transform active:translate-y-1 scale-110">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[32px]" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</button>
</header>
<!-- Main Map Canvas -->
<main class="relative w-full h-[calc(100vh-144px)] overflow-hidden bg-[#e0f4ff]">
<!-- Animated Background Texture -->

<!-- The Interactive Map -->
<div class="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center p-8">
<div class="relative w-full max-w-4xl aspect-[16/9] rounded-xl overflow-visible">
<!-- Map Illustration -->
<img class="w-full h-full object-contain filter drop-shadow-xl" data-alt="A whimsical and simplified world map designed for children. Continents are depicted in soft, vibrant shades of grass green and lime green, while the oceans are a calming sky blue with subtle wave patterns. The illustration style is playful and clean, featuring minimalist outlines of major world landmarks like small trees, mountains, and whales in the sea. The lighting is bright and even, creating a joyful exploration mood." data-location="World Map" src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuBCm_J63UZqrYalhJ2b50_EpBfWMUOlsz8zOYF8WZ8Vcb3Dmo5SRvYkkg3ULoyf8VgnFFiK0nucjFu7qD2l8Fbmg7j_DSFca1VcESLP_cIFH_10tua6ZaxMfO9E_gsypyfJVOC6CMKeG16o5rgW72yxTlTTc8tcZT7LyQ-FiHmvVE5LKPGU5BK-g1bXzrc_8NAsjyhcj5-A1eYYKxIqBG92s7wKe70TeP3r7kx7W04W8CFkhQRmvMROKyZj8MEdHLYYJ5Alu2qcqfE">
<!-- Mexico Highlight & Pin -->
<div class="absolute top-[42%] left-[18%] z-20 group cursor-pointer active-press">
<!-- Glowing Aura -->
<div class="absolute -inset-8 bg-primary-container opacity-30 rounded-full animate-pulse-slow"></div>
<!-- Highlighted Mexico Shape (Simplified bounding box for visual) -->
<div class="absolute -inset-4 border-4 border-white/50 rounded-lg blur-sm"></div>
<!-- Glowing Pin -->
<div class="relative flex flex-col items-center animate-float">
<div class="w-12 h-12 bg-error rounded-full border-4 border-white flex items-center justify-center shadow-xl chunky-shadow-secondary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">location_on</span>
</div>
<!-- Mexico Flag Mini Preview -->
<div class="mt-2 bg-white p-1 rounded-md shadow-lg border-2 border-primary transform -rotate-3 hover:rotate-0 transition-transform">
<img class="w-10 h-6 rounded-sm" data-alt="A vibrant and accurate depiction of the Mexican flag, showing the green, white, and red vertical stripes with the national emblem of an eagle perched on a cactus eating a snake in the center. The image is rendered as a clean, high-contrast vector icon with soft rounded corners to match a premium educational app aesthetic." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuCVDoTHfh1EDrlRFQ0X7ZyxkdqT4mRdbowpy09nbTQXWk42x--5o47JvNptDNos5bTdDwPKPRYPRI-VT28P4VSbpnGMGNzAOjKfJq587ndfX4m2yElWfEfaRXmHAEV6siGsw1u-usgqxBCJX4_yw5I7EWpS_cc0PwdnsAND-30stHxXAMrWYmg2GS6rwAvJOrhRTvQBXq_m4lhVg0cmiXR6MvrFPosfMXZ6TEvEbLtHOmfba0fYFpeL1HwdJ9M_b5odb1ugYcR0gLM">
</div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Mascot Component -->
<div class="absolute bottom-4 right-10 z-30 flex items-end gap-2 animate-float" style="animation-delay: 0.5s;">
<!-- Speech Bubble -->
<div class="mb-16 mr-[-20px] relative bg-white px-6 py-4 rounded-xl shadow-xl border-4 border-primary-container">
<p class="font-headline-md text-primary font-bold whitespace-nowrap">¡A explorar!</p>
<!-- Bubble tail -->
<div class="absolute bottom-[-16px] right-8 w-8 h-8 bg-white border-r-4 border-b-4 border-primary-container speech-bubble-tail transform rotate-45"></div>
</div>
<!-- Parrot Mascot -->
<div class="w-32 h-32 transform scale-x-[-1]">
<img class="w-full h-full object-contain" data-alt="A friendly, expressive parrot mascot named 'Paco'. Paco has bright green plumage, a cheerful yellow beak, and a small blue explorer's hat. He is pointing enthusiastically towards the center of the screen with a wing. The style is high-end 2D digital illustration with thick outlines, soft gradients, and large, kind eyes, perfectly tailored for 4-8 year old children." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuDYaYYfnH8b8yn9GkjUsm15wzicfjutMJnc0Ma1xJTn4mFSJZCJFHIrTJmxtyE2W26o1_SZyvtv1t5ePcDNg2GoU9bsm-WAUwllOu50J-s3EEjBr6I2lCWYX69UFvuc7WFkBIDrr7fSfdUcxHnLIdg-nwsnP8TiXjStrwbPt140o_c25SUFyPUrD6qGkAWu5Rp5gsPsoIhbAJZParYb2r8JZoAu2y_qg1fJUXpDw-g6J6sW-L_2rEQdNVWMzsHDdDCqEd2rsBuMjog">
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Floating Action Button (Contextual) -->
<button class="fixed bottom-24 right-container-margin z-40 bg-tertiary-container text-on-tertiary-container flex items-center gap-2 px-8 py-4 rounded-xl chunky-shadow-tertiary active-press font-label-bold text-label-bold">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[32px]">play_circle</span>
<span class="">¡A JUGAR!</span>
</button>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation Bar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-gutter pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest border-t-4 border-surface-container-highest shadow-lg rounded-t-lg"><a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant" href="#">
  <span class="material-symbols-outlined">home</span>
  <span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Home</span>
</a>
<!-- Explore (Active) -->
<button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container rounded-xl px-4 py-1 translate-y-[-4px] transition-all duration-150 active:scale-95">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explorar</span>
</button>
<!-- Passport (Inactive) -->
<button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-colors active:scale-95">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Pasaporte</span>
</button>
<!-- Play (Inactive) -->
<button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-colors active:scale-95">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Jugar</span>
</button>
</nav>
<!-- Micro-interaction Script -->
<script>
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
            const mexicoPin = document.querySelector('.group.cursor-pointer');
            mexicoPin.addEventListener('click', () => {
                // Flash effect for "Tap"
                mexicoPin.style.transform = 'scale(0.9)';
                setTimeout(() => {
                    mexicoPin.style.transform = 'scale(1)';
                    // Logic for navigation would go here
                    console.log("Navigating to Mexico detail view...");
                }, 100);
            });

            // Gentle audio icon pulse
            const volumeBtn = document.querySelector('header button');
            setInterval(() => {
                volumeBtn.classList.add('scale-110');
                setTimeout(() => volumeBtn.classList.remove('scale-110'), 200);
            }, 5000);
        });
    </script>






</body></html>

<!-- World Map Hub -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="en"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport">
<title>Flag Explorer - Mexico Celebration</title>
<!-- Google Fonts: Quicksand for kid-friendly, premium feel -->
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<!-- Material Symbols -->
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "card-padding": "20px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        
        /* Tactile Shadows */
        .btn-primary-tactile {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #004b71;
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
        }
        .btn-primary-tactile:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        
        .btn-secondary-tactile {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #bec8d3;
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
        }
        .btn-secondary-tactile:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #bec8d3;
        }

        .card-tactile {
            box-shadow: 0 8px 0 0 #dee3e9;
        }

        /* Waving Animation */
        @keyframes wave {
            0% { transform: rotate(0deg); }
            25% { transform: rotate(2deg) translateY(-2px); }
            75% { transform: rotate(-2deg) translateY(2px); }
            100% { transform: rotate(0deg); }
        }
        .animate-wave {
            animation: wave 3s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        /* Rays Background */
        .celebration-rays {
            background: radial-gradient(circle, #fccc00 0%, #ffe084 100%);
            overflow: hidden;
            position: relative;
        }
        .ray {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: 50%;
            width: 200%;
            height: 100px;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
            transform-origin: 0 50%;
            animation: rotate-rays 20s linear infinite;
        }
        @keyframes rotate-rays {
            from { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(0deg); }
            to { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(360deg); }
        }

        /* Floating Confetti */
        .confetti {
            position: absolute;
            width: 12px;
            height: 12px;
            border-radius: 2px;
            animation: fall linear infinite;
        }
        @keyframes fall {
            to { transform: translateY(100vh) rotate(720deg); }
        }

        /* Stamp Pop effect */
        @keyframes stamp-pop {
            0% { transform: scale(3) rotate(-20deg); opacity: 0; }
            80% { transform: scale(0.9) rotate(5deg); opacity: 1; }
            100% { transform: scale(1) rotate(0deg); opacity: 1; }
        }
        .animate-stamp {
            animation: stamp-pop 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275) forwards;
            animation-delay: 0.5s;
            opacity: 0;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-surface font-body-md text-on-surface min-h-screen flex flex-col overflow-x-hidden">
<!-- Top Navigation Anchor (Suppressed in transactional, but present for context) -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky z-50 bg-surface flex justify-between items-center px-container-margin py-unit h-touch-target-min border-b-4 border-surface-container-highest">
<div class="flex items-center gap-3">
<div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-primary-container flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden border-2 border-primary">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A cute, circular cartoon avatar of a young world explorer wearing a khaki hat and smiling warmly, digital art style for kids." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuDbdJvfW3devmQSNyIXe9zbiaHmLaC04EE2jKRLmkethcOWHAufBE8i7Tzh5cnMgQ8SP_9DUhLJ-kjBFpPfEPTdME_oXx0dqgwqBqPnalEDDTr2h7oBx__OaG7pH9s8alngscYJU_iRhIBIi8TnEIiOpiBkJqdDlt02qBX_EttbGc4bBAmE-_RjIdB99_XBMwjtzjj3GRwAUZUNqBRlUEjtbARPHp5l42IN7RDX6iq_CjreAVhFdt4C7SoVpvxglxw_YX9HKMlQU4c">
</div>
<span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md font-bold text-primary">Flag Explorer</span>
</div>
<button class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-secondary-container flex items-center justify-center btn-primary-tactile" style="background-color: #fccc00; box-shadow: 0 4px 0 0 #735c00;">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container">volume_up</span>
</button>
<button class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-secondary-container flex flex-col items-center justify-center btn-primary-tactile ml-2" style="background-color: rgb(252, 204, 0); box-shadow: rgb(115, 92, 0) 0px 4px 0px 0px;"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-2xl">notifications_active</span><span class="text-[8px] font-bold uppercase leading-none mt-0.5">Alarma</span></button></header>
<!-- Main Celebration Canvas -->
<main class="flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-center relative p-container-margin celebration-rays">
<!-- Animated Background Rays -->
<div class="absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none" id="rays-container"><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(0deg);"></div><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(30deg);"></div><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(60deg);"></div><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(90deg);"></div><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(120deg);"></div><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(150deg);"></div><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(180deg);"></div><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(210deg);"></div><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(240deg);"></div><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(270deg);"></div><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(300deg);"></div><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(330deg);"></div><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(0deg);"></div><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(30deg);"></div><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(60deg);"></div><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(90deg);"></div><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(120deg);"></div><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(150deg);"></div><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(180deg);"></div><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(210deg);"></div><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(240deg);"></div><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(270deg);"></div><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(300deg);"></div><div class="ray" style="transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(330deg);"></div></div>
<!-- Confetti Generator Script Container -->
