background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); top: -20px; animation-duration: 4.23805s; opacity: 0.198113;"></div></div>
<!-- Central Content Card -->
<div class="relative z-10 w-full max-w-lg flex flex-col items-center text-center">
<!-- Mascot Cheering -->
<div class="mb-4 transform hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-300">
<img class="h-40 object-contain drop-shadow-xl" data-alt="A friendly, chunky 3D cartoon blue bird mascot wearing small aviator goggles, wings spread wide in a cheering pose with a joyful expression, premium children's app aesthetic." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuCoWy-zoxoduGDtDYh-tosoCt5W3XiFWxHtHYwjjMifyhWZh8Dx2UFdXUjyRRG_9l0twz30hyOfbLIK5kHHO0qqZa0qIbSw-kRl-wVU1yLvXHfLAepCqdrL4m5Oxr1NoktzE4ndLtYQ4k9JScWusgWuDQaPykaVSiqsNktaEIg60ynnbEzcSH0uqobv5ia2q4mEw2A2cOaCdpLrxMVWDegmeBi_P0vusErakTUaqKcPrqiRLBccti1n5PmXDnRhpNgWH8KzbE3hVJg">
</div>
<!-- The Flag Hero Section -->
<div class="bg-white rounded-lg p-card-padding card-tactile mb-8 animate-wave inline-block border-2 border-surface-container-highest">
<div class="w-64 h-40 bg-white overflow-hidden rounded-md border-2 border-surface-variant flex items-center justify-center">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="The national flag of Mexico, vibrant green, white, and red vertical stripes with the national coat of arms centered, displayed in a clean, flat educational style." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuDEZ5OIuNzo550YG-prkLojh-xyGyLb0eAtRCtGTd_-PHHbhpreLhmuA8CNJ2LW7ZJASUyW8kKxirEyLjv4bk43XyirLvMR76e2tCU7eLrlOm2TyZrYDdohS49mp6-MFdwbmB_xutit8Fz6uJXkh3Fio9d79ztMcTHqweZsVB230cQl5g3gloDnOEOxxFt2i1eclE2UeCoaGgu3S1_PJeTVvAF3nGuxJ5PeTl6AiuOOvRDmmOhkoyLXkDCDfarCr8fFD7aTgshXm0s">
</div>
<h1 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile mt-4 text-primary">¡Lo lograste!<br><span class="text-body-md font-medium opacity-80">You Did It!</span></h1>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-surface-variant mt-2">¡México completado!<br><span class="text-label-bold opacity-70">Mexico is Completed!</span></p>
</div>
<!-- Passport Stamp Reward -->
<div class="relative mb-12">
<div class="animate-stamp flex flex-col items-center">
<div class="w-32 h-32 rounded-full bg-white border-8 border-tertiary-container flex flex-col items-center justify-center transform -rotate-12 shadow-2xl">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-tertiary-container text-5xl">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-tertiary-container uppercase tracking-widest mt-1">MEXICO</span>
</div>
<div class="absolute -top-4 -right-4 bg-error text-white px-3 py-1 rounded-full font-label-bold shadow-lg animate-bounce">¡NUEVO!</div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Interactive Sparkles -->
<div class="absolute top-1/2 left-1/4 animate-pulse">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-secondary-fixed text-4xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
</div>
<div class="absolute bottom-1/3 right-1/4 animate-pulse" style="animation-delay: 0.5s;">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-secondary-fixed text-3xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Action Button -->
<div class="w-full max-w-sm mt-auto z-20 pb-10">
<button class="w-full py-6 rounded-xl bg-primary text-white font-headline-md text-headline-md btn-primary-tactile flex items-center justify-center gap-4"><div class="flex flex-col items-center"><span class="">Siguiente Bandera</span><span class="text-label-bold opacity-80">Next Flag</span></div><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-4xl">arrow_forward</span></button>
<button class="w-full mt-6 py-4 rounded-xl bg-white text-primary font-body-lg text-body-lg btn-secondary-tactile border-2 border-surface-container-highest"><div class="flex flex-col items-center"><span class="">Volver al Mapa</span><span class="text-label-bold opacity-70">Back to Map</span></div></button>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Navigation suppressed per "Transactional/Success" rule -->
<script>
        // Generate Rays
        const raysContainer = document.getElementById('rays-container');
        for (let i = 0; i < 12; i++) {
            const ray = document.createElement('div');
            ray.className = 'ray';
            ray.style.transform = `translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(${i * 30}deg)`;
            raysContainer.appendChild(ray);
        }

        // Generate Confetti
        const confettiContainer = document.getElementById('confetti-container');
        const colors = ['#fccc00', '#59be1b', '#006495', '#ba1a1a', '#ffffff'];
        
        function createConfetti() {
            for (let i = 0; i < 50; i++) {
                const confetti = document.createElement('div');
                confetti.className = 'confetti';
                confetti.style.left = Math.random() * 100 + 'vw';
                confetti.style.backgroundColor = colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)];
                confetti.style.top = '-20px';
                confetti.style.animationDuration = (Math.random() * 3 + 2) + 's';
                confetti.style.opacity = Math.random();
                confettiContainer.appendChild(confetti);

                // Remove after animation
                setTimeout(() => {
                    confetti.remove();
                }, 5000);
            }
        }

        // Initial burst
        createConfetti();
        // Constant light drizzle
        setInterval(createConfetti, 4000);

        // Simple haptic-like vibration on button click (if supported)
        document.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(btn => {
            btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                if (window.navigator.vibrate) {
                    window.navigator.vibrate(50);
                }
            });
        });
    </script>




</body></html>

<!-- Celebration & Reward -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="en"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport">
<title>Flag Explorer - Quiz Review</title>
<!-- Font: Quicksand for a friendly, rounded feel -->
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@400;500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<!-- Material Symbols -->
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "card-padding": "20px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif;
            background-color: #f7f9ff;
            overflow-x: hidden;
        }

        /* Tactile Button Styles */
        .tactile-button-primary {
            @apply relative transition-all duration-100;
            background-color: #2bb1ff; /* primary-container approx or custom sky blue */
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #006495;
            border-radius: 1.5rem;
        }
        .tactile-button-primary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #006495;
        }

        .tactile-button-secondary {
            @apply relative transition-all duration-100;
            background-color: #ffffff;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #dee3e9;
            border-radius: 1.5rem;
        }
        .tactile-button-secondary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #dee3e9;
        }

        /* Correct State Highlight */
        .correct-choice {
            background-color: #92fc58 !important; /* tertiary-fixed */
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #2b6c00 !important;
            border: 4px solid #ffffff;
        }

        /* Progress Bar Animation */
        .progress-fill {
            transition: width 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1);
        }

        /* Confetti Canvas */
        #confetti-canvas {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 100;
        }

        /* Pulse for Audio Icons */
        @keyframes subtle-pulse {
            0% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); }
        }
        .pulse-audio {
            animation: subtle-pulse 2s infinite ease-in-out;
        }

        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        .fill-icon {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;
        }
    </style>
<style>
    body {
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);
    }
  </style>
  </head>
<body class="min-h-screen flex flex-col text-on-surface">
<!-- TopAppBar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky bg-surface dark:bg-on-surface border-b-4 border-surface-container-highest dark:border-outline flex justify-between items-center px-container-margin py-unit h-touch-target-min z-40">
<div class="flex items-center gap-3">
<div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-primary-container flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden border-2 border-white shadow-sm">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A cute, vibrant 3D stylized rank badge for a children's educational app. It features a friendly golden star with a explorer's hat, set against a bright blue circular background with a subtle glossy plastic texture." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuD7Wu399DNjlJUXF1oNOKlkGtsx0CqOH67L_eztVJSiWu1L0aAIFhZz52TDinorB2g-qtPE3WwK_hBhMqs5Q07KNwkcarTIP6xHTUFLMvmz3Wwrs3GplZhjvxxbeh1i6VL7hfLT5WkBsoQxVrtqhrsgdfLNzwEEjfht-xW6cGsJAAPJp1Q8uoKzaELJvMb6hZmsfz8olixXRVzlnXSXcHYtX_lvW3S4ILk-fAtJooLbnx-yrQA50E3baSavpNdtuXav4gVxjjpybj4">
</div>
<h1 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md font-bold text-primary dark:text-primary-fixed">Flag Explorer</h1>
</div>
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex flex-col items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container hover:opacity-80 transition-all active:translate-y-1 shadow-[0_4px_0_0_#6d5700] mr-2">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">notifications_active</span>
<span class="text-[8px] font-bold uppercase leading-none">¡Alarma!</span>
</button><button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center text-primary dark:text-inverse-primary hover:scale-105 transition-transform active:translate-y-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[32px]">volume_up</span>
</button>
</header>
<main class="flex-1 flex flex-col items-center px-container-margin py-8 gap-8 max-w-2xl mx-auto w-full pb-32">
<!-- Progress Bar Section -->
<div class="w-full">
<div class="flex justify-between items-end mb-2">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-primary">Question 1/10</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-tertiary">Keep going!</span>
</div>
<div class="w-full h-4 bg-surface-container-highest rounded-full overflow-hidden">
<div class="progress-fill h-full bg-tertiary-container w-[10%] rounded-full shadow-inner"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Flag Review Card -->
<div class="w-full bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-lg p-6 flex flex-col items-center gap-4 shadow-sm border border-outline-variant relative overflow-hidden">
<!-- Decorative recessed pattern -->
<div class="absolute inset-0 opacity-5 pointer-events-none" style="background-image: radial-gradient(#006495 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 16px 16px;"></div>
<div class="w-full aspect-[3/2] max-w-sm rounded-lg overflow-hidden border-4 border-white shadow-lg z-10 transition-transform duration-500 hover:scale-[1.02]">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A clean, high-resolution graphic of the national flag of France, featuring three vertical stripes of blue, white, and red. The flag is displayed with a slight fabric texture and subtle lighting to appear high-quality and professional for a children's learning interface." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuBAafoujHy4bGMWVRYEl9BZvoEUV8VQZLH2A0jDic73TgFF5jHIBHmlHF2xhLE0dBNUYqw-33jJDCPb5MfJ6JHrdZ2aCNmbi1VjNtf7jyhzYnkWwyOcML9tECZlSXtdD9i2WggvhnTNI4wqDeZJc4BIdXeTlwCEc9CBjN5n8DCvbJWAheJtpOXWZmDLLaOhJugXowqZ4s1UhUHZ8aTuWBl3VTsVu0cjApXNds8-ORTFTKBqvUm1CSQRtodzLlCIC-FOLuD1KIn1zLE">
</div>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-surface-variant z-10 text-center">Which country is this?</p>
</div>
<!-- Choice Buttons Grid -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 w-full">
<!-- Option 1: Italy -->
<button class="tactile-button-secondary w-full min-h-[96px] flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-4" onclick="handleChoice(this, false)">
<div class="flex items-center gap-6">
<div class="w-20 h-20 bg-surface-container-low rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center p-2 border border-outline-variant">
<img class="h-16 w-16 object-contain opacity-70" data-alt="A simplified, solid dark grey silhouette of Italy including Sicily and Sardinia, centered on a light, clean background. The style is minimalist and instructional, designed for easy recognition by children." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuAayUGMl4TgBIfASg2bjVzRzrrnLLvRgOxZA0iAr1GFkIGMrdgOxXAgGD_Ou0QiApBwUO9Ybfq6tMvxe64EyvoPYAjZanOV5nE59RBM0sZQLbUFc2NpobaB2lifsC8Lk0goqzdxaQM71YHEHPlhdlvT318wPKB9r3rbTaakzHac9lc1EGgjV4XXzfnrrbsR4ynGPfzfzAzuyiwrxnlItPW0wOPkXxd6gzUBRPAOI6aO_WgbGK7Z75jgWTw0sY-INt6jFh69Cl2ImXU">
</div>
</div>
<div class="w-16 h-16 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-md pulse-audio">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-4xl fill-icon">volume_up</span>
</div>
</button>
<!-- Option 2: France (Correct) -->
<button class="tactile-button-secondary w-full min-h-[96px] flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-4" onclick="handleChoice(this, true)">
<div class="flex items-center gap-6">
<div class="w-20 h-20 bg-surface-container-low rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center p-2 border border-outline-variant">
<img class="h-16 w-16 object-contain opacity-70" data-alt="A simplified, solid dark grey silhouette of mainland France, centered on a light, clean background. The shape is clear and distinct, intended for educational use in a flag quiz app for young children." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuCqd_eJ5rJJyMlFTiefuXSbRao3kJIA2ndLsTits4VRlpeb3ULSzVsb_EGwgK4DRNJ_9En_weagQTjSOAY0_TFT1HXqPwJ4aBzRElouvV4CGwT_lixSorn5ad2AVDCvKAnyV1HWE2k-Lz8gCd8hXjWBkAHmdNi0VaJ1jljWZo-vV4KZyYPeoXmlfbyDdwEe6Nq48jHvMCNk-7RyNxYDe8pEJN265Llksi1qtA7FcJr81Q_6UWM6guVfWQ4i1gpnvi-OqU_jRHq6FDQ">
</div>
</div>
<div class="w-16 h-16 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-md pulse-audio">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-4xl fill-icon">volume_up</span>
</div>
</button>
<!-- Option 3: Germany -->
<button class="tactile-button-secondary w-full min-h-[96px] flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-4" onclick="handleChoice(this, false)">
<div class="flex items-center gap-6">
<div class="w-20 h-20 bg-surface-container-low rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center p-2 border border-outline-variant">
<img class="h-16 w-16 object-contain opacity-70" data-alt="A simplified, solid dark grey silhouette of Germany, centered on a light, clean background. The visual style is iconic and instructive, ensuring a focus on the geographical shape for young learners." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuAtDuB600j3homutdJrrcucfM674nNujYejfb_vXdh-WqsTBHUD4sVtQ4wfoysGbC4YyKwCLw0OggqPLeBtr2BL9DXJuOifUw55EYBJmlGSxDP3mwzNA-VHozhb-1q5Qr0hoxYBNt7yu7sqZLpYb_UrT6b2kYZtppcmDUFF-M6MhYR2_WU947AyBnLEqNwWtcM1sVfXlmxWpKP_IgexMd_P8Bmjusu2eINSSHuShRVVC22eX8Dyj1smBDeP-yWT2Nu9Zz78LH7vAZs">
</div>
</div>
<div class="w-16 h-16 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-md pulse-audio">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-4xl fill-icon">volume_up</span>
</div>
</button>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation Shell -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-gutter pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest dark:bg-on-surface border-t-4 border-surface-container-highest dark:border-outline shadow-lg rounded-t-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-colors" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold mt-1">Explore</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-colors" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold mt-1">Passport</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container rounded-xl px-4 py-1 translate-y-[-4px] active:scale-95 transition-transform duration-150" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl fill-icon">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold mt-1">Play</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Confetti Canvas -->
<canvas id="confetti-canvas"></canvas>
<script>
        function handleChoice(button, isCorrect) {
            if (isCorrect) {
                button.classList.remove('tactile-button-secondary');
                button.classList.add('correct-choice');
                triggerConfetti();
                
                // Audio feedback (Simulation)
                const audio = new Audio(); // Placeholder for sound effect
                console.log("Playing: Francia / France!");
                
                // Vibrate if available
                if (window.navigator.vibrate) {
                    window.navigator.vibrate([100, 30, 100]);
                }

                // Wait 2 seconds then "next question"
                setTimeout(() => {
                    alert("Super! You found France! Ready for the next one?");
                    window.location.reload();
                }, 2500);
            } else {
                button.style.transform = "translateX(10px)";
                button.classList.add('bg-error-container');
                setTimeout(() => {
                    button.style.transform = "";
                    button.classList.remove('bg-error-container');
                }, 200);
            }
        }

        // Basic Confetti Implementation
        function triggerConfetti() {
            const canvas = document.getElementById('confetti-canvas');
            const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
            canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
            canvas.height = window.innerHeight;

            let particles = [];
            const colors = ['#fccc00', '#2bb1ff', '#92fc58', '#ffdad6', '#ffffff'];

            for (let i = 0; i < 150; i++) {
                particles.push({
                    x: Math.random() * canvas.width,
                    y: canvas.height + Math.random() * 100,
                    size: Math.random() * 8 + 4,
                    color: colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)],
                    speedY: Math.random() * -10 - 10,
                    speedX: Math.random() * 10 - 5,
                    rotation: Math.random() * 360,
                    rotSpeed: Math.random() * 10 - 5
                });
            }

            function animate() {
                ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
                particles.forEach((p, i) => {
                    p.y += p.speedY;
                    p.x += p.speedX;
                    p.speedY += 0.25; // Gravity
                    p.rotation += p.rotSpeed;

                    ctx.save();
                    ctx.translate(p.x, p.y);
                    ctx.rotate(p.rotation * Math.PI / 180);
                    ctx.fillStyle = p.color;
                    ctx.fillRect(-p.size / 2, -p.size / 2, p.size, p.size);
                    ctx.restore();

                    if (p.y > canvas.height + 50) {
                        particles.splice(i, 1);
                    }
                });

                if (particles.length > 0) {
                    requestAnimationFrame(animate);
                }
            }

            animate();
        }
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Quiz Phase -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport">
<title>Flag Paint Station - France</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 24;
        }
        .filled-icon {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;
        }
        
        /* Tactile Shadow Utility */
        .tactile-button-primary {
            box-shadow: 0 4px 0 0 #004b71;
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
        }
        .tactile-button-primary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 #004b71;
        }

        .tactile-button-secondary {
            box-shadow: 0 4px 0 0 #e4e8ef;
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
        }
        .tactile-button-secondary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 #e4e8ef;
        }

        .tactile-yellow {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #efc200;
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
        }
        .tactile-yellow:active {
            transform: translateY(6px);
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 #efc200;
        }

        /* Paint Bucket specific shadows */
        .bucket-blue { box-shadow: 0 8px 0 0 #004163; }
        .bucket-white { box-shadow: 0 8px 0 0 #dee3e9; }
        .bucket-red { box-shadow: 0 8px 0 0 #93000a; }
        
        .bucket-active { transform: translateY(8px); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 transparent !important; }

        @keyframes pulse-soft {
            0% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); }
        }
        .pulse-audio {
            animation: pulse-soft 2s infinite ease-in-out;
        }

        .flag-section {
            transition: background-color 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
        }
    </style>
<script id="tailwind-config">
        tailwind.config = {
          darkMode: "class",
          theme: {
            extend: {
              "colors": {
                      "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                      "outline": "#6e7882",
                      "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                      "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                      "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                      "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                      "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                      "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                      "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                      "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                      "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                      "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                      "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                      "error": "#ba1a1a",
                      "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                      "background": "#f7f9ff",
                      "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                      "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                      "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                      "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                      "primary": "#006495",
                      "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                      "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                      "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                      "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                      "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                      "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                      "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                      "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                      "on-error": "#ffffff",
                      "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                      "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                      "surface-tint": "#006495",
                      "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                      "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                      "on-surface": "#171c21",
                      "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                      "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                      "secondary": "#735c00",
                      "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                      "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                      "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                      "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                      "on-background": "#171c21",
                      "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                      "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                      "on-primary-container": "#004163"
              },
              "borderRadius": {
                      "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                      "lg": "2rem",
                      "xl": "3rem",
                      "full": "9999px"
              },
              "spacing": {
                      "unit": "8px",
                      "gutter": "16px",
                      "container-margin": "24px",
                      "touch-target-min": "48px",
                      "card-padding": "20px"
              },
              "fontFamily": {
                      "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                      "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                      "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                      "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                      "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                      "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"]
              },
              "fontSize": {
                      "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                      "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                      "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                      "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                      "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                      "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}]
              }
            },
          },
        }
      </script>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-surface font-body-md overflow-x-hidden">
<!-- Top Navigation Bar -->
<nav class="w-full top-0 sticky bg-surface flex justify-between items-center px-container-margin py-unit h-touch-target-min z-50">
<div class="flex items-center gap-3">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-[32px]">language</span>
<span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md-mobile text-primary">Explorador de Banderas</span>
</div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-2"><button class="flex items-center gap-1 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container px-4 py-2 rounded-full border-b-4 border-on-secondary-fixed-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-lg"><span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">notifications_active</span><span class="font-label-bold text-[10px] uppercase tracking-tighter">¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm</span></button>
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-surface-container-high text-on-surface-variant transition-colors active:translate-y-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[28px]">volume_up</span>
</button>
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-surface-container-high text-on-surface-variant transition-colors active:translate-y-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[28px]">close</span>
</button>
</div>
</nav>
<main class="max-w-screen-md mx-auto px-container-margin pb-32 pt-6 flex flex-col items-center">
<!-- Header Section: Country Identity -->
<div class="w-full bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-xl p-6 flex items-center justify-between shadow-sm border-2 border-surface-container-high mb-8">
<div class="flex flex-col">
<h1 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-primary leading-tight">Francia</h1>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-surface-variant">France</p>
</div>
<button class="w-20 h-20 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center tactile-yellow pulse-audio">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-[40px] filled-icon">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
<!-- Flag Canvas -->
<div class="relative w-full aspect-[3/2] max-w-[500px] bg-white rounded-lg overflow-hidden border-4 border-surface-variant shadow-lg mb-12 flex">
<!-- Blue Section -->
<div class="flag-section flex-1 bg-surface-container-low border-r-2 border-surface-container-high flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer group" id="section-blue" onclick="selectSection('blue')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-outline opacity-20 text-6xl group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">format_paint</span>
</div>
<!-- White Section (Active State Example) -->
<div class="flag-section flex-1 bg-surface-container-lowest ring-inset ring-4 ring-primary-container z-10 flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer group" id="section-white" onclick="selectSection('white')">
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-primary-container/5 pointer-events-none"></div>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary-container text-6xl pulse-audio">edit_note</span>
</div>
<!-- Red Section -->
<div class="flag-section flex-1 bg-surface-container-low border-l-2 border-surface-container-high flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer group" id="section-red" onclick="selectSection('red')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-outline opacity-20 text-6xl group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">format_paint</span>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Instructions Text -->
<div class="text-center mb-10">
<h2 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-primary tracking-wide uppercase">¡ELIGE UN COLOR!</h2>
<p class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface-variant tracking-widest uppercase">PICK A COLOR!</p>
</div>
<!-- Palette Section: Paint Buckets -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-gutter w-full">
<!-- Blue Bucket -->
<button class="flex flex-col items-center gap-3 transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1" onclick="applyColor('#006495', 'blue')">
<div class="w-24 h-24 sm:w-28 sm:h-28 bg-[#006495] rounded-full flex items-center justify-center bucket-blue border-4 border-white/20 active:translate-y-2 active:shadow-none transition-all">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white text-[32px] filled-icon">volume_up</span>
</div>
<div class="text-center">
<p class="font-label-bold text-on-surface text-sm sm:text-base">Azul</p>
<p class="font-body-md text-on-surface-variant text-xs sm:text-sm">Blue</p>
</div>
</button>
<!-- White Bucket -->
<button class="flex flex-col items-center gap-3 transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1" onclick="applyColor('#ffffff', 'white')">
<div class="w-24 h-24 sm:w-28 sm:h-28 bg-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center bucket-white border-4 border-surface-variant active:translate-y-2 active:shadow-none transition-all">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-[32px] filled-icon">volume_up</span>
</div>
<div class="text-center">
<p class="font-label-bold text-on-surface text-sm sm:text-base">Blanco</p>
<p class="font-body-md text-on-surface-variant text-xs sm:text-sm">White</p>
</div>
</button>
<!-- Red Bucket -->
<button class="flex flex-col items-center gap-3 transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1" onclick="applyColor('#ba1a1a', 'red')">
<div class="w-24 h-24 sm:w-28 sm:h-28 bg-[#ba1a1a] rounded-full flex items-center justify-center bucket-red border-4 border-white/20 active:translate-y-2 active:shadow-none transition-all">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white text-[32px] filled-icon">volume_up</span>
</div>
<div class="text-center">
<p class="font-label-bold text-on-surface text-sm sm:text-base">Rojo</p>
<p class="font-body-md text-on-surface-variant text-xs sm:text-sm">Red</p>
</div>
</button>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Navigation Bar Footer (Hidden as per Destination rule, but structure maintained if needed for game loop) -->
<div class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full flex justify-around items-center px-container-margin pb-6 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest border-t-4 border-surface-variant z-40">
<button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-xl px-gutter py-1 shadow-[0_4px_0_0_#6d5700] active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none transition-all">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[28px] filled-icon">explore</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explorar</span>
</button>
<button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant px-gutter py-1 hover:bg-surface-container-high rounded-xl transition-colors">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[28px]">import_contacts</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Pasaporte</span>
</button>
<button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant px-gutter py-1 hover:bg-surface-container-high rounded-xl transition-colors">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[28px]">sports_esports</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Jugar</span>
</button>
</div>
<script>
        let currentActiveSection = 'white';

        function selectSection(id) {
            // Remove active state from all
            document.querySelectorAll('.flag-section').forEach(el => {
                el.classList.remove('ring-4', 'ring-primary-container', 'z-10');
                const overlay = el.querySelector('.bg-primary-container\\/5');
                if (overlay) overlay.remove();
                
                // Restore generic icons
                const icon = el.querySelector('.material-symbols-outlined');
                if (icon) {
                    icon.innerText = 'format_paint';
                    icon.classList.remove('pulse-audio', 'text-primary-container');
                    icon.classList.add('text-outline', 'opacity-20');
                }
            });

            // Set active
            const target = document.getElementById('section-' + id);
            target.classList.add('ring-4', 'ring-primary-container', 'z-10');
            
            const overlay = document.createElement('div');
            overlay.className = 'absolute inset-0 bg-primary-container/5 pointer-events-none';
            target.appendChild(overlay);

            const icon = target.querySelector('.material-symbols-outlined');
            if (icon) {
                icon.innerText = 'edit_note';
                icon.classList.remove('text-outline', 'opacity-20');
                icon.classList.add('text-primary-container', 'pulse-audio');
            }

            currentActiveSection = id;
        }

        function applyColor(hex, type) {
            const section = document.getElementById('section-' + currentActiveSection);
            if (!section) return;

            // Apply background color
            section.style.backgroundColor = hex;
            
            // Success animation
            section.style.transform = 'scale(1.05)';
            setTimeout(() => {
                section.style.transform = 'scale(1)';
            }, 200);

            // Hide icon after painting
            const icon = section.querySelector('.material-symbols-outlined');
            if (icon) {
                icon.style.opacity = '0';
            }

            // Check if all colors are correct for France (Blue, White, Red)
            // This is just visual for the demo
        }
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Francia) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport">
<title>Estación de Pintura: Japón</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>

<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {

                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",

                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "card-padding": "20px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        .chunky-shadow {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }
        .active-press:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }
        .flag-circle-pulse {
            animation: pulse 2s infinite;
        }
        @keyframes pulse {
            0% { transform: scale(1); stroke-width: 2; }
            50% { transform: scale(1.02); stroke-width: 4; }
            100% { transform: scale(1); stroke-width: 2; }
        }
        .celebration-bg {
            background: radial-gradient(circle, #fccc00 0%, #ffe084 100%);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background font-body-md text-on-background min-h-screen flex flex-col overflow-hidden">
<!-- TopAppBar -->
<nav class="w-full top-0 sticky bg-surface flex justify-between items-center px-container-margin py-unit h-touch-target-min z-50">
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-headline-md" data-icon="language">language</span>
<h1 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md-mobile text-primary">Explorador de Banderas</h1>
</div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-4">
<button aria-label="Audio instructions" class="p-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high rounded-full active:translate-y-1 transition-transform">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-surface-variant" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</button>
<button aria-label="Close" class="p-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high rounded-full active:translate-y-1 transition-transform">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-surface-variant" data-icon="close">close</span>
</button>
</div>
</nav>
<!-- Main Canvas -->
<main class="flex-1 flex flex-col items-center px-container-margin py-unit gap-6 max-w-4xl mx-auto w-full">
<!-- Header Bubble -->
<header class="w-full flex justify-center mt-2">
<div class="bg-surface-container-lowest px-xl py-6 rounded-xl border-4 border-primary-container flex items-center shadow-lg gap-12">
<div class="flex flex-col">
<span class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-on-surface">Japón</span>
<span class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-outline">Japan</span>
</div>
<button class="w-16 h-16 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center border-b-8 border-on-secondary-container active-press transition-all" id="audio-name">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-headline-md" data-icon="volume_up" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</button>
<button class="w-16 h-16 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center border-b-8 border-on-secondary-container active-press transition-all group relative" id="alarm-button" aria-label="Sound Alarm"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-headline-md" data-icon="notifications_active">notifications_active</span><span class="absolute -bottom-12 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 whitespace-nowrap font-label-bold text-on-surface text-[12px] leading-tight text-center">¡Alarma!<br>Sound Alarm</span></button></div>
</header>
<!-- Flag Canvas -->
<div class="relative w-full flex-1 max-h-[400px] flex items-center justify-center mt-4">
<div class="w-full aspect-[3/2] bg-white rounded-lg border-8 border-surface-variant shadow-xl relative overflow-hidden flex items-center justify-center p-8">
<!-- Guide lines for kids -->
<div class="absolute inset-0 border-[1px] border-dashed border-outline-variant opacity-20 pointer-events-none"></div>
<!-- The Circle (Paintable Area) -->
<button class="relative z-10 w-1/2 aspect-square rounded-full border-4 border-dashed border-primary transition-all duration-500 hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 bg-surface-container-low flex items-center justify-center group" id="flag-circle">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-primary group-hover:hidden transition-opacity" id="circle-label">¡PINTA AQUÍ!</span>
<div class="absolute inset-0 rounded-full scale-0 transition-transform duration-700 bg-[#BC002D]" id="paint-fill"></div>
</button>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Instructions -->
<section class="text-center space-y-1">
<h2 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md-mobile text-primary uppercase tracking-wide">¡ELIGE UN COLOR!</h2>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-outline">PICK A COLOR!</p>
</section>
<!-- Paint Palette -->
<section class="w-full flex justify-center gap-12 pb-12">
<!-- White Paint -->
<button class="palette-item group flex flex-col items-center gap-3" data-color="white">
<div class="w-24 h-24 bg-white rounded-full border-4 border-outline-variant border-b-8 shadow-xl flex items-center justify-center active-press transition-all hover:scale-110">
<div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full border-2 border-surface-variant opacity-20"></div>
</div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface">Blanco / White</span>
</button>
<!-- Red Paint -->
<button class="palette-item group flex flex-col items-center gap-3" data-color="red">
<div class="w-24 h-24 bg-[#BC002D] rounded-full border-4 border-[#8B0000] border-b-8 shadow-xl flex items-center justify-center active-press transition-all hover:scale-110 ring-8 ring-transparent group-[.selected]:ring-secondary-container">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white text-headline-md opacity-0 group-[.selected]:opacity-100" data-icon="brush">brush</span>
</div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface">Rojo / Red</span>
</button>
</section>
</main>
<!-- Celebration Modal (Hidden by default) -->
<div class="fixed inset-0 z-[100] celebration-bg hidden flex-col items-center justify-center p-container-margin text-center" id="celebration">
<div class="relative">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[120px] text-white animate-bounce" data-icon="star" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-white opacity-20 blur-3xl animate-pulse"></div>
</div>
<h2 class="font-headline-lg text-headline-lg text-white mt-8">¡EXCELENTE!</h2>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-secondary-container mt-2">The flag of Japan is complete!</p>
<button class="mt-12 bg-white text-primary font-headline-md px-12 py-4 rounded-full border-b-8 border-surface-variant active-press transition-all" id="btn-next">
            ¡Siguiente!
        </button>
</div>
<script>
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
            const circle = document.getElementById('flag-circle');
            const paintFill = document.getElementById('paint-fill');
            const circleLabel = document.getElementById('circle-label');
            const paletteItems = document.querySelectorAll('.palette-item');
            const celebration = document.getElementById('celebration');
            const btnNext = document.getElementById('btn-next');
            
            let selectedColor = null;

            paletteItems.forEach(item => {
                item.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    // Visual feedback for selection
                    paletteItems.forEach(p => p.classList.remove('selected'));
                    item.classList.add('selected');
                    selectedColor = item.getAttribute('data-color');
                    
                    // Simple haptic-like effect
                    item.style.transform = 'scale(0.9)';
                    setTimeout(() => item.style.transform = '', 100);
                });
            });

            circle.addEventListener('click', () => {
                if (selectedColor === 'red') {
                    // Correct!
                    paintFill.classList.remove('scale-0');
                    paintFill.classList.add('scale-100');
                    circleLabel.style.display = 'none';
                    circle.classList.remove('border-dashed', 'border-primary');
                    circle.classList.add('border-transparent');
                    
                    // Trigger success
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        celebration.classList.remove('hidden');
                        celebration.classList.add('flex');
                    }, 800);
                } else if (selectedColor === 'white') {
                    // Already white, maybe a giggle or hint?
                    circle.style.animation = 'none';
                    circle.offsetHeight; // trigger reflow
                    circle.classList.add('shake');
                    // Simple shake class added via script if needed or inline
                    circle.style.transition = '0.1s';
                    circle.style.marginLeft = '10px';
                    setTimeout(() => circle.style.marginLeft = '-10px', 50);
                    setTimeout(() => circle.style.marginLeft = '0', 100);
                } else {
                    // No color selected hint
                    circle.classList.add('flag-circle-pulse');
                }
            });

            btnNext.addEventListener('click', () => {
                location.reload(); // Restart for demo
            });

            // Audio button visual feedback
            const audioBtn = document.getElementById('audio-name');
            audioBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                audioBtn.classList.add('scale-110');
                setTimeout(() => audioBtn.classList.remove('scale-110'), 200);
            });
        });
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Japón) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport">
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                "outline": "#6e7882",
                "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                "error": "#ba1a1a",
                "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                "background": "#f7f9ff",
                "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                "primary": "#006495",
                "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                "on-error": "#ffffff",
                "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                "surface-tint": "#006495",
                "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                "on-surface": "#171c21",
                "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                "secondary": "#735c00",
                "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                "on-background": "#171c21",
                "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                "on-primary-container": "#004163"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                "lg": "2rem",
                "xl": "3rem",
                "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                "unit": "8px",
                "gutter": "16px",
                "container-margin": "24px",
                "touch-target-min": "48px",
                "card-padding": "20px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        body { font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; }
        
        .tactile-button {
            transition: transform 0.1s ease, box-shadow 0.1s ease;
        }
        .tactile-button:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: none !important;
        }

        .flag-section {
            transition: background-color 0.3s ease;
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        .bucket-selected {
            transform: scale(1.1) translateY(-8px);
            outline: 4px solid #006495;
            outline-offset: 4px;
        }

        @keyframes pulse-yellow {
            0% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); }
        }
        .pulse-audio {
            animation: pulse-yellow 2s infinite ease-in-out;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background min-h-screen flex flex-col overflow-x-hidden">
<!-- Top Navigation Bar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky bg-surface flex justify-between items-center px-container-margin py-unit h-touch-target-min z-50">
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary" data-icon="language">language</span>
<h1 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md-mobile text-primary">Explorador de Banderas</h1>
</div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-4"><button class="tactile-button p-2 rounded-full bg-secondary-container shadow-[0_4px_0_0_#6d5700] hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-colors flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-w-[64px]"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-[24px]" data-icon="notifications_active">notifications_active</span><div class="flex flex-col items-center -mt-1"><span class="text-[8px] font-bold text-on-secondary-container uppercase leading-none">¡Alarma!</span><span class="text-[8px] font-bold text-on-secondary-container uppercase leading-none">Alarm</span></div></button>
<button class="tactile-button p-2 rounded-full hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-colors">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-[32px]" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</button>
<button class="tactile-button p-2 rounded-full hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-colors">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-surface-variant text-[32px]" data-icon="close">close</span>
</button>
</div>
</header>
<main class="flex-grow flex flex-col items-center px-container-margin py-unit space-y-6 pb-32">
<!-- Header Section: Country Label -->
<div class="w-full max-w-md bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-xl p-card-padding shadow-[0_6px_0_0_#eaeef5] border-2 border-surface-variant flex items-center justify-between">
<div class="flex flex-col">
<span class="font-headline-lg text-headline-lg-mobile text-on-surface">Italia</span>
<span class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-outline">Italy</span>
</div>
<button class="pulse-audio tactile-button w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min rounded-full bg-secondary-container shadow-[0_4px_0_0_#6d5700] flex items-center justify-center" onclick="playAudio('italia')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
<!-- Center Section: The Flag Silhouette -->
<div class="relative w-full max-w-lg aspect-[3/2] bg-surface-container-highest rounded-lg border-[6px] border-on-surface overflow-hidden shadow-[0_12px_0_0_#dee3e9]">
<div class="flex h-full w-full">
<!-- Section 1 (Left) - Green -->
<div class="flag-section flex-1 bg-white border-r-4 border-on-surface flex items-center justify-center group" id="section-0" onclick="paintSection(0)">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-surface-variant opacity-30 text-[48px] group-hover:scale-125 transition-transform" data-icon="format_paint">format_paint</span>
</div>
<!-- Section 2 (Middle) - White -->
<div class="flag-section flex-1 bg-white border-r-4 border-on-surface flex items-center justify-center group" id="section-1" onclick="paintSection(1)">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-surface-variant opacity-30 text-[48px] group-hover:scale-125 transition-transform" data-icon="format_paint">format_paint</span>
</div>
<!-- Section 3 (Right) - Red -->
<div class="flag-section flex-1 bg-white flex items-center justify-center group" id="section-2" onclick="paintSection(2)">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-surface-variant opacity-30 text-[48px] group-hover:scale-125 transition-transform" data-icon="format_paint">format_paint</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Instructions Text -->
<div class="text-center space-y-1">
<h2 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-primary tracking-wide">¡ELIGE UN COLOR!</h2>
<p class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-outline">PICK A COLOR!</p>
</div>
<!-- Palette Section: Paint Buckets -->
<div class="w-full flex justify-center gap-4 md:gap-8 flex-wrap">
<!-- Green Bucket -->
<button class="tactile-button flex flex-col items-center gap-2 group" onclick="selectColor('green', this)">
<div class="w-24 h-24 rounded-full bg-[#009246] border-4 border-on-surface shadow-[0_8px_0_0_#006431] flex items-center justify-center">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white text-[40px]" data-icon="brush">brush</span>
</div>
<div class="text-center">
<div class="font-label-bold text-on-surface">Verde</div>
<div class="text-[12px] font-bold text-outline uppercase">Green</div>
</div>
</button>
<!-- White Bucket -->
<button class="tactile-button flex flex-col items-center gap-2 group" onclick="selectColor('white', this)">
<div class="w-24 h-24 rounded-full bg-[#ffffff] border-4 border-on-surface shadow-[0_8px_0_0_#dee3e9] flex items-center justify-center">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-surface-variant text-[40px]" data-icon="brush">brush</span>
</div>
<div class="text-center">
<div class="font-label-bold text-on-surface">Blanco</div>
<div class="text-[12px] font-bold text-outline uppercase">White</div>
</div>
</button>
<!-- Red Bucket -->
<button class="tactile-button flex flex-col items-center gap-2 group" onclick="selectColor('red', this)">
<div class="w-24 h-24 rounded-full bg-[#ce2b37] border-4 border-on-surface shadow-[0_8px_0_0_#8c1d25] flex items-center justify-center">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white text-[40px]" data-icon="brush">brush</span>
</div>
<div class="text-center">
<div class="font-label-bold text-on-surface">Rojo</div>
<div class="text-[12px] font-bold text-outline uppercase">Red</div>
</div>
</button>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation Bar (Fixed) -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full flex justify-around items-center px-container-margin pb-6 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest border-t-4 border-surface-variant shadow-lg z-50">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant px-gutter py-1 hover:bg-surface-container-high rounded-xl transition-all" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="explore">explore</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explorar</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-xl px-gutter py-1 shadow-[0_4px_0_0_#6d5700] translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="import_contacts">import_contacts</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Pasaporte</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant px-gutter py-1 hover:bg-surface-container-high rounded-xl transition-all" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="sports_esports">sports_esports</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Jugar</span>
</a>
</nav>
<script>
        let currentColor = null;
        const colorMap = {
            'green': '#009246',
            'white': '#ffffff',
            'red': '#ce2b37'
        };

        function selectColor(color, element) {
            currentColor = colorMap[color];
            
            // UI Feedback for selection
            document.querySelectorAll('.tactile-button').forEach(btn => {
                btn.classList.remove('bucket-selected');
            });
            element.classList.add('bucket-selected');
            
            // Audio feedback
            playAudio(color);
        }

        function paintSection(index) {
            if (!currentColor) {
                alert("¡Elige un color primero! / Pick a color first!");
                return;
            }
            
            const section = document.getElementById(`section-${index}`);
            section.style.backgroundColor = currentColor;
            
            // Hide the paint icon once colored
            const icon = section.querySelector('span');
            if (icon) icon.style.display = 'none';

            // Check if win condition
            checkWin();
        }

        function checkWin() {
            const s0 = document.getElementById('section-0').style.backgroundColor;
            const s1 = document.getElementById('section-1').style.backgroundColor;
            const s2 = document.getElementById('section-2').style.backgroundColor;

            // Simple check for hex values or rgb strings
            const isGreen = s0.includes('rgb(0, 146, 70)') || s0 === 'rgb(0, 146, 70)';
            const isWhite = s1.includes('rgb(255, 255, 255)') || s1 === 'rgb(255, 255, 255)';
            const isRed = s2.includes('rgb(206, 43, 55)') || s2 === 'rgb(206, 43, 55)';

            if (isGreen && isWhite && isRed) {
                setTimeout(() => {
                    alert("¡Excelente! ¡Has pintado la bandera de Italia! 🇮🇹");
                }, 300);
            }
        }

        function playAudio(term) {
            // Placeholder for text-to-speech or audio clips
            console.log("Playing audio for: " + term);
        }
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Brasil) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport">
<title>Explorador de Banderas - Brasil</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "gutter": "16px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        body { font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; }
        .material-symbols-outlined { font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48; }
        
        .chunky-button-primary {
            @apply transition-all duration-75 active:translate-y-1;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        .chunky-button-primary:active { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 #004b71; }

        .chunky-button-secondary {
            @apply transition-all duration-75 active:translate-y-1;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 0 0 #bec8d3;
        }
        .chunky-button-secondary:active { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 #bec8d3; }

        .chunky-bucket {
            @apply transition-all duration-100 active:scale-95;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 0 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }

        .pulse-audio {
            animation: pulse-ring 2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1) infinite;
        }
        @keyframes pulse-ring {
            0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
            50% { transform: scale(1.1); opacity: 0.8; }
        }

        .canvas-area {
            background-image: radial-gradient(#dee3e9 1px, transparent 1px);
            background-size: 20px 20px;
        }

        .flag-path { transition: fill 0.3s ease; fill: #ffffff; stroke: #3e4851; stroke-width: 2; }
        .selected-color-outline { outline: 4px solid #2bb1ff; outline-offset: 4px; }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-surface text-on-surface min-h-screen flex flex-col overflow-hidden">
<!-- TopAppBar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky bg-surface flex justify-between items-center px-container-margin py-unit h-touch-target-min z-50">
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-headline-md-mobile" data-icon="language">language</span>
<h1 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md-mobile text-primary">Explorador de Banderas</h1>
</div>
<button aria-label="Ajustes de sonido" class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-surface-container-high rounded-full active:translate-y-1 transition-transform">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</button>
<button aria-label="¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm" class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-full active:translate-y-1 transition-transform shadow-[0_2px_0_0_#6d5700] ml-2" onclick="playAudio('¡Alarma! Sound Alarm')"><span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="notifications_active">notifications_active</span></button></header>
<!-- Main Content: Flag Station -->
<main class="flex-1 flex flex-col items-center px-container-margin py-unit overflow-y-auto pb-32">
<!-- Header Section -->
<div class="w-full flex flex-col items-center mb-6">
<div class="flex items-center gap-4">
<div class="text-center">
<h2 class="font-headline-lg text-headline-lg-mobile text-on-background m-0">Brasil</h2>
<p class="font-body-md text-body-md text-on-surface-variant opacity-70">Brazil</p>
</div>
<button class="pulse-audio w-[64px] h-[64px] bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center chunky-button-secondary border-4 border-white" onclick="playAudio('Brasil, Brazil')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-[32px]" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Interactive Flag Canvas -->
<div class="w-full max-w-[500px] aspect-[3/2] bg-white rounded-lg p-card-padding shadow-inner relative canvas-area border-4 border-surface-container-highest flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden">
<svg class="w-full h-full drop-shadow-lg" id="flag-svg" viewBox="0 0 300 200">
<!-- Green Field (Background) -->
<rect class="flag-path cursor-pointer" height="200" id="part-green" onclick="paintPart('part-green')" width="300" x="0" y="0"></rect>
<!-- Yellow Rhombus -->
<polygon class="flag-path cursor-pointer" id="part-yellow" onclick="paintPart('part-yellow')" points="150,20 280,100 150,180 20,100"></polygon>
<!-- Blue Circle -->
<circle class="flag-path cursor-pointer" cx="150" cy="100" id="part-blue" onclick="paintPart('part-blue')" r="45"></circle>
</svg>
<!-- Guide Overlay -->
<div class="absolute pointer-events-none border-4 border-dashed border-primary/40 rounded-xl px-6 py-4 bg-white/80 animate-bounce" id="paint-hint">
<p class="font-label-bold text-primary flex items-center gap-2">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="brush">brush</span>
                    ¡PINTA AQUÍ!
                </p>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Palette Section -->
<div class="w-full mt-auto pt-8 flex flex-col items-center">
<p class="font-label-bold text-on-surface-variant mb-4">ELIGE UN COLOR</p>
<div class="flex justify-center gap-gutter w-full overflow-x-auto py-2">
<!-- Color: Verde -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
<button class="color-bucket w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-[#009739] border-4 border-white chunky-bucket flex items-center justify-center text-white" onclick="selectColor('#009739', this, 'Verde, Green')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[32px]" data-icon="format_paint">format_paint</span>
</button>
<div class="flex items-center gap-1 bg-surface-container-high rounded-full px-3 py-1">
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">Verde</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[18px] text-primary" data-icon="volume_up" style="font-size: 16px;">volume_up</span>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Color: Amarillo -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
<button class="color-bucket w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-[#fedf00] border-4 border-white chunky-bucket flex items-center justify-center text-on-secondary-container" onclick="selectColor('#fedf00', this, 'Amarillo, Yellow')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[32px]" data-icon="format_paint">format_paint</span>
</button>
<div class="flex items-center gap-1 bg-surface-container-high rounded-full px-3 py-1">
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">Amarillo</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[18px] text-primary" data-icon="volume_up" style="font-size: 16px;">volume_up</span>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Color: Azul -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
<button class="color-bucket w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-[#012169] border-4 border-white chunky-bucket flex items-center justify-center text-white" onclick="selectColor('#012169', this, 'Azul, Blue')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[32px]" data-icon="format_paint">format_paint</span>
</button>
<div class="flex items-center gap-1 bg-surface-container-high rounded-full px-3 py-1">
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">Azul</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[18px] text-primary" data-icon="volume_up" style="font-size: 16px;">volume_up</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</main>
<!-- BottomNavBar -->
