<nav class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full flex justify-around items-center px-container-margin pb-6 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest border-t-4 border-surface-variant shadow-lg z-50 rounded-t-lg">
<button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant px-gutter py-1 hover:bg-surface-container-high rounded-full">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="explore">explore</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explorar</span>
</button>
<button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-xl px-gutter py-1 shadow-[0_4px_0_0_#6d5700] active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none transition-all duration-75">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="import_contacts">import_contacts</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Pasaporte</span>
</button>
<button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant px-gutter py-1 hover:bg-surface-container-high rounded-full">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="sports_esports">sports_esports</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Jugar</span>
</button>
</nav>
<script>
        let currentColor = null;

        function selectColor(color, element, audioText) {
            currentColor = color;
            
            // UI Feedback for selection
            document.querySelectorAll('.color-bucket').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('selected-color-outline'));
            element.classList.add('selected-color-outline');
            
            // Remove the paint hint once a color is selected
            const hint = document.getElementById('paint-hint');
            if (hint) hint.classList.add('hidden');
            
            // Audio Feedback
            playAudio(audioText);
        }

        function paintPart(id) {
            if (!currentColor) {
                playAudio("¡Elige un color primero!");
                return;
            }
            const part = document.getElementById(id);
            part.style.fill = currentColor;
            
            // Add a little pop animation
            part.classList.add('animate-ping');
            setTimeout(() => part.classList.remove('animate-ping'), 150);

            checkFlagCompletion();
        }

        function playAudio(text) {
            // In a real app, this would trigger TTS or play a pre-recorded file.
            // For now, we'll use a console log to simulate.
            console.log("Playing Audio: " + text);
            
            // Visual feedback for non-readers
            const speakerIcon = document.querySelector('.pulse-audio');
            speakerIcon.classList.add('scale-125');
            setTimeout(() => speakerIcon.classList.remove('scale-125'), 200);
        }

        function checkFlagCompletion() {
            const green = document.getElementById('part-green').style.fill;
            const yellow = document.getElementById('part-yellow').style.fill;
            const blue = document.getElementById('part-blue').style.fill;

            // Simplified check for hex/rgb equivalence
            if (green.includes('0, 151, 57') && yellow.includes('254, 223, 0') && blue.includes('1, 33, 105')) {
                setTimeout(() => {
                    alert("¡Excelente! Has pintado la bandera de Brasil correctamente.");
                }, 500);
            }
        }
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (España) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport">
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<!-- CSS for tactile interactions and children's UI patterns -->
<style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif;
            -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
            overflow-x: hidden;
        }
        
        .tactile-button {
            transition: transform 0.1s ease, box-shadow 0.1s ease;
        }
        
        .tactile-button:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: none !important;
        }

        .flag-stripe {
            transition: background-color 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275);
        }

        .pulse-animation {
            animation: pulse-ring 2s infinite;
        }

        @keyframes pulse-ring {
            0% { transform: scale(0.95); opacity: 1; }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); opacity: 0.8; }
            100% { transform: scale(0.95); opacity: 1; }
        }

        .canvas-area {
            cursor: url('https://fonts.gstatic.com/s/i/materialsymbolsoutlined/brush/v1/24px.svg'), auto;
        }

        /* Material Symbols Weight Fix */
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        .filled-icon {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
    </style>
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "gutter": "16px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
</head>
<body class="bg-surface text-on-surface flex flex-col min-h-screen">
<!-- Top App Bar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky z-40 bg-surface dark:bg-on-background flex justify-between items-center px-container-margin py-unit h-touch-target-min">
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary dark:text-primary-container" style="font-size: 32px;">language</span>
<h1 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md-mobile text-primary dark:text-primary-container">Explorador de Banderas</h1>
</div>
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container rounded-full shadow-[0_4px_0_0_#6d5700] tactile-button">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container">volume_up</span>
</button>
<button class="flex items-center gap-2 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container px-4 py-2 rounded-full shadow-[0_4px_0_0_#6d5700] tactile-button ml-2">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-size: 24px;">notifications_active</span>
<div class="flex flex-col items-start leading-none">
<span class="text-xs font-label-bold">¡Alarma!</span>
<span class="text-[10px] opacity-70">Sound Alarm</span>
</div>
</button></header>
<main class="flex-grow px-container-margin py-unit flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-6">
<!-- Header Section -->
<div class="text-center flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
<div class="flex items-center gap-3">
<h2 class="font-headline-lg text-headline-lg-mobile text-on-surface">España</h2>
<button class="w-14 h-14 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-[0_4px_0_0_#6d5700] tactile-button pulse-animation" onclick="playAudio('Spain')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined filled-icon text-on-secondary-container" style="font-size: 32px;">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
<p class="font-body-lg text-on-surface-variant opacity-70">Spain</p>
</div>
<!-- Interactive Flag Canvas -->
<div class="relative w-full max-w-md aspect-[3/2] bg-white rounded-lg shadow-xl border-4 border-surface-container-highest overflow-hidden flex flex-col" id="flag-container">
<!-- Top Stripe -->
<div class="flag-stripe flex-1 border-b-2 border-surface-container-high bg-surface-container-lowest flex items-center justify-center transition-all" id="stripe-top">
<span class="text-on-surface-variant font-label-bold opacity-30 select-none">PINTA AQUÍ</span>
</div>
<!-- Middle Stripe (Double width) -->
<div class="flag-stripe flex-[2] relative flex items-center justify-center bg-surface-container-lowest" id="stripe-middle">
<!-- Coat of Arms Outline Placeholder -->
<div class="absolute left-12 w-20 h-24 border-2 border-dashed border-outline-variant rounded-md opacity-40 flex items-center justify-center">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-outline-variant" style="font-size: 32px;">shield</span>
</div>
<!-- Interactive Hint -->
<div class="border-2 border-dashed border-primary px-6 py-2 rounded-full bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-sm z-10 animate-bounce">
<span class="font-label-bold text-primary">¡PINTA AQUÍ!</span>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Bottom Stripe -->
<div class="flag-stripe flex-1 border-t-2 border-surface-container-high bg-surface-container-lowest flex items-center justify-center transition-all" id="stripe-bottom">
<span class="text-on-surface-variant font-label-bold opacity-30 select-none">PINTA AQUÍ</span>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Color Palette -->
<div class="w-full flex justify-center gap-8 py-4">
<!-- Red Bucket -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-3">
<button class="group relative w-24 h-24 rounded-full bg-[#E62E00] border-[6px] border-white shadow-[0_8px_0_0_#991F00] tactile-button" id="btn-red" onclick="selectColor('red')">
<div class="absolute -top-2 -right-2 bg-secondary-container w-10 h-10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-md border-2 border-white">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-sm">volume_up</span>
</div>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white text-4xl group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">brush</span>
</button>
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface">Rojo</span>
</div>
<!-- Yellow Bucket -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-3">
<button class="group relative w-24 h-24 rounded-full bg-[#FFD700] border-[6px] border-white shadow-[0_8px_0_0_#CCAC00] tactile-button" id="btn-yellow" onclick="selectColor('yellow')">
<div class="absolute -top-2 -right-2 bg-secondary-container w-10 h-10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-md border-2 border-white">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-sm">volume_up</span>
</div>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white text-4xl group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">brush</span>
</button>
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface">Amarillo</span>
</div>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation Bar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full z-50 bg-surface-container-lowest dark:bg-inverse-surface border-t-4 border-surface-variant dark:border-on-surface-variant shadow-lg px-container-margin pb-6 pt-2 flex justify-around items-center">
<!-- Explorar (Active) -->
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container dark:bg-secondary text-on-secondary-container dark:text-on-secondary rounded-xl px-gutter py-1 shadow-[0_4px_0_0_#6d5700] transition-all duration-75 active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined filled-icon" style="font-size: 28px;">explore</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explorar</span>
</a>
<!-- Pasaporte -->
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant dark:text-surface-variant px-gutter py-1 hover:bg-surface-container-high dark:hover:bg-on-surface-variant rounded-xl transition-all" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-size: 28px;">import_contacts</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Pasaporte</span>
</a>
<!-- Jugar -->
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant dark:text-surface-variant px-gutter py-1 hover:bg-surface-container-high dark:hover:bg-on-surface-variant rounded-xl transition-all" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-size: 28px;">sports_esports</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Jugar</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Celebration Modal (Hidden by default) -->
<div class="fixed inset-0 z-[100] hidden flex items-center justify-center bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-md" id="celebration">
<div class="relative w-80 aspect-square bg-surface rounded-xl flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-card-padding text-center shadow-2xl border-4 border-primary">
<div class="absolute inset-0 overflow-hidden rounded-xl">
<div class="w-full h-full opacity-20 bg-[radial-gradient(circle,theme(colors.secondary-container)_0%,transparent_70%)] animate-pulse"></div>
</div>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-tertiary-container filled-icon mb-4" style="font-size: 80px;">verified</span>
<h3 class="font-headline-lg text-on-surface mb-2">¡Excelente!</h3>
<p class="font-body-md text-on-surface-variant">Has pintado la bandera de España.</p>
<button class="mt-6 px-8 py-3 bg-primary text-on-primary rounded-full font-label-bold shadow-[0_4px_0_0_#004b71] tactile-button" onclick="closeCelebration()">¡Siguiente!</button>
</div>
</div>
<script>
        let currentColor = null;
        let paintedState = {
            top: false,
            middle: false,
            bottom: false
        };

        function selectColor(color) {
            currentColor = color;
            
            // Visual feedback for selected brush
            document.querySelectorAll('button[id^="btn-"]').forEach(btn => {
                btn.style.transform = 'scale(1)';
                btn.style.boxShadow = '0 8px 0 0 ' + (btn.id === 'btn-red' ? '#991F00' : '#CCAC00');
            });
            
            const selectedBtn = document.getElementById(`btn-${color}`);
            selectedBtn.style.transform = 'scale(1.1)';
            selectedBtn.style.boxShadow = '0 4px 0 0 ' + (color === 'red' ? '#991F00' : '#CCAC00');

            // Audio feedback placeholder
            const audioText = color === 'red' ? 'Rojo, Red' : 'Amarillo, Yellow';
            console.log(`Playing audio: ${audioText}`);
        }

        function playAudio(term) {
            console.log(`Playing audio for: ${term}`);
            // Here we would trigger the actual audio source
        }

        const stripes = {
            'stripe-top': 'red',
            'stripe-middle': 'yellow',
            'stripe-bottom': 'red'
        };

        Object.keys(stripes).forEach(id => {
            const el = document.getElementById(id);
            el.addEventListener('click', () => {
                if (!currentColor) {
                    alert("¡Primero elige un color!");
                    return;
                }

                if (currentColor === stripes[id]) {
                    el.classList.remove('bg-surface-container-lowest');
                    el.style.backgroundColor = currentColor === 'red' ? '#E62E00' : '#FFD700';
                    el.querySelector('span')?.remove();
                    el.querySelector('div')?.classList.remove('animate-bounce');
                    el.querySelector('div')?.remove();
                    
                    if(id === 'stripe-top') paintedState.top = true;
                    if(id === 'stripe-middle') paintedState.middle = true;
                    if(id === 'stripe-bottom') paintedState.bottom = true;
                    
                    checkCompletion();
                } else {
                    // Wrong color shake
                    el.classList.add('animate-shake');
                    setTimeout(() => el.classList.remove('animate-shake'), 500);
                }
            });
        });

        function checkCompletion() {
            if (paintedState.top && paintedState.middle && paintedState.bottom) {
                setTimeout(() => {
                    document.getElementById('celebration').classList.remove('hidden');
                }, 500);
            }
        }

        function closeCelebration() {
            document.getElementById('celebration').classList.add('hidden');
            // Reset for demo or navigate
        }
    </script>
<style>
        @keyframes shake {
            0%, 100% { transform: translateX(0); }
            25% { transform: translateX(-10px); }
            75% { transform: translateX(10px); }
        }
        .animate-shake {
            animation: shake 0.2s cubic-bezier(.36,.07,.19,.97) both;
        }
    </style>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Canadá) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport">
<title>Flag Paint Station - Canadá</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@400;500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "card-padding": "20px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-red {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #93000a;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-white {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #bec8d3;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-yellow {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #a38900;
        }
        .flag-canvas-inner {
            box-shadow: inset 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
        }
        @keyframes pulse-soft {
            0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
        }
        .animate-pulse-soft {
            animation: pulse-soft 2s infinite ease-in-out;
        }
        .paint-active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: none !important;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background font-body-md text-on-background min-h-screen pb-24 select-none">
<!-- TopAppBar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky z-40 bg-background border-b-4 border-surface-container-highest flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit">
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center hover:opacity-80 active:translate-y-1 transition-all text-primary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-3xl">arrow_back</span>
</button>
<div class="flex flex-col">
<h1 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-primary">España / Spain</h1>
</div>
</div>
<button class="flex items-center gap-1 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container px-4 py-2 rounded-full chunky-shadow-yellow active:translate-y-1 transition-all mr-2"><span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">notifications_active</span><span class="font-label-bold text-[10px] uppercase tracking-tighter">¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm</span></button><button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container chunky-shadow-yellow active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none transition-all">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">volume_up</span>
</button>
</header>
<main class="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-container-margin pt-unit space-y-8">
<!-- Hero Section -->
<section class="text-center space-y-2 mt-4">
<div class="inline-flex items-center gap-4">
<h2 class="font-headline-lg text-headline-lg text-on-background">Canadá</h2>
<button class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container flex items-center justify-center chunky-shadow-yellow animate-pulse-soft">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-outline">Canada</p>
</section>
<!-- Flag Painting Canvas -->
<section class="relative bg-white rounded-lg p-card-padding border-2 border-outline-variant flag-canvas-inner">
<div class="aspect-[2/1] w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto relative overflow-hidden rounded-md border border-surface-variant bg-surface-container-low group cursor-crosshair" id="canvas-container">
<!-- Blank Flag Template -->
<div class="absolute inset-0 flex">
<div class="h-full w-1/4 transition-colors duration-300 border-r border-surface-variant/20" id="stripe-left"></div>
<div class="h-full w-1/2 transition-colors duration-300 flex items-center justify-center" id="stripe-center">
<!-- Maple Leaf Silhouette -->
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[12rem] md:text-[18rem] text-surface-variant transition-colors duration-300" id="leaf-icon" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">1k</span>
<!-- Fallback if icon font doesn't have maple leaf glyph -->
<div class="hidden" id="leaf-fallback">
<svg class="w-48 h-48 fill-current text-surface-variant" viewBox="0 0 100 100">
<path d="M50 5 L55 25 L75 20 L70 40 L90 45 L75 55 L85 75 L65 70 L55 90 L50 75 L45 90 L35 70 L15 75 L25 55 L10 45 L30 40 L25 20 L45 25 Z"></path>
</svg>
</div>
</div>
<div class="h-full w-1/4 transition-colors duration-300 border-l border-surface-variant/20" id="stripe-right"></div>
</div>
<!-- Interaction Prompt Overlay (Hidden on first click) -->
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-white/40 flex items-center justify-center pointer-events-none transition-opacity" id="instruction-overlay">
<div class="bg-white/90 px-6 py-3 rounded-full shadow-lg border-2 border-primary animate-bounce">
<p class="font-label-bold text-primary flex items-center gap-2">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">format_paint</span>
                           ¡Pinta la bandera!
                       </p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>
<!-- Palette & Tools -->
<section class="flex flex-col items-center gap-6">
<h3 class="font-label-bold text-outline uppercase tracking-widest">Elige un color</h3>
<div class="flex flex-wrap justify-center gap-6">
<!-- Color: Rojo -->
<button class="color-btn group flex flex-col items-center gap-2" onclick="selectColor('red', this)">
<div class="w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-error chunky-shadow-red flex items-center justify-center transition-all group-active:translate-y-1 group-active:shadow-none">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white text-3xl hidden check">check</span>
</div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-error">Rojo</span>
</button>
<!-- Color: Blanco -->
<button class="color-btn group flex flex-col items-center gap-2" onclick="selectColor('white', this)">
<div class="w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-white border-2 border-surface-container-highest chunky-shadow-white flex items-center justify-center transition-all group-active:translate-y-1 group-active:shadow-none">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-outline text-3xl hidden check">check</span>
</div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-outline">Blanco</span>
</button>
<!-- Tool: Reset -->
<button class="group flex flex-col items-center gap-2" onclick="resetCanvas()">
<div class="w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-surface-container-high border-2 border-surface-variant chunky-shadow-white flex items-center justify-center transition-all group-active:translate-y-1 group-active:shadow-none">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-surface-variant text-3xl">restart_alt</span>
</div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">Borrar</span>
</button>
</div>
</section>
<!-- Fun Fact Card -->
<section class="bg-primary-container/20 rounded-lg p-card-padding border-2 border-dashed border-primary-container flex items-start gap-4">
<div class="bg-primary text-white p-3 rounded-full shrink-0">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-3xl">lightbulb</span>
</div>
<div>
<h4 class="font-headline-md text-primary">¿Sabías que...?</h4>
<p class="font-body-md text-on-primary-container">La hoja de arce en el centro de la bandera es el símbolo nacional de Canadá. ¡Hay muchos árboles de arce allí!</p>
</div>
</section>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation Shell -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-touch-target-min flex justify-around items-center px-gutter pb-2 bg-surface shadow-lg border-t-4 border-surface-container-highest z-50 rounded-t-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant px-4 py-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-transform duration-150 active:scale-95" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">explore</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explorar</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container rounded-xl px-4 py-2 translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-150 active:scale-95" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Pasaporte</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant px-4 py-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-transform duration-150 active:scale-95" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">videogame_asset</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Jugar</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Success Modal (Hidden by default) -->
<div class="fixed inset-0 z-[100] hidden flex items-center justify-center p-container-margin" id="success-modal">
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-on-background/60 backdrop-blur-sm"></div>
<div class="relative bg-white rounded-lg p-8 w-full max-w-md text-center space-y-6 chunky-shadow-yellow border-4 border-secondary-container overflow-hidden">
<!-- Background Rays Effect -->
<div class="absolute inset-0 -z-10 opacity-10 animate-spin" style="background: repeating-conic-gradient(from 0deg, transparent 0deg 20deg, #fccc00 20deg 40deg); animation-duration: 20s;"></div>
<div class="w-24 h-24 bg-secondary-container rounded-full mx-auto flex items-center justify-center shadow-inner">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-6xl text-on-secondary-container" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
</div>
<div class="space-y-2">
<h2 class="font-headline-lg text-headline-lg text-primary">¡Increíble!</h2>
<p class="font-body-lg text-on-surface">Has pintado la bandera de Canadá perfectamente.</p>
</div>
<button class="w-full py-4 bg-primary text-white rounded-full font-headline-md chunky-shadow-red active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none transition-all" onclick="closeModal()">
                Siguiente País
            </button>
</div>
</div>
<script>
        let currentColor = null;
        let paintedParts = { left: false, right: false, center: false, leaf: false };

        function selectColor(color, btn) {
            currentColor = color;
            
            // UI Feedback for button selection
            document.querySelectorAll('.color-btn .check').forEach(el => el.classList.add('hidden'));
            document.querySelectorAll('.color-btn > div').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('paint-active'));
            
            btn.querySelector('.check').classList.remove('hidden');
            btn.querySelector('div').classList.add('paint-active');

            // Play a soft sound effect (simulated)
            console.log("Color selected: " + color);
        }

        // Add interaction to canvas parts
        const parts = {
            'stripe-left': document.getElementById('stripe-left'),
            'stripe-right': document.getElementById('stripe-right'),
            'leaf-icon': document.getElementById('leaf-icon'),
            'stripe-center': document.getElementById('stripe-center')
        };

        Object.keys(parts).forEach(id => {
            parts[id].addEventListener('click', () => {
                if (!currentColor) {
                    alert("¡Primero elige un color!");
                    return;
                }

                // Hide instruction overlay
                document.getElementById('instruction-overlay').style.opacity = '0';

                const colorValue = currentColor === 'red' ? '#ba1a1a' : '#ffffff';
                
                if (id === 'leaf-icon') {
                    parts[id].style.color = colorValue;
                    if(currentColor === 'red') paintedParts.leaf = true;
                } else {
                    parts[id].style.backgroundColor = colorValue;
                    if(id === 'stripe-left' && currentColor === 'red') paintedParts.left = true;
                    if(id === 'stripe-right' && currentColor === 'red') paintedParts.right = true;
                    if(id === 'stripe-center' && currentColor === 'white') paintedParts.center = true;
                }

                checkCompletion();
            });
        });

        function resetCanvas() {
            parts['stripe-left'].style.backgroundColor = 'transparent';
            parts['stripe-right'].style.backgroundColor = 'transparent';
            parts['stripe-center'].style.backgroundColor = 'transparent';
            parts['leaf-icon'].style.color = '';
            paintedParts = { left: false, right: false, center: false, leaf: false };
            document.getElementById('instruction-overlay').style.opacity = '1';
        }

        function checkCompletion() {
            if (paintedParts.left && paintedParts.right && paintedParts.center && paintedParts.leaf) {
                setTimeout(() => {
                    document.getElementById('success-modal').classList.remove('hidden');
                }, 500);
            }
        }

        function closeModal() {
            document.getElementById('success-modal').classList.add('hidden');
            resetCanvas();
        }
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Alemania) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport">
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script id="tailwind-config">
        tailwind.config = {
            darkMode: "class",
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    "colors": {
                        "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                        "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                        "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                        "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                        "error": "#ba1a1a",
                        "secondary": "#735c00",
                        "primary": "#006495",
                        "on-background": "#171c21",
                        "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                        "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                        "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                        "background": "#f7f9ff",
                        "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                        "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                        "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                        "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                        "on-surface": "#171c21",
                        "surface-tint": "#006495",
                        "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                        "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                        "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                        "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                        "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                        "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                        "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                        "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                        "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                        "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                        "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                        "on-error": "#ffffff",
                        "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                        "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                        "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                        "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                        "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                        "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                        "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                        "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                        "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                        "outline": "#6e7882",
                        "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                        "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                        "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                        "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                        "surface": "#f7f9ff"
                    },
                    "borderRadius": {
                        "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                        "lg": "2rem",
                        "xl": "3rem",
                        "full": "9999px"
                    },
                    "spacing": {
                        "touch-target-min": "48px",
                        "gutter": "16px",
                        "unit": "8px",
                        "container-margin": "24px",
                        "card-padding": "20px"
                    },
                    "fontFamily": {
                        "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                        "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                        "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                        "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                        "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                        "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"]
                    },
                    "fontSize": {
                        "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                        "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                        "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                        "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                        "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                        "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}]
                    }
                },
            },
        }
    </script>
<style>
        .tactile-shadow-primary {
            box-shadow: 0 4px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        .tactile-shadow-primary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 0px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        .tactile-shadow-secondary {
            box-shadow: 0 4px 0 0 #bec8d3;
        }
        .tactile-shadow-secondary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 0px 0 0 #bec8d3;
        }
        .audio-pulse {
            animation: pulse 2s infinite;
        }
        @keyframes pulse {
            0% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(252, 204, 0, 0.7); }
            70% { transform: scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 0 0 10px rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
        }
        .paint-stripe {
            transition: background-color 0.3s ease;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .color-bubble {
            transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275);
        }
        .color-bubble:active {
            transform: scale(0.9) translateY(4px);
        }
        .selected-color {
            outline: 6px solid #2bb1ff;
            outline-offset: 4px;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background font-body-md text-on-surface min-h-screen pb-32">
<!-- TopAppBar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky z-50 bg-background border-b-4 border-surface-container-highest flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit">
<div class="flex items-center gap-4">
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:opacity-80 active:translate-y-1 transition-all text-primary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-3xl">arrow_back</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-primary">España / Spain</h1>
</div>
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:opacity-80 active:translate-y-1 transition-all text-primary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-3xl">volume_up</span>
</button>
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container tactile-shadow-secondary hover:opacity-80 active:translate-y-1 transition-all" title="¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-3xl">notifications_active</span>
</button></header>
<main class="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-container-margin py-unit">
<!-- Title & Subtitle Section -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center mt-6 text-center">
<div class="flex items-center gap-3">
<h2 class="font-headline-lg text-headline-lg text-on-background">Alemania</h2>
<button class="audio-pulse w-12 h-12 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center tactile-shadow-secondary" onclick="playAudio('Alemania')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-2 mt-1">
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-surface-variant">Germany</p>
<button class="w-10 h-10 bg-surface-variant rounded-full flex items-center justify-center opacity-80" onclick="playAudio('Germany')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-surface-variant text-xl">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Canvas Container -->
<div class="mt-10 bg-white rounded-lg p-card-padding border-4 border-surface-container-highest shadow-sm relative overflow-hidden">
<div class="aspect-[5/3] w-full flex flex-col border-2 border-outline-variant rounded-md overflow-hidden bg-surface-container-low" id="flag-canvas">
<!-- Three horizontal stripes -->
<div class="paint-stripe flex-1 border-b-2 border-dashed border-outline-variant flex items-center justify-center group" id="stripe-0" onclick="paintStripe(0)">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-outline-variant opacity-20 group-hover:opacity-50 text-4xl">format_paint</span>
</div>
<div class="paint-stripe flex-1 border-b-2 border-dashed border-outline-variant flex items-center justify-center group" id="stripe-1" onclick="paintStripe(1)">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-outline-variant opacity-20 group-hover:opacity-50 text-4xl">format_paint</span>
</div>
<div class="paint-stripe flex-1 flex items-center justify-center group" id="stripe-2" onclick="paintStripe(2)">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-outline-variant opacity-20 group-hover:opacity-50 text-4xl">format_paint</span>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Instructions Overlay (Optional/Decorative) -->
<div class="absolute top-4 right-4 flex gap-2">
<span class="px-4 py-1 bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container rounded-full font-label-bold text-label-bold">Pinta la Bandera!</span>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Palette Selector -->
<div class="mt-12 flex flex-col items-center">
<p class="font-label-bold text-label-bold mb-6 text-on-surface-variant uppercase tracking-widest">Elige un Color / Choose a Color</p>
<div class="flex flex-wrap justify-center gap-8">
<!-- Black -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-3">
<button class="color-bubble w-20 h-20 bg-[#171c21] rounded-full tactile-shadow-secondary border-4 border-white" id="btn-negro" onclick="selectColor('#171c21', 'Negro', 'Black', this)"></button>
<div class="flex items-center gap-1">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Negro</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-sm cursor-pointer" onclick="playAudio('Negro')">volume_up</span>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Red -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-3">
<button class="color-bubble w-20 h-20 bg-[#ba1a1a] rounded-full tactile-shadow-secondary border-4 border-white" id="btn-rojo" onclick="selectColor('#ba1a1a', 'Rojo', 'Red', this)"></button>
<div class="flex items-center gap-1">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Rojo</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-sm cursor-pointer" onclick="playAudio('Rojo')">volume_up</span>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Yellow/Gold -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-3">
<button class="color-bubble w-20 h-20 bg-[#fccc00] rounded-full tactile-shadow-secondary border-4 border-white" id="btn-amarillo" onclick="selectColor('#fccc00', 'Amarillo', 'Yellow', this)"></button>
<div class="flex items-center gap-1">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Amarillo</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-sm cursor-pointer" onclick="playAudio('Amarillo')">volume_up</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Reset Button -->
<div class="mt-12 flex justify-center">
<button class="px-8 py-4 bg-white text-primary font-label-bold text-label-bold rounded-xl tactile-shadow-secondary flex items-center gap-2" onclick="resetFlag()">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">restart_alt</span>
                Limpiar / Reset
            </button>
</div>
</main>
<!-- BottomNavBar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-touch-target-min flex justify-around items-center px-gutter pb-2 bg-surface border-t-4 border-surface-container-highest shadow-lg z-50 rounded-t-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant px-4 py-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-transform duration-150 active:scale-95" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">explore</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explorar</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container rounded-xl px-4 py-2 translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-150 active:scale-95" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Pasaporte</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant px-4 py-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-transform duration-150 active:scale-95" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">videogame_asset</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Jugar</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Success Modal (Hidden by default) -->
<div class="fixed inset-0 z-[100] hidden flex items-center justify-center p-6" id="success-modal">
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-primary/40 backdrop-blur-sm"></div>
<div class="relative bg-white w-full max-w-sm rounded-xl p-8 flex flex-col items-center text-center tactile-shadow-primary border-4 border-primary">
<div class="w-24 h-24 bg-tertiary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-6">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white text-6xl">star</span>
</div>
<h3 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-on-background mb-2">¡Excelente!</h3>
<p class="font-body-md text-body-md text-on-surface-variant mb-6">Has pintado la bandera de Alemania perfectamente.</p>
<button class="w-full py-4 bg-primary text-white font-label-bold text-label-bold rounded-xl tactile-shadow-primary uppercase" onclick="closeModal()">Continuar</button>
</div>
</div>
<script>
        let currentColor = null;
        let stripeState = [null, null, null];
        const correctFlag = ['#171c21', '#ba1a1a', '#fccc00'];

        function selectColor(hex, es, en, btn) {
            currentColor = hex;
            
            // Remove selection from all bubbles
            document.querySelectorAll('.color-bubble').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('selected-color'));
            // Add to active
            btn.classList.add('selected-color');

            // Feedback sound simulation
            console.log(`Color selected: ${es} / ${en}`);
        }

        function paintStripe(index) {
            if (!currentColor) {
                alert("Primero elige un color de la paleta.");
                return;
            }

            const stripe = document.getElementById(`stripe-${index}`);
            stripe.style.backgroundColor = currentColor;
            stripe.innerHTML = ""; // Remove the icon
            stripe.classList.remove('group');
            
            stripeState[index] = currentColor;

            checkWin();
        }

        function checkWin() {
            const isCorrect = stripeState.every((color, index) => color === correctFlag[index]);
            if (isCorrect) {
                setTimeout(() => {
                    document.getElementById('success-modal').classList.remove('hidden');
                    playAudio('Success');
                }, 500);
            }
        }

        function resetFlag() {
            stripeState = [null, null, null];
            for(let i=0; i<3; i++) {
                const stripe = document.getElementById(`stripe-${i}`);
                stripe.style.backgroundColor = "";
                stripe.innerHTML = `<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-outline-variant opacity-20 group-hover:opacity-50 text-4xl">format_paint</span>`;
                stripe.classList.add('group');
            }
        }

        function closeModal() {
            document.getElementById('success-modal').classList.add('hidden');
            resetFlag();
        }

        function playAudio(label) {
            // Simplified feedback for prototype
            const synth = window.speechSynthesis;
            const utter = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(label);
            utter.lang = label === 'Alemania' || label === 'Negro' || label === 'Rojo' || label === 'Amarillo' ? 'es-ES' : 'en-US';
            synth.speak(utter);
        }
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Egipto) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport">
<title>Flag Paint Station - Egipto</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@400;500;600;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "card-padding": "20px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        body { font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; background-color: #f7f9ff; }
        .material-symbols-outlined { font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 24; }
        
        /* Tactical Shadows for chunky buttons */
        .chunky-button-red {
            background-color: #ba1a1a;
            border-bottom: 6px solid #8c1111;
        }
        .chunky-button-white {
            background-color: #ffffff;
            border-bottom: 6px solid #dee3e9;
        }
        .chunky-button-black {
            background-color: #171c21;
            border-bottom: 6px solid #000000;
        }
        .chunky-button-audio {
            background-color: #fccc00;
            border-bottom: 6px solid #c9a300;
        }
        .active-press:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            border-bottom-width: 0px;
        }

        /* Drawing States */
        .stripe-target {
            transition: background-color 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        .pulse-audio {
            animation: pulse-ring 2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1) infinite;
        }

        @keyframes pulse-ring {
            0% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); opacity: 0.8; }
            100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
        }

        /* Confetti effect for success */
        .confetti {
            position: absolute;
            width: 10px;
            height: 10px;
            background-color: #fccc00;
            opacity: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="min-h-screen flex flex-col pb-24 overflow-x-hidden">
<!-- Top App Bar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky bg-background border-b-4 border-surface-container-highest flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit z-50">
<button aria-label="Go back" class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-size: 32px;">arrow_back</span>
</button>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center">
<h1 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-primary">España / Spain</h1>
</div>
<button aria-label="Settings" class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-size: 32px;">volume_up</span>
</button>
<button aria-label="Sound Alarm" class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center text-secondary active:translate-y-1 transition-all" title="¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm"><span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-size: 32px;">notifications_active</span></button></header>
<main class="flex-grow container mx-auto px-container-margin py-unit flex flex-col items-center gap-unit max-w-2xl">
<!-- Header Content -->
<div class="w-full flex justify-between items-end mt-4 mb-2">
<div class="flex flex-col">
<h2 class="font-headline-lg text-headline-lg text-on-background">Egipto</h2>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-outline">Egypt</p>
</div>
<div class="flex gap-4">
<button class="chunky-button-audio active-press w-16 h-16 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center pulse-audio" onclick="playAudio('es')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white" style="font-size: 36px; font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</button>
<button class="chunky-button-audio active-press w-16 h-16 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center" onclick="playAudio('en')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white" style="font-size: 36px; font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">translate</span>
</button>
</div>
</div>
<!-- The Flag Canvas (Interactive) -->
<div class="relative w-full aspect-[3/2] bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg border-4 border-surface-container-highest overflow-hidden flex flex-col p-1" id="flag-canvas">
<!-- Top Stripe -->
<div class="stripe-target flex-1 w-full bg-surface-container-low cursor-pointer flex items-center justify-center border-b-2 border-surface-variant" id="stripe-top" onclick="paintStripe('top')">
<span class="text-outline font-label-bold opacity-30 select-none">TOQUE PARA PINTAR</span>
</div>
<!-- Middle Stripe with Eagle -->
<div class="stripe-target flex-1 w-full bg-surface-container-low cursor-pointer relative flex items-center justify-center border-b-2 border-surface-variant" id="stripe-middle" onclick="paintStripe('middle')">
<div class="w-24 h-24 z-10 opacity-40 grayscale contrast-125">
<img class="w-full h-full object-contain" data-alt="A bold, stylized golden eagle emblem of Saladin, the national symbol of Egypt, presented as a clear black-and-white vector outline with thick strokes suitable for a children's educational app. The icon is centered, majestic, and easily recognizable, appearing as a transparent silhouette waiting to be revealed." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuCBkavufG_VEGMdHYt_g6_uV84WfvVBSLfKfNMsV8baLT7KssJ1-oeFhui5gyqWUf0dj0FRolishJmDTz5UE92fra5iKkcHaTdfGx0CRHrrHSgBK0VIErl5BHE_JDG58YrCUAiUa3GazTJ_Sv8MqU3IQi3ddDEuXGpHB3ulP6KK7pDDQIjfGDhivyM3roGeK09Tka_VRN62DxG7vvUxfx_1MIRPPxffpcx9Ebwyg7RswO2igLAIBwthUGZ7-KQPik0bw2diEXNBCec">
</div>
<span class="absolute text-outline font-label-bold opacity-30 select-none">TOQUE PARA PINTAR</span>
</div>
<!-- Bottom Stripe -->
<div class="stripe-target flex-1 w-full bg-surface-container-low cursor-pointer flex items-center justify-center" id="stripe-bottom" onclick="paintStripe('bottom')">
<span class="text-outline font-label-bold opacity-30 select-none">TOQUE PARA PINTAR</span>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Instruction Text -->
<div class="bg-primary-fixed rounded-lg p-card-padding w-full mt-4 flex items-center gap-4">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-primary-fixed-variant" style="font-size: 40px;">palette</span>
<p class="font-body-md text-on-primary-fixed-variant flex-1 leading-tight">
                ¡Pinta la bandera de Egipto con los colores correctos! Selecciona un color y toca una franja.
            </p>
</div>
<!-- Palette Section -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-6 w-full mt-6 h-32">
<button class="chunky-button-red active-press rounded-lg flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-1 group" id="color-red" onclick="selectColor('red')">
<div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full border-2 border-white mb-1 shadow-inner"></div>
<span class="text-white font-label-bold">Rojo</span>
</button>
<button class="chunky-button-white active-press rounded-lg flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-1 group" id="color-white" onclick="selectColor('white')">
<div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full border-2 border-surface-variant mb-1 shadow-inner"></div>
<span class="text-primary font-label-bold">Blanco</span>
</button>
<button class="chunky-button-black active-press rounded-lg flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-1 group" id="color-black" onclick="selectColor('black')">
<div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full border-2 border-outline mb-1 shadow-inner"></div>
<span class="text-white font-label-bold">Negro</span>
</button>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation Bar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-touch-target-min flex justify-around items-center px-gutter pb-2 bg-surface shadow-lg border-t-4 border-surface-container-highest z-50 rounded-t-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant px-4 py-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-transform duration-150 active:scale-95" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">explore</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explorar</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container rounded-xl px-6 py-2 translate-y-1 shadow-md" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Pasaporte</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant px-4 py-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-transform duration-150 active:scale-95" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">videogame_asset</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Jugar</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Overlay Celebration (Hidden by default) -->
<div class="fixed inset-0 z-[100] hidden flex items-center justify-center bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm p-container-margin" id="celebration">
<div class="bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-xl p-8 w-full max-w-sm flex flex-col items-center text-center shadow-2xl relative overflow-hidden">
<div class="absolute inset-0 opacity-10 pointer-events-none">

</div>
<div class="w-32 h-32 mb-6 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-secondary text-7xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
</div>
<h3 class="font-headline-lg text-primary mb-2">¡Excelente!</h3>
<p class="font-body-lg text-on-surface-variant mb-8">Has completado la bandera de Egipto perfectamente.</p>
<button class="bg-primary text-white font-label-bold text-label-bold px-10 py-4 rounded-full shadow-lg active:scale-95 transition-transform" onclick="resetPainting()">
                Jugar de Nuevo
            </button>
</div>
</div>
<script>
        let selectedColor = null;
        const correctFlag = {
            top: 'red',
            middle: 'white',
            bottom: 'black'
        };
        let currentFlag = {
            top: null,
            middle: null,
            bottom: null
        };

        const colorMap = {
            red: '#ba1a1a',
            white: '#ffffff',
            black: '#171c21'
        };

        function selectColor(color) {
            selectedColor = color;
            
            // Visual feedback on selection
            document.querySelectorAll('[id^="color-"]').forEach(btn => {
                btn.classList.remove('scale-110', 'ring-4', 'ring-primary-container');
            });
            document.getElementById(`color-${color}`).classList.add('scale-110', 'ring-4', 'ring-primary-container');
        }

        function paintStripe(stripeId) {
            if (!selectedColor) {
                alert("¡Primero elige un color de la paleta!");
                return;
            }

            const element = document.getElementById(`stripe-${stripeId}`);
            element.style.backgroundColor = colorMap[selectedColor];
            element.querySelector('span').classList.add('hidden');
            
            if (stripeId === 'middle' && selectedColor === 'white') {
                element.querySelector('div').classList.remove('opacity-40', 'grayscale');
                element.querySelector('div').classList.add('opacity-100');
            } else if (stripeId === 'middle') {
                element.querySelector('div').classList.add('opacity-40', 'grayscale');
            }

            currentFlag[stripeId] = selectedColor;
            checkWin();
        }

        function checkWin() {
            if (currentFlag.top === correctFlag.top && 
                currentFlag.middle === correctFlag.middle && 
                currentFlag.bottom === correctFlag.bottom) {
                
                setTimeout(() => {
                    document.getElementById('celebration').classList.remove('hidden');
                    document.getElementById('celebration').classList.add('flex');
                }, 500);
            }
        }

        function resetPainting() {
            document.getElementById('celebration').classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('celebration').classList.remove('flex');
            
            ['top', 'middle', 'bottom'].forEach(id => {
                const el = document.getElementById(`stripe-${id}`);
                el.style.backgroundColor = '';
                el.querySelector('span').classList.remove('hidden');
                currentFlag[id] = null;
            });
            
            const middleImg = document.getElementById('stripe-middle').querySelector('div');
            middleImg.classList.add('opacity-40', 'grayscale');
            
            selectedColor = null;
            document.querySelectorAll('[id^="color-"]').forEach(btn => {
                btn.classList.remove('scale-110', 'ring-4', 'ring-primary-container');
            });
        }

        function playAudio(lang) {
            // Simplified feedback for audio
            const text = lang === 'es' ? "Egipto" : "Egypt";
            console.log("Playing audio for: " + text);
            
            const btn = event.currentTarget;
            btn.classList.add('scale-90');
            setTimeout(() => btn.classList.remove('scale-90'), 200);
        }
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Australia) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport">
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@400;500;600;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "card-padding": "20px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        body { font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; }
        .chunky-button { transition: all 0.1s ease; border-bottom-width: 4px; }
        .chunky-button:active { transform: translateY(4px); border-bottom-width: 0px; }
        .flag-path { transition: fill 0.3s ease; cursor: pointer; stroke: #bec8d3; stroke-width: 2; }
        .audio-pulse { animation: pulse 2s infinite; }
        @keyframes pulse {
            0% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); }
        }
        .canvas-bg { background-image: radial-gradient(#dee3e9 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 20px 20px; }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-surface min-h-screen flex flex-col overflow-x-hidden">
<!-- Top App Bar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky bg-background dark:bg-on-background border-b-4 border-surface-container-highest dark:border-inverse-surface z-50">
<div class="flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit w-full">
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center text-primary dark:text-primary-fixed-dim hover:opacity-80 active:translate-y-1 transition-all">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-headline-lg-mobile">arrow_back</span>
</button>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center">
<h1 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-primary dark:text-primary-fixed-dim">Australia</h1>
<span class="font-body-md text-body-md text-on-surface-variant">Australia</span>
</div>
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container rounded-full shadow-sm text-on-secondary-container hover:opacity-80 active:translate-y-1 transition-all mr-2" id="alarm-btn"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-headline-md">notifications_active</span><div class="absolute -bottom-8 flex flex-col items-center whitespace-nowrap"><span class="text-[10px] font-label-bold uppercase">¡Alarma!</span><span class="text-[8px] opacity-70">Sound Alarm</span></div></button><button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container rounded-full shadow-sm text-on-secondary-container hover:opacity-80 active:translate-y-1 transition-all audio-pulse" id="audio-main">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-headline-md">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</header>
<main class="flex-grow flex flex-col items-center px-container-margin pt-unit pb-32 canvas-bg">
<!-- Instructional Header -->
<div class="w-full max-w-lg mb-gutter text-center">
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-surface-variant mb-unit">¡Pinta la bandera! <span class="block text-body-md opacity-60">Paint the flag!</span></p>
</div>
<!-- Interactive Flag Canvas -->
<div class="w-full max-w-2xl bg-white rounded-lg shadow-xl p-unit border-4 border-surface-container-highest relative aspect-[2/1] flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden">
<svg class="w-full h-full drop-shadow-md" id="australia-flag-svg" viewBox="0 0 1200 600">
<!-- Main Blue Field -->
<rect class="flag-path" data-region="field" fill="#f7f9ff" height="600" width="1200" x="0" y="0"></rect>
<!-- Union Jack Area -->
<g id="union-jack" transform="scale(0.5)">
<rect class="flag-path" data-region="uj-bg" fill="#ffffff" height="600" width="1200"></rect>
<path class="flag-path" d="M0,0 L1200,600 M1200,0 L0,600" data-region="uj-cross-diag-bg" fill="none" stroke="#bec8d3" stroke-width="120"></path>
<path class="flag-path" d="M0,0 L1200,600 M1200,0 L0,600" data-region="uj-cross-diag" fill="none" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="80"></path>
<path class="flag-path" d="M600,0 V600 M0,300 H1200" data-region="uj-cross-main-bg" fill="none" stroke="#bec8d3" stroke-width="200"></path>
<path class="flag-path" d="M600,0 V600 M0,300 H1200" data-region="uj-cross-main" fill="none" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="120"></path>
</g>
