<!-- Federation Star -->
<path class="flag-path" d="M300,340 l18,54 l57,-3 l-36,44 l40,41 l-55,-13 l-24,51 l-18,-54 l-57,3 l36,-44 l-40,-41 l55,13 z" data-region="star-federation" fill="#ffffff"></path>
<!-- Southern Cross -->
<g id="southern-cross">
<path class="flag-path" d="M900,100 l9,27 l28,-2 l-18,22 l20,20 l-27,-6 l-12,25 l-9,-27 l-28,2 l18,-22 l-20,-20 l27,6 z" data-region="star-gamma" fill="#ffffff"></path>
<path class="flag-path" d="M900,450 l9,27 l28,-2 l-18,22 l20,20 l-27,-6 l-12,25 l-9,-27 l-28,2 l18,-22 l-20,-20 l27,6 z" data-region="star-alpha" fill="#ffffff"></path>
<path class="flag-path" d="M1050,250 l9,27 l28,-2 l-18,22 l20,20 l-27,-6 l-12,25 l-9,-27 l-28,2 l18,-22 l-20,-20 l27,6 z" data-region="star-beta" fill="#ffffff"></path>
<path class="flag-path" d="M750,230 l9,27 l28,-2 l-18,22 l20,20 l-27,-6 l-12,25 l-9,-27 l-28,2 l18,-22 l-20,-20 l27,6 z" data-region="star-delta" fill="#ffffff"></path>
<path class="flag-path" d="M950,300 l6,18 l19,-1 l-12,15 l13,13 l-18,-4 l-8,17 l-6,-18 l-19,1 l12,-15 l-13,-13 l18,4 z" data-region="star-epsilon" fill="#ffffff"></path>
</g>
</svg>
</div>
<!-- Color Palette Station -->
<div class="mt-xl w-full max-w-lg grid grid-cols-3 gap-gutter">
<!-- Azul -->
<button class="flex flex-col items-center gap-unit" onclick="selectColor('#001e30', 'azul')">
<div class="w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-[#00008b] border-b-8 border-[#000055] chunky-button flex items-center justify-center ring-offset-4 ring-primary" id="palette-azul">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white text-headline-md opacity-0 check-mark">check</span>
</div>
<div class="text-center">
<p class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface">Azul</p>
<p class="text-xs text-on-surface-variant font-medium">Blue</p>
</div>
</button>
<!-- Blanco -->
<button class="flex flex-col items-center gap-unit" onclick="selectColor('#ffffff', 'blanco')">
<div class="w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-white border-b-8 border-outline-variant chunky-button flex items-center justify-center" id="palette-blanco">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-headline-md opacity-0 check-mark">check</span>
</div>
<div class="text-center">
<p class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface">Blanco</p>
<p class="text-xs text-on-surface-variant font-medium">White</p>
</div>
</button>
<!-- Rojo -->
<button class="flex flex-col items-center gap-unit" onclick="selectColor('#ba1a1a', 'rojo')">
<div class="w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-[#ff0000] border-b-8 border-[#93000a] chunky-button flex items-center justify-center" id="palette-rojo">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white text-headline-md opacity-0 check-mark">check</span>
</div>
<div class="text-center">
<p class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface">Rojo</p>
<p class="text-xs text-on-surface-variant font-medium">Red</p>
</div>
</button>
</div>
<!-- Action Tools -->
<div class="mt-xl flex gap-gutter">
<button class="chunky-button px-gutter py-unit bg-surface-container-highest border-b-4 border-outline-variant rounded-lg flex items-center gap-2 font-label-bold text-on-surface-variant" id="reset-btn">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">restart_alt</span>
                Reiniciar
            </button>
<button class="chunky-button px-xl py-unit bg-tertiary-container border-b-4 border-tertiary text-on-tertiary-container rounded-lg flex items-center gap-2 font-label-bold" id="finish-btn">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">auto_awesome</span>
                ¡Listo!
            </button>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-touch-target-min flex justify-around items-center px-gutter pb-2 bg-surface shadow-lg border-t-4 border-surface-container-highest z-50 rounded-t-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant dark:text-outline px-4 py-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-transform duration-150 active:scale-95" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">explore</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-[10px] uppercase mt-1">Explorar</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant dark:text-outline px-4 py-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-transform duration-150 active:scale-95" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-[10px] uppercase mt-1">Pasaporte</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-primary-container dark:bg-on-primary-fixed-variant text-on-primary-container dark:text-primary-fixed rounded-xl px-4 py-2 translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-150 active:scale-95" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">videogame_asset</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-[10px] uppercase mt-1">Jugar</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Success Modal (Hidden by default) -->
<div class="fixed inset-0 z-[100] hidden flex items-center justify-center bg-white/90" id="celebration">
<div class="text-center animate-bounce">
<div class="relative inline-block">
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-secondary-fixed blur-3xl opacity-50 scale-150"></div>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[120px] text-secondary relative z-10" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">workspace_premium</span>
</div>
<h2 class="font-headline-lg text-headline-lg text-on-background mt-4">¡Increíble!</h2>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-surface-variant">Has pintado la bandera de Australia</p>
<button class="mt-xl chunky-button px-xl py-4 bg-primary text-on-primary border-b-8 border-on-primary-fixed-variant rounded-xl font-headline-md" onclick="location.reload()">
                Jugar de Nuevo
            </button>
</div>
</div>
<script>
        let currentColor = null;
        let colorName = '';

        function selectColor(color, name) {
            currentColor = color;
            colorName = name;
            
            // UI Feedback for palette
            document.querySelectorAll('.check-mark').forEach(el => el.classList.add('opacity-0'));
            document.querySelectorAll('.chunky-button').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('ring-4'));
            
            const selectedPalette = document.getElementById(`palette-${name}`);
            selectedPalette.querySelector('.check-mark').classList.remove('opacity-0');
            selectedPalette.classList.add('ring-4');

            // Play simulated audio
            console.log(`Audio: ${name}`);
        }

        document.querySelectorAll('.flag-path').forEach(region => {
            region.addEventListener('click', function() {
                if(currentColor) {
                    this.setAttribute('fill', currentColor);
                    this.style.stroke = 'transparent';
                    
                    // Simple logic for checking if Union Jack or Stars are painted "correctly"
                    // In a production app, we'd validate the color vs region mapping
                } else {
                    // Shake effect if no color selected
                    this.animate([
                        { transform: 'translateX(0px)' },
                        { transform: 'translateX(-5px)' },
                        { transform: 'translateX(5px)' },
                        { transform: 'translateX(0px)' }
                    ], { duration: 200 });
                }
            });
        });

        document.getElementById('reset-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
            document.querySelectorAll('.flag-path').forEach(region => {
                if(region.tagName === 'rect' && region.dataset.region === 'field') {
                    region.setAttribute('fill', '#f7f9ff');
                } else {
                    region.setAttribute('fill', '#ffffff');
                }
                region.style.stroke = '#bec8d3';
            });
        });

        document.getElementById('finish-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
            const celebration = document.getElementById('celebration');
            celebration.classList.remove('hidden');
            celebration.classList.add('flex');
            
            // Audio simulation
            const finishAudio = new Audio();
            // finishAudio.play();
        });

        // Add some fun hover interaction for kids
        document.querySelectorAll('.flag-path').forEach(p => {
            p.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
                if(currentColor) p.style.opacity = "0.8";
            });
            p.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                p.style.opacity = "1";
            });
        });
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Sesión de Quiz Bilingüe -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport">
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@100..900&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "card-padding": "20px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        .chunky-button-primary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 #004b71;
        }
        .chunky-button-primary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 #004b71;
        }
        .chunky-card {
            box-shadow: 0 8px 0 #dee3e9;
            transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275);
        }
        .chunky-card:active {
            transform: scale(0.95) translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 #dee3e9;
        }
        .audio-pulse {
            animation: pulse-ring 2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1) infinite;
        }
        @keyframes pulse-ring {
            0% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); opacity: 0.8; }
            100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
        }
        .confetti {
            position: absolute;
            width: 10px;
            height: 10px;
            background-color: #fccc00;
            pointer-events: none;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background font-body-md overflow-x-hidden selection:bg-primary-container">
<!-- Top AppBar Component -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky z-50 bg-background border-b-4 border-surface-container-highest flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit">
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-all active:translate-y-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-3xl">arrow_back</span>
</button>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center">
<h1 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-primary">España / Spain</h1>
<div class="w-48 h-3 bg-surface-container-highest rounded-full overflow-hidden mt-1">
<div class="w-2/3 h-full bg-tertiary-container rounded-full"></div>
</div>
</div>
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-secondary-container hover:opacity-80 transition-all active:translate-y-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-3xl">volume_up</span>
</button>
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-full active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-sm border-b-2 border-secondary"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">notifications_active</span><span class="text-[8px] font-bold uppercase leading-none">Alarma</span></button><button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-full active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-sm border-b-2 border-secondary"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">notifications_active</span><span class="text-[8px] font-bold uppercase leading-none">Alarma</span></button><button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-full active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-sm border-b-2 border-secondary"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">notifications_active</span><span class="text-[8px] font-bold uppercase leading-none">Alarma</span></button><button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-full active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-sm border-b-2 border-secondary"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">notifications_active</span><span class="text-[8px] font-bold uppercase leading-none">Alarma</span></button><button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-full active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-sm border-b-2 border-secondary"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">notifications_active</span><span class="text-[8px] font-bold uppercase leading-none">Alarma</span></button><button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-full active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-sm border-b-2 border-secondary"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">notifications_active</span><span class="text-[8px] font-bold uppercase leading-none">Alarma</span></button><button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-full active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-sm border-b-2 border-secondary"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">notifications_active</span><span class="text-[8px] font-bold uppercase leading-none">Alarma</span></button><button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-full active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-sm border-b-2 border-secondary"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">notifications_active</span><span class="text-[8px] font-bold uppercase leading-none">Alarma</span></button></header>
<main class="min-h-[calc(100vh-144px)] px-container-margin pt-8 pb-32 max-w-2xl mx-auto flex flex-col items-center gap-10">
<!-- Question Section -->
<section class="w-full text-center space-y-6">
<div class="relative inline-block">
<button class="audio-pulse w-24 h-24 rounded-full bg-secondary-container flex items-center justify-center chunky-card group" onclick="playAudio()">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-5xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</button>
<div class="absolute -top-2 -right-2 bg-primary text-white text-xs font-bold px-2 py-1 rounded-full">¡ESCUCHA!</div>
</div>
<div class="space-y-2">
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-on-surface">¿Cuál es la bandera de México?</h2>
<p class="font-body-lg text-on-surface-variant italic">Which is the flag of Mexico?</p>
</div>
</section>
<!-- Quiz Options - Bento-ish Grid -->
<section class="w-full grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
<!-- Italy (Incorrect) -->
<button class="chunky-card bg-surface-container-lowest border-2 border-surface-container-highest rounded-lg p-card-padding flex flex-col items-center gap-4 group" onclick="handleSelection(false, this)">
<div class="w-full aspect-[3/2] rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-outline-variant">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A clean, vibrant digital illustration of the national flag of Italy with vertical stripes of green, white, and red. The style is educational and friendly, using bright, saturated colors suitable for a premium children's learning application. The lighting is even and soft, making the colors pop against a neutral background." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuDlDd6FdZBw3Mm-vmEpDOHUgURCVwKrY226juztADE0WQ_3nyzZLXNDTEo97eg6bWutiwyyrkbXkxpebjVle0JOqsKTZdZy4pbcKvMRerj5JnB6U3uURJbbHTm0rUTGcohV_GcPCtk0IXrCfbnazQBtrYB9tAwM3rNRfq_yi2wCNx3qPwvVyUyvpDEWyWtr4zmfA45iezGtcYjnLw20n3HYFk2gq1CTPlxWNge2tMij95bC3lDTgi1MXLnp9mZeTMRHpeDYPhCbmTU">
</div>
</button>
<!-- Mexico (Correct) -->
<button class="chunky-card bg-surface-container-lowest border-2 border-surface-container-highest rounded-lg p-card-padding flex flex-col items-center gap-4 group" onclick="handleSelection(true, this)">
<div class="w-full aspect-[3/2] rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-outline-variant">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A detailed, colorful digital depiction of the Mexican flag, showing the tricolor of green, white, and red with the coat of arms featuring an eagle on a cactus with a snake in its beak centered on the white stripe. The visual style is playful and chunky, optimized for 4-8 year old children, featuring high contrast and friendly textures." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuAaksyIA79prSiRWuDSBxV9J41itX2QpNDOfHBoQYnDRWI4sxfF9bKALQzlIwm7bDtIP7HTlnbzyan5InLfiNx6l47q9Tu2gWIHibVXsOMNCQSHCSiWh2X_z3X_fIN2VNIotBawXjPkylipySFzPQJZIVmLIpMn7w-FKwYtPe9RxsxgISPLPjoWrjOgkCdEAygXqiQrf4jtHUqdTMvygSHe-kA-vdOPG7pWehLNmmY-K3qew_wF4CkHXuTxP3VISGwzJjOd07tuCrQ">
</div>
</button>
<!-- Japan (Incorrect) -->
<button class="chunky-card bg-surface-container-lowest border-2 border-surface-container-highest rounded-lg p-card-padding flex flex-col items-center gap-4 group" onclick="handleSelection(false, this)">
<div class="w-full aspect-[3/2] rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-outline-variant">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A high-quality digital illustration of the flag of Japan, consisting of a stark white rectangular field with a deep red disc in the center representing the sun. The aesthetic is clean, minimal, and vibrant, designed with soft rounded corners and tactile textures for a premium educational mobile app interface for young children." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuB7UHvituZZxmT6IF6H4Bf4iVJ5BFIqReR-LOf2UzUbG1yAUOFvwVdcdKwnTFZMYdDPAO8tCitFFZv7Zq6vOE3nDxcUbg9RWKeqrMiNgil9XFg7EGEhOkdqwBgOwNL68B079uaZFBK-ay3eErS1-ws-lGk9KaV92NruObcyrJePwWBDTxeSdzgapTJWB_AjcB9hVo5SgtilQ05kKJdcXAhsivLrOtM4RorBUnAC2nDf8uiQcL6mYq8sE2LVzW2nWSS6kwGxGzmWqAc">
</div>
</button>
</section>
<!-- Visual Encouragement Decor -->
<div class="flex gap-4">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-tertiary-container text-4xl animate-bounce" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-secondary-container text-4xl animate-bounce" style="animation-delay: 0.2s; font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary-container text-4xl animate-bounce" style="animation-delay: 0.4s; font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation Bar (Contextual) -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-touch-target-min flex justify-around items-center px-gutter pb-2 bg-surface border-t-4 border-surface-container-highest shadow-lg z-50 rounded-t-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant px-4 py-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-all active:scale-95" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">explore</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explorar</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container rounded-xl px-4 py-2 translate-y-1 active:scale-95 transition-transform" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Pasaporte</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant px-4 py-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-all active:scale-95" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">videogame_asset</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Jugar</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Feedback Modal (Hidden by default) -->
<div class="fixed inset-0 bg-white/90 z-[60] hidden flex-col items-center justify-center p-container-margin text-center" id="feedback-overlay">
<div class="bg-surface-container-lowest p-10 rounded-xl chunky-card border-4 border-primary flex flex-col items-center gap-6 max-w-sm" id="modal-content">
<div class="w-32 h-32 rounded-full bg-tertiary-container flex items-center justify-center" id="icon-container">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white text-7xl" id="feedback-icon" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">check_circle</span>
</div>
<h2 class="font-headline-lg text-headline-lg text-primary" id="feedback-title">¡Excelente!</h2>
<p class="font-body-lg text-on-surface-variant" id="feedback-subtitle">That's the flag of Mexico!</p>
<button class="w-full py-4 rounded-full bg-primary text-white font-headline-md chunky-button-primary" onclick="closeFeedback()">
                ¡SIGUIENTE!
            </button>
</div>
</div>
<script>
        function playAudio() {
            // Animation only for prototype
            const icon = document.querySelector('.audio-pulse');
            icon.classList.remove('audio-pulse');
            void icon.offsetWidth; // Trigger reflow
            icon.classList.add('audio-pulse');
            
            // Haptic-like visual feedback
            icon.style.transform = "scale(1.1) translateY(4px)";
            setTimeout(() => icon.style.transform = "", 200);
        }

        function handleSelection(isCorrect, element) {
            const overlay = document.getElementById('feedback-overlay');
            const title = document.getElementById('feedback-title');
            const subtitle = document.getElementById('feedback-subtitle');
            const icon = document.getElementById('feedback-icon');
            const iconBg = document.getElementById('icon-container');
            const modal = document.getElementById('modal-content');

            overlay.classList.remove('hidden');
            overlay.classList.add('flex');

            if (isCorrect) {
                title.innerText = "¡Excelente!";
                subtitle.innerText = "That's the flag of Mexico!";
                icon.innerText = "celebration";
                iconBg.className = "w-32 h-32 rounded-full bg-tertiary-container flex items-center justify-center";
                modal.style.borderColor = "#2b6c00";
                createConfetti();
            } else {
                title.innerText = "¡Casi!";
                subtitle.innerText = "Try again! You can do it!";
                icon.innerText = "refresh";
                iconBg.className = "w-32 h-32 rounded-full bg-secondary-container flex items-center justify-center";
                modal.style.borderColor = "#735c00";
            }
        }

        function closeFeedback() {
            document.getElementById('feedback-overlay').classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('feedback-overlay').classList.remove('flex');
        }

        function createConfetti() {
            for (let i = 0; i < 30; i++) {
                const confetti = document.createElement('div');
                confetti.className = 'confetti';
                confetti.style.left = Math.random() * 100 + 'vw';
                confetti.style.top = '-10px';
                confetti.style.backgroundColor = ['#fccc00', '#2bb1ff', '#59be1b', '#ffdad6'][Math.floor(Math.random() * 4)];
                confetti.style.transform = `rotate(${Math.random() * 360}deg)`;
                document.body.appendChild(confetti);

                const animation = confetti.animate([
                    { transform: `translate(0, 0) rotate(0)`, opacity: 1 },
                    { transform: `translate(${(Math.random() - 0.5) * 200}px, 100vh) rotate(${Math.random() * 1000}deg)`, opacity: 0 }
                ], {
                    duration: 1000 + Math.random() * 2000,
                    easing: 'cubic-bezier(0, .9, .57, 1)'
                });

                animation.onfinish = () => confetti.remove();
            }
        }
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Recompensa de Nivel 1: Explorador del Mundo -->
<!DOCTYPE html>

<html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/>
<title>Flag Explorer - Level 1 Completed</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "container-margin": "24px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 24;
        }
        
        .tactile-button-primary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0px 0px #004b71;
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
        }
        .tactile-button-primary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0px 0px #004b71;
        }

        .tactile-button-secondary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0px 0px #bec8d3;
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
        }
        .tactile-button-secondary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0px 0px #bec8d3;
        }

        .tactile-card {
            box-shadow: 0 8px 0px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
        }

        @keyframes pulse-yellow {
            0% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.1); box-shadow: 0 0 20px #fccc00; }
            100% { transform: scale(1); }
        }
        .pulse-audio {
            animation: pulse-yellow 2s infinite ease-in-out;
        }

        @keyframes confetti-fall {
            0% { transform: translateY(-10vh) rotate(0deg); opacity: 1; }
            100% { transform: translateY(100vh) rotate(720deg); opacity: 0; }
        }
        .confetti {
            position: absolute;
            width: 12px;
            height: 12px;
            z-index: 10;
            animation: confetti-fall 4s linear forwards;
        }

        .star-ray {
            background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(252,204,0,0.2) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0) 70%);
        }
    </style>
<style>
    body {
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);
    }
  </style>
  </head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background font-body-md overflow-hidden min-h-screen flex flex-col">
<!-- Celebration Background Layer -->
<div class="fixed inset-0 pointer-events-none overflow-hidden z-0">
<div class="absolute inset-0 star-ray opacity-50 scale-150 animate-pulse"></div>
<div id="confetti-container"></div>
</div>
<!-- Header / Top Bar (Manual Mapping from JSON) -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky bg-surface flex justify-between items-center px-container-margin py-unit h-touch-target-min border-b-4 border-surface-container-highest z-20">
<div class="flex items-center gap-3">
<div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-primary-container flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden border-2 border-primary">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A friendly, smiling cartoon blue bird character wearing pilot goggles and a vintage aviator scarf, rendered in a 3D claymation style with soft lighting and vibrant primary colors, set against a clean white background." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuBgHjhh9ak7Nnemtd-VNJn6ka92vdofytt_NO1Zfk4bcxRFwfeVhRjuIKyu3iFOfubgcLVK5cIeU18VjTv-9rAexM0KDHM9Tw94Y2MK0zeczuIgnFFyow0NoWuRzgBMU4vvTOHGeuMORvpF5_fe0IN0FauMo5ZNlfugBeROj5TNUN9igy7VxknCMIafyT4jeYlMxGarbikG3BkzZDpFWt5OIqTIeQT6tl_ArJUSvIP6sP2_Os-azCRzyeNlrbo49B5II1ffcQy82lA"/>
</div>
<span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md font-bold text-primary">Flag Explorer</span>
</div>
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container hover:scale-105 transition-transform">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-3xl">volume_up</span>
</button>
</header>
<!-- Main Content Canvas -->
<main class="flex-grow flex flex-col items-center justify-center px-gutter py-8 relative z-10">
<!-- Congratulatory Audio Trigger -->
<button class="pulse-audio mb-6 w-24 h-24 rounded-full bg-secondary-container flex items-center justify-center text-on-secondary-container tactile-button-secondary border-4 border-secondary shadow-xl" onclick="playCongrats()">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-5xl">volume_up</span>
</button>
<!-- Headline Group -->
<div class="text-center mb-8">
<h1 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile md:text-headline-lg text-primary mb-2 drop-shadow-sm">¡Nivel 1 Completado!</h1>
<p class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-on-surface-variant opacity-80">Level 1 Mastery!</p>
</div>
<!-- Rank Badge & Character -->
<div class="relative w-64 h-64 md:w-80 md:h-80 mb-10 flex items-center justify-center">
<!-- Glow effect -->
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-secondary-container rounded-full opacity-30 blur-3xl animate-pulse"></div>
<div class="relative z-10 w-full h-full p-4">
<div class="w-full h-full bg-white rounded-full border-[10px] border-secondary-container tactile-card flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6 text-center">
<img class="w-40 h-40 object-contain mb-2" data-alt="A chunky, golden 3D trophy badge shaped like a globe with a cute, cheering bird pilot emerging from the center. The style is premium toy-like with high-gloss textures and soft shadows, using a warm yellow and bright blue color scheme to convey a sense of accomplishment." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuA168WK1qEdZgqDul2lclR0VtlpMhX8ge6DNiREEn36JDLBR5mjSfMKPjV1EBS_aFwHtTAl5kbO_eeoUwFtCYqFW9rJ3ODCqOBmPX05kaNBQsHmgb-EAbcG1eKy0ZBhYgFPk5zDJ6feNJPN6v_H3jzYhgqNjvvIqxeTyKlQi_4jZI0RfG5iWiRnj9mITpZCE3V1cvfAc11XUouSj0v9h_SWizO1-O_eZ0i5ZR_q0NlB_FYBwdMjozwJGS1dFwDH4asN3GYVCrdow1k"/>
<span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-secondary uppercase tracking-wider">World Traveler</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Mastered Flags Summary -->
<div class="w-full max-w-2xl bg-surface-container-low rounded-xl p-card-padding tactile-card mb-12 border-2 border-surface-variant">
<h2 class="text-center font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface-variant mb-6 uppercase">10 Flags Mastered!</h2>
<div class="grid grid-cols-5 gap-4 md:gap-6">
<!-- Flags mapping -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
<div class="w-12 h-12 md:w-16 md:h-16 rounded-lg border-2 border-white shadow-sm overflow-hidden bg-white flex items-center justify-center">
<img class="w-10 h-auto" data-alt="A clean, vibrant illustration of the Mexican flag, featuring a centered emblem and vertical tricolor stripes in a friendly, educational cartoon style." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuAjXcpgc5ee1XquMei1-07NCreeh8x5v418DEJ2vefo1UontSsUfIiwwRIiWdb636rJ1lqObQbCqed2Ex9SLcHdE0LTha4MH1oXBzM7fjduYlIBqVkBKMANjV3LnhYJJf7HAdXw9RfOQ3t6kaTHQC5TGuf7C3lHs2nn1ZJFrFwTVbF3A9AgTaRjETzHCVj1nYeS6ysBpAif5N9aZBtfQoZpt3KHkpo6L6FipKEVPa-EI7-oW6EvMXKUSfw_sWEYyNxHzXGMhrMM_pU"/>
</div>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
<div class="w-12 h-12 md:w-16 md:h-16 rounded-lg border-2 border-white shadow-sm overflow-hidden bg-white flex items-center justify-center">
<img class="w-10 h-auto" data-alt="The national flag of France, shown as a simple, high-contrast tricolor of blue, white, and red in a playful, hand-painted digital style." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuCPulF_mS380A3VMH20ZY4uvqazjQZ1EyDSV91OVKeWHba_vM4RJtYBK1baYGlhOj8FNwN0SdvgH3dLWrrpOMT3vJUefuXUd88pvqEU_b9E31m_0zNkrycAT3nTtkeP4UDr3-HxGm87Cr2V-EHfxxwewtGFQTbuaEbjxFOo7FctnhY8JU7OGfgLsUpYs40qsbUtFAy4Bu36qjnBZ0fBfJOoeX393WAvHX6wB3aJltFV_yO5XXL-PidZqdfcAVYuZb7HBpGOj35Io3s"/>
</div>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
<div class="w-12 h-12 md:w-16 md:h-16 rounded-lg border-2 border-white shadow-sm overflow-hidden bg-white flex items-center justify-center">
<img class="w-10 h-auto" data-alt="The national flag of Japan, a minimalist red sun on a white field, rendered with thick lines and vibrant colors for a kid-friendly look." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuCUffJgpVd4x9sYgujDCj9WDnlvOb-kn_vpd5Zq6gNkCsAcqC6gmF7AboG7Q1HcUV1WZYoTBKE7hatlsv_MIXRyUn0HBxPZUqxwbqzdM9uXIltDyAb9-P4SpWrncVvkQ3jkooQTaUYqW_X1PE_3NwoL1Uu4rq4GcyxZ4e5o0H-pwTrVwMNV71oAeUb5__bhZDCIMmXDLUfspHJPgklIenLlmLh24YggpvtuyslE6EdR2R0qeLWPxx9Axg5tO--sdys2iGTPsinI6sM"/>
</div>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
<div class="w-12 h-12 md:w-16 md:h-16 rounded-lg border-2 border-white shadow-sm overflow-hidden bg-white flex items-center justify-center">
<img class="w-10 h-auto" data-alt="The Italian flag, featuring green, white, and red vertical stripes, presented with soft rounded corners and bright saturation." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuCssGyfipEVSLKLVnzQKlZsVWm2O2k-stPPD9SCnXJFhtb28PZX2R-nIlSgzN6oB9-_C6yEyACBA9mo_SmvhFWu97guCyC_Xt9yNwcn0Opw8SSlsEZQ1BL9hFo-4xUipT0XqxAyBJEX-RX-nc1425YUGF_tlLKvCoBbKEwVlqoCewIAfRc6SXCWY8tB8B1IBDUQlNfRrmlnG_6EJ3-rwOumgJhYBPG7Zpl4Rj9wPI2LN4lmFIc_qbQHTKJnxLFFWpZDr4sT_ILLDxk"/>
</div>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
<div class="w-12 h-12 md:w-16 md:h-16 rounded-lg border-2 border-white shadow-sm overflow-hidden bg-white flex items-center justify-center">
<img class="w-10 h-auto" data-alt="The flag of Brazil, with its iconic yellow diamond and blue globe on a green field, illustrated in a clean vector style." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuC01yG4WcvkcQqJOEAptwrqpq_iA3u1tY_0cwuS9A15j5WGmt7hFZcU4V73W2chMIdRl_4UMqKouLAxwV2ME8TNDRRlcfJshiHUbfsn_jIhYvI1IoFIsajFhfTVBGJJkLjpkg16wdzI4iew_g03hCm_TfhEXbrc2LYA84kvTPdMF7MrilFOTt_BYOmpzK_Gg4j0-BhK1IZMVD0XyJFJMoQj3-RAkT0UfpUTr9ma_KijhTGdUM56LVDKJ9CyRL-OIoK-aM_8CBNxpTk"/>

<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
<div class="w-12 h-12 md:w-16 md:h-16 rounded-lg border-2 border-white shadow-sm overflow-hidden bg-white flex items-center justify-center">
<img class="w-10 h-auto" data-alt="The flag of Spain, with its yellow and red horizontal stripes and crest, simplified for a children's educational app." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuAc0S0X1Rc1fDG9UO2928xFRejxGPaY-GJLI2m1vda_SxLXRqmvIKWHZbKnHVob8gkqGiMVeacPtdjY3AQzjfp6CqwVKxWV9JIQzyrpb4nYQ3CC1Qx7kBrMcsCiYjYk99eCYqcK1ILB1vT3wJA2nYZDNCVBNmw1eDcqyoV1thc389LLockm7r9WEm0PeFS2P5O3-IG-mQtymgUx8qcQcUTVhC2NQTMz5pIdAKTxkI9JOv4x7d8jM6PTgcgBgikEkbce2B9GVIL57iY"/>
</div>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
<div class="w-12 h-12 md:w-16 md:h-16 rounded-lg border-2 border-white shadow-sm overflow-hidden bg-white flex items-center justify-center">
<img class="w-10 h-auto" data-alt="The national flag of Germany, showing black, red, and gold horizontal stripes in a high-quality digital illustration." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuCrR-U-sV8DFt8fcTMWlJQQdiwuJ4E6vcZgom1j2tHsRXCxlquZ4SS9aYklk5DCFpy5CdxAj6hLKRkocQDYC95DoVykseHcicNKvJk0TBcvhNqGYKtqQ_XOxwLxvU4vMdOO2n543gZZIzu0BclWPN0gZkrB8JerFGpQfVeOPm5DgRrMy1ni1vNAfAaD1zAvFO4_WSsCmGqK7ypcKo0sYbWjzWsYdUQQK-2jBWeG8kNgRod1dT4YZEJlECAoqQkYxrk7bLoOuBOyfF8"/>
</div>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
<div class="w-12 h-12 md:w-16 md:h-16 rounded-lg border-2 border-white shadow-sm overflow-hidden bg-white flex items-center justify-center">
<img class="w-10 h-auto" data-alt="The Canadian flag, with its red maple leaf on a white and red field, rendered with vibrant colors and thick, friendly outlines." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuAor3yRIVNgCH25G-t2lWdmbQjxiARO0Cr7icMcNxPQK9MqbyVH9F7mvijuKRYCl_V0zqTvAV3vigMm0gBEUE-ZDxgCgbXRJONRopileC9RR0h0UPHujTEiEt1Pv3m9C9HulG1nDhC4NcEy_8kdWFYbf9yIsl-1jFlMM08oho2p6rAREyeC8aVN-fwr5TfFIXYvqqh1_0kwhJRXZdYb6f7Z7K6OcrubjeW_9p5nH-hiPPA3og2h6k9cSOIqUr0GWaIgeM7ZW9WQ6nQ"/>
</div>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
<div class="w-12 h-12 md:w-16 md:h-16 rounded-lg border-2 border-white shadow-sm overflow-hidden bg-white flex items-center justify-center">
<img class="w-10 h-auto" data-alt="The flag of Egypt, featuring red, white, and black horizontal stripes with the Golden Eagle of Saladin, simplified for young learners." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuBXwLIPgGMugYh1nWTl7DWN9zuvxnW_9V_Jz1FQekbMxjYtoOvTNMb7KEAFye3FfKALvTgubNVZ8bYirDzak7QSgW33qlAW-LIdZnp686ujV1bwl4OBIyJoM-cXcQsIcu7PPntWMNNzTQnBwuhpDDFqr2qeDlWSdnEzS-h-LCWIlbRXvW8vACyeE9A6Y0eVvsIYK7INmvU08GXOEKWGVhh9W9mY6U5vU6oUzzAAzq6aBvDnwLpv62x0y_jXLUOh7KIZuUrDwEPvXVE"/>
</div>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
<div class="w-12 h-12 md:w-16 md:h-16 rounded-lg border-2 border-white shadow-sm overflow-hidden bg-white flex items-center justify-center">
<img class="w-10 h-auto" data-alt="The Australian flag, with the Union Jack and Southern Cross stars on a blue field, presented as a clear, colorful icon." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuBGVlepViONNNNR23w47mX_yNdxvrEPZSm-CcpBfN7v0QIdltNnfbGu5yWP6cqdDNsWFLCFe3H54FKvOh3YBUUCZ04moS2fS8KFxw-09xVHItwhxDF9v2fk_gYHAv14Cm5DOf2b9SdEeaV6EzrQE5Rud19BtY4ZtDdFJJRuM7K4WQ-PSslbrqa85z5MOGiXKcfBrEg8SCRly-EKmP5ywW3N5l4zyRi81He8wapohNHlqt6D-ms1vAu8g51V1LriNG1JmdorMMf6Txs"/>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Action Buttons -->
<div class="w-full max-w-sm flex flex-col gap-6 px-gutter pb-8">
<button class="w-full bg-primary py-5 rounded-lg tactile-button-primary flex items-center justify-center gap-3 text-on-primary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-3xl">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md">Reclamar Sello de Pasaporte</span>
</button>
<button class="w-full bg-white border-2 border-outline-variant py-5 rounded-lg tactile-button-secondary flex items-center justify-center gap-3 text-primary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-3xl">map</span>
<span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md">Seguir Explorando</span>
</button>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Nav Shell (Suppressed for Success Screen per UX rules but kept if needed for top-level context) -->
<!-- Suppressing per: "exclude the navigation shell if the page intent is: Success/Confirmation splash screens" -->
<script>
        function createConfetti() {
            const container = document.getElementById('confetti-container');
            const colors = ['#006495', '#2bb1ff', '#fccc00', '#59be1b', '#ba1a1a'];
            
            for (let i = 0; i < 50; i++) {
                const confetti = document.createElement('div');
                confetti.className = 'confetti';
                confetti.style.left = Math.random() * 100 + 'vw';
                confetti.style.backgroundColor = colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)];
                confetti.style.animationDelay = Math.random() * 2 + 's';
                confetti.style.borderRadius = Math.random() > 0.5 ? '50%' : '2px';
                container.appendChild(confetti);
            }
        }

        function playCongrats() {
            // Visual feedback
            console.log("Playing: ¡Felicidades! ¡Eres un Explorador del Mundo! Congratulations! You are a World Explorer!");
            const speaker = document.querySelector('.pulse-audio');
            speaker.classList.add('scale-125');
            setTimeout(() => speaker.classList.remove('scale-125'), 300);
            
            // Re-trigger confetti for fun
            document.getElementById('confetti-container').innerHTML = '';
            createConfetti();
        }

        // Initialize confetti on load
        window.onload = createConfetti;
    </script>
</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Reino Unido) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport">
<title>Estación de Pintura: Reino Unido</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "unit": "8px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif;
            -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
            overflow-x: hidden;
        }

        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }

        /* Tactile Button Styles */
        .btn-chunky-primary {
            @apply bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container font-label-bold text-label-bold rounded-xl relative;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 #004b71;
            transition: transform 0.1s, box-shadow 0.1s;
        }
        .btn-chunky-primary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 #004b71;
        }

        .btn-chunky-secondary {
            @apply bg-surface-container-lowest text-primary font-label-bold text-label-bold rounded-xl relative border-2 border-surface-container-highest;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 #dee3e9;
            transition: transform 0.1s, box-shadow 0.1s;
        }
        .btn-chunky-secondary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 #dee3e9;
        }

        .audio-pulse {
            animation: pulse 2s infinite;
        }
        @keyframes pulse {
            0% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 6px 0 #b38f00, 0 0 0 0px rgba(252, 204, 0, 0.4); }
            70% { transform: scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 6px 0 #b38f00, 0 0 0 15px rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 6px 0 #b38f00, 0 0 0 0px rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
        }

        .flag-path {
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: fill 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        .color-bubble {
            width: 72px;
            height: 72px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            border: 4px solid white;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275);
        }
        .color-bubble.active {
            transform: scale(1.2);
            border-color: #006495;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }

        .success-overlay {
            display: none;
            position: fixed;
            inset: 0;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, #fccc00 0%, #735c00 100%);
            z-index: 100;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            flex-direction: column;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-surface min-h-screen flex flex-col pb-24">
<!-- Top Navigation Bar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky z-40 bg-background border-b-4 border-surface-container-highest flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit h-16">
<button aria-label="Volver" class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center hover:opacity-80 active:translate-y-1 transition-all text-primary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[32px]">arrow_back</span>
</button>
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<h1 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-primary">España / Spain</h1>
</div>
<button aria-label="Escuchar nombre" class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container rounded-full audio-pulse active:scale-95 transition-transform shadow-[0_4px_0_#b38f00]">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-fixed">volume_up</span>
</button>
<button class="flex items-center gap-1 bg-tertiary-container text-on-tertiary-container px-4 py-2 rounded-full border-b-4 border-on-tertiary-fixed-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-lg"><span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">notifications_active</span><span class="font-label-bold text-[10px] uppercase tracking-tighter">¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm</span></button></header>
<main class="flex-grow container mx-auto px-container-margin py-unit flex flex-col items-center">
<!-- Instructional Header -->
<div class="text-center mb-8 mt-4">
<h2 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-on-surface mb-2">¡Pintemos la bandera!</h2>
<p class="font-body-md text-body-md text-on-surface-variant flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
                Selecciona un color y toca la bandera del <span class="font-bold text-primary">Reino Unido</span>.
            </p>
</div>
<!-- Flag Canvas Section -->
<div class="w-full max-w-lg bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-lg p-card-padding border-2 border-surface-container-highest shadow-sm relative mb-8">
<svg class="w-full h-auto drop-shadow-md rounded-md overflow-hidden bg-white" id="union-jack" viewBox="0 0 60 30">
<!-- UK Flag Structure (Simplified for Painting Interaction) -->
<!-- Base / Blue areas -->
<path class="flag-path" d="M0,0 L60,0 L60,30 L0,30 Z" data-part="blue-bg" fill="#e5e7eb"></path>
<!-- White diagonals (Saltires) -->
<path d="M0,0 L60,30 M60,0 L0,30" fill="none" pointer-events="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="6"></path>
<!-- Red diagonals (Saltires) -->
<path class="flag-path" d="M0,0 L60,30 M60,0 L0,30" data-part="red-saltire" fill="none" stroke="#e5e7eb" stroke-width="2"></path>
<!-- White cross (St George's border) -->
<path d="M30,0 v30 M0,15 h60" fill="none" pointer-events="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="10"></path>
<!-- Red cross (St George's) -->
<path class="flag-path" d="M30,0 v30 M0,15 h60" data-part="red-cross" fill="none" stroke="#e5e7eb" stroke-width="6"></path>
</svg>
<!-- Reset Button -->
<button class="absolute -top-4 -right-4 w-12 h-12 bg-white rounded-full border-2 border-surface-container-highest flex items-center justify-center text-outline hover:text-error transition-colors shadow-sm" onclick="resetFlag()">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">restart_alt</span>
</button>
</div>
<!-- Interactive Palette -->
<div class="w-full max-w-md bg-surface-container-high rounded-xl p-card-padding flex flex-col gap-6">
<div class="flex justify-around items-center">
<!-- Color: Azul -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
<button class="color-bubble active" data-color-name="Azul" onclick="selectColor('#00247d', this)" style="background-color: #00247d;"></button>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface-variant uppercase tracking-wider">Azul</span>
<button class="w-10 h-10 bg-secondary-fixed rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-[0_3px_0_#b38f00] active:translate-y-1 transition-all">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[20px]">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
<!-- Color: Blanco -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
<button class="color-bubble" data-color-name="Blanco" onclick="selectColor('#ffffff', this)" style="background-color: #ffffff;"></button>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface-variant uppercase tracking-wider">Blanco</span>
<button class="w-10 h-10 bg-secondary-fixed rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-[0_3px_0_#b38f00] active:translate-y-1 transition-all">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[20px]">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
<!-- Color: Rojo -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
<button class="color-bubble" data-color-name="Rojo" onclick="selectColor('#cf142b', this)" style="background-color: #cf142b;"></button>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface-variant uppercase tracking-wider">Rojo</span>
<button class="w-10 h-10 bg-secondary-fixed rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-[0_3px_0_#b38f00] active:translate-y-1 transition-all">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[20px]">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Hint Section -->
<div class="bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-lg p-unit flex items-center gap-4">
<div class="w-16 h-10 rounded border border-outline-variant overflow-hidden shrink-0">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A bright educational illustration of the United Kingdom Union Jack flag, professional digital art for children, vibrant red white and blue colors, thick bold outlines, soft lighting, cheerful minimalist style." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuDGaJ5ZPQEweDR3Lm2HvK8ywQmsJ4652JKCWQcu0tY_EYnrKV9q3sfv5Kamc7K7GugXICeVIa5sAjPjkLUo2p9zsnHhUHHjHHRSsszCnkXDvlVMXtUlh4WIajP1K11z9Kp9G18U7PK-hb53BLbEgCIMbqmZlcP_Hjf2DQluGfIQEDpNfezaRD9zd_HqETKDa9cjZhH2dNU5Xrp6tzs1VLf7z5g-TVDMbhampjCCuIRXT35zrULYqJQLzhyuMKdMHu4VhHnnIgBE0_s">
</div>
<p class="font-body-md text-body-md text-on-surface-variant italic">Mira cómo debe quedar...</p>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Action Button -->
<div class="mt-10 w-full max-w-xs">
<button class="btn-chunky-primary w-full py-4 text-xl" onclick="checkFlag()">
                ¡HE TERMINADO!
            </button>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation (Shared Component) -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-touch-target-min flex justify-around items-center px-gutter pb-2 bg-surface border-t-4 border-surface-container-highest z-50">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant px-4 py-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-colors" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">explore</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explorar</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container rounded-xl px-4 py-2 translate-y-1 transition-transform" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Pasaporte</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant px-4 py-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-colors" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">videogame_asset</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Jugar</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Celebration Overlay -->
<div class="success-overlay" id="success-overlay">
<div class="relative w-64 h-64 mb-8">
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-white opacity-20 rounded-full animate-ping scale-150"></div>
<div class="relative z-10 w-full h-full bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center border-8 border-white shadow-xl">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[120px] text-white" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
</div>
</div>
<h2 class="font-headline-lg text-headline-lg text-white mb-4 text-center px-8">¡INCREÍBLE!</h2>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-secondary-fixed mb-8">Has completado el Reino Unido</p>
<button class="btn-chunky-secondary px-12 py-4 text-xl" onclick="closeSuccess()">
            CONTINUAR
        </button>
</div>
<script>
        let currentColor = '#00247d';
        const partsPainted = {
            'blue-bg': false,
            'red-saltire': false,
            'red-cross': false
        };

        function selectColor(color, element) {
            currentColor = color;
            document.querySelectorAll('.color-bubble').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
            element.classList.add('active');
            
            // Interaction sound simulation
            if (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext) {
                const context = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
                const oscillator = context.createOscillator();
                oscillator.type = 'sine';
                oscillator.frequency.setValueAtTime(440, context.currentTime);
                const gain = context.createGain();
                gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.1, context.currentTime);
                oscillator.connect(gain);
                gain.connect(context.destination);
                oscillator.start();
                oscillator.stop(context.currentTime + 0.1);
            }
        }

        // Add event listeners to flag paths
        document.querySelectorAll('.flag-path').forEach(path => {
            path.addEventListener('click', function() {
                const part = this.getAttribute('data-part');
                if (part.includes('red')) {
                    this.style.stroke = currentColor;
                } else {
                    this.style.fill = currentColor;
                }
                partsPainted[part] = true;
                
                // Visual feedback
                this.classList.add('scale-[1.02]');
                setTimeout(() => this.classList.remove('scale-[1.02]'), 100);
            });
        });

        function resetFlag() {
            document.querySelectorAll('.flag-path').forEach(path => {
                const part = path.getAttribute('data-part');
                if (part.includes('red')) {
                    path.style.stroke = '#e5e7eb';
                } else {
                    path.style.fill = '#e5e7eb';
                }
                partsPainted[part] = false;
            });
        }

        function checkFlag() {
            // Logic to check if correct colors were used for each part
            const bluePart = document.querySelector('[data-part="blue-bg"]').style.fill;
            const saltirePart = document.querySelector('[data-part="red-saltire"]').style.stroke;
            const crossPart = document.querySelector('[data-part="red-cross"]').style.stroke;

            // Approximate hex check (UK Blue #00247d, UK Red #cf142b)
            const isBlueCorrect = bluePart.includes('rgb(0, 36, 125)') || bluePart === '#00247d';
            const isSaltireCorrect = saltirePart.includes('rgb(207, 20, 43)') || saltirePart === '#cf142b';
            const isCrossCorrect = crossPart.includes('rgb(207, 20, 43)') || crossPart === '#cf142b';

            if (isBlueCorrect && isSaltireCorrect && isCrossCorrect) {
                document.getElementById('success-overlay').style.display = 'flex';
            } else {
                alert("¡Casi lo tienes! Fíjate bien en los colores de la pista.");
            }
        }

        function closeSuccess() {
            document.getElementById('success-overlay').style.display = 'none';
        }
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (India) -->
<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/>
<title>¡Pinta la Bandera de la India!</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@400;500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "flag-orange": "#FF9933",
                    "flag-green": "#138808",
                    "flag-blue": "#000080"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "unit": "8px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 24;
        }
        .chunky-button {
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }
        .chunky-button:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }
        .paint-section {
            transition: background-color 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
        }
        .audio-pulse {
            animation: pulse 2s infinite;
        }
        @keyframes pulse {
            0% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(252, 204, 0, 0.7); }
            70% { transform: scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 0 0 15px rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
        }
        .confetti {
            position: absolute;
            width: 10px;
            height: 10px;
            background: #f00;
            border-radius: 50%;
        }
    </style>
<style>
    body {
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);
    }
  </style>
  </head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-surface font-body-md overflow-x-hidden selection:bg-primary-container selection:text-on-primary-container">
<!-- Top Navigation -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky z-50 bg-background border-b-4 border-surface-container-highest flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit">
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-colors active:translate-y-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-3xl">arrow_back</span>
</button>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center">
<h1 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-primary tracking-tight">España / Spain</h1>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">Estación de Pintura</span>
</div>
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container chunky-button audio-pulse" onclick="playAudio('India')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">volume_up</span>
</button>
</header>
<main class="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-gutter py-8 mb-24">
<!-- Instruction Section -->
<section class="text-center mb-10">
<div class="inline-flex items-center gap-4 bg-surface-container-low px-6 py-4 rounded-xl border-2 border-dashed border-primary/30">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-4xl">palette</span>
<p class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-on-surface">¡Pinta la bandera de <span class="text-primary">India</span>!</p>
</div>
</section>
<!-- Flag Canvas -->
<div class="relative bg-white rounded-lg p-6 shadow-xl border-4 border-surface-container-highest overflow-hidden select-none">
<!-- India Silhouette Structure -->
<div class="aspect-[3/2] flex flex-col border-2 border-outline-variant rounded-md overflow-hidden bg-surface-container-lowest">
<!-- Top Stripe: Saffron -->
<div class="paint-section flex-1 border-b-2 border-outline-variant flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer hover:brightness-95" id="stripe-top" onclick="paintArea('stripe-top')">
<span class="text-outline/20 font-headline-lg select-none">Naranja</span>
</div>
<!-- Middle Stripe: White -->
<div class="paint-section flex-1 border-b-2 border-outline-variant relative flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer hover:brightness-95" id="stripe-middle" onclick="paintArea('stripe-middle')">
<!-- Ashoka Chakra -->
<div class="paint-section w-32 h-32 rounded-full border-2 border-outline-variant flex items-center justify-center relative z-10 hover:scale-110 transition-transform bg-transparent" id="chakra" onclick="event.stopPropagation(); paintArea('chakra')">
<div class="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center opacity-30">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-6xl">settings</span>
</div>
</div>
<span class="text-outline/20 font-headline-lg select-none absolute left-8">Blanco</span>
</div>
<!-- Bottom Stripe: Green -->
<div class="paint-section flex-1 flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer hover:brightness-95" id="stripe-bottom" onclick="paintArea('stripe-bottom')">
<span class="text-outline/20 font-headline-lg select-none">Verde</span>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Decorative Element -->
<div class="absolute -right-12 -top-12 w-48 h-48 bg-secondary-container/20 rounded-full blur-3xl -z-10"></div>
<div class="absolute -left-12 -bottom-12 w-48 h-48 bg-primary-container/20 rounded-full blur-3xl -z-10"></div>
</div>
<!-- Palette / Color Picker -->
<section class="mt-12 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
<!-- Naranja Button -->
<button class="group relative flex flex-col items-center gap-3 p-4 bg-surface-container rounded-lg chunky-button border-b-8 border-[#CC7A29] active:border-b-0 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-all" onclick="selectColor('naranja', '#FF9933')">
<div class="w-20 h-20 bg-flag-orange rounded-full shadow-inner border-4 border-white"></div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md">Naranja</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-secondary-container bg-on-surface p-1 rounded-full text-xl hover:scale-110 transition-transform cursor-pointer" onclick="event.stopPropagation(); playAudio('Naranja')">volume_up</span>
</div>
<div class="hidden absolute -top-4 -right-4 bg-tertiary-container text-on-tertiary p-2 rounded-full shadow-lg" id="check-naranja">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">check_circle</span>
</div>
</button>
<!-- Blanco Button -->
<button class="group relative flex flex-col items-center gap-3 p-4 bg-surface-container rounded-lg chunky-button border-b-8 border-[#C0C8D0] active:border-b-0 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-all" onclick="selectColor('blanco', '#FFFFFF')">
<div class="w-20 h-20 bg-white rounded-full shadow-inner border-4 border-surface-container-highest"></div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md">Blanco</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-secondary-container bg-on-surface p-1 rounded-full text-xl hover:scale-110 transition-transform cursor-pointer" onclick="event.stopPropagation(); playAudio('Blanco')">volume_up</span>
</div>
<div class="hidden absolute -top-4 -right-4 bg-tertiary-container text-on-tertiary p-2 rounded-full shadow-lg" id="check-blanco">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">check_circle</span>
</div>
</button>
<!-- Verde Button -->
<button class="group relative flex flex-col items-center gap-3 p-4 bg-surface-container rounded-lg chunky-button border-b-8 border-[#0E6606] active:border-b-0 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-all" onclick="selectColor('verde', '#138808')">
<div class="w-20 h-20 bg-flag-green rounded-full shadow-inner border-4 border-white"></div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md">Verde</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-secondary-container bg-on-surface p-1 rounded-full text-xl hover:scale-110 transition-transform cursor-pointer" onclick="event.stopPropagation(); playAudio('Verde')">volume_up</span>
</div>
<div class="hidden absolute -top-4 -right-4 bg-tertiary-container text-on-tertiary p-2 rounded-full shadow-lg" id="check-verde">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">check_circle</span>
</div>
</button>
</section>
<!-- Completion Progress -->
<div class="mt-12">
<div class="flex justify-between items-end mb-2">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-primary">Progreso</span>
<span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-primary" id="progress-text">0%</span>
</div>
