<div class="w-full bg-surface-container-highest h-6 rounded-full overflow-hidden shadow-inner">
<div class="h-full bg-tertiary-container w-0 transition-all duration-500 rounded-full" id="progress-bar" style="box-shadow: inset 0 -4px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.1)"></div>
</div>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-touch-target-min flex justify-around items-center px-gutter pb-2 bg-surface border-t-4 border-surface-container-highest shadow-lg z-50 rounded-t-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant dark:text-outline px-4 py-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-all" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">explore</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explorar</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant dark:text-outline px-4 py-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-all" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Pasaporte</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container rounded-xl px-4 py-2 translate-y-1 shadow-md" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">videogame_asset</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Jugar</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Success Modal (Hidden by default) -->
<div class="fixed inset-0 z-[60] flex items-center justify-center bg-on-surface/50 backdrop-blur-sm hidden" id="success-modal">
<div class="bg-surface-container-lowest p-8 rounded-xl max-w-sm w-full mx-4 text-center border-b-8 border-tertiary-container shadow-2xl scale-90 transition-transform">
<div class="w-24 h-24 bg-secondary-container mx-auto rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-6">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-6xl">stars</span>
</div>
<h2 class="font-headline-lg text-headline-lg text-primary mb-2">¡Excelente!</h2>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-surface-variant mb-8">Has pintado la bandera de India correctamente.</p>
<button class="w-full bg-primary text-on-primary py-4 rounded-lg font-headline-md chunky-button border-b-4 border-[#004163]" onclick="location.reload()">
                ¡Jugar otra vez!
            </button>
</div>
</div>
<script>
        let selectedColor = null;
        let selectedHex = null;
        let paintedParts = {
            'stripe-top': false,
            'stripe-middle': false,
            'stripe-bottom': false,
            'chakra': false
        };

        const correctColors = {
            'stripe-top': 'naranja',
            'stripe-middle': 'blanco',
            'stripe-bottom': 'verde',
            'chakra': 'blanco' // Chakra is technically blue, but for this simplified UI we focus on the tri-color and general Blanco background. 
            // Simplified logic: Chakra is painted separately if needed, but let's assume it should be blue if we had a blue button.
            // Let's adjust to auto-color chakra blue when the middle is white for a better user experience.
        };

        function selectColor(colorName, hex) {
            selectedColor = colorName;
            selectedHex = hex;
            
            // UI feedback for selection
            ['naranja', 'blanco', 'verde'].forEach(c => {
                const check = document.getElementById(`check-${c}`);
                if (c === colorName) {
                    check.classList.remove('hidden');
                } else {
                    check.classList.add('hidden');
                }
            });

            // Sparkle effect on button
            createParticles(event.pageX, event.pageY);
        }

        function paintArea(id) {
            if (!selectedHex) {
                alert("¡Primero selecciona un color abajo!");
                return;
            }

            const area = document.getElementById(id);
            area.style.backgroundColor = selectedHex;
            area.innerHTML = ''; // Clear label text
            
            if (id === 'chakra' && selectedColor === 'blanco') {
                // Special case for chakra, let's make it look authentic
                area.style.borderColor = '#000080';
                area.innerHTML = '<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-6xl text-[#000080]" style="font-variation-settings: \'opsz\' 48">settings</span>';
            }

            paintedParts[id] = true;
            updateProgress();
        }

        function updateProgress() {
            const total = Object.keys(paintedParts).length;
            const painted = Object.values(paintedParts).filter(v => v).length;
            const percentage = Math.round((painted / total) * 100);
            
            document.getElementById('progress-bar').style.width = percentage + '%';
            document.getElementById('progress-text').innerText = percentage + '%';

            if (percentage === 100) {
                setTimeout(showSuccess, 500);
            }
        }

        function showSuccess() {
            const modal = document.getElementById('success-modal');
            modal.classList.remove('hidden');
            setTimeout(() => {
                modal.querySelector('div').classList.remove('scale-90');
                modal.querySelector('div').classList.add('scale-100');
            }, 10);
            
            // Confetti burst
            for(let i=0; i<50; i++) {
                setTimeout(() => createParticles(window.innerWidth/2, window.innerHeight/2), i * 20);
            }
        }

        function playAudio(text) {
            // Simplified simulation of audio feedback
            console.log("Playing audio for: " + text);
            // Visual feedback
            const btn = event.currentTarget;
            btn.classList.add('scale-110');
            setTimeout(() => btn.classList.remove('scale-110'), 200);
        }

        function createParticles(x, y) {
            for (let i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
                const p = document.createElement('div');
                p.className = 'confetti fixed z-[100] pointer-events-none';
                p.style.backgroundColor = `hsl(${Math.random() * 360}, 70%, 50%)`;
                p.style.left = x + 'px';
                p.style.top = y + 'px';
                document.body.appendChild(p);

                const angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                const velocity = 2 + Math.random() * 4;
                const dx = Math.cos(angle) * velocity;
                const dy = Math.sin(angle) * velocity;
                
                let posX = x;
                let posY = y;
                let opacity = 1;

                const animate = () => {
                    posX += dx;
                    posY += dy;
                    opacity -= 0.02;
                    p.style.left = posX + 'px';
                    p.style.top = posY + 'px';
                    p.style.opacity = opacity;

                    if (opacity > 0) {
                        requestAnimationFrame(animate);
                    } else {
                        p.remove();
                    }
                };
                requestAnimationFrame(animate);
            }
        }
    </script>
</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (EE. UU.) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport">
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@100..900&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        .fill-icon {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;
        }
        
        /* Tactile Button Effect */
        .btn-tactile-primary {
            @apply transition-all duration-75 relative;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 #004b71;
        }
        .btn-tactile-primary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 #004b71;
        }

        .btn-tactile-red {
            @apply transition-all duration-75 relative;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 #93000a;
        }
        .btn-tactile-red:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 #93000a;
        }

        .btn-tactile-blue {
            @apply transition-all duration-75 relative;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 #001e30;
        }
        .btn-tactile-blue:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 #001e30;
        }

        .btn-tactile-white {
            @apply transition-all duration-75 relative;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 #bec8d3;
        }
        .btn-tactile-white:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 #bec8d3;
        }

        /* Flag Coloring Zones */
        .paint-zone {
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: fill 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        /* Custom Audio Pulse */
        @keyframes pulse-audio {
            0% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
            50% { transform: scale(1.1); opacity: 0.8; }
            100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
        }
        .animate-audio {
            animation: pulse-audio 2s infinite ease-in-out;
        }
    </style>
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "unit": "8px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background min-h-screen flex flex-col font-body-md overflow-x-hidden">
<!-- Top Navigation Anchor -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky bg-background border-b-4 border-surface-container-highest flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit z-40">
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-surface-container active:scale-90 transition-all">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary">arrow_back</span>
</button>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center">
<h1 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-primary">España / Spain</h1>
</div>
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center btn-tactile-primary animate-audio" onclick="playAudio('title')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container fill-icon">volume_up</span>
</button>
<button class="flex items-center gap-1 bg-tertiary-container text-on-tertiary-container px-4 py-2 rounded-full border-b-4 border-on-tertiary-fixed-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-lg"><span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">notifications_active</span><span class="font-label-bold text-[10px] uppercase tracking-tighter">¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm</span></button></header>
<main class="flex-grow p-container-margin pb-32 flex flex-col items-center gap-8">
<!-- Title & Instruction -->
<section class="w-full max-w-2xl text-center">
<div class="inline-flex items-center gap-4 bg-primary-container/20 px-6 py-3 rounded-full mb-4">
<span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-primary">Estados Unidos</span>
<button class="w-12 h-12 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-md active:scale-95" onclick="playAudio('usa')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-2xl">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-surface-variant">¡Colorea la bandera!</p>
</section>
<!-- Canvas Area -->
<section class="w-full max-w-2xl aspect-[1.9/1] bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-lg border-4 border-surface-container-highest shadow-inner flex items-center justify-center p-4 relative overflow-hidden">
<svg class="w-full h-full drop-shadow-sm" id="flag-canvas" viewBox="0 0 1900 1000" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<!-- Stripes Container -->
<g id="stripes">
<!-- 13 Stripes simplified -->
<rect class="paint-zone" data-type="stripe" fill="#FFFFFF" height="76.9" stroke="#D1D5DB" stroke-width="2" width="1900" x="0" y="0"></rect>
<rect class="paint-zone" data-type="stripe" fill="#FFFFFF" height="76.9" stroke="#D1D5DB" stroke-width="2" width="1900" x="0" y="76.9"></rect>
<rect class="paint-zone" data-type="stripe" fill="#FFFFFF" height="76.9" stroke="#D1D5DB" stroke-width="2" width="1900" x="0" y="153.8"></rect>
<rect class="paint-zone" data-type="stripe" fill="#FFFFFF" height="76.9" stroke="#D1D5DB" stroke-width="2" width="1900" x="0" y="230.7"></rect>
<rect class="paint-zone" data-type="stripe" fill="#FFFFFF" height="76.9" stroke="#D1D5DB" stroke-width="2" width="1900" x="0" y="307.6"></rect>
<rect class="paint-zone" data-type="stripe" fill="#FFFFFF" height="76.9" stroke="#D1D5DB" stroke-width="2" width="1900" x="0" y="384.5"></rect>
<rect class="paint-zone" data-type="stripe" fill="#FFFFFF" height="76.9" stroke="#D1D5DB" stroke-width="2" width="1900" x="0" y="461.4"></rect>
<rect class="paint-zone" data-type="stripe" fill="#FFFFFF" height="76.9" stroke="#D1D5DB" stroke-width="2" width="1900" x="0" y="538.3"></rect>
<rect class="paint-zone" data-type="stripe" fill="#FFFFFF" height="76.9" stroke="#D1D5DB" stroke-width="2" width="1900" x="0" y="615.2"></rect>
<rect class="paint-zone" data-type="stripe" fill="#FFFFFF" height="76.9" stroke="#D1D5DB" stroke-width="2" width="1900" x="0" y="692.1"></rect>
<rect class="paint-zone" data-type="stripe" fill="#FFFFFF" height="76.9" stroke="#D1D5DB" stroke-width="2" width="1900" x="0" y="769"></rect>
<rect class="paint-zone" data-type="stripe" fill="#FFFFFF" height="76.9" stroke="#D1D5DB" stroke-width="2" width="1900" x="0" y="845.9"></rect>
<rect class="paint-zone" data-type="stripe" fill="#FFFFFF" height="76.9" stroke="#D1D5DB" stroke-width="2" width="1900" x="0" y="922.8"></rect>
</g>
<!-- Union (Blue Field) -->
<rect class="paint-zone" data-type="union" fill="#FFFFFF" height="538.5" stroke="#D1D5DB" stroke-width="4" width="760" x="0" y="0"></rect>
<!-- Stars (Simplified representation for kids) -->
<g id="stars" pointer-events="none">
<circle cx="150" cy="100" fill="#F0F4FB" r="25"></circle>
<circle cx="300" cy="100" fill="#F0F4FB" r="25"></circle>
<circle cx="450" cy="100" fill="#F0F4FB" r="25"></circle>
<circle cx="600" cy="100" fill="#F0F4FB" r="25"></circle>
<circle cx="225" cy="200" fill="#F0F4FB" r="25"></circle>
<circle cx="375" cy="200" fill="#F0F4FB" r="25"></circle>
<circle cx="525" cy="200" fill="#F0F4FB" r="25"></circle>
<circle cx="150" cy="300" fill="#F0F4FB" r="25"></circle>
<circle cx="300" cy="300" fill="#F0F4FB" r="25"></circle>
<circle cx="450" cy="300" fill="#F0F4FB" r="25"></circle>
<circle cx="600" cy="300" fill="#F0F4FB" r="25"></circle>
<circle cx="225" cy="400" fill="#F0F4FB" r="25"></circle>
<circle cx="375" cy="400" fill="#F0F4FB" r="25"></circle>
<circle cx="525" cy="400" fill="#F0F4FB" r="25"></circle>
</g>
</svg>
<!-- Confetti Overlay (Hidden) -->
<div class="absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none opacity-0 flex items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container/20 transition-opacity duration-500" id="celebration">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-secondary text-9xl fill-icon">star</span>
</div>
</section>
<!-- Color Palette Bento -->
<section class="w-full max-w-2xl grid grid-cols-3 gap-6 px-4">
<!-- Rojo -->
<div class="flex flex-col gap-3">
<button class="w-full aspect-square rounded-xl bg-error btn-tactile-red flex items-center justify-center border-4 border-error-container" onclick="selectColor('#ba1a1a', 'rojo')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white text-4xl" id="brush-rojo">brush</span>
</button>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
<p class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface">Rojo</p>
<button class="w-10 h-10 bg-surface-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center active:scale-95" onclick="playAudio('rojo')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-xl">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Blanco -->
<div class="flex flex-col gap-3">
<button class="w-full aspect-square rounded-xl bg-surface-container-lowest btn-tactile-white flex items-center justify-center border-4 border-outline-variant" onclick="selectColor('#ffffff', 'blanco')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-outline text-4xl hidden" id="brush-blanco">brush</span>
</button>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
<p class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface">Blanco</p>
<button class="w-10 h-10 bg-surface-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center active:scale-95" onclick="playAudio('blanco')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-xl">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Azul -->
<div class="flex flex-col gap-3">
<button class="w-full aspect-square rounded-xl bg-primary-container btn-tactile-blue flex items-center justify-center border-4 border-on-primary-fixed-variant" onclick="selectColor('#004163', 'azul')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white text-4xl hidden" id="brush-azul">brush</span>
</button>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
<p class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface">Azul</p>
<button class="w-10 h-10 bg-surface-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center active:scale-95" onclick="playAudio('azul')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-xl">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</div>
</section>
<!-- Tool Actions -->
<section class="flex gap-4">
<button class="px-8 py-4 bg-surface-container-high rounded-full font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface-variant flex items-center gap-2 hover:bg-surface-variant transition-colors border-2 border-outline-variant" onclick="resetFlag()">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">restart_alt</span>
                Empezar de nuevo
            </button>
</section>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Nav Anchor -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-touch-target-min flex justify-around items-center px-gutter pb-2 bg-surface shadow-lg border-t-4 border-surface-container-highest z-50 rounded-t-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant dark:text-outline px-4 py-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-all" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">explore</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explorar</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant dark:text-outline px-4 py-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-all" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Pasaporte</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container rounded-xl px-4 py-2 translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined fill-icon">videogame_asset</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Jugar</span>
</a>
</nav>
<script>
        let currentColor = '#ba1a1a';
        let paintedParts = 0;
        const totalParts = 14; // 13 stripes + 1 union

        function selectColor(color, name) {
            currentColor = color;
            
            // UI Feedback for selected brush
            document.querySelectorAll('[id^="brush-"]').forEach(el => el.classList.add('hidden'));
            document.getElementById(`brush-${name}`).classList.remove('hidden');
            
            // Haptic-like visual feedback
            console.log(`Selected color: ${name}`);
            playAudio(name);
        }

        // Initialize first color
        selectColor('#ba1a1a', 'rojo');

        // Painting Logic
        document.querySelectorAll('.paint-zone').forEach(zone => {
            zone.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                const target = e.currentTarget;
                if(target.getAttribute('fill') === '#FFFFFF' || target.getAttribute('fill') === '#F0F4FB') {
                    paintedParts++;
                }
                target.setAttribute('fill', currentColor);
                target.setAttribute('stroke', 'transparent');
                
                // Add "painted" look by changing star colors if union is blue
                if(target.dataset.type === 'union' && currentColor === '#004163') {
                    document.querySelectorAll('#stars circle').forEach(star => star.setAttribute('fill', '#FFFFFF'));
                }

                checkCompletion();
            });
        });

        function resetFlag() {
            document.querySelectorAll('.paint-zone').forEach(zone => {
                zone.setAttribute('fill', '#FFFFFF');
                zone.setAttribute('stroke', '#D1D5DB');
            });
            document.querySelectorAll('#stars circle').forEach(star => star.setAttribute('fill', '#F0F4FB'));
            paintedParts = 0;
            document.getElementById('celebration').classList.add('opacity-0');
        }

        function checkCompletion() {
            if(paintedParts >= totalParts) {
                const celebration = document.getElementById('celebration');
                celebration.classList.remove('opacity-0');
                playAudio('win');
                setTimeout(() => {
                    celebration.classList.add('opacity-0');
                }, 3000);
            }
        }

        function playAudio(id) {
            // Simulated audio player
            const feedback = {
                rojo: "¡Rojo!",
                blanco: "¡Blanco!",
                azul: "¡Azul!",
                usa: "Estados Unidos de América",
                title: "¡Vamos a aprender los colores de las banderas!",
                win: "¡Excelente trabajo! ¡Has terminado la bandera!"
            };
            console.log("Playing audio: " + feedback[id]);
            
            // Visual pulse on the speaker
            if(id === 'title') {
                const icon = document.querySelector('.animate-audio');
                icon.classList.remove('animate-audio');
                void icon.offsetWidth; // Trigger reflow
                icon.classList.add('animate-audio');
            }
        }
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Argentina) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport">
<title>Estación de Pintura - Argentina</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@100..900&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
            vertical-align: middle;
        }
        .chunky-shadow {
            box-shadow: 0 4px 0 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
        }
        .active-press {
            transition: transform 0.1s ease, box-shadow 0.1s ease;
        }
        .active-press:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 transparent;
        }
        .pulse-audio {
            animation: pulse 2s infinite;
        }
        @keyframes pulse {
            0% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(252, 204, 0, 0.7); }
            70% { transform: scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 0 0 15px rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
        }
        .flag-zone {
            aspect-ratio: 5 / 3;
        }
    </style>
<script id="tailwind-config">
        tailwind.config = {
            darkMode: "class",
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    "colors": {
                        "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                        "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                        "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                        "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                        "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                        "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                        "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                        "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                        "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                        "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                        "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                        "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                        "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                        "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                        "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                        "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                        "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                        "primary": "#006495",
                        "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                        "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                        "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                        "error": "#ba1a1a",
                        "secondary": "#735c00",
                        "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                        "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                        "outline": "#6e7882",
                        "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                        "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                        "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                        "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                        "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                        "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                        "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                        "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                        "on-surface": "#171c21",
                        "background": "#f7f9ff",
                        "on-background": "#171c21",
                        "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                        "surface-tint": "#006495",
                        "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                        "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                        "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                        "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                        "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                        "on-error": "#ffffff"
                    },
                    "borderRadius": {
                        "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                        "lg": "2rem",
                        "xl": "3rem",
                        "full": "9999px"
                    },
                    "spacing": {
                        "gutter": "16px",
                        "touch-target-min": "48px",
                        "container-margin": "24px",
                        "card-padding": "20px",
                        "unit": "8px"
                    },
                    "fontFamily": {
                        "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                        "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                        "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                        "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                        "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                        "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
                    },
                    "fontSize": {
                        "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                        "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                        "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                        "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                        "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                        "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
                    }
                },
            },
        }
    </script>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background min-h-screen flex flex-col font-body-md overflow-x-hidden">
<!-- TopAppBar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky z-50 bg-background border-b-4 border-surface-container-highest flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit h-20">
<div class="flex items-center gap-4">
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-surface-container active:scale-90 transition-all text-primary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-3xl">arrow_back</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-primary">Argentina</h1>
</div>
<button class="w-14 h-14 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-md active-press pulse-audio" onclick="playSound('Argentina')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-3xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</button>
<button class="w-14 h-14 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center shadow-md active-press chunky-shadow border-2 border-secondary-container" title="¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm" onclick="playSound('Alarma')"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">notifications_active</span><span class="text-[10px] font-label-bold leading-none">Alarma</span></button></header>
<main class="flex-grow flex flex-col items-center px-container-margin py-8 gap-8 mb-24">
<!-- Interactive Flag Canvas -->
<div class="w-full max-w-2xl bg-white rounded-lg p-6 border-4 border-surface-container-highest shadow-sm relative overflow-hidden">
<div class="flag-zone w-full border-2 border-dashed border-outline-variant rounded-lg flex flex-col transition-colors duration-500 overflow-hidden" id="flag-canvas">
<!-- Top Stripe -->
<div class="flex-1 bg-surface-container-low transition-colors duration-300 border-b-2 border-surface-container-highest cursor-pointer flex items-center justify-center" id="stripe-top" onclick="paintRegion('stripe-top')">
<span class="text-outline-variant font-label-bold opacity-30 select-none">Toca para pintar</span>
</div>
<!-- Middle Stripe with Sun -->
<div class="flex-1 bg-surface-container-low transition-colors duration-300 relative border-b-2 border-surface-container-highest cursor-pointer flex items-center justify-center" id="stripe-middle" onclick="paintRegion('stripe-middle')">
<div class="w-16 h-16 md:w-24 md:h-24 rounded-full border-4 border-dashed border-outline-variant transition-all duration-300 flex items-center justify-center" id="sun-of-may" onclick="event.stopPropagation(); paintRegion('sun-of-may')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-outline-variant text-4xl opacity-30 select-none">sunny</span>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Bottom Stripe -->
<div class="flex-1 bg-surface-container-low transition-colors duration-300 cursor-pointer flex items-center justify-center" id="stripe-bottom" onclick="paintRegion('stripe-bottom')">
<span class="text-outline-variant font-label-bold opacity-30 select-none">Toca para pintar</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="mt-6 flex justify-between items-center">
<div class="flex flex-col">
<span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-primary">¡Pintemos la bandera!</span>
<span class="font-body-md text-body-md text-on-surface-variant">Elige un color y toca la sección.</span>
</div>
<button class="bg-tertiary-container text-on-tertiary-container font-label-bold text-label-bold px-6 py-3 rounded-full active-press chunky-shadow border-b-4 border-tertiary flex items-center gap-2">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">check_circle</span>
                    Listo
                </button>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Palette Selector -->
<div class="w-full max-w-2xl grid grid-cols-3 gap-4">
<!-- Celeste -->
<button class="color-swatch relative group flex flex-col items-center gap-3 p-4 bg-white rounded-lg border-2 border-surface-container-highest hover:border-primary-container transition-all active-press chunky-shadow" data-color="#74ACDF" onclick="selectColor('#74ACDF', 'Celeste')">
<div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-[#74ACDF] border-4 border-white shadow-inner"></div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface">Celeste</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-secondary text-xl" onclick="event.stopPropagation(); playSound('Celeste')">volume_up</span>
</div>
</button>
<!-- Blanco -->
<button class="color-swatch relative group flex flex-col items-center gap-3 p-4 bg-white rounded-lg border-2 border-surface-container-highest hover:border-primary-container transition-all active-press chunky-shadow" data-color="#FFFFFF" onclick="selectColor('#FFFFFF', 'Blanco')">
<div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-white border-4 border-surface-container-highest shadow-inner"></div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface">Blanco</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-secondary text-xl" onclick="event.stopPropagation(); playSound('Blanco')">volume_up</span>
</div>
</button>
<!-- Amarillo -->
<button class="color-swatch relative group flex flex-col items-center gap-3 p-4 bg-white rounded-lg border-2 border-surface-container-highest hover:border-primary-container transition-all active-press chunky-shadow" data-color="#F6B40E" onclick="selectColor('#F6B40E', 'Amarillo')">
<div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-[#F6B40E] border-4 border-white shadow-inner"></div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface">Amarillo</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-secondary text-xl" onclick="event.stopPropagation(); playSound('Amarillo')">volume_up</span>
</div>
</button>
</div>
<!-- Educational Bento Card -->
<div class="w-full max-w-2xl grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
<div class="bg-primary-container/20 rounded-lg p-card-padding border-2 border-primary-container flex items-center gap-6">
<div class="w-24 h-24 flex-shrink-0 bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm overflow-hidden border-2 border-white">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A cheerful, colorful cartoon illustration of a smiling sun character wearing sunglasses, in a playful nursery art style. The sun is central, with soft golden rays against a friendly sky blue background. The overall aesthetic is educational and joyful for children." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuBPbiTMvlfHseWeJXDCZ07097-73EL0mJqEmcA9HyX0RYLaUp9jYYrrCO838AIarizKDrCqqyKPwbxRGsMXCzwBVyGGXbbQxsQ3_guUaEn41z6ETIFITzACFRUXcy8u4QU6x9qNufll36oavOt0a0L618LpUBmVzaL47iOrrJpJZxR8-jDB0cSNYksa3FGwzy2l4Mxvakcyqhh7_vlg82Qo4Te3gdd0t-9gT9WQmZXoz90yWqQ_RR8KJE541_snWsZQ28B8nI_eC1Q">
</div>
<div>
<h3 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-on-primary-container">Sol de Mayo</h3>
<p class="font-body-md text-body-md text-on-primary-fixed-variant">El centro de la bandera es un sol brillante que sonríe.</p>
</div>
</div>
<div class="bg-secondary-container/20 rounded-lg p-card-padding border-2 border-secondary-container flex flex-col justify-center gap-2">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-secondary-container flex items-center gap-2">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">lightbulb</span> Sabías que...
                </span>
<p class="font-body-md text-body-md text-on-secondary-fixed-variant">El color celeste representa el cielo despejado de Argentina.</p>
</div>
</div>
</main>
<!-- BottomNavBar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-touch-target-min flex justify-around items-center px-gutter pb-2 bg-surface border-t-4 border-surface-container-highest shadow-lg z-50 rounded-t-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant px-4 py-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-all active:scale-95" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">explore</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explorar</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container rounded-xl px-4 py-2 translate-y-1 active:scale-95 transition-all" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Pasaporte</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant px-4 py-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-all active:scale-95" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">videogame_asset</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Jugar</span>
</a>
</nav>
<script>
        let selectedColor = null;

        function selectColor(hex, name) {
            selectedColor = hex;
            // Clear previous selection highlight
            document.querySelectorAll('.color-swatch').forEach(swatch => {
                swatch.classList.remove('ring-4', 'ring-primary-container', 'border-primary');
            });
            // Add highlight to current
            event.currentTarget.classList.add('ring-4', 'ring-primary-container', 'border-primary');
            console.log("Selected:", name);
        }

        function paintRegion(regionId) {
            if (!selectedColor) {
                alert("¡Primero elige un color de la paleta!");
                return;
            }
            const region = document.getElementById(regionId);
            region.style.backgroundColor = selectedColor;
            region.classList.remove('bg-surface-container-low');
            
            // Remove the helper text/icon if it exists
            const helper = region.querySelector('span');
            if (helper) helper.remove();

            if (regionId === 'sun-of-may') {
                region.style.borderColor = 'transparent';
            }
        }

        function playSound(text) {
            // Placeholder for audio functionality
            console.log("Narrating:", text);
            // In a real app, this would trigger an Audio object or Speech Synthesis
            if ('speechSynthesis' in window) {
                const utterance = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text);
                utterance.lang = 'es-ES';
                window.speechSynthesis.speak(utterance);
            }
        }
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (China) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport">
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@400;500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "unit": "8px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        body { font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; }
        
        .tactile-button {
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }
        .tactile-button:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }

        .flag-stroke {
            stroke: #bec8d3;
            stroke-width: 2px;
            fill: #ffffff;
            transition: fill 0.3s ease;
        }

        .star-stroke {
            stroke: #bec8d3;
            stroke-width: 1px;
            fill: #ffffff;
            transition: fill 0.3s ease;
        }

        .color-selected {
            ring: 6px solid #2bb1ff;
            transform: scale(1.1);
        }

        @keyframes pulse-audio {
            0% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.1); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); }
        }
        .animate-audio {
            animation: pulse-audio 2s infinite ease-in-out;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background min-h-screen flex flex-col">
<!-- Top Navigation Anchor (Shared Component: TopAppBar) -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky bg-background dark:bg-on-background border-b-4 border-surface-container-highest dark:border-inverse-surface z-40">
<div class="flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit w-full">
<button class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary dark:text-primary-fixed-dim hover:opacity-80 active:translate-y-1 active:border-b-0 transition-all text-headline-lg-mobile" data-icon="arrow_back">arrow_back</button>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center">
<h1 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-primary dark:text-primary-fixed-dim">España / Spain</h1>
</div>
<button class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary dark:text-primary-fixed-dim hover:opacity-80 active:translate-y-1 active:border-b-0 transition-all text-headline-lg-mobile" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</button>
<button class="flex items-center gap-1 bg-tertiary-container text-on-tertiary-container px-4 py-2 rounded-full border-b-4 border-on-tertiary-fixed-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-lg"><span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">notifications_active</span><span class="font-label-bold text-[10px] uppercase tracking-tighter">¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm</span></button></div>
</header>
<main class="flex-grow container mx-auto px-container-margin py-8 flex flex-col items-center">
<!-- Header Info -->
<div class="w-full max-w-2xl flex items-center justify-between mb-8">
<div class="flex items-center gap-4">
<button class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-secondary-container flex items-center justify-center tactile-button animate-audio text-on-secondary-container" onclick="playAudio('China')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-4xl" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</button>
<h2 class="font-headline-lg text-headline-lg text-on-surface">Pintamos China</h2>
</div>
<div class="bg-surface-container-high px-6 py-2 rounded-full font-label-bold text-label-bold text-primary">
                1 / 5 Estrellas
            </div>
</div>
<!-- Flag Canvas -->
<div class="relative w-full max-w-3xl aspect-[3/2] bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-lg border-4 border-surface-container-highest p-4 mb-10 shadow-inner flex items-center justify-center">
<svg class="w-full h-full drop-shadow-md" id="china-flag" viewBox="0 0 30 20">
<!-- Red Field -->
<rect class="flag-stroke cursor-pointer" height="20" id="field" onclick="paintElement('field')" width="30" x="0" y="0"></rect>
<!-- Main Large Star -->
<path class="star-stroke cursor-pointer" d="M5,2 L5.58,3.81 L7.45,3.81 L5.93,4.92 L6.51,6.73 L5,5.62 L3.49,6.73 L4.07,4.92 L2.55,3.81 L4.42,3.81 Z" id="star1" onclick="paintElement('star1')"></path>
<!-- 4 Smaller Stars -->
<path class="star-stroke cursor-pointer" d="M10,2 L10.3,2.9 L11.2,2.9 L10.4,3.5 L10.7,4.4 L10,3.8 L9.3,4.4 L9.6,3.5 L8.8,2.9 L9.7,2.9 Z" id="star2" onclick="paintElement('star2')"></path>
<path class="star-stroke cursor-pointer" d="M12,4 L12.3,4.9 L13.2,4.9 L12.4,5.5 L12.7,6.4 L12,5.8 L11.3,6.4 L11.6,5.5 L10.8,4.9 L11.7,4.9 Z" id="star3" onclick="paintElement('star3')"></path>
<path class="star-stroke cursor-pointer" d="M12,7 L12.3,7.9 L13.2,7.9 L12.4,8.5 L12.7,9.4 L12,8.8 L11.3,9.4 L11.6,8.5 L10.8,7.9 L11.7,7.9 Z" id="star4" onclick="paintElement('star4')"></path>
<path class="star-stroke cursor-pointer" d="M10,9 L10.3,9.9 L11.2,9.9 L10.4,10.5 L10.7,11.4 L10,10.8 L9.3,11.4 L9.6,10.5 L8.8,9.9 L9.7,9.9 Z" id="star5" onclick="paintElement('star5')"></path>
</svg>
<div class="absolute -top-4 -right-4">
<div class="w-32 h-32 bg-cover bg-center rounded-full border-4 border-white shadow-lg" data-alt="A cute, friendly 3D cartoon panda mascot smiling warmly and holding a paintbrush. The character is rendered in a soft, premium educational style with rounded features and vibrant textures. The background is a clean, bright minimalist studio with soft daylight, perfectly complementing the kid-friendly UI theme." style="background-image: url('https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuAOcBtufX1ZQNbNaG_g4uKdyy-yeNWzEiDKd6BKGnB3tRsXgNupeEksKKRpEWpH9kLihVaxRa9nqEKQ5LnVViUgeI0jATGTQUlLgGEasnf5E_ioZgRd_6wSWaOFqIBCAyoQvUDOh9nWn6Z2Npw5CjMxIBdMa_7FpRmP_kO7E_jK7uAqtFnxiqRUImjItZCOJMKHfLUPv693JKbF_2-uI0KkmxGPHKIiEl_9PvuAh9WfpONecLs61OxNJrlu1Leqbr8ZB4wNqBgV9zs')"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Color Palette -->
<div class="flex flex-wrap justify-center gap-8 mb-12">
<!-- Rojo Button -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-3">
<button class="w-24 h-24 rounded-full bg-error border-b-[8px] border-red-900 transition-all active:translate-y-[4px] active:border-b-[4px] ring-offset-4 ring-4 ring-primary-container" id="btn-rojo" onclick="selectColor('#ba1a1a', 'rojo')" title="Rojo">
</button>
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<button class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-surface-container-high flex items-center justify-center text-primary active:scale-90 transition-transform" onclick="playAudio('Rojo')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-xl" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</button>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface">Rojo</span>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Amarillo Button -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-3">
<button class="w-24 h-24 rounded-full bg-secondary-container border-b-[8px] border-yellow-700 transition-all active:translate-y-[4px] active:border-b-[4px] ring-offset-4" id="btn-amarillo" onclick="selectColor('#fccc00', 'amarillo')" title="Amarillo">
</button>
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<button class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-surface-container-high flex items-center justify-center text-primary active:scale-90 transition-transform" onclick="playAudio('Amarillo')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-xl" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</button>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface">Amarillo</span>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Borrador -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-3">
<button class="w-24 h-24 rounded-full bg-white border-2 border-outline-variant border-b-[8px] border-surface-container-highest transition-all active:translate-y-[4px] active:border-b-[4px] flex items-center justify-center ring-offset-4" id="btn-eraser" onclick="selectColor('#ffffff', 'eraser')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-4xl text-outline" data-icon="ink_eraser">ink_eraser</span>
</button>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface">Borrador</span>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Success Message (Initially Hidden) -->
<div class="hidden text-center scale-0 transition-transform duration-500 ease-out" id="celebration">
<h3 class="font-headline-lg text-headline-lg text-tertiary mb-2">¡Excelente!</h3>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-surface-variant">Has pintado la bandera de China</p>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation (Shared Component: BottomNavBar) -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-touch-target-min flex justify-around items-center px-gutter pb-2 bg-surface z-50 rounded-t-lg border-t-4 border-surface-container-highest dark:border-inverse-surface shadow-lg md:hidden">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant dark:text-outline px-4 py-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high active:scale-95 transition-transform duration-150" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="explore">explore</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explorar</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant dark:text-outline px-4 py-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high active:scale-95 transition-transform duration-150" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="menu_book">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Pasaporte</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-primary-container dark:bg-on-primary-fixed-variant text-on-primary-container dark:text-primary-fixed rounded-xl px-4 py-2 translate-y-1 active:scale-95 transition-transform duration-150" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="videogame_asset">videogame_asset</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Jugar</span>
</a>
</nav>
<script>
        let currentColor = '#ba1a1a';
        let activeSelection = 'rojo';

        function selectColor(color, name) {
            currentColor = color;
            activeSelection = name;
            
            // Remove active styles
            document.querySelectorAll('[id^="btn-"]').forEach(btn => {
                btn.classList.remove('ring-4', 'ring-primary-container');
            });
            
            // Add active style to selected
            document.getElementById(`btn-${name}`).classList.add('ring-4', 'ring-primary-container');
            
            console.log('Selected color:', name);
        }

        function paintElement(id) {
            const el = document.getElementById(id);
            el.style.fill = currentColor;
            el.style.stroke = 'none';
            
            checkProgress();
        }

        function playAudio(text) {
            // Placeholder for audio logic
            console.log("Playing audio for: " + text);
            // Visual feedback
            const utter = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text);
            utter.lang = 'es-ES';
            window.speechSynthesis.speak(utter);
        }

        function checkProgress() {
            const field = document.getElementById('field').style.fill;
            const s1 = document.getElementById('star1').style.fill;
            const s2 = document.getElementById('star2').style.fill;
            const s3 = document.getElementById('star3').style.fill;
            const s4 = document.getElementById('star4').style.fill;
            const s5 = document.getElementById('star5').style.fill;

            // Simplified check: Field is red and stars are yellow
            // Using RGB because style.fill returns rgb()
            const isRed = (c) => c === 'rgb(186, 26, 26)' || c === '#ba1a1a';
            const isYellow = (c) => c === 'rgb(252, 204, 0)' || c === '#fccc00';

            if (isRed(field) && isYellow(s1) && isYellow(s2) && isYellow(s3) && isYellow(s4) && isYellow(s5)) {
                showCelebration();
            }
        }

        function showCelebration() {
            const celeb = document.getElementById('celebration');
            celeb.classList.remove('hidden');
            setTimeout(() => {
                celeb.classList.add('scale-100');
            }, 10);
            
            // Haptic-like visual shake for buttons
            document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
            playAudio("¡Increíble! ¡Has completado la bandera!");
        }

        // Initialize first color
        window.onload = () => {
            selectColor('#ba1a1a', 'rojo');
        }
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Quiz Nivel 2: Estados Unidos -->
<!DOCTYPE html>

<html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/>
<title>Flag Adventure - Quiz</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@100..900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-primary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-secondary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #dee3e9;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-active {
            box-shadow: 0 0px 0 0 transparent !important;
            transform: translateY(6px);
        }
        .pulse-soft {
            animation: pulse-border 2s infinite;
        }
        @keyframes pulse-border {
            0% { border-color: rgba(0, 100, 149, 0.2); transform: scale(1); }
            50% { border-color: rgba(0, 100, 149, 1); transform: scale(1.02); }
            100% { border-color: rgba(0, 100, 149, 0.2); transform: scale(1); }
        }
        .star-pop {
            animation: star-pop 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275);
        }
        @keyframes star-pop {
            0% { transform: scale(0); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); }
        }
    </style>
<script id="tailwind-config">
        tailwind.config = {
            darkMode: "class",
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    "colors": {
                        "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                        "error": "#ba1a1a",
                        "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                        "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                        "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                        "background": "#f7f9ff",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                        "primary": "#006495",
                        "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                        "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                        "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                        "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                        "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                        "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                        "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                        "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                        "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                        "outline": "#6e7882",
                        "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                        "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                        "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                        "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                        "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                        "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                        "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                        "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                        "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                        "secondary": "#735c00",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                        "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                        "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                        "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                        "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                        "on-background": "#171c21",
                        "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                        "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                        "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                        "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                        "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                        "on-error": "#ffffff",
                        "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                        "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                        "on-surface": "#171c21",
                        "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                        "surface-tint": "#006495",
                        "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                        "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851"
                    },
                    "borderRadius": {
                        "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                        "lg": "2rem",
                        "xl": "3rem",
                        "full": "9999px"
                    },
                    "spacing": {
                        "gutter": "16px",
                        "container-margin": "24px",
                        "unit": "8px",
                        "card-padding": "20px",
                        "touch-target-min": "48px"
                    },
                    "fontFamily": {
                        "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                        "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                        "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                        "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                        "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                        "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
                    },
                    "fontSize": {
                        "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", { "lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700" }],
                        "headline-lg": ["36px", { "lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700" }],
                        "body-md": ["18px", { "lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500" }],
                        "body-lg": ["20px", { "lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500" }],
                        "label-bold": ["16px", { "lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700" }],
                        "headline-md": ["24px", { "lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700" }]
                    }
                },
            },
        }
    </script>
<style>
    body {
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);
    }
  </style>
  </head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background font-body-md min-h-screen flex flex-col pb-24">
<!-- Top Navigation Bar (Shared Component Strategy) -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky bg-surface-container-low flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit z-40">
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="menu">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary font-bold">Flag Adventure</h1>
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100" id="global-volume">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</button>
</header>
<main class="flex-1 w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto px-container-margin py-unit space-y-6">
<!-- Progress Bar Section -->
<div class="space-y-2">
<div class="flex justify-between items-center text-on-surface-variant font-label-bold text-label-bold">
<span>Progreso</span>
<span>4 / 10</span>
</div>
<div class="h-4 w-full bg-surface-container-highest rounded-full overflow-hidden">
<div class="h-full w-[40%] bg-tertiary-container rounded-full transition-all duration-500 ease-out"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Audio Question Interaction -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center space-y-4 py-4">
<button class="w-32 h-32 rounded-full bg-secondary-container flex items-center justify-center chunky-shadow-primary active:chunky-shadow-active transition-all group overflow-hidden relative" id="audio-prompt" onclick="this.classList.toggle('animate-pulse')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container !text-6xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-white/20 opacity-0 group-active:opacity-100 transition-opacity"></div>
</button>
<div class="text-center space-y-1">
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-on-surface">¿Cuál es la bandera de Estados Unidos?</h2>
<p class="font-body-md text-on-surface-variant italic opacity-80">Which is the flag of the United States?</p>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Quiz Options (Bento Style Cards) -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-6 pt-4">
<!-- Option 1: United Kingdom -->
<button class="group relative bg-surface-container-lowest p-card-padding rounded-lg border-2 border-surface-variant chunky-shadow-secondary active:chunky-shadow-active transition-all hover:border-primary-container h-48 sm:h-64 flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden">
<div class="w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center p-4">
<img class="w-full h-full object-contain rounded-sm shadow-sm" data-alt="The vibrant national flag of the United Kingdom, the Union Jack, with its iconic blue field, white saltire, and red cross, rendered in a clean, flat vector style with slightly rounded corners and a subtle soft fabric texture. The colors are bright and saturated, set against a clean white educational card background with soft studio lighting." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuALcENXhxtdRWEo7InMz1WzbaWRh3a06h47VeSrjOh0Qjli_KfkPeaUWkL1tjflYmlGMuWG8vldCkhvRV__0YRdjLgRJU48kDzn8or5QYxHfRYYyaSTvz_Vyu59PMKwJlQ81Ry7DQ6bRkKYN6_gVvgdXUgCXs2VvCD4biJOtFtV1D-OnKBUhnPMtilO0X51DDbdvalm-nH00IYJoF9hDtPTsexLSv5CYMT6IGXYxQdfetbJ0x3nhHSxbhU-Oowff1k1KfPvzfmPZ2o"/>
</div>
</button>
<!-- Option 2: USA (Correct Answer with Pulse) -->
<button class="group relative bg-surface-container-lowest p-card-padding rounded-lg border-4 border-primary/20 chunky-shadow-secondary active:chunky-shadow-active transition-all pulse-soft h-48 sm:h-64 flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden">
<div class="w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center p-4">
<img class="w-full h-full object-contain rounded-sm shadow-sm" data-alt="The national flag of the United States of America, featuring the classic stars and stripes in vivid red, white, and blue, rendered as a crisp, high-contrast digital illustration. The flag is displayed with straight, clean lines and a slight silk sheen, centered perfectly within a wide, chunky-bordered white card that feels tactile and toy-like for a child's learning app." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuBDqKcq-nEh6u3DK5Kgqr4oSE3iVPgG0np-3U2N2W7U-A_r5eHjCXlsnTSmQXEp81xmCxqUh7AbDgX4pafZHhBep9DZuWWGw31YrqeEg5d3rP26Exs6KRNSlkZsEefY7yMG6E85ILNQmPZzQFgMZUOICowws9_3z3svd7u1CtCVulREaSsicFpQlspsrhAMK4KepI2XSt78Jm40sQunyqXrnUEbr90EI0Vt0uaSF7T1qoxYXGhDE2ma3WSonyl2pnfep33_5gE-7bk"/>
</div>
<div class="absolute top-2 right-2 opacity-0 group-focus:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-tertiary-container !text-4xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">check_circle</span>
</div>
</button>
<!-- Option 3: China -->
<button class="group relative bg-surface-container-lowest p-card-padding rounded-lg border-2 border-surface-variant chunky-shadow-secondary active:chunky-shadow-active transition-all hover:border-primary-container h-48 sm:h-64 flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden">
<div class="w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center p-4">
<img class="w-full h-full object-contain rounded-sm shadow-sm" data-alt="The national flag of the People's Republic of China, with its striking solid red background and five bright yellow stars, presented in a clean, professional educational format. The design is bold and minimalist, featuring soft corner-rounding and a subtle drop shadow to make it appear as a physical flashcard in a brightly lit, modern digital classroom environment." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuA4gc2jctd53Sx_g9qZHpij4wENLEoGuoy5uKsn59kYFfnvTj8_nuNw40jxtXqJkwv1uR-Z3MlzEYMkskrXnHzIdkmeVV9EvLgBq5EKEyXDXgzrOp4r7PXzf89lBk1iJjUZuTdQcwZ-SqZcspJcM3PsI9mDtIC5GpY5k_iWGJOp-LwgObbAbCpwC-iSt9QRCFXY0lO1XpowX1hQcC-q_Du5MOAT8JRGg_MeGDKYSSy18OLkbx5xBFcfY57cmrGL3ISIBTBkQiTFKz4"/>
</div>
</button>
</div>
<!-- Performance Feedback Section -->
<div class="pt-8 flex flex-col items-center space-y-4">
<p class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">Tus Estrellas</p>
<div class="flex gap-4 items-center justify-center">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-secondary-container !text-5xl star-pop" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-secondary-container !text-5xl star-pop" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-secondary-container !text-5xl star-pop" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-outline-variant !text-5xl opacity-40">star</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-outline-variant !text-5xl opacity-40">star</span>
</div>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation Bar (Shared Component Strategy) -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest border-t-4 border-surface-variant shadow-lg rounded-t-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="map">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="menu_book">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0 hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="quiz" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Simple interaction script for audio and feedback -->
<script>
        document.getElementById('audio-prompt').addEventListener('click', function() {
            // Simulate speaking
            const synth = window.speechSynthesis;
            if (synth) {
                const utteranceEs = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance('¿Cuál es la bandera de Estados Unidos?');
                utteranceEs.lang = 'es-ES';
                const utteranceEn = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance('Which is the flag of the United States?');
                utteranceEn.lang = 'en-US';
                
                synth.speak(utteranceEs);
                setTimeout(() => synth.speak(utteranceEn), 2000);
            }
        });

        // Toggle volume icon state
        document.getElementById('global-volume').addEventListener('click', function() {
            const icon = this.querySelector('span');
            if (icon.innerText === 'volume_up') {
                icon.innerText = 'volume_off';
            } else {
                icon.innerText = 'volume_up';
            }
        });
    </script>
</body></html>

<!-- Quiz Nivel 2: India -->
<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="en"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/>
<title>Flag Adventure - Quiz Level 2</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        body { font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; }
        .material-symbols-outlined {
