            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
            display: inline-block;
            vertical-align: middle;
        }
        .tactile-btn {
            box-shadow: 0 4px 0 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
        }
        .tactile-btn:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
        }
        .flag-card {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #e4e8ef;
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
        }
        .flag-card:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #e4e8ef;
        }
        .audio-pulse {
            animation: pulse 2s infinite;
        }
        @keyframes pulse {
            0% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(252, 204, 0, 0.7); }
            70% { transform: scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 0 0 15px rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
        }
    </style>
<style>
    body {
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);
    }
  </style>
  </head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background min-h-screen flex flex-col overflow-x-hidden">
<!-- TopAppBar -->
<header class="bg-surface-container-low w-full top-0 sticky z-40 flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit h-16">
<div class="flex items-center gap-4">
<button class="active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 text-primary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-headline-md">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary">Flag Adventure</h1>
</div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">LVL 2</span>
<button class="active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 text-primary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-headline-md">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</header>
<!-- Main Content Canvas -->
<main class="flex-grow container mx-auto px-container-margin pt-4 pb-24 max-w-lg">
<!-- Progress Bar Section -->
<div class="mb-8">
<div class="flex justify-between items-end mb-2">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">Quest Progress</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-primary">4/10</span>
</div>
<div class="h-4 w-full bg-surface-container-highest rounded-full overflow-hidden">
<div class="h-full bg-tertiary-container w-[40%] rounded-full transition-all duration-500"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Question Section -->
<section class="text-center mb-8 space-y-4">
<div class="relative inline-block mb-4">
<button class="audio-pulse w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-secondary-container flex items-center justify-center tactile-btn text-on-secondary-container" onclick="playAudioPrompt()">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined !text-4xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
<div class="space-y-2">
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-on-background">¿Cuál es la bandera de la India?</h2>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-surface-variant italic">Which is the flag of India?</p>
</div>
</section>
<!-- Options Grid -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 mb-12">
<!-- Option A: Argentina -->
<button class="flag-card group bg-surface-container-lowest border-2 border-surface-variant rounded-lg p-card-padding flex items-center gap-6 text-left" onclick="selectOption('wrong')">
<div class="w-32 h-20 rounded-md overflow-hidden bg-surface-container shrink-0">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="The national flag of Argentina, featuring three equal horizontal bands of light blue and white, with a centered golden Sun of May with a human face and thirty-two rays. The style is clean, vibrant, and educational with a soft matte finish against a neutral studio background." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuBhj7c6SDkjPy7WxzG6llJzuIOTUKTCV3VcZHAE7ovrFopebOzqnu0bvRtqy5ipTOHbfF1holvV2PzWd3J8Ai6qVFA8Ob6zXE-6K579cjL84QC78sWSAe0lrTmYXsQJ-aSKXcrvSUUXOedbJxQJCQebcEHQuCP56oEdhOw3okgz4lRywtSPZ8eYj6XKB8YWRkbSDlMvh7hbUxFfBHiTyREew1tFEfQSXaEO3_Qzt8Rrg4RiQKGxMQ95GHHTFKPCqWXf4TWUbvxzpXg"/>
</div>
<span class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-on-surface">Argentina</span>
</button>
<!-- Option B: India (Correct) -->
<button class="flag-card group bg-surface-container-lowest border-2 border-primary-container rounded-lg p-card-padding flex items-center gap-6 text-left" onclick="selectOption('correct')">
<div class="w-32 h-20 rounded-md overflow-hidden bg-surface-container shrink-0">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="The national flag of India, a horizontal tricolor of saffron at the top, white in the middle, and green at the bottom. In the center is the navy blue Ashoka Chakra, a wheel with 24 spokes. High-quality children's educational illustration style, bright colors, and soft lighting." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuAVW6yOI4mGz3aohJAUj8MCO0MHiUa1z3aFXDBTDTDczL0kKW4duvA_pVg0XGDO_1uiudDqwXIkcG6P6wiUbyx8EYnDwqTgfU3dYYu_eksJcX7PJdwt8pUG6PfVHiCokQitxuZM8UoMJW6y8BmoDvED6mOLc6dvjsqJsl3rFsgDYiRs8AK6qSiRHjHZXBOuZkYvGcC5567G-EMNpHjExlHrdnTYl6UzhoIVnz2SHqLL3tyal_BNNzjFkp56whgkKs94y9HMlZWRwAw"/>
</div>
<span class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-on-surface">India</span>
</button>
<!-- Option C: South Africa -->
<button class="flag-card group bg-surface-container-lowest border-2 border-surface-variant rounded-lg p-card-padding flex items-center gap-6 text-left" onclick="selectOption('wrong')">
<div class="w-32 h-20 rounded-md overflow-hidden bg-surface-container shrink-0">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="The national flag of South Africa, featuring a horizontal Y-shape in green, with red on top and blue below. It has a black triangle at the hoist side separated by a yellow band, and white bands bordering the green Y. Modern flat design, rich saturation, educational context." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuCdHyGVVKKk36vESwRHguXH9_UThJuJlb3BqtZX0zTM6ysirYazcQjGl1CVwaOwXk4mqOEmLa9weNVho2dTfoQkZ9a6GuRs2VZIX5qJXYDYMBCWOhmqBYKeMie99w85-aq-eoKBS9A_fa8r7ggEDI0ia3_gQm4pmIHmEbHDhEKT6jGLuoi1v81kYBAv0a7TE4lW0kfU3AJrcDhLkvTXBnfCznp-5XWR7AMbp57BXw8ySgWv8g1NqkHF9VXjei5iGfH1RWvToDJTeaA"/>
</div>
<span class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-on-surface">South Africa</span>
</button>
</div>
<!-- Performance Stars -->
<div class="flex justify-center items-center gap-4 py-4 bg-surface-container-low rounded-xl">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined !text-4xl text-secondary-container" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined !text-5xl text-secondary-container" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined !text-4xl text-outline-variant" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0;">star</span>
</div>
</main>
<!-- BottomNavBar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 bg-surface-container-lowest flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 shadow-lg rounded-t-lg border-t-4 border-surface-variant">
<!-- Explore -->
<button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-75">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="map">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</button>
<!-- Passport -->
<button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-75">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="menu_book">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</button>
<!-- Play (Active) -->
<button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-75">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="quiz" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</button>
</nav>
<!-- Correct/Wrong Micro-interactions -->
<div class="fixed inset-0 pointer-events-none flex items-center justify-center z-[60] opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-300" id="feedback-overlay">
<div class="p-8 rounded-full bg-white shadow-2xl scale-50 transition-transform duration-500" id="feedback-content">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined !text-9xl" id="feedback-icon"></span>
</div>
</div>
<script>
        function selectOption(type) {
            const overlay = document.getElementById('feedback-overlay');
            const content = document.getElementById('feedback-content');
            const icon = document.getElementById('feedback-icon');
            
            overlay.classList.remove('opacity-0');
            content.classList.remove('scale-50');
            content.classList.add('scale-100');

            if(type === 'correct') {
                icon.innerText = 'check_circle';
                icon.className = 'material-symbols-outlined !text-9xl text-tertiary-container';
                // Success Audio Trigger Simulation
            } else {
                icon.innerText = 'cancel';
                icon.className = 'material-symbols-outlined !text-9xl text-error';
            }

            setTimeout(() => {
                overlay.classList.add('opacity-0');
                content.classList.add('scale-50');
                content.classList.remove('scale-100');
            }, 1000);
        }

        function playAudioPrompt() {
            console.log("Playing audio: ¿Cuál es la bandera de la India? Which is the flag of India?");
            // Add a temporary animation effect to show audio is "playing"
            const btn = document.querySelector('.audio-pulse');
            btn.classList.remove('audio-pulse');
            void btn.offsetWidth; // trigger reflow
            btn.classList.add('audio-pulse');
        }
    </script>
</body></html>

<!-- Quiz Nivel 2: Sudáfrica -->
<!DOCTYPE html>

<html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport"/>
<title>Flag Adventure - Level 2</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@400;500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif;
            -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
        }

        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 24;
        }

        /* Tactile Shadow Buttons */
        .btn-tactile-primary {
            @apply transition-all duration-75 active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        
        .btn-tactile-secondary {
            @apply transition-all duration-75 active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 0 0 #d1d5db;
        }

        .card-tactile {
            @apply transition-all duration-100 hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-95 cursor-pointer;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #dee3e9;
        }

        .card-tactile:active {
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #dee3e9;
            transform: translateY(4px);
        }

        @keyframes pulse-yellow {
            0% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 4px 0 0 #a38400, 0 0 0 0px rgba(252, 204, 0, 0.4); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 4px 0 0 #a38400, 0 0 0 15px rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 4px 0 0 #a38400, 0 0 0 0px rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
        }

        .audio-pulse {
            animation: pulse-yellow 2s infinite;
        }

        .confetti-slow {
            pointer-events: none;
            position: absolute;
        }
    </style>
<style>
    body {
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);
    }
  </style>
  </head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background min-h-screen pb-24">
<!-- Top App Bar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky bg-surface-container-low flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit z-50">
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<button class="p-2 active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary font-bold">Flag Adventure</h1>
</div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<div class="bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container px-3 py-1 rounded-full font-label-bold flex items-center gap-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[18px]" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
<span>Level 2</span>
</div>
<button class="p-2 active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</header>
<main class="max-w-md mx-auto px-container-margin pt-6 pb-12 flex flex-col gap-8">
<!-- Progress Bar -->
<div class="w-full">
<div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-2 px-1">
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">Pregunta 4 de 10</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-tertiary">40%</span>
</div>
<div class="h-4 w-full bg-surface-container-highest rounded-full overflow-hidden">
<div class="h-full bg-tertiary-container rounded-full w-[40%] transition-all duration-500 shadow-sm border-r-2 border-white/20"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Question Section -->
<section class="flex flex-col items-center gap-6 text-center">
<!-- Large Audio Button -->
<button class="audio-pulse w-24 h-24 rounded-full bg-secondary-container flex items-center justify-center text-on-secondary-container transition-transform active:scale-90" onclick="playQuestion()" style="box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #a38400;">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-5xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</button>
<div class="space-y-2">
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-on-surface leading-tight px-4">
                    ¿Cuál es la bandera de Sudáfrica?
                </h2>
<p class="font-body-md text-on-surface-variant italic">
                    "Which is the flag of South Africa?"
                </p>
</div>
</section>
<!-- Flag Options Grid -->
<section class="grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 mt-4">
<!-- Option 1: Colombia -->
<div class="card-tactile bg-surface-container-lowest p-card-padding rounded-lg border-2 border-surface-variant flex items-center gap-6 group" onclick="selectFlag(this, false)">
<div class="w-32 h-20 rounded-md overflow-hidden border-2 border-outline-variant shrink-0 bg-white shadow-sm">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="The flag of Colombia featuring three horizontal bands of yellow, blue, and red. The yellow band is at the top and occupies half the height, while the blue and red bands are at the bottom, each occupying a quarter. The image is clean, vibrant, and displayed in a high-contrast educational style for children." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuDZ2Knj4RmiUTzG6oNuSJn2gkt2cFVNmsY55FdL3Q0GcXgWDUbHrMBI_DZ-uGJa6bE23U0a1hOHV1l_tllYflN_uXOwWslkXBOZo4PV_g7E4-DjrjIbUgLc1v-BRc5jmyU4ysZJiqznZPo3I1F_lo68vBoDI2485JALIPdhybusU1x5LILOd6-NR16r9okVnumiyxQPHDnoEqkiFHly-HqZtcfsG4lKsPKoOWd1zAPPcFm6D2gi5OMiBS3-GNc2MakJp8V1G0xPDWA"/>
</div>
<div class="text-left">
<p class="font-headline-md text-primary font-bold">Colombia</p>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Option 2: South Africa (Correct) -->
<div class="card-tactile bg-surface-container-lowest p-card-padding rounded-lg border-2 border-surface-variant flex items-center gap-6 group" onclick="selectFlag(this, true)">
<div class="w-32 h-20 rounded-md overflow-hidden border-2 border-outline-variant shrink-0 bg-white shadow-sm">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="The flag of South Africa displayed as a crisp, high-resolution graphic. It features a horizontal Y-shaped band in green, bordered by white on the upper and lower arms and yellow against a black triangle at the hoist. The remaining areas are red at the top and blue at the bottom. Bright, playful lighting highlights its bold primary colors." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuC1fPnoSx-4O4XY4vKEL4i_96DV5SRJ7wSiBO3ZPknMYzmQM4dqXwkub1i_H-VEZed9u-FlSMlDPutUOeuWNmNXAWaPeI1Z5gyeYhdVWdMO_5QKRh9LEKKf9FPVDxPVazoHTX31oUm9TsxiVu3O_MuTEZ8eM0tMEaVtVE3_hCfvdIvmUPQwDl7DlQ0J_SXhvD6JiK5gLArxGx5__QkoR11eWkre996ZjNxuEJEhKo6nRDllvqgYwa_qk_T1way-KdFISAWHhf2WTgY"/>
</div>
<div class="text-left">
<p class="font-headline-md text-primary font-bold">Sudáfrica</p>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Option 3: Greece -->
<div class="card-tactile bg-surface-container-lowest p-card-padding rounded-lg border-2 border-surface-variant flex items-center gap-6 group" onclick="selectFlag(this, false)">
<div class="w-32 h-20 rounded-md overflow-hidden border-2 border-outline-variant shrink-0 bg-white shadow-sm">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="The flag of Greece with nine equal horizontal stripes of blue alternating with white. A blue square in the upper hoist-side corner bears a white cross. The image is rendered with smooth vectors and bright saturation, perfect for a high-end educational app for young children." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuCe8iUyZF_3D6Z6BFQidqxSG4rDEPx2yjbciJqfD5iRCU04eseTHO-M-mh95E6jhObLet_2B7yE6DYAJSUE7J3TA4sZRb9HbBzRZ2xNkCqs2AKAjdcxn6qjIiqkVzGFolk2KN11xmkAx-iEYV6suvQ6_hidq_oF8zG7p8TLAm-zdauHLLJWpMn0hVYrwuxM6DfKENsWEIMz38eiGxs9JQrH8obfpuElG5IS4pJ4YUziHOFUUson0mnHJg-VvjykotY2ONUbgOCqo0s"/>
</div>
<div class="text-left">
<p class="font-headline-md text-primary font-bold">Grecia</p>
</div>
</div>
</section>
<!-- Performance Stars -->
<section class="flex justify-center items-center gap-4 py-6">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-secondary-container text-4xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-secondary-container text-6xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-outline-variant text-4xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0;">star</span>
</section>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation Bar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg border-t-4 border-surface-variant rounded-t-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Success Feedback Overlay (Hidden by default) -->
<div class="fixed inset-0 bg-background/90 z-[100] flex flex-col items-center justify-center hidden" id="success-overlay">
<div class="relative w-full h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-container-margin text-center">
<div class="absolute inset-0 overflow-hidden pointer-events-none" id="confetti-container"></div>
<div class="bg-surface-container-lowest p-10 rounded-xl shadow-2xl border-4 border-tertiary-container max-w-sm w-full animate-bounce">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-tertiary-container text-8xl mb-4" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">check_circle</span>
<h3 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-tertiary-container mb-2">¡Excelente!</h3>
<p class="font-body-lg text-on-surface mb-6">Very Good!</p>
<button class="w-full py-4 bg-primary text-on-primary rounded-lg font-headline-md btn-tactile-primary" onclick="closeOverlay()">
                    Continuar
                </button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<script>
        function selectFlag(element, isCorrect) {
            // Remove previous selections
            document.querySelectorAll('.card-tactile').forEach(card => {
                card.classList.remove('border-primary', 'border-error', 'border-tertiary-container', 'bg-tertiary-container/10');
            });

            if (isCorrect) {
                element.classList.add('border-tertiary-container', 'bg-tertiary-container/10');
                // Play correct sound effect (visual feedback)
                showSuccess();
            } else {
                element.classList.add('border-error', 'bg-error/5');
                // Small vibration/shake effect
                element.classList.add('animate-shake');
                setTimeout(() => element.classList.remove('animate-shake'), 400);
            }
        }

        function showSuccess() {
            const overlay = document.getElementById('success-overlay');
            overlay.classList.remove('hidden');
            createConfetti();
        }

        function closeOverlay() {
            const overlay = document.getElementById('success-overlay');
            overlay.classList.add('hidden');
        }

        function playQuestion() {
            // Visual feedback for clicking audio
            const btn = document.querySelector('.audio-pulse');
            btn.style.transform = 'scale(1.1)';
            setTimeout(() => btn.style.transform = 'scale(1)', 200);
            
            // In a real app, window.speechSynthesis or an audio file would play here
            console.log("Playing audio: ¿Cuál es la bandera de Sudáfrica?");
        }

        function createConfetti() {
            const container = document.getElementById('confetti-container');
            const colors = ['#fccc00', '#006495', '#59be1b', '#ba1a1a'];
            for (let i = 0; i < 50; i++) {
                const confetti = document.createElement('div');
                confetti.className = 'confetti-slow';
                confetti.style.left = Math.random() * 100 + 'vw';
                confetti.style.top = '-10px';
                confetti.style.width = '10px';
                confetti.style.height = '10px';
                confetti.style.backgroundColor = colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)];
                confetti.style.borderRadius = '50%';
                container.appendChild(confetti);

                const duration = 2000 + Math.random() * 3000;
                confetti.animate([
                    { transform: 'translateY(0) rotate(0)', opacity: 1 },
                    { transform: `translateY(100vh) rotate(${Math.random() * 360}deg)`, opacity: 0 }
                ], {
                    duration: duration,
                    easing: 'cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1)'
                }).onfinish = () => confetti.remove();
            }
        }
    </script>
<style>
        @keyframes shake {
            0%, 100% { transform: translateX(0); }
            25% { transform: translateX(-8px); }
            75% { transform: translateX(8px); }
        }
        .animate-shake {
            animation: shake 0.2s cubic-bezier(.36,.07,.19,.97) both;
            border-color: #ba1a1a !important;
        }
    </style>
</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Colombia) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport">
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "unit": "8px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          }
        }
      }
    </script>
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-primary {
            box-shadow: 0 4px 0 #004b71;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-secondary {
            box-shadow: 0 4px 0 #dee3e9;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-yellow {
            box-shadow: 0 8px 0 #fccc00;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-blue {
            box-shadow: 0 8px 0 #006495;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-red {
            box-shadow: 0 8px 0 #ba1a1a;
        }
        .press-effect:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: none;
        }
        .flag-stripe {
            transition: background-color 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
        }
        @keyframes pulse-audio {
            0% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.1); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); }
        }
        .audio-pulse {
            animation: pulse-audio 2s infinite ease-in-out;
        }
    </style>
<style><br>            @keyframes shake {<br>                0%, 100% { transform: translateX(0); }<br>                25% { transform: translateX(-10px); }<br>                75% { transform: translateX(10px); }<br>            }<br>            .animate-shake {<br>                animation: shake 0.2s cubic-bezier(.36,.07,.19,.97) both;<br>            }<br>        </style></head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background font-body-md min-h-screen flex flex-col">
<!-- Top Navigation -->
<nav class="w-full top-0 sticky z-50 bg-background border-b-4 border-surface-container-highest flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit">
<button class="press-effect hover:opacity-80 transition-all text-primary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[32px]">arrow_back</span>
</button>
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<h1 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-primary">Colombia</h1>
<button class="audio-pulse bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container p-2 rounded-full press-effect chunky-shadow-yellow" onclick="playAudio('Colombia')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
<button class="flex items-center gap-1 bg-tertiary-container text-on-tertiary-container px-4 py-2 rounded-full border-b-4 border-on-tertiary-fixed-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-lg"><span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">notifications_active</span><span class="font-label-bold text-[10px] uppercase tracking-tighter">¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm</span></button> <!-- Spacer for centering -->
</nav>
<main class="flex-grow container mx-auto px-container-margin py-8 flex flex-col gap-8 max-w-2xl">
<!-- Instruction Section -->
<div class="bg-surface-container-low rounded-lg p-card-padding border-2 border-surface-container-highest text-center">
<p class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-on-surface-variant">¡Pinta la bandera!</p>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-outline">Toca un color y luego una franja.</p>
</div>
<!-- Interactive Flag Silhouette -->
<div class="relative w-full aspect-[3/2] bg-white rounded-lg border-2 border-surface-container-highest overflow-hidden shadow-inner flex flex-col">
<!-- Stripe 1 (Yellow - Top Half) -->
<div class="flag-stripe flex-1 bg-surface-container-highest flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer border-b-2 border-dashed border-outline-variant" id="stripe-yellow" onclick="paintStripe('yellow')">
<span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-outline opacity-30 select-none" id="label-yellow">Amarillo</span>
</div>
<!-- Stripe 2 (Blue - 1/4) -->
<div class="flag-stripe h-1/4 bg-surface-container-high flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer border-b-2 border-dashed border-outline-variant" id="stripe-blue" onclick="paintStripe('blue')">
<span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-outline opacity-30 select-none" id="label-blue">Azul</span>
</div>
<!-- Stripe 3 (Red - 1/4) -->
<div class="flag-stripe h-1/4 bg-surface-container-highest flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer" id="stripe-red" onclick="paintStripe('red')">
<span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-outline opacity-30 select-none" id="label-red">Rojo</span>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Palette / Color Picker -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-gutter mt-4">
<!-- Amarillo -->
<button class="flex flex-col items-center gap-unit group" id="tool-yellow" onclick="selectColor('yellow')">
<div class="w-full aspect-square bg-secondary-container rounded-xl chunky-shadow-yellow press-effect flex items-center justify-center border-4 border-transparent transition-all" id="swatch-yellow">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-[40px]">brush</span>
</div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-1 mt-2">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Amarillo</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[18px] text-secondary cursor-pointer" onclick="event.stopPropagation(); playAudio('Amarillo')">volume_up</span>
</div>
</button>
<!-- Azul -->
<button class="flex flex-col items-center gap-unit group" id="tool-blue" onclick="selectColor('blue')">
<div class="w-full aspect-square bg-primary-container rounded-xl chunky-shadow-blue press-effect flex items-center justify-center border-4 border-transparent transition-all" id="swatch-blue">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-primary-container text-[40px]">brush</span>
</div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-1 mt-2">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Azul</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[18px] text-primary cursor-pointer" onclick="event.stopPropagation(); playAudio('Azul')">volume_up</span>
</div>
</button>
<!-- Rojo -->
<button class="flex flex-col items-center gap-unit group" id="tool-red" onclick="selectColor('red')">
<div class="w-full aspect-square bg-error-container rounded-xl chunky-shadow-red press-effect flex items-center justify-center border-4 border-transparent transition-all" id="swatch-red">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-error-container text-[40px]">brush</span>
</div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-1 mt-2">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Rojo</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[18px] text-error cursor-pointer" onclick="event.stopPropagation(); playAudio('Rojo')">volume_up</span>
</div>
</button>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-touch-target-min flex justify-around items-center px-gutter pb-2 bg-surface border-t-4 border-surface-container-highest shadow-lg z-50 rounded-t-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container rounded-xl px-4 py-2 translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-150 active:scale-95" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">explore</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explorar</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant px-4 py-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-transform duration-150 active:scale-95" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Pasaporte</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant px-4 py-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-transform duration-150 active:scale-95" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">videogame_asset</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Jugar</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Modal Success (Hidden by default) -->
<div class="fixed inset-0 z-[100] hidden flex items-center justify-center px-container-margin" id="success-modal">
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-primary/20 backdrop-blur-sm"></div>
<div class="relative bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-lg p-8 border-b-8 border-tertiary shadow-xl max-w-sm w-full text-center flex flex-col items-center gap-6">
<div class="w-32 h-32 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[80px] text-on-secondary-container" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
</div>
<div>
<h2 class="font-headline-lg text-headline-lg text-primary">¡Excelente!</h2>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg mt-2">Has pintado la bandera de Colombia.</p>
</div>
<button class="w-full py-4 bg-primary text-white font-label-bold text-label-bold rounded-lg chunky-shadow-primary press-effect" onclick="location.reload()">
                ¡Jugar de nuevo!
            </button>
</div>
</div>
<script>
        let selectedColor = null;
        let painted = { yellow: false, blue: false, red: false };

        const config = {
            yellow: { bg: 'bg-[#FFD700]', swatch: 'swatch-yellow', border: 'border-secondary-container' },
            blue: { bg: 'bg-[#003893]', swatch: 'swatch-blue', border: 'border-primary' },
            red: { bg: 'bg-[#CE1126]', swatch: 'swatch-red', border: 'border-error' }
        };

        function selectColor(color) {
            selectedColor = color;
            
            // UI Feedback for selection
            Object.keys(config).forEach(c => {
                const swatch = document.getElementById(config[c].swatch);
                swatch.classList.remove('border-primary', 'border-secondary-container', 'border-error', 'scale-110');
            });
            
            const activeSwatch = document.getElementById(config[color].swatch);
            activeSwatch.classList.add(config[color].border, 'scale-110');
            
            playAudio(color.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + color.slice(1));
        }

        function paintStripe(stripeId) {
            if (!selectedColor) return;
            
            // Update Stripe Color
            const stripe = document.getElementById(`stripe-${stripeId}`);
            const label = document.getElementById(`label-${stripeId}`);
            
            // Logic: Is it the right color for the right stripe?
            if (selectedColor === stripeId) {
                stripe.className = `flag-stripe ${stripeId === 'yellow' ? 'flex-1' : 'h-1/4'} ${config[selectedColor].bg} flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer transition-all duration-500`;
                label.style.display = 'none';
                painted[stripeId] = true;
                checkCompletion();
            } else {
                // Shake effect for wrong color
                stripe.classList.add('animate-shake');
                setTimeout(() => stripe.classList.remove('animate-shake'), 500);
            }
        }

        function checkCompletion() {
            if (painted.yellow && painted.blue && painted.red) {
                setTimeout(() => {
                    document.getElementById('success-modal').classList.remove('hidden');
                    playAudio('Success');
                }, 600);
            }
        }

        function playAudio(term) {
            console.log(`Playing audio for: ${term}`);
            // In a real app, this would trigger an HTML5 Audio object
            // const audio = new Audio(`/sounds/${term.toLowerCase()}.mp3`);
            // audio.play();
        }

        // Add shake animation
        const styleSheet = document.createElement("style");
        styleSheet.innerText = `
            @keyframes shake {
                0%, 100% { transform: translateX(0); }
                25% { transform: translateX(-10px); }
                75% { transform: translateX(10px); }
            }
            .animate-shake {
                animation: shake 0.2s cubic-bezier(.36,.07,.19,.97) both;
            }
        `;
        document.head.appendChild(styleSheet);
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Corea del Sur) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport">
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@100..900&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        .filled-icon {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;
        }
        /* Tactile Button Press Animation */
        .chunky-button-primary {
            @apply relative transition-all duration-75 active:translate-y-[4px];
            box-shadow: 0 4px 0 #004b71;
        }
        .chunky-button-primary:active {
            box-shadow: 0 0px 0 #004b71;
        }
        .chunky-button-secondary {
            @apply relative transition-all duration-75 active:translate-y-[2px];
            box-shadow: 0 4px 0 #bec8d3;
        }
        .chunky-button-secondary:active {
            box-shadow: 0 0px 0 #bec8d3;
        }
        /* Squishy selection effect */
        .color-bubble {
            @apply relative transition-all duration-200 cursor-pointer;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }
        .color-bubble.active {
            @apply scale-110 ring-4 ring-primary-container;
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }
        /* Progress bar animation */
        @keyframes progress-fill {
            from { width: 0%; }
            to { width: 45%; }
        }
        .animate-progress {
            animation: progress-fill 1s ease-out forwards;
        }
    </style>
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "unit": "8px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background min-h-screen font-body-md flex flex-col">
<!-- Top App Bar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky z-50 bg-background border-b-4 border-surface-container-highest flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit">
<button aria-label="Volver" class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-all active:scale-90">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary">arrow_back</span>
</button>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center">
<h1 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-primary tracking-tight">Corea del Sur</h1>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">Estación de Pintura</span>
</div>
<button aria-label="Escuchar nombre" class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container rounded-full shadow-[0_4px_0_#6d5700] hover:opacity-80 active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none transition-all" onclick="playAudio('corea')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container filled-icon">volume_up</span>
</button>
<button class="flex items-center gap-1 bg-tertiary-container text-on-tertiary-container px-4 py-2 rounded-full border-b-4 border-on-tertiary-fixed-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-lg"><span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">notifications_active</span><span class="font-label-bold text-[10px] uppercase tracking-tighter">¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm</span></button></header>
<main class="flex-grow flex flex-col items-center p-gutter max-w-4xl mx-auto w-full">
<!-- Progress Bar Section -->
<div class="w-full mb-8">
<div class="flex justify-between items-end mb-2">
<span class="font-label-bold text-primary flex items-center gap-2">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined filled-icon text-[20px]">brush</span>
                    ¡Casi listo!
                </span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-outline">45%</span>
</div>
<div class="h-4 w-full bg-surface-container-highest rounded-full overflow-hidden">
<div class="h-full bg-tertiary-container animate-progress rounded-full"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Canvas Area (The Flag) -->
<div class="relative w-full aspect-[3/2] bg-white rounded-lg border-[3px] border-surface-container-highest shadow-xl p-card-padding flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden">
<!-- Simulated Flag Layout -->
<div class="relative w-full h-full border-2 border-dashed border-outline-variant flex items-center justify-center" id="flag-canvas">
<!-- Central Taegeuk Silhouette -->
<div class="relative w-[40%] aspect-square rounded-full border-4 border-outline-variant flex flex-col pointer-events-auto cursor-pointer group hover:bg-surface-container-low transition-colors">
<div class="h-1/2 w-full border-b-2 border-outline-variant rounded-t-full flex items-center justify-center">
<span class="text-outline-variant font-label-bold text-sm opacity-50 group-hover:opacity-100">ROJO</span>
</div>
<div class="h-1/2 w-full rounded-b-full flex items-center justify-center">
<span class="text-outline-variant font-label-bold text-sm opacity-50 group-hover:opacity-100">AZUL</span>
</div>
<!-- Small inner circles for the S curve feel -->
<div class="absolute top-1/4 left-0 w-1/2 h-1/2 bg-white/20 rounded-full"></div>
<div class="absolute bottom-1/4 right-0 w-1/2 h-1/2 bg-white/20 rounded-full"></div>
</div>
<!-- Trigrams (Positions) -->
<!-- Top Left -->
<div class="absolute top-4 left-4 w-16 h-12 flex flex-col gap-1.5 rotate-45">
<div class="h-2 w-full bg-outline-variant rounded-full opacity-30"></div>
<div class="h-2 w-full bg-outline-variant rounded-full opacity-30"></div>
<div class="h-2 w-full bg-outline-variant rounded-full opacity-30"></div>
</div>
<!-- Bottom Left -->
<div class="absolute bottom-4 left-4 w-16 h-12 flex flex-col gap-1.5 -rotate-45">
<div class="h-2 w-full bg-outline-variant rounded-full opacity-30"></div>
<div class="h-2 w-[45%] bg-outline-variant rounded-full opacity-30 inline-block"></div>
<div class="h-2 w-[45%] bg-outline-variant rounded-full opacity-30 inline-block ml-auto"></div>
<div class="h-2 w-full bg-outline-variant rounded-full opacity-30"></div>
</div>
<!-- Top Right -->
<div class="absolute top-4 right-4 w-16 h-12 flex flex-col gap-1.5 -rotate-45">
<div class="h-2 w-[45%] bg-outline-variant rounded-full opacity-30 inline-block"></div>
<div class="h-2 w-[45%] bg-outline-variant rounded-full opacity-30 inline-block ml-auto"></div>
<div class="h-2 w-full bg-outline-variant rounded-full opacity-30"></div>
<div class="h-2 w-[45%] bg-outline-variant rounded-full opacity-30 inline-block"></div>
<div class="h-2 w-[45%] bg-outline-variant rounded-full opacity-30 inline-block ml-auto"></div>
</div>
<!-- Bottom Right -->
<div class="absolute bottom-4 right-4 w-16 h-12 flex flex-col gap-1.5 rotate-45">
<div class="h-2 w-[45%] bg-outline-variant rounded-full opacity-30 inline-block"></div>
<div class="h-2 w-[45%] bg-outline-variant rounded-full opacity-30 inline-block ml-auto"></div>
<div class="h-2 w-[45%] bg-outline-variant rounded-full opacity-30 inline-block"></div>
<div class="h-2 w-[45%] bg-outline-variant rounded-full opacity-30 inline-block ml-auto"></div>
<div class="h-2 w-[45%] bg-outline-variant rounded-full opacity-30 inline-block"></div>
<div class="h-2 w-[45%] bg-outline-variant rounded-full opacity-30 inline-block ml-auto"></div>
</div>
<!-- Center Helper Label -->
<div class="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center pointer-events-none">
<p class="font-label-bold text-surface-container-highest text-[80px] select-none">Taegeuk</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Palette Section -->
<section class="w-full mt-10">
<h2 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-on-surface mb-6 text-center">Elige un color</h2>
<div class="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-8 px-4">
<!-- Blanco -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-3">
<button class="color-bubble w-16 h-16 md:w-20 md:h-20 bg-white border-4 border-surface-container-highest rounded-full active" onclick="selectColor('white', this)"></button>
<div class="flex items-center gap-1">
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface">Blanco</span>
<button class="p-1 text-primary hover:scale-110 active:scale-95 transition-transform" onclick="playAudio('blanco')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[20px] filled-icon">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Rojo -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-3">
<button class="color-bubble w-16 h-16 md:w-20 md:h-20 bg-[#CD2E3A] border-4 border-[#8B1F27] rounded-full" onclick="selectColor('red', this)"></button>
<div class="flex items-center gap-1">
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface">Rojo</span>
<button class="p-1 text-primary hover:scale-110 active:scale-95 transition-transform" onclick="playAudio('rojo')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[20px] filled-icon">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Azul -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-3">
<button class="color-bubble w-16 h-16 md:w-20 md:h-20 bg-[#0047A0] border-4 border-[#002D66] rounded-full" onclick="selectColor('blue', this)"></button>
<div class="flex items-center gap-1">
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface">Azul</span>
<button class="p-1 text-primary hover:scale-110 active:scale-95 transition-transform" onclick="playAudio('azul')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[20px] filled-icon">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Negro -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-3">
<button class="color-bubble w-16 h-16 md:w-20 md:h-20 bg-[#000000] border-4 border-[#333333] rounded-full" onclick="selectColor('black', this)"></button>
<div class="flex items-center gap-1">
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface">Negro</span>
<button class="p-1 text-primary hover:scale-110 active:scale-95 transition-transform" onclick="playAudio('negro')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[20px] filled-icon">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation Controls -->
<div class="mt-auto p-gutter flex justify-between items-center w-full max-w-4xl mx-auto pb-24">
<button class="chunky-button-secondary bg-white text-primary px-8 py-4 rounded-xl font-headline-md flex items-center gap-2">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">restart_alt</span>
            Reiniciar
        </button>
<button class="chunky-button-primary bg-primary text-white px-10 py-4 rounded-xl font-headline-md flex items-center gap-2">
            ¡Siguiente!
            <span class="material-symbols-outlined">arrow_forward</span>
</button>
</div>
<!-- Bottom Navbar (Shell Component) -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-touch-target-min flex justify-around items-center px-gutter pb-2 bg-surface border-t-4 border-surface-container-highest shadow-lg z-50 rounded-t-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container rounded-xl px-4 py-2 translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-150 active:scale-95" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined filled-icon">explore</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explorar</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant px-4 py-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-transform duration-150 active:scale-95" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Pasaporte</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant px-4 py-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-transform duration-150 active:scale-95" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">videogame_asset</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Jugar</span>
</a>
</nav>
<script>
        function selectColor(color, element) {
            // Remove active class from all bubbles
            document.querySelectorAll('.color-bubble').forEach(btn => {
                btn.classList.remove('active');
            });
            // Add active class to clicked bubble
            element.classList.add('active');
            
            // Log for prototype simulation
            console.log("Selected color: " + color);
        }

        function playAudio(term) {
            // Simulated audio player
            const speakerBtn = event.currentTarget;
            speakerBtn.classList.add('animate-pulse');
            
            console.log("Playing audio for: " + term);
            
            setTimeout(() => {
                speakerBtn.classList.remove('animate-pulse');
            }, 1000);
        }

        // Simple haptic-like feedback on color interaction
        document.querySelectorAll('.color-bubble').forEach(btn => {
            btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                if (window.navigator.vibrate) {
                    window.navigator.vibrate(50);
                }
            });
        });
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Rusia) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@300;400;500;600;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "unit": "8px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        .tactile-button {
            transition: all 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275);
        }
        .tactile-button:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            border-bottom-width: 0px !important;
        }
        .paint-active {
            outline: 6px solid #2bb1ff;
            outline-offset: 4px;
        }
        .pulse-animation {
            animation: pulse-ring 2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1) infinite;
        }
        @keyframes pulse-ring {
            0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
            50% { transform: scale(1.1); opacity: 0.8; }
        }
        .canvas-stripe {
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: background-color 0.3s ease;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background font-body-md min-h-screen flex flex-col">
<!-- Top Navigation -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky z-50 bg-background border-b-4 border-surface-container-highest flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit">
<button class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary p-2 active:scale-95 transition-transform" style="font-size: 32px;">arrow_back</button>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center">
<h1 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-primary">Rusia / Russia</h1>
</div>
<button class="flex items-center gap-1 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container px-4 py-2 rounded-full border-b-4 border-secondary active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-lg"><span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">notifications_active</span><span class="font-label-bold text-[10px] uppercase tracking-tighter">¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm</span></button><button class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-secondary-container flex items-center justify-center tactile-button border-b-4 border-secondary shadow-sm" id="main-audio">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container">volume_up</span>
</button>
</header>
<main class="flex-grow flex flex-col items-center px-container-margin py-6 gap-8 pb-32">
<!-- Progress Bar -->
<div class="w-full max-w-md bg-surface-container-highest h-4 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
<div class="bg-tertiary-container h-full w-1/3 transition-all duration-500 rounded-full" id="progress-fill"></div>
</div>
<!-- The Flag Canvas (Interactive) -->
<div class="w-full max-w-xl aspect-[3/2] bg-white rounded-lg border-2 border-outline-variant shadow-xl overflow-hidden flex flex-col relative group">
<div class="canvas-stripe flex-1 border-b border-surface-container-highest bg-surface-container-lowest flex items-center justify-center" id="stripe-0" onclick="paintStripe(0)">
<span class="text-surface-dim font-headline-md opacity-20 pointer-events-none">Blanco</span>
</div>
<div class="canvas-stripe flex-1 border-b border-surface-container-highest bg-surface-container-lowest flex items-center justify-center" id="stripe-1" onclick="paintStripe(1)">
<span class="text-surface-dim font-headline-md opacity-20 pointer-events-none">Azul</span>
</div>
<div class="canvas-stripe flex-1 bg-surface-container-lowest flex items-center justify-center" id="stripe-2" onclick="paintStripe(2)">
<span class="text-surface-dim font-headline-md opacity-20 pointer-events-none">Rojo</span>
</div>
<!-- Atmosphere Decoration -->
<div class="absolute -top-6 -right-6 w-24 h-24 bg-secondary-container opacity-20 rounded-full blur-2xl"></div>
</div>
<!-- Color Palette Picker -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-6 w-full max-w-md">
<!-- White Button -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-3">
<button class="w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-white border-2 border-outline-variant shadow-[0_6px_0_#dee3e9] tactile-button paint-active" id="btn-white" onclick="selectColor('#FFFFFF', 'Blanco')">
<div class="w-full h-full rounded-full bg-white"></div>
</button>
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface">Blanco</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-[20px] cursor-pointer" onclick="speak('Blanco')">volume_up</span>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Blue Button -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-3">
<button class="w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-[#0039A6] shadow-[0_6px_0_#002160] tactile-button" id="btn-blue" onclick="selectColor('#0039A6', 'Azul')">
</button>
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface">Azul</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-[20px] cursor-pointer" onclick="speak('Azul')">volume_up</span>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Red Button -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-3">
<button class="w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-[#D52B1E] shadow-[0_6px_0_#7b1912] tactile-button" id="btn-red" onclick="selectColor('#D52B1E', 'Rojo')">
</button>
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface">Rojo</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-[20px] cursor-pointer" onclick="speak('Rojo')">volume_up</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Instruction Text -->
<div class="bg-primary-container/20 p-card-padding rounded-xl border-2 border-primary-container text-center max-w-sm">
<p class="font-body-lg text-on-primary-container">¡Pintemos la bandera! Toca un color y luego una franja.</p>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Celebration Modal (Hidden by default) -->
<div class="fixed inset-0 z-[100] hidden flex items-center justify-center p-6" id="celebration">
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-secondary/80 backdrop-blur-sm"></div>

<div class="relative bg-surface rounded-lg p-8 shadow-2xl flex flex-col items-center text-center max-w-md border-t-8 border-secondary-container">
<div class="w-24 h-24 bg-tertiary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-6 shadow-lg">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white text-6xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">stars</span>
</div>
<h2 class="font-headline-lg text-headline-lg text-primary mb-2">¡Excelente!</h2>
<p class="font-body-lg text-on-surface-variant mb-8">Has pintado la bandera de Rusia perfectamente.</p>
<button class="w-full py-4 rounded-xl bg-primary text-white font-headline-md tactile-button border-b-6 border-on-primary-fixed-variant" onclick="window.location.reload()">
                ¡Jugar de nuevo!
            </button>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Bottom Nav Bar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-touch-target-min flex justify-around items-center px-gutter pb-2 bg-surface border-t-4 border-surface-container-highest shadow-lg z-50">
<div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant px-4 py-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-all rounded-xl active:scale-95">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">explore</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explorar</span>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container rounded-xl px-4 py-2 translate-y-1 shadow-md">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Pasaporte</span>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant px-4 py-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-all rounded-xl active:scale-95">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">videogame_asset</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Jugar</span>
</div>
</nav>
<script>
        let currentColor = '#FFFFFF';
        let paintedStripes = [false, false, false];
        const correctColors = ['#FFFFFF', '#0039A6', '#D52B1E'];

        function selectColor(color, name) {
            currentColor = color;
            // UI Updates for active button
            document.querySelectorAll('.tactile-button').forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove('paint-active'));
            if(name === 'Blanco') document.getElementById('btn-white').classList.add('paint-active');
            if(name === 'Azul') document.getElementById('btn-blue').classList.add('paint-active');
            if(name === 'Rojo') document.getElementById('btn-red').classList.add('paint-active');
            speak(name);
        }

        function paintStripe(index) {
            const stripe = document.getElementById(`stripe-${index}`);
            stripe.style.backgroundColor = currentColor;
            stripe.innerHTML = ''; // Clear helper text
            
            if (currentColor.toLowerCase() === correctColors[index].toLowerCase()) {
                paintedStripes[index] = true;
                updateProgress();
            } else {
                paintedStripes[index] = false;
                updateProgress();
            }

            checkWin();
        }

        function updateProgress() {
            const count = paintedStripes.filter(Boolean).length;
            const progress = (count / 3) * 100;
            document.getElementById('progress-fill').style.width = `${progress}%`;
        }

        function checkWin() {
            if (paintedStripes.every(Boolean)) {
                setTimeout(() => {
                    document.getElementById('celebration').classList.remove('hidden');
                    speak("¡Felicidades! Has completado Rusia");
                }, 500);
            }
        }

        function speak(text) {
            // Placeholder for text-to-speech interaction
            console.log("Speaking: " + text);
            // In a real app: window.speechSynthesis.speak(new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text));
        }

        // Initial visual hint
        document.getElementById('main-audio').addEventListener('click', () => speak("Rusia"));
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Sudáfrica) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "unit": "8px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
            },
