            "fontSize": {
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 24;
        }
        
        .chunky-shadow-primary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #004163;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-secondary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #d6dae1;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-yellow {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #6d5700;
        }
        
        .flag-path {
            transition: fill 0.3s ease;
            cursor: pointer;
            stroke: #dee3e9;
            stroke-width: 2;
        }
        
        .active-brush {
            transform: scale(1.1) translateY(-8px);
            border: 4px solid #006495 !important;
        }

        @keyframes pulse-soft {
            0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
        }
        .pulse-audio {
            animation: pulse-soft 2s infinite ease-in-out;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background font-body-md min-h-screen pb-24 overflow-x-hidden">
<!-- Top Navigation Bar (from Shared Components) -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky z-40 bg-background border-b-4 border-surface-container-highest flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit h-16">
<button aria-label="Volver" class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:opacity-80 active:translate-y-1 transition-all">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-3xl">arrow_back</span>
</button>
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<h1 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-primary">Sudáfrica</h1>
<button class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-secondary-container flex items-center justify-center chunky-shadow-yellow pulse-audio active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none transition-all" onclick="playAudio('Sudáfrica')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
<button class="flex items-center gap-1 bg-tertiary-container text-on-tertiary-container px-4 py-2 rounded-full border-b-4 border-on-tertiary-fixed-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-lg"><span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">notifications_active</span><span class="font-label-bold text-[10px] uppercase tracking-tighter">¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm</span></button><button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:opacity-80 active:translate-y-1 transition-all">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-3xl">help_outline</span>
</button>
</header>
<main class="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-container-margin py-8">
<!-- Progress Bar -->
<div class="mb-8 px-4">
<div class="flex justify-between items-end mb-2">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-tertiary">¡Casi listo!</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">3 / 6 colores</span>
</div>
<div class="w-full h-4 bg-surface-container-high rounded-full overflow-hidden border-2 border-surface-container-highest">
<div class="h-full bg-tertiary-container w-1/2 transition-all duration-500 rounded-full"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Flag Canvas Section -->
<div class="relative bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-lg p-card-padding border-2 border-surface-container-high shadow-xl mb-10 overflow-hidden">
<div class="absolute top-4 left-4 flex gap-2">
<div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-surface-container flex items-center justify-center text-outline">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-sm">palette</span>
</div>
<p class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">Pinta la bandera</p>
</div>
<!-- SVG Flag Outline for South Africa (Y-shape) -->
<div class="aspect-[3/2] w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto mt-8 relative">
<svg class="w-full h-full drop-shadow-md" id="flag-svg" viewBox="0 0 900 600">
<!-- Red Top -->
<path class="flag-path" d="M0 0h900v200H300L200 100 100 0H0z" data-color-target="Rojo" fill="#f0f4fb" onclick="paint(this)"></path>
<!-- Blue Bottom -->
<path class="flag-path" d="M0 600h900V400H300l-100 100-100 100H0z" data-color-target="Azul" fill="#f0f4fb" onclick="paint(this)"></path>
<!-- Green Y-Shape -->
<path class="flag-path" d="M0 100v400l100-100h100l200-200H100L0 100z M200 300l100 100h600V200H300L200 300z" data-color-target="Verde" fill="#f0f4fb" onclick="paint(this)"></path>
<!-- Yellow Triangle Border -->
<path class="flag-path" d="M0 100l200 200L0 500V100z" data-color-target="Amarillo" fill="#f0f4fb" onclick="paint(this)"></path>
<!-- Black Triangle -->
<path class="flag-path" d="M0 150l150 150L0 450V150z" data-color-target="Negro" fill="#f0f4fb" onclick="paint(this)"></path>
<!-- White Borders (represented as part of the fillable logic or static) -->
<path class="flag-path" d="M0 0v100l200 200L0 500v100h100l300-300L100 0H0z" data-color-target="Blanco" fill="#f0f4fb" onclick="paint(this)"></path>
</svg>
</div>
<!-- Floating Decorative Stars -->
<div class="absolute -bottom-4 -right-4 opacity-20 transform rotate-12">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-8xl text-secondary">grade</span>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Color Palette Picker -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-6 gap-4 mb-12">
<!-- Verde -->
<button class="color-btn group flex flex-col items-center gap-2 p-2 rounded-lg bg-surface-container border-2 border-transparent transition-all" onclick="selectColor('#2b6c00', 'Verde', this)">
<div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-[#2b6c00] border-4 border-white shadow-md group-active:scale-90 transition-transform"></div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-1">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface">Verde</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-sm" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</div>
</button>
<!-- Amarillo -->
<button class="color-btn group flex flex-col items-center gap-2 p-2 rounded-lg bg-surface-container border-2 border-transparent transition-all" onclick="selectColor('#fccc00', 'Amarillo', this)">
<div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-[#fccc00] border-4 border-white shadow-md group-active:scale-90 transition-transform"></div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-1">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface">Amarillo</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-sm" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</div>
</button>
<!-- Blanco -->
<button class="color-btn group flex flex-col items-center gap-2 p-2 rounded-lg bg-surface-container border-2 border-transparent transition-all" onclick="selectColor('#ffffff', 'Blanco', this)">
<div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-[#ffffff] border-4 border-white shadow-md group-active:scale-90 transition-transform"></div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-1">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface">Blanco</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-sm" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</div>
</button>
<!-- Rojo -->
<button class="color-btn group flex flex-col items-center gap-2 p-2 rounded-lg bg-surface-container border-2 border-transparent transition-all" onclick="selectColor('#ba1a1a', 'Rojo', this)">
<div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-[#ba1a1a] border-4 border-white shadow-md group-active:scale-90 transition-transform"></div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-1">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface">Rojo</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-sm" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</div>
</button>
<!-- Azul -->
<button class="color-btn group flex flex-col items-center gap-2 p-2 rounded-lg bg-surface-container border-2 border-transparent transition-all" onclick="selectColor('#006495', 'Azul', this)">
<div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-[#006495] border-4 border-white shadow-md group-active:scale-90 transition-transform"></div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-1">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface">Azul</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-sm" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</div>
</button>
<!-- Negro -->
<button class="color-btn group flex flex-col items-center gap-2 p-2 rounded-lg bg-surface-container border-2 border-transparent transition-all" onclick="selectColor('#171c21', 'Negro', this)">
<div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-[#171c21] border-4 border-white shadow-md group-active:scale-90 transition-transform"></div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-1">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface">Negro</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-sm" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</div>
</button>
</div>
<!-- Instructions Section -->
<div class="bg-primary-container/20 rounded-lg p-6 border-2 border-primary-container flex items-start gap-4 mb-8">
<div class="w-12 h-12 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-primary flex items-center justify-center text-on-primary shadow-lg">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">lightbulb</span>
</div>
<div>
<h3 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-on-primary-container">¿Sabías que...?</h3>
<p class="text-on-surface-variant font-body-md">La bandera de Sudáfrica tiene 6 colores. La forma de "Y" significa que muchas personas se unen para vivir en paz.</p>
</div>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Action Bar (Fixed but distinct from Nav) -->
<div class="fixed bottom-20 left-0 w-full px-container-margin z-30">
<button class="w-full h-16 bg-primary text-on-primary font-headline-md text-headline-md rounded-lg chunky-shadow-primary flex items-center justify-center gap-3 active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none transition-all">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">check_circle</span>
            ¡He terminado!
        </button>
</div>
<!-- Bottom Nav Bar (from Shared Components) -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-touch-target-min flex justify-around items-center px-gutter pb-2 bg-surface border-t-4 border-surface-container-highest shadow-lg z-50 rounded-t-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant px-4 py-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-transform duration-150 active:scale-95" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">explore</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-[10px]">Explorar</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant px-4 py-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-transform duration-150 active:scale-95" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-[10px]">Pasaporte</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container rounded-xl px-4 py-2 translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-150 active:scale-95" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">videogame_asset</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-[10px]">Jugar</span>
</a>
</nav>
<script>
        let currentColor = null;
        let colorName = "";

        function selectColor(hex, name, btn) {
            currentColor = hex;
            colorName = name;
            
            // UI feedback for selection
            document.querySelectorAll('.color-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active-brush', 'bg-white', 'shadow-inner'));
            btn.classList.add('active-brush', 'bg-white', 'shadow-inner');
            
            playAudio(name);
        }

        function paint(element) {
            if (!currentColor) {
                // Shake or feedback to pick a color first
                element.classList.add('animate-pulse');
                setTimeout(() => element.classList.remove('animate-pulse'), 500);
                return;
            }
            
            const target = element.getAttribute('data-color-target');
            
            // Simple logic for kids: if they pick the right color for the right area
            // In a real app, we might allow any color but praise for the right one
            element.style.fill = currentColor;
            
            // Celebration effect for specific touch
            createSparkle(element);
        }

        function playAudio(text) {
            console.log("Playing audio for: " + text);
            // In a real implementation, this triggers speech synthesis
            if ('speechSynthesis' in window) {
                const utterance = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text);
                utterance.lang = 'es-ES';
                speechSynthesis.speak(utterance);
            }
        }

        function createSparkle(target) {
            const sparkle = document.createElement('div');
            sparkle.className = 'absolute pointer-events-none text-secondary text-2xl animate-ping';
            sparkle.innerHTML = '✨';
            sparkle.style.left = '50%';
            sparkle.style.top = '50%';
            target.parentElement.appendChild(sparkle);
            setTimeout(() => sparkle.remove(), 1000);
        }
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Grecia) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport">
<title>Estación de Pintura: Grecia</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@100..900&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                "primary": "#006495",
                "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                "error": "#ba1a1a",
                "secondary": "#735c00",
                "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                "outline": "#6e7882",
                "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                "on-surface": "#171c21",
                "background": "#f7f9ff",
                "on-background": "#171c21",
                "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                "surface-tint": "#006495",
                "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                "on-error": "#ffffff"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                "lg": "2rem",
                "xl": "3rem",
                "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                "gutter": "16px",
                "touch-target-min": "48px",
                "container-margin": "24px",
                "card-padding": "20px",
                "unit": "8px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          }
        }
      }
    </script>
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        
        .chunky-shadow-primary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-primary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #004b71;
        }

        .chunky-shadow-secondary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #bec8d3;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-secondary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #bec8d3;
        }

        .chunky-shadow-yellow {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #6d5700;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-yellow:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #6d5700;
        }

        .flag-stripe {
            transition: background-color 0.3s ease;
        }

        @keyframes pulse-soft {
            0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
        }
        .pulse-audio {
            animation: pulse-soft 2s infinite ease-in-out;
        }

        .brush-active {
            outline: 6px solid #2bb1ff;
            outline-offset: 4px;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background font-body-md overflow-x-hidden min-h-screen flex flex-col pb-24">
<!-- Top Navigation (Shell Implementation) -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky z-50 bg-background border-b-4 border-surface-container-highest flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit">
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-4xl" data-icon="arrow_back">arrow_back</span>
</button>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center">
<h1 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-primary">España / Spain</h1>
<span class="font-body-md text-on-surface-variant">¡Pintamos la bandera!</span>
</div>
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-4xl" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</button>
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-secondary bg-secondary-container rounded-full chunky-shadow-yellow active:translate-y-1 transition-all group relative" title="¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl" data-icon="notifications_active">notifications_active</span><span class="absolute -bottom-8 whitespace-nowrap text-[10px] font-label-bold text-secondary opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">¡Alarma!</span></button></header>
<main class="flex-1 max-w-4xl mx-auto w-full px-container-margin py-8 space-y-8">
<!-- Country Header with Interactive Speaker -->
<section class="flex items-center gap-6 bg-surface-container-low p-card-padding rounded-lg border-2 border-surface-container-highest">
<button class="w-20 h-20 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center chunky-shadow-yellow pulse-audio text-on-secondary-container" onclick="playSound('Grecia')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-5xl" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</button>
<div class="flex flex-col">
<h2 class="font-headline-lg text-headline-lg text-primary">Grecia</h2>
<p class="font-body-lg text-on-surface-variant">Escucha y pinta</p>
</div>
</section>
<!-- Flag Painting Area -->
<section class="relative bg-white rounded-lg border-2 border-surface-container-highest p-4 md:p-8 aspect-[3/2] flex flex-col shadow-inner overflow-hidden">
<!-- The Interactive Flag Silhouette -->
<div class="w-full h-full border-4 border-surface-container-highest relative grid grid-rows-9" id="flag-canvas">
<!-- Canton (Top Left Cross) -->
<div class="absolute top-0 left-0 h-[calc(100%/9*5)] aspect-square bg-surface-container-highest z-10 border-r-2 border-b-2 border-outline-variant cursor-pointer flag-zone flex items-center justify-center group" data-current-color="none">
<!-- Cross Shape (Simplified) -->
<div class="w-1/5 h-full bg-white opacity-50 pointer-events-none"></div>
<div class="h-1/5 w-full bg-white opacity-50 absolute pointer-events-none"></div>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-outline-variant opacity-20 text-6xl group-hover:opacity-40" data-icon="format_paint">format_paint</span>
</div>
<!-- Horizontal Stripes -->
<div class="bg-surface-container-highest border-b-2 border-outline-variant cursor-pointer flag-zone flag-stripe" data-current-color="none"></div>
<div class="bg-white border-b-2 border-outline-variant cursor-not-allowed"></div>
<div class="bg-surface-container-highest border-b-2 border-outline-variant cursor-pointer flag-zone flag-stripe" data-current-color="none"></div>
<div class="bg-white border-b-2 border-outline-variant cursor-not-allowed"></div>
<div class="bg-surface-container-highest border-b-2 border-outline-variant cursor-pointer flag-zone flag-stripe" data-current-color="none"></div>
<div class="bg-white border-b-2 border-outline-variant cursor-not-allowed"></div>
<div class="bg-surface-container-highest border-b-2 border-outline-variant cursor-pointer flag-zone flag-stripe" data-current-color="none"></div>
<div class="bg-white border-b-2 border-outline-variant cursor-not-allowed"></div>
<div class="bg-surface-container-highest cursor-pointer flag-zone flag-stripe" data-current-color="none"></div>
</div>
<!-- Atmospheric Element -->
<div class="absolute -bottom-4 -right-4 opacity-10 pointer-events-none">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[160px]" data-icon="palette">palette</span>
</div>
</section>
<!-- Color Palette Selection -->
<section class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-6 pt-4">
<!-- Azul -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-3">
<button class="w-full bg-primary h-24 rounded-lg chunky-shadow-primary flex items-center justify-center text-white relative" id="brush-azul" onclick="selectColor('#006495', 'Azul', this)">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-4xl" data-icon="brush">brush</span>
</button>
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-primary">Azul</span>
<button class="text-primary active:scale-90 transition-transform" onclick="playSound('Azul')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Blanco -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-3">
<button class="w-full bg-white h-24 rounded-lg chunky-shadow-secondary flex items-center justify-center text-outline relative border-2 border-surface-container-highest" id="brush-blanco" onclick="selectColor('#ffffff', 'Blanco', this)">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-4xl" data-icon="brush">brush</span>
</button>
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-on-surface-variant">Blanco</span>
<button class="text-on-surface-variant active:scale-90 transition-transform" onclick="playSound('Blanco')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</div>
</section>
<!-- Fun Contextual Card (Bento-ish) -->
<section class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
<div class="md:col-span-2 bg-primary-container/20 border-2 border-primary-container p-6 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-4">
<div class="flex-1">
<h3 class="font-headline-md text-primary mb-2">¡Dato Curioso!</h3>
<p class="font-body-md text-on-primary-container">Grecia tiene miles de islas rodeadas de mar azul. ¡Por eso usan estos colores!</p>
</div>
<div class="w-24 h-24 rounded-lg overflow-hidden flex-shrink-0 border-4 border-white shadow-md rotate-3">
<div class="w-full h-full bg-cover bg-center" data-alt="A cinematic, vibrant photo of Santorini, Greece, with iconic blue-domed churches and whitewashed buildings overlooking a deep sapphire Mediterranean sea under a bright, golden-hour sun. The style is travel-documentary, high contrast, and saturated, matching a premium educational kid-friendly aesthetic." style="background-image: url('https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuBef0v-7r6niG_EVq1fHnU860KfgpmWF9-THbk9ezlNwnNc-CP-VDh0KusEaPjGlJnts8f9LlZeYXltLm75H_X2h-LcOaHOcbTcJSPj2IdozUoRqhRR1MNEO7BcIgFq0XXYWXhPEIfmza_OSCPC4zIv7DWRHdEeFziK-4F50D1h41wEAHSasHKbksfiugeaqRQXH9IBwHv5D5tTPPUvb9ggabYp75tYT5NZ0oeCPiobFR5GXzU85gYecP7oKjkL5uz2gtgthglHE-w')"></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="bg-tertiary-container/20 border-2 border-tertiary-container p-6 rounded-lg flex flex-col justify-center items-center text-center">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-tertiary text-5xl mb-2" data-icon="star" data-weight="fill">star</span>
<span class="font-headline-md text-tertiary">3 / 6</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-tertiary">Pasaporte</span>
</div>
</section>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation Shell -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-touch-target-min flex justify-around items-center px-gutter pb-2 bg-surface border-t-4 border-surface-container-highest z-50">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant px-4 py-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-all" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="explore">explore</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explorar</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container rounded-xl px-4 py-2 translate-y-1 shadow-md" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="menu_book">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Pasaporte</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant px-4 py-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-all" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="videogame_asset">videogame_asset</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Jugar</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Audio & Painting Logic -->
<script>
        let selectedColor = null;
        let selectedColorName = null;

        function selectColor(color, name, element) {
            selectedColor = color;
            selectedColorName = name;
            
            // UI Feedback for brush selection
            document.querySelectorAll('[id^="brush-"]').forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove('brush-active'));
            element.classList.add('brush-active');
            
            playSound(name);
        }

        function playSound(text) {
            // Logic for text-to-speech or pre-recorded clips
            console.log("Playing audio for: " + text);
            // Visual feedback for interaction
            const utterance = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text);
            utterance.lang = 'es-ES';
            window.speechSynthesis.speak(utterance);
        }

        // Initialize Painting Interaction
        document.querySelectorAll('.flag-zone').forEach(zone => {
            zone.addEventListener('click', function() {
                if (selectedColor) {
                    this.style.backgroundColor = selectedColor;
                    this.dataset.currentColor = selectedColorName;
                    this.querySelector('span')?.classList.add('hidden');
                    
                    // Simple haptic effect
                    this.classList.add('scale-[0.98]');
                    setTimeout(() => this.classList.remove('scale-[0.98]'), 100);

                    checkCompletion();
                } else {
                    // Alert to pick a color first
                    playSound('Elige un color primero');
                }
            });
        });

        function checkCompletion() {
            const zones = document.querySelectorAll('.flag-zone');
            const allPainted = Array.from(zones).every(z => z.dataset.currentColor === 'Azul');
            
            if (allPainted) {
                // Success trigger
                confetti();
            }
        }

        function confetti() {
            console.log("Celebration! Flag complete.");
            // Simple success visual
            const main = document.querySelector('main');
            const successOverlay = document.createElement('div');
            successOverlay.className = 'fixed inset-0 z-[100] flex items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container/90 pointer-events-none animate-in fade-in duration-500';
            successOverlay.innerHTML = `
                <div class="text-center p-8 bg-white rounded-xl shadow-2xl border-b-8 border-secondary flex flex-col items-center">
                    <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-9xl text-secondary animate-bounce" data-weight="fill" data-icon="emoji_events">emoji_events</span>
                    <h2 class="font-headline-lg text-primary mt-4">¡Excelente!</h2>
                    <p class="font-body-lg text-on-surface-variant">Has pintado la bandera de Grecia</p>
                </div>
            `;
            document.body.appendChild(successOverlay);
            playSound('¡Excelente! Lo has logrado.');
            setTimeout(() => successOverlay.remove(), 3000);
        }
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Portugal) -->
<!DOCTYPE html>

<html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/>
<title>Estación de Pintura (Portugal)</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        body { font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; }
        
        .chunky-button {
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
        }
        .chunky-button:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
        }

        .flag-section {
            transition: background-color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        .brush-active {
            filter: drop-shadow(0 0 10px rgba(0, 100, 149, 0.4));
        }

        @keyframes pulse-audio {
            0% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(252, 204, 0, 0.7); }
            70% { transform: scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 0 0 10px rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
        }
        .pulse-audio { animation: pulse-audio 2s infinite; }

        .confetti {
            position: absolute;
            pointer-events: none;
        }
    </style>
<style>
    body {
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);
    }
  </style>
  </head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background min-h-screen pb-24">
<!-- Top Navigation -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky bg-surface-container-low z-50 flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit">
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[32px]">arrow_back</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary font-bold">Estación de Pintura</h1>
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[32px]">volume_up</span>
</button>
</header>
<main class="px-container-margin py-6 max-w-4xl mx-auto">
<!-- Fun Fact Card -->
<div class="bg-primary-container/10 border-2 border-primary-container rounded-lg p-card-padding mb-8 flex items-center gap-4">
<div class="bg-secondary-container p-3 rounded-full flex-shrink-0">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container">sailing</span>
</div>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-primary-container">
<strong>Portugal</strong> es famoso por sus barcos y el mar.
            </p>
</div>
<!-- Canvas Area -->
<div class="relative bg-white rounded-lg p-8 shadow-sm border-2 border-surface-variant mb-8 flex flex-col items-center">
<h2 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-primary mb-6">¡Pinta la bandera!</h2>
<!-- Flag Interactive Silhouette -->
<div class="relative w-full aspect-[3/2] max-w-md border-8 border-surface-variant rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-inner bg-surface-dim" id="flag-canvas">
<svg class="w-full h-full" viewbox="0 0 300 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<!-- Left Section (Green) -->
<rect class="flag-section" fill="#E5E7EB" height="200" id="rect-green" onclick="paintSection('green')" width="120" x="0" y="0"></rect>
<!-- Right Section (Red) -->
<rect class="flag-section" fill="#F3F4F6" height="200" id="rect-red" onclick="paintSection('red')" width="180" x="120" y="0"></rect>
<!-- Shield Emblem (Gold/Center) -->
<circle class="flag-section" cx="120" cy="100" fill="#D1D5DB" id="shield-base" onclick="paintSection('gold')" r="35"></circle>
<!-- Inner details (simplified for kids) -->
<circle cx="120" cy="100" fill="none" r="25" stroke="#9CA3AF" stroke-width="2"></circle>
</svg>
</div>
<!-- Smart Brush Selection -->
<div class="flex gap-4 mt-8">
<button class="brush-btn w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-[#006633] border-4 border-white shadow-lg chunky-button flex items-center justify-center" onclick="selectColor('green', this)">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white text-[32px]">brush</span>
</button>
<button class="brush-btn w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-[#FF0000] border-4 border-white shadow-lg chunky-button flex items-center justify-center" onclick="selectColor('red', this)">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white text-[32px]">brush</span>
</button>
<button class="brush-btn w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-[#FFCC00] border-4 border-white shadow-lg chunky-button flex items-center justify-center" onclick="selectColor('gold', this)">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white text-[32px]">brush</span>
</button>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Bilingual Audio Section -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
<button class="flex flex-col items-center gap-3 bg-white p-6 rounded-lg border-b-8 border-tertiary-container shadow-sm active:translate-y-1 active:border-b-4 transition-all" onclick="playAudio('verde')">
<div class="w-16 h-16 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center pulse-audio">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-4xl">volume_up</span>
</div>
<div class="text-center">
<span class="block font-headline-md text-headline-md text-tertiary">Verde</span>
<span class="block font-body-md text-body-md text-outline">Green</span>
</div>
</button>
<button class="flex flex-col items-center gap-3 bg-white p-6 rounded-lg border-b-8 border-error-container shadow-sm active:translate-y-1 active:border-b-4 transition-all" onclick="playAudio('rojo')">
<div class="w-16 h-16 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-4xl">volume_up</span>
</div>
<div class="text-center">
<span class="block font-headline-md text-headline-md text-error">Rojo</span>
<span class="block font-body-md text-body-md text-outline">Red</span>
</div>
</button>
</div>
<!-- Artistic Decoration Image -->
<div class="mt-12 rounded-lg overflow-hidden border-4 border-white shadow-xl rotate-1">
<img class="w-full h-48 object-cover" data-alt="A cheerful, child-friendly illustration of a traditional Portuguese caravela sailing boat on a vibrant blue ocean with a bright cartoon sun. The style is 2D vector art with bold outlines and bright colors like sky blue, warm yellow, and deep navy. Gentle waves splash against the wooden hull of the ship, which features white sails with red crosses. The atmosphere is joyful and adventurous, set under a clear sky." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuDquDfgSyzmfM8ojkukQ06yC5u0YifL5Qkyeyq7Fl-WM0yBSy3WUhCH5B_vphLCLl_m-b_1pEvoLoe4sDf1IILbSt7Uc07qNEwXVSf5JCsC6qcGRVPaHmmOfEsUkhxl_sohuKIOX9LmP9bJ_hLtF0vEQ8a-EWq6wk24aMc2nDu1uOQtJ-9-zPifbPE_0VUH9gN_vIH-kbIwsVrhUkMhMYsXhj-LrBvhdBoafrtnRdBnxQV1dESbDw4n2wKFJtQsuw2j32V1JUwgzd4"/>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Navigation Shell -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg border-t-4 border-surface-variant">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Confetti Overlay Container -->
<div class="fixed inset-0 pointer-events-none z-[100]" id="confetti-container"></div>
<script>
        let selectedColor = null;
        let paintedCount = 0;
        const totalSections = 3;

        function selectColor(color, btn) {
            selectedColor = color;
            // Clear previous brush highlights
            document.querySelectorAll('.brush-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('ring-4', 'ring-primary', 'scale-110'));
            // Highlight current
            btn.classList.add('ring-4', 'ring-primary', 'scale-110');
            
            // Audio feedback for selection
            const audioMap = {
                'green': 'Verde!',
                'red': 'Rojo!',
                'gold': '¡Dorado!'
            };
            console.log("Selected color: " + audioMap[color]);
        }

        function paintSection(sectionId) {
            if (!selectedColor) {
                alert("¡Primero elige un color con el pincel!");
                return;
            }

            const element = document.getElementById('rect-' + sectionId) || document.getElementById('shield-base');
            
            if (sectionId === 'green' && selectedColor === 'green') {
                element.setAttribute('fill', '#006633');
                checkProgress();
            } else if (sectionId === 'red' && selectedColor === 'red') {
                element.setAttribute('fill', '#FF0000');
                checkProgress();
            } else if (sectionId === 'gold' && selectedColor === 'gold') {
                element.setAttribute('fill', '#FFCC00');
                checkProgress();
            } else {
                // Shake effect or feedback for wrong color
                element.classList.add('animate-pulse');
                setTimeout(() => element.classList.remove('animate-pulse'), 500);
            }
        }

        function checkProgress() {
            paintedCount++;
            if (paintedCount >= totalSections) {
                celebrate();
            }
        }

        function celebrate() {
            const container = document.getElementById('confetti-container');
            for (let i = 0; i < 50; i++) {
                const confetti = document.createElement('div');
                confetti.className = 'confetti';
                confetti.style.left = Math.random() * 100 + 'vw';
                confetti.style.top = '-10px';
                confetti.style.width = '10px';
                confetti.style.height = '10px';
                confetti.style.backgroundColor = ['#006633', '#FF0000', '#FFCC00'][Math.floor(Math.random() * 3)];
                confetti.style.transform = `rotate(${Math.random() * 360}deg)`;
                
                container.appendChild(confetti);

                const animation = confetti.animate([
                    { transform: `translateY(0) rotate(0deg)`, opacity: 1 },
                    { transform: `translateY(100vh) rotate(${Math.random() * 720}deg)`, opacity: 0 }
                ], {
                    duration: 2000 + Math.random() * 1000,
                    easing: 'cubic-bezier(0, .9, .57, 1)'
                });

                animation.onfinish = () => confetti.remove();
            }
        }

        function playAudio(word) {
            console.log("Playing pronunciation for: " + word);
            // In a real app, this would trigger an actual audio file
        }
    </script>
</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Países Bajos) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport">
<title>Estación de Pintura (Países Bajos)</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        .tactile-btn {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }
        .tactile-btn:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }
        .flag-strip-red { border-bottom: 8px solid #991b1b; }
        .flag-strip-white { border-bottom: 8px solid #d1d5db; }
        .flag-strip-blue { border-bottom: 8px solid #1e3a8a; }

        @keyframes pulse-audio {
            0% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.1); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); }
        }
        .pulse-animation {
            animation: pulse-audio 2s infinite ease-in-out;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background font-body-md min-h-screen flex flex-col pb-24">
<!-- TopAppBar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky bg-surface-container-low flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit z-50">
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full text-primary hover:bg-primary-container active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="menu">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary font-bold">Estación de Pintura</h1>
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full text-primary hover:bg-primary-container active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</button>
<button class="flex items-center gap-1 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container px-4 py-2 rounded-full border-b-4 border-on-secondary-fixed-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-lg"><span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">notifications_active</span><span class="font-label-bold text-[10px] uppercase tracking-tighter">¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm</span></button></header>
<main class="flex-grow px-container-margin pt-6 max-w-4xl mx-auto w-full">
<!-- Subtitle -->
<div class="mb-6 text-center">
<span class="inline-block bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container px-4 py-1 rounded-full font-label-bold text-label-bold mb-2">PAÍSES BAJOS</span>
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-on-surface">¡Pintemos la bandera!</h2>
</div>
<!-- Canvas Area -->
<div class="relative bg-white rounded-lg p-card-padding border-2 border-surface-variant shadow-lg mb-8">
<div class="aspect-[3/2] w-full rounded-lg overflow-hidden flex flex-col border border-outline-variant" id="flag-canvas">
<!-- Red Strip -->
<button class="flex-1 bg-surface-container-high transition-colors duration-300 flex items-center justify-center group relative cursor-pointer hover:brightness-95" id="strip-top" onclick="paintStrip('red')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-outline-variant group-hover:scale-125 transition-transform" data-icon="format_paint">format_paint</span>
</button>
<!-- White Strip -->
<button class="flex-1 bg-surface-container flex items-center justify-center group relative cursor-pointer hover:brightness-95" id="strip-middle" onclick="paintStrip('white')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-outline-variant group-hover:scale-125 transition-transform" data-icon="format_paint">format_paint</span>
</button>
<!-- Blue Strip -->
<button class="flex-1 bg-surface-container-high transition-colors duration-300 flex items-center justify-center group relative cursor-pointer hover:brightness-95" id="strip-bottom" onclick="paintStrip('blue')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-outline-variant group-hover:scale-125 transition-transform" data-icon="format_paint">format_paint</span>
</button>
</div>
<!-- Success Overlay (Hidden) -->
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-secondary-container/90 rounded-lg hidden flex-col items-center justify-center p-card-padding text-center z-10" id="success-overlay">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-7xl text-on-secondary-container mb-4" data-icon="auto_awesome" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">auto_awesome</span>
<h3 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-on-secondary-container mb-2">¡Increíble!</h3>
<p class="text-body-lg font-body-lg text-on-secondary-container">Has pintado la bandera perfectamente.</p>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Controls / Palette -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-8">
<!-- Rojo -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-3 p-4 bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-lg border-b-4 border-surface-variant">
<button class="w-20 h-20 bg-[#C8102E] rounded-full tactile-btn border-4 border-white transition-transform active:scale-95" id="btn-red" onclick="selectColor('red')"></button>
<button class="flex items-center gap-2 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container px-4 py-2 rounded-full font-label-bold pulse-animation">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
                    Rojo
                </button>
</div>
<!-- Blanco -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-3 p-4 bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-lg border-b-4 border-surface-variant">
<button class="w-20 h-20 bg-white rounded-full tactile-btn border-4 border-surface-variant transition-transform active:scale-95" id="btn-white" onclick="selectColor('white')"></button>
<button class="flex items-center gap-2 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container px-4 py-2 rounded-full font-label-bold pulse-animation">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
                    Blanco
                </button>
</div>
<!-- Azul -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-3 p-4 bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-lg border-b-4 border-surface-variant">
<button class="w-20 h-20 bg-[#1E3A8A] rounded-full tactile-btn border-4 border-white transition-transform active:scale-95" id="btn-blue" onclick="selectColor('blue')"></button>
<button class="flex items-center gap-2 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container px-4 py-2 rounded-full font-label-bold pulse-animation">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
                    Azul
                </button>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Fun Fact Card -->
<div class="bg-tertiary-container text-on-tertiary-container p-card-padding rounded-lg flex gap-4 items-center mb-12 shadow-md">
<div class="w-16 h-16 bg-white/20 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shrink-0">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-4xl" data-icon="lightbulb" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">lightbulb</span>
</div>
<div>
<h4 class="font-label-bold text-label-bold uppercase opacity-80 mb-1">¿Sabías que?</h4>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg">¡En los Países Bajos hay muchos molinos de viento!</p>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Image Hint -->
<div class="rounded-lg overflow-hidden border-4 border-white shadow-xl rotate-1 mb-10 max-w-sm mx-auto">
<img class="w-full aspect-video object-cover" data-alt="A cheerful educational digital illustration of a traditional Dutch windmill standing in a vibrant green field under a clear blue sky. In the foreground, there is a small flag of the Netherlands on a wooden pole. The art style is premium, tactile, and chunky, designed for children aged 4-8, with soft lighting and a palette of bright primary colors like Sky Blue and Grass Green." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuCu-j1Z2n8eNcjBVhSNyR_eKeRucJMdLuCMtATQGvOPUFKYEymo2qkzTjwRX9QzBsmaH_Pz8seTvlUStiwNqo3WUhGLAF6lJ_EsgQJrfnSdSvwRdVcpJw8caki8f7lLEiMFhWley9plMp-_wtpKUsPvWCapem2PXKOBQ-e-NngjOYhyeG4q4FIaVJtAH_ckBZKNySJ12oXwZcEG7Yi5TxxaxUbxqFtQzw_-RcXtoL3bC6gQNQXo4uwXJziVJU_jQ6RXqxcmSYvmUmQ">
</div>
</main>
<!-- BottomNavBar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest border-t-4 border-surface-variant shadow-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-all duration-75" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="map">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-all duration-75" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="menu_book">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0 transition-transform duration-75" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="quiz">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
</nav>
<script>
        let currentColor = null;
        let progress = { top: false, middle: false, bottom: false };

        function selectColor(color) {
            currentColor = color;
            // Highlight selected color button
            document.querySelectorAll('.tactile-btn').forEach(btn => {
                btn.classList.remove('scale-110', 'ring-4', 'ring-primary');
            });
            const btnId = 'btn-' + color;
            document.getElementById(btnId).classList.add('scale-110', 'ring-4', 'ring-primary');
        }

        function paintStrip(position) {
            if (!currentColor) {
                alert('¡Primero elige un color!');
                return;
            }

            const targetStrip = document.getElementById('strip-' + (position === 'red' ? 'top' : position === 'white' ? 'middle' : 'bottom'));
            
            let hexColor = '';
            if (currentColor === 'red') hexColor = '#C8102E';
            if (currentColor === 'white') hexColor = '#FFFFFF';
            if (currentColor === 'blue') hexColor = '#1E3A8A';

            targetStrip.style.backgroundColor = hexColor;
            targetStrip.innerHTML = ''; // Remove the paint icon

            // Check if correct
            if (position === currentColor) {
                if (position === 'red') progress.top = true;
                if (position === 'white') progress.middle = true;
                if (position === 'blue') progress.bottom = true;
            }

            checkWin();
        }

        function checkWin() {
            if (progress.top && progress.middle && progress.bottom) {
                setTimeout(() => {
                    document.getElementById('success-overlay').classList.remove('hidden');
                    document.getElementById('success-overlay').classList.add('flex');
                }, 500);
            }
        }
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Turquía) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport">
<title>Estación de Pintura (Turquía)</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-primary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-primary:active {
            box-shadow: 0 0px 0 0 #004b71;
            transform: translateY(6px);
        }
        .chunky-shadow-secondary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #bec8d3;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-secondary:active {
            box-shadow: 0 0px 0 0 #bec8d3;
            transform: translateY(6px);
        }
        .chunky-shadow-yellow {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #b38f00;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-yellow:active {
            box-shadow: 0 0px 0 0 #b38f00;
            transform: translateY(6px);
        }
        .canvas-area {
            cursor: url('https://fonts.gstatic.com/s/i/short-term/release/materialsymbolsoutlined/brush/default/24px.svg'), auto;
        }
        @keyframes pulse-slow {
            0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
        }
        .animate-pulse-slow {
            animation: pulse-slow 3s ease-in-out infinite;
        }
    </style>
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-surface font-body-md min-h-screen pb-32">
<!-- Top App Bar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky z-50 bg-surface-container-low flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit h-16">
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 hover:bg-primary-container rounded-full">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-3xl">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary text-center">Estación de Pintura (Turquía)</h1>
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 hover:bg-primary-container rounded-full">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-3xl">volume_up</span>
</button>
<button class="flex items-center gap-1 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container px-4 py-2 rounded-full border-b-4 border-on-secondary-fixed-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-lg chunky-shadow-yellow"><span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">notifications_active</span><span class="font-label-bold text-[10px] uppercase tracking-tighter">¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm</span></button></header>
<main class="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-container-margin mt-8 space-y-8">
<!-- Interactive Flag Canvas Section -->
<div class="relative bg-surface-container-lowest p-card-padding rounded-lg shadow-sm border-2 border-surface-variant">
<div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-6">
<div class="space-y-1">
<h2 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-primary">¡Pinta la Bandera!</h2>
<p class="text-body-md text-on-surface-variant">Usa tus dedos para colorear.</p>
</div>
<div class="flex gap-4">
<!-- Audio Button: Rojo -->
<button class="chunky-shadow-yellow flex items-center gap-3 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container px-6 py-3 rounded-full font-label-bold animate-pulse-slow">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
                        Rojo
                    </button>
<!-- Audio Button: Blanco -->
<button class="chunky-shadow-yellow flex items-center gap-3 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container px-6 py-3 rounded-full font-label-bold">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
                        Blanco
                    </button>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Flag Container -->
<div class="canvas-area aspect-[3/2] w-full bg-surface-container-high rounded-xl relative overflow-hidden border-4 border-dashed border-outline-variant flex items-center justify-center" id="flag-canvas">
<!-- Visual Placeholder of Turkish Flag Outline -->
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-red-500 opacity-10 flex items-center justify-center">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[12rem] text-white opacity-20">format_paint</span>
</div>
<!-- The Star and Crescent Outline (Simplified for UI representation) -->
<div class="relative w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center p-12">
<div class="w-full h-full border-4 border-on-surface-variant border-opacity-30 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-sm">
<!-- Simulated painting brush -->
<div class="text-center space-y-4">
<img class="w-64 h-auto mx-auto drop-shadow-lg" data-alt="A stylized, thick-lined coloring book illustration of the Turkish flag. The design is centered, featuring a large crescent moon and a five-pointed star. The art style is bold and tactile, suitable for a children's digital painting app, set against a warm, sun-drenched minimalist classroom background. Soft high-key lighting illuminates the scene with a joyful, premium educational feel." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuAHsrHqnnf3DHrdOjM6jninGtX9Y3QeMJ4-4N-AqMkfzqGfZfFFbc1CB6g0ZJqh85nkONA3Z10DyVxQRLQDNlm6pc-i-9Z4SQ6_LQSKij_8XKed8-YCxcy3CHGyZib_gXXwzrGeYhiwPEjfXMRL2j1Gda0FFKAZUTywSkWiOHMdxMvmjL7evt603q9GfDWeC3y0mQHwg-Eu06gHNMKsHC8HAQZg-lmasbVI-m5eKJP2mBES5a9ZoZ0lVYEHdB4qtdlumoWDUOaraUM">
<p class="font-label-bold text-on-surface-variant uppercase tracking-widest">Toque para colorear</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Bento Style Info Cards -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-gutter">
<!-- Fun Fact Card -->
<div class="bg-tertiary-container text-on-tertiary p-card-padding rounded-lg chunky-shadow-primary flex flex-col justify-center min-h-[160px]">
<div class="flex items-start gap-4">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-4xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">auto_awesome</span>
<div>
<h3 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md mb-2">¿Sabías que?</h3>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg leading-relaxed">"La luna y la estrella brillan en el cielo de Turquía."</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Tool Selection -->
<div class="bg-surface-container-low p-card-padding rounded-lg border-2 border-surface-variant flex items-center justify-around">
<button class="w-20 h-20 bg-red-600 rounded-full border-4 border-white shadow-lg active:scale-95 transition-transform flex items-center justify-center group">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white text-3xl group-active:scale-110">brush</span>
</button>
<button class="w-20 h-20 bg-white rounded-full border-4 border-surface-variant shadow-lg active:scale-95 transition-transform flex items-center justify-center group">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-3xl group-active:scale-110">brush</span>
</button>
<button class="w-20 h-20 bg-primary-container rounded-full border-4 border-white shadow-lg active:scale-95 transition-transform flex items-center justify-center group">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white text-3xl group-active:scale-110">undo</span>
</button>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Action Section -->
<div class="flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-6 items-center justify-center pt-8">
<button class="chunky-shadow-primary w-full md:w-auto px-12 py-5 bg-primary text-on-primary rounded-full font-headline-md text-headline-md flex items-center justify-center gap-3">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">check_circle</span>
                ¡Terminé!
            </button>
<button class="chunky-shadow-secondary w-full md:w-auto px-12 py-5 bg-white text-primary rounded-full font-headline-md text-headline-md border-2 border-surface-variant flex items-center justify-center gap-3">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">restart_alt</span>
                Empezar de nuevo
            </button>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation Bar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 bg-surface-container-lowest flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 shadow-lg border-t-4 border-surface-variant">
<!-- Explore -->
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-75 hover:bg-surface-variant rounded-lg" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</a>
<!-- Passport -->
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-75 hover:bg-surface-variant rounded-lg" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</a>
<!-- Play (Active) -->
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0 active:translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-75" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
</nav>
<script>
        // Micro-interaction for painting feedback
        const canvas = document.getElementById('flag-canvas');
        canvas.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            const ripple = document.createElement('div');
            ripple.className = 'absolute rounded-full bg-red-500/20 pointer-events-none transform -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 animate-ping';
            ripple.style.width = '100px';
            ripple.style.height = '100px';
            ripple.style.left = `${e.clientX - canvas.getBoundingClientRect().left}px`;
            ripple.style.top = `${e.clientY - canvas.getBoundingClientRect().top}px`;
            canvas.appendChild(ripple);
            setTimeout(() => ripple.remove(), 1000);
        });

        // Simple audio feedback simulation
        document.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(btn => {
            btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                const text = btn.innerText.trim();
                if (text === 'volume_up Rojo') {
                    console.log('Playing audio: Rojo');
                } else if (text === 'volume_up Blanco') {
                    console.log('Playing audio: Blanco');
                }
            });
        });
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Suecia) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport">
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                "primary": "#006495",
                "on-surface": "#171c21",
                "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                "error": "#ba1a1a",
                "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                "on-background": "#171c21",
                "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                "surface-tint": "#006495",
                "outline": "#6e7882",
                "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                "secondary": "#735c00",
                "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                "on-error": "#ffffff",
                "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
