                "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                "background": "#f7f9ff"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                "lg": "2rem",
                "xl": "3rem",
                "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                "gutter": "16px",
                "container-margin": "24px",
                "card-padding": "20px",
                "unit": "8px",
                "touch-target-min": "48px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          }
        }
      }
    </script>
<style>
        body { font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; }
        
        .tactile-button {
            transition: all 0.1s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275);
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }
        .tactile-button:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }

        .primary-tactile {
            background-color: #2bb1ff;
            border-bottom: 6px solid #006495;
            color: white;
        }

        .secondary-tactile {
            background-color: white;
            border-bottom: 6px solid #dee3e9;
            color: #006495;
        }

        .audio-pulse {
            animation: pulse 2s infinite;
        }
        @keyframes pulse {
            0% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(252, 204, 0, 0.4); }
            70% { transform: scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 0 0 15px rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
        }

        .sweden-blue { background-color: #006aa7; }
        .sweden-yellow { background-color: #fecc00; }

        .flag-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(18, 1fr);
            grid-template-rows: repeat(12, 1fr);
            aspect-ratio: 16/10;
        }

        .paint-active {
            outline: 6px solid #2bb1ff;
            outline-offset: 4px;
            z-index: 10;
        }

        .floating-forest {
            pointer-events: none;
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 20px;
            right: 20px;
            width: 120px;
            height: 120px;
            z-index: 10;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background min-h-screen pb-32">
<!-- Top Navigation -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky z-40 bg-surface-container-low flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit h-16">
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full text-primary hover:bg-primary-container active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[32px]">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary font-bold">Flag Adventure</h1>
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full text-primary hover:bg-primary-container active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[32px]">volume_up</span>
</button>
<button class="flex items-center gap-1 bg-tertiary-container text-on-tertiary-container px-4 py-2 rounded-full border-b-4 border-on-tertiary-fixed-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-lg"><span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">notifications_active</span><span class="font-label-bold text-[10px] uppercase tracking-tighter">¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm</span></button></header>
<main class="px-container-margin py-8">
<!-- Title & Hero Info -->
<div class="text-center mb-8">
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-on-surface mb-2">Estación de Pintura (Suecia)</h2>
<p class="font-body-md text-on-surface-variant max-w-xs mx-auto">¡Pinta la bandera de Suecia con los colores correctos!</p>
</div>
<!-- The Painting Canvas -->
<div class="relative bg-white rounded-lg p-6 shadow-xl border-2 border-surface-variant mb-10">
<div class="flag-grid rounded-md overflow-hidden bg-surface-variant border-4 border-white shadow-inner" id="flag-canvas">
<!-- Background (Field) -->
<div class="canvas-part cursor-pointer bg-white transition-colors duration-300" id="field-top-left" onclick="paintPart(this)" style="grid-area: 1 / 1 / 6 / 6;"></div>
<div class="canvas-part cursor-pointer bg-white transition-colors duration-300" id="field-bottom-left" onclick="paintPart(this)" style="grid-area: 8 / 1 / 13 / 6;"></div>
<div class="canvas-part cursor-pointer bg-white transition-colors duration-300" id="field-top-right" onclick="paintPart(this)" style="grid-area: 1 / 10 / 6 / 19;"></div>
<div class="canvas-part cursor-pointer bg-white transition-colors duration-300" id="field-bottom-right" onclick="paintPart(this)" style="grid-area: 8 / 10 / 13 / 19;"></div>
<!-- Nordic Cross (Horizontal) -->
<div class="canvas-part cursor-pointer bg-white transition-colors duration-300" id="cross-h" onclick="paintPart(this)" style="grid-area: 6 / 1 / 8 / 19;"></div>
<!-- Nordic Cross (Vertical) -->
<div class="canvas-part cursor-pointer bg-white transition-colors duration-300" id="cross-v" onclick="paintPart(this)" style="grid-area: 1 / 6 / 13 / 10;"></div>
</div>
<!-- Audio Help Buttons -->
<div class="absolute -top-4 -right-4 flex flex-col gap-3">
<button class="w-16 h-16 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-full shadow-lg border-b-4 border-on-secondary-container flex items-center justify-center audio-pulse tactile-button" onclick="playAudio('azul')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[32px]">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Color Palette Picker -->
<div class="flex justify-center gap-6 mb-12">
<div class="flex flex-col items-center">
<button class="w-20 h-20 rounded-full sweden-blue border-4 border-white shadow-lg tactile-button paint-active" id="color-blue" onclick="selectColor('azul', this)">
</button>
<span class="mt-3 font-label-bold text-on-surface">Azul</span>
<button class="mt-2 text-primary" onclick="playAudio('azul')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center">
<button class="w-20 h-20 rounded-full sweden-yellow border-4 border-white shadow-lg tactile-button" id="color-yellow" onclick="selectColor('amarillo', this)">
</button>
<span class="mt-3 font-label-bold text-on-surface">Amarillo</span>
<button class="mt-2 text-primary" onclick="playAudio('amarillo')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Fun Fact Card -->
<div class="bg-primary-fixed p-card-padding rounded-lg relative overflow-hidden flex items-start gap-4 shadow-md">
<div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-primary-container flex-shrink-0 flex items-center justify-center text-white border-2 border-white">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[32px]">lightbulb</span>
</div>
<div class="z-10">
<h3 class="font-label-bold text-on-primary-fixed-variant mb-1">Dato Curioso:</h3>
<p class="font-body-md text-on-primary-fixed-variant leading-tight italic">
                    "¡En Suecia hace frío y hay muchos bosques!"
                </p>
</div>
<!-- Background forest silhouette style via div -->
<div class="absolute bottom-[-10px] right-[-10px] opacity-20 transform scale-150 rotate-12">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[100px] text-primary">forest</span>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Action Button -->
<div class="mt-12 flex justify-center">
<button class="px-12 py-5 rounded-full primary-tactile font-headline-md tactile-button flex items-center gap-3" onclick="checkResult()">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">check_circle</span>
                ¡Listo!
            </button>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation Shell -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg border-t-4 border-surface-variant">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-75 hover:bg-surface-variant" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0 active:translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-75" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-75 hover:bg-surface-variant" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Celebration Modal (Hidden by default) -->
<div class="fixed inset-0 z-[100] hidden flex items-center justify-center p-6" id="success-modal">
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-primary/40 backdrop-blur-sm"></div>
<div class="relative bg-secondary-fixed p-8 rounded-xl shadow-2xl text-center border-b-[8px] border-secondary text-on-secondary-fixed max-w-sm w-full scale-90 transition-transform duration-300" id="modal-content">
<div class="w-24 h-24 bg-white rounded-full mx-auto mb-6 flex items-center justify-center shadow-inner">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[64px] text-tertiary">celebration</span>
</div>
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile mb-2">¡Excelente!</h2>
<p class="font-body-lg mb-8">Has pintado la bandera de Suecia perfectamente.</p>
<button class="w-full py-4 primary-tactile rounded-full font-headline-md tactile-button" onclick="location.reload()">
                ¡Seguir Jugando!
            </button>
</div>
</div>
<script>
        let selectedColor = 'azul';

        function selectColor(color, el) {
            selectedColor = color;
            // Clear active state
            document.getElementById('color-blue').classList.remove('paint-active');
            document.getElementById('color-yellow').classList.remove('paint-active');
            // Set active state
            el.classList.add('paint-active');
        }

        function paintPart(el) {
            if (selectedColor === 'azul') {
                el.style.backgroundColor = '#006aa7';
            } else if (selectedColor === 'amarillo') {
                el.style.backgroundColor = '#fecc00';
            }
        }

        function playAudio(term) {
            // Logic to play audio (placeholder)
            console.log("Playing audio for: " + term);
            const synth = window.speechSynthesis;
            const utter = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(term);
            utter.lang = 'es-ES';
            synth.speak(utter);
        }

        function checkResult() {
            const blueAreas = ['field-top-left', 'field-bottom-left', 'field-top-right', 'field-bottom-right'];
            const yellowAreas = ['cross-h', 'cross-v'];
            
            let allCorrect = true;

            blueAreas.forEach(id => {
                const el = document.getElementById(id);
                // Simple color check (note: rgb format)
                if (el.style.backgroundColor !== 'rgb(0, 106, 167)') allCorrect = false;
            });

            yellowAreas.forEach(id => {
                const el = document.getElementById(id);
                if (el.style.backgroundColor !== 'rgb(254, 204, 0)') allCorrect = false;
            });

            if (allCorrect) {
                const modal = document.getElementById('success-modal');
                const content = document.getElementById('modal-content');
                modal.classList.remove('hidden');
                setTimeout(() => content.classList.replace('scale-90', 'scale-100'), 10);
            } else {
                alert("¡Casi! Intenta poner el azul en los rectángulos y el amarillo en la cruz.");
            }
        }
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Chile) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport">
<title>Estación de Pintura (Chile)</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 24;
        }
        .tactile-button-primary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #004b71;
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
        }
        .tactile-button-primary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        .tactile-button-secondary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #dee3e9;
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
        }
        .tactile-button-secondary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #dee3e9;
        }
        .tactile-card {
            box-shadow: 0 8px 0 0 #eaeef5;
        }
        .audio-pulse:active {
            animation: pulse 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1);
        }
        @keyframes pulse {
            0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.1); }
        }
        .star-clip {
            clip-path: polygon(50% 0%, 61% 35%, 98% 35%, 68% 57%, 79% 91%, 50% 70%, 21% 91%, 32% 57%, 2% 35%, 39% 35%);
        }
    </style>
<script id="tailwind-config">
        tailwind.config = {
          darkMode: "class",
          theme: {
            extend: {
              "colors": {
                      "primary": "#006495",
                      "on-surface": "#171c21",
                      "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                      "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                      "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                      "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                      "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                      "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                      "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                      "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                      "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                      "error": "#ba1a1a",
                      "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                      "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                      "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                      "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                      "on-background": "#171c21",
                      "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                      "surface-tint": "#006495",
                      "outline": "#6e7882",
                      "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                      "secondary": "#735c00",
                      "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                      "on-error": "#ffffff",
                      "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                      "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                      "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                      "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                      "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                      "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                      "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                      "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                      "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                      "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                      "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                      "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                      "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                      "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                      "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                      "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                      "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                      "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                      "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                      "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                      "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                      "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                      "background": "#f7f9ff"
              },
              "borderRadius": {
                      "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                      "lg": "2rem",
                      "xl": "3rem",
                      "full": "9999px"
              },
              "spacing": {
                      "gutter": "16px",
                      "container-margin": "24px",
                      "card-padding": "20px",
                      "unit": "8px",
                      "touch-target-min": "48px"
              },
              "fontFamily": {
                      "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                      "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                      "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                      "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                      "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                      "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"]
              },
              "fontSize": {
                      "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                      "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                      "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                      "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                      "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                      "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}]
              }
            },
          },
        }
    </script>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-surface font-body-md min-h-screen pb-32">
<!-- TopAppBar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky z-50 bg-surface-container-low flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit transition-all duration-100">
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary font-bold">Estación de Pintura (Chile)</h1>
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">volume_up</span>
</button>
<button class="flex items-center gap-1 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container px-4 py-2 rounded-full border-b-4 border-on-secondary-fixed-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-lg"><span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">notifications_active</span><span class="font-label-bold text-[10px] uppercase tracking-tighter">¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm</span></button></header>
<main class="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-container-margin pt-unit space-y-gutter">
<!-- Progress Section -->
<div class="flex items-center gap-unit bg-surface-container p-4 rounded-lg">
<div class="flex-1 h-4 bg-surface-variant rounded-full overflow-hidden">
<div class="h-full bg-tertiary-container transition-all duration-500" id="progress-bar" style="width: 33%"></div>
</div>
<span class="text-label-bold font-label-bold text-tertiary">1/3</span>
</div>
<!-- Main Flag Canvas -->
<section class="flex flex-col items-center">
<div class="relative w-full aspect-[3/2] bg-white border-2 border-surface-variant rounded-lg tactile-card overflow-hidden p-card-padding">
<div class="w-full h-full border border-outline-variant rounded-md relative cursor-crosshair" id="flag-canvas">
<!-- Chile Flag Construction (Interactive areas) -->
<div class="absolute inset-0 grid grid-rows-2">
<!-- Top Band -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-3">
<div class="bg-surface-container-highest transition-colors duration-300 relative flex items-center justify-center group" id="target-blue" onclick="paint('blue')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary/20 text-6xl group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">format_paint</span>
<div class="absolute w-1/2 h-1/2 bg-surface-variant star-clip opacity-50" id="star"></div>
</div>
<div class="col-span-2 bg-surface-container-highest transition-colors duration-300 flex items-center justify-center group border-l border-white/20" id="target-white-top" onclick="paint('white')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary/20 text-6xl group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">format_paint</span>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Bottom Band -->
<div class="bg-surface-container-highest transition-colors duration-300 flex items-center justify-center group" id="target-red" onclick="paint('red')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary/20 text-6xl group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">format_paint</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="mt-4 font-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">¡Toca una parte de la bandera para pintarla!</p>
</section>
<!-- Color Selection & Audio -->
<section class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-gutter">
<!-- Azul -->
<button class="color-btn flex flex-col items-center gap-2 p-4 bg-white rounded-lg tactile-button-secondary border-2 border-transparent" onclick="selectColor('blue', this)">
<div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-[#00205b] border-4 border-white shadow-inner"></div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary audio-pulse" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface">Azul</span>
</div>
</button>
<!-- Blanco -->
<button class="color-btn flex flex-col items-center gap-2 p-4 bg-white rounded-lg tactile-button-secondary border-2 border-transparent" onclick="selectColor('white', this)">
<div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-white border-4 border-surface-variant shadow-inner"></div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary audio-pulse" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface">Blanco</span>
</div>
</button>
<!-- Rojo -->
<button class="color-btn flex flex-col items-center gap-2 p-4 bg-white rounded-lg tactile-button-secondary border-2 border-transparent" onclick="selectColor('red', this)">
<div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-[#d52b1e] border-4 border-white shadow-inner"></div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary audio-pulse" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface">Rojo</span>
</div>
</button>
</section>
<!-- Fun Fact Bento Box -->
<section class="bg-secondary-container p-6 rounded-lg tactile-card border-l-8 border-secondary flex items-start gap-4">
<div class="p-3 bg-white rounded-full text-secondary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-4xl">lightbulb</span>
</div>
<div>
<h3 class="font-headline-md text-on-secondary-container mb-1">Dato Curioso</h3>
<p class="font-body-md text-on-secondary-container">Chile tiene montañas muy altas llamadas los Andes.</p>
</div>
</section>
<!-- Landscape Context Image -->
<div class="w-full h-48 rounded-lg overflow-hidden tactile-card">
<div class="w-full h-full bg-cover bg-center" data-alt="A cinematic, vibrant digital painting of the snowy Andes mountains in Chile under a bright blue sky with soft white clouds. In the foreground, a minimalist trail winds through colorful wildflowers and green grass. The lighting is high-key and cheerful, matching a premium educational app style for children, with saturated blues and warm sunshine." style="background-image: url('https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuAQrqqtiYlLjq8jV1BMl0k0NNSjlSAtaamsvxpLcGbePK2sDR8Z7ga6136Z_Npjq4O4Z4sawlCpnqR3jeaT9b2SQM7ZLrZZZz09YxJ9RXOn1wjfE4xPa3kxSekeEu1TciybEA2C-J1QTKGs8CsyIJfarWIkGBFQZmkNbjwb5fcFDcx9tcpPULJqcK_dtcXM0MbUoLqJhjQ9TRMTGgOxXr-IYZwjKZG4FACsMKq1LYNKvkcYZPFsST4YMmB7b5LYK0b0xyL4OxnMxPk')"></div>
</div>
</main>
<!-- BottomNavBar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg border-t-4 border-surface-variant rounded-t-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0 transition-transform duration-75" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Win Modal (Hidden) -->
<div class="fixed inset-0 z-[100] flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm hidden" id="win-modal">
<div class="bg-secondary-fixed p-8 rounded-xl max-w-sm w-full mx-container-margin text-center tactile-card border-4 border-white animate-bounce-short">
<div class="mb-4">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-8xl text-secondary" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">stars</span>
</div>
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-on-secondary-fixed mb-4">¡Excelente Trabajo!</h2>
<p class="font-body-lg text-on-secondary-fixed-variant mb-6">Has pintado la bandera de Chile perfectamente.</p>
<button class="w-full py-4 bg-primary text-white font-headline-md rounded-lg tactile-button-primary" onclick="resetGame()">
                ¡Jugar de nuevo!
            </button>
</div>
</div>
<script>
        let currentColor = null;
        let paintedZones = { blue: false, white: false, red: false };

        function selectColor(color, element) {
            currentColor = color;
            document.querySelectorAll('.color-btn').forEach(btn => {
                btn.classList.remove('border-primary', 'bg-primary-fixed');
                btn.classList.add('bg-white');
            });
            element.classList.add('border-primary', 'bg-primary-fixed');
            element.classList.remove('bg-white');
            
            // Audio Feedback Simulation
            console.log("Playing audio for: " + color);
        }

        function paint(zone) {
            if (!currentColor) {
                alert("¡Primero elige un color de abajo!");
                return;
            }

            const target = document.getElementById(`target-${zone}`);
            const star = document.getElementById('star');
            
            if (zone === 'blue' && currentColor === 'blue') {
                target.style.backgroundColor = '#00205b';
                target.innerHTML = ''; // Remove paint icon
                target.appendChild(star);
                star.style.backgroundColor = '#ffffff';
                star.classList.remove('opacity-50');
                paintedZones.blue = true;
            } else if (zone === 'white' && currentColor === 'white') {
                target.style.backgroundColor = '#ffffff';
                target.innerHTML = '';
                paintedZones.white = true;
            } else if (zone === 'red' && currentColor === 'red') {
                target.style.backgroundColor = '#d52b1e';
                target.innerHTML = '';
                paintedZones.red = true;
            } else {
                // Shake effect for wrong color
                target.classList.add('bg-error-container');
                setTimeout(() => target.classList.remove('bg-error-container'), 500);
                return;
            }

            updateProgress();
            checkWin();
        }

        function updateProgress() {
            const count = Object.values(paintedZones).filter(v => v).length;
            const percentage = (count / 3) * 100;
            document.getElementById('progress-bar').style.width = percentage + '%';
            document.querySelector('.text-tertiary').innerText = `${count}/3`;
        }

        function checkWin() {
            if (paintedZones.blue && paintedZones.white && paintedZones.red) {
                setTimeout(() => {
                    document.getElementById('win-modal').classList.remove('hidden');
                }, 500);
            }
        }

        function resetGame() {
            location.reload();
        }
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Perú) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport">
<title>Estación de Pintura (Perú)</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-primary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-primary:active {
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 #004b71;
            transform: translateY(6px);
        }
        .chunky-shadow-secondary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #dee3e9;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-secondary:active {
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 #dee3e9;
            transform: translateY(6px);
        }
        .chunky-shadow-yellow {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #b38f00;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-yellow:active {
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 #b38f00;
            transform: translateY(6px);
        }
        .flag-band {
            transition: background-color 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1);
        }
        @keyframes pulse-soft {
            0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
        }
        .animate-pulse-soft {
            animation: pulse-soft 2s infinite ease-in-out;
        }
    </style>
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-surface font-body-md min-h-screen flex flex-col pb-24">
<!-- Top Navigation -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky z-40 bg-surface-container-low flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit transition-all duration-100">
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container active:translate-y-1 transition-all">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary">arrow_back</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary font-bold">Estación de Pintura (Perú)</h1>
</div>
<div class="flex gap-2">
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container active:translate-y-1 transition-all">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
<button class="flex items-center gap-1 bg-tertiary-container text-on-tertiary-container px-4 py-2 rounded-full border-b-4 border-on-tertiary-fixed-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-lg"><span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">notifications_active</span><span class="font-label-bold text-[10px] uppercase tracking-tighter">¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm</span></button></header>
<main class="flex-grow px-container-margin pt-unit flex flex-col gap-6">
<!-- Instruction Section -->
<section class="flex flex-col items-center text-center gap-2 mt-4">
<p class="font-headline-md text-primary">¡Pinta la bandera de Perú!</p>
<p class="text-on-surface-variant text-body-md">Toca los botes de pintura para colorear cada parte.</p>
</section>
<!-- Interactive Flag Canvas -->
<div class="relative w-full max-w-md mx-auto aspect-[3/2] bg-white rounded-lg border-4 border-surface-variant p-4 chunky-shadow-secondary overflow-hidden">
<div class="w-full h-full flex border-2 border-outline-variant rounded-sm" id="flag-container">
<!-- Left Red Band -->
<button class="flag-band flex-1 h-full bg-surface-container-highest cursor-pointer hover:opacity-90 active:scale-95 transition-transform" data-correct-color="bg-[#D91023]" onclick="paintBand(this)"></button>
<!-- Middle White Band -->
<button class="flag-band flex-1 h-full bg-surface-container-highest border-x border-outline-variant cursor-pointer hover:opacity-90 active:scale-95 transition-transform" data-correct-color="bg-white" onclick="paintBand(this)"></button>
<!-- Right Red Band -->
<button class="flag-band flex-1 h-full bg-surface-container-highest cursor-pointer hover:opacity-90 active:scale-95 transition-transform" data-correct-color="bg-[#D91023]" onclick="paintBand(this)"></button>
</div>
<!-- Confetti Overlay (Hidden) -->
<div class="absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none opacity-0 flex items-center justify-center transition-opacity duration-500" id="celebration">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-6xl text-secondary-container" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">stars</span>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Tool Palette & Audio -->
<div class="flex flex-col gap-8 items-center mt-4">
<!-- Color Pickers -->
<div class="flex gap-6 items-end">
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-3">
<button class="w-20 h-24 bg-[#D91023] rounded-t-full rounded-b-lg border-x-4 border-b-8 border-[#9a0b19] flex items-end justify-center pb-2 active:translate-y-1 active:border-b-4 transition-all" id="paint-red" onclick="selectColor('bg-[#D91023]')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white text-3xl">format_paint</span>
</button>
<button class="w-12 h-12 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center chunky-shadow-yellow text-on-secondary-container animate-pulse-soft" onclick="playAudio('rojo')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</button>
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface">Rojo</span>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-3">
<button class="w-20 h-24 bg-white rounded-t-full rounded-b-lg border-x-4 border-b-8 border-surface-variant flex items-end justify-center pb-2 active:translate-y-1 active:border-b-4 transition-all" id="paint-white" onclick="selectColor('bg-white')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-3xl">format_paint</span>
</button>
<button class="w-12 h-12 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center chunky-shadow-yellow text-on-secondary-container animate-pulse-soft" onclick="playAudio('blanco')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</button>
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface">Blanco</span>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Fun Fact Card -->
<div class="w-full bg-tertiary-container/10 border-2 border-tertiary-container rounded-lg p-card-padding flex items-center gap-4">
<div class="w-16 h-16 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-white border-2 border-tertiary shadow-sm flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A cute, friendly cartoon llama with large expressive eyes and a colorful Peruvian woven collar. The art style is chunky, bright, and child-friendly with soft lighting and a cheerful blue sky background. The llama looks happy and approachable, designed for an educational children's application." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuARpr31cGlfktTDBX7K-ncChaXL97qgwG0AeuX_P6fJK0FVHSTUvfJQJGsyH9E14NVqmLTe1kmxAkpeGkoDqPdOv3IK3nY9-qMq7LJfVIC28GeiB5rA4xD3VXaSJ-oiRofrX383MG_6ncD3iCr2G5VmDIf2VKXZOIxIhjnGbGCXpU_3HGNeNbh5Eh-hGtkBr88tiRFRNiu68QtO17lgyNKjPd8iivnCZDpov41NbpFQP8WXL2Jk0UQmtVrNXy9ozSSZZbr3Xm7FWNE">
</div>
<div class="flex-1">
<p class="font-label-bold text-tertiary">¿Sabías que...?</p>
<p class="text-on-tertiary-container text-body-md">En Perú viven las simpáticas llamas.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Navigation Shell -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg border-t-4 border-surface-variant">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
</nav>
<script>
        let selectedColorClass = '';

        function selectColor(colorClass) {
            selectedColorClass = colorClass;
            // Visual feedback for selection
            document.querySelectorAll('[id^="paint-"]').forEach(btn => {
                btn.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
            });
            event.currentTarget.style.transform = 'translateY(4px)';
        }

        function paintBand(element) {
            if (!selectedColorClass) {
                alert("¡Primero elige un color de los botes!");
                return;
            }
            
            // Remove previous bg classes
            element.className = element.className.replace(/\bbg-\S+/g, '');
            element.classList.add(selectedColorClass);

            checkWinCondition();
        }

        function playAudio(word) {
            console.log("Playing audio for: " + word);
            // In a real app, this would trigger an audio file
            // For now, visual feedback
            const utter = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(word);
            utter.lang = 'es-PE';
            window.speechSynthesis.speak(utter);
        }

        function checkWinCondition() {
            const bands = document.querySelectorAll('.flag-band');
            let allCorrect = true;
            
            bands.forEach(band => {
                const correct = band.getAttribute('data-correct-color');
                if (!band.classList.contains(correct)) {
                    allCorrect = false;
                }
            });

            if (allCorrect) {
                const celebration = document.getElementById('celebration');
                celebration.classList.remove('opacity-0');
                celebration.classList.add('opacity-100');
                
                // Audio feedback
                setTimeout(() => {
                    const winMsg = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance("¡Excelente! Has pintado la bandera de Perú.");
                    winMsg.lang = 'es-PE';
                    window.speechSynthesis.speak(winMsg);
                }, 500);
            }
        }
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Nigeria) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport">
<title>Estación de Pintura (Nigeria)</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        body { font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; }
        
        .tactile-button {
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
        }
        .tactile-button:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: none !important;
        }

        .flag-card {
            box-shadow: 0 8px 0 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
        }

        .brush-active {
            transform: scale(1.1) translateY(-4px);
            filter: drop-shadow(0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.2));
        }

        @keyframes pulse-soft {
            0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
        }
        .audio-pulse {
            animation: pulse-soft 2s infinite ease-in-out;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background min-h-screen pb-32">
<!-- Top Navigation -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky bg-surface-container-low flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit z-50">
<div class="flex items-center gap-4">
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full tactile-button bg-white border-b-4 border-surface-variant text-primary active:border-b-0">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="menu">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary font-extrabold tracking-tight">Estación de Pintura (Nigeria)</h1>
</div>
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full tactile-button bg-white border-b-4 border-surface-variant text-primary active:border-b-0">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</button>
<button class="flex items-center gap-1 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container px-4 py-2 rounded-full border-b-4 border-on-secondary-fixed-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-lg"><span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">notifications_active</span><span class="font-label-bold text-[10px] uppercase tracking-tighter">¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm</span></button></header>
<main class="max-w-md mx-auto px-container-margin pt-unit space-y-6">
<!-- Interactive Flag Canvas -->
<section class="relative">
<div class="flag-card bg-white rounded-lg p-card-padding border-2 border-surface-variant overflow-hidden">
<div class="aspect-[3/2] flex w-full border-4 border-surface-dim rounded-lg overflow-hidden cursor-crosshair" id="flag-canvas">
<div class="flex-1 bg-surface-container-low transition-colors duration-300 flex items-center justify-center" id="band-1" onclick="paintBand('band-1')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-surface-variant opacity-30 text-6xl">format_paint</span>
</div>
<div class="flex-1 bg-surface-container-low transition-colors duration-300 border-x-2 border-surface-variant/20 flex items-center justify-center" id="band-2" onclick="paintBand('band-2')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-surface-variant opacity-30 text-6xl">format_paint</span>
</div>
<div class="flex-1 bg-surface-container-low transition-colors duration-300 flex items-center justify-center" id="band-3" onclick="paintBand('band-3')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-surface-variant opacity-30 text-6xl">format_paint</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Audio Assistance -->
<div class="absolute -right-4 -top-4">
<button class="w-16 h-16 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center tactile-button shadow-[0_6px_0_0_#6d5700] active:shadow-none audio-pulse" onclick="playAudio('instruction')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-3xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</section>
<!-- Tool Palette -->
<section class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
<!-- Green Tool -->
<button class="color-tool relative bg-white border-2 border-surface-variant rounded-lg p-4 tactile-button shadow-[0_6px_0_0_#dee3e9] flex flex-col items-center gap-2 group" onclick="selectColor('#2b6c00', this)">
<div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-tertiary shadow-inner border-4 border-white"></div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-1">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Verde</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-xl" data-icon="volume_up" onclick="event.stopPropagation(); playAudio('verde')">volume_up</span>
</div>
</button>
<!-- White Tool -->
<button class="color-tool relative bg-white border-2 border-surface-variant rounded-lg p-4 tactile-button shadow-[0_6px_0_0_#dee3e9] flex flex-col items-center gap-2" onclick="selectColor('#ffffff', this)">
<div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-white shadow-inner border-4 border-surface-variant"></div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-1">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Blanco</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-xl" data-icon="volume_up" onclick="event.stopPropagation(); playAudio('blanco')">volume_up</span>
</div>
</button>
</section>
<!-- Fun Fact Card -->
<section class="bg-primary-container/20 rounded-lg p-card-padding border-2 border-dashed border-primary flex items-start gap-4">
<div class="w-12 h-12 bg-primary rounded-xl flex-shrink-0 flex items-center justify-center text-white">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">lightbulb</span>
</div>
<div>
<h3 class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-primary-container mb-1">¿Sabías que...?</h3>
<p class="font-body-md text-body-md text-on-primary-container">Nigeria es un país con mucha selva y animales.</p>
</div>
</section>
<!-- Contextual Activity Image -->
<section class="rounded-lg overflow-hidden border-2 border-surface-variant h-48 relative">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A whimsical digital illustration for children showing a lush Nigerian jungle with vibrant green foliage, colorful tropical birds, and a friendly-looking elephant. The style is soft-edged with high-key lighting, bright primary colors, and a clean, minimalist layout consistent with a high-end educational app for kids. The background is a soft sky blue." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuBQmD81zp8of4yIK5JL-22xh7ZARXpqm-DJEWGQ9VmXBaeeAPB22g2epmfQnPXUAD1C3PterAiiNYlRux4VFhFUU2By02uYddmbg32fMx0IZYiwp0lxLCqILsiyLcaLkLFRGfddUAUKNLqDq2uOY9J14qgJTw362pGkzALHCGhBkXXiRouU718Q3qKZcgfMgZRT1U59Z8ifz1T1UlkWapzoQ-DGykZ8X-_ynhWwWk38I2lezDJPX6ZcbsjhePBTwNyGRwe2V7j83oY">
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/40 to-transparent"></div>
<div class="absolute bottom-3 left-4 text-white font-label-bold flex items-center gap-2">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">park</span>
                Selva Tropical
            </div>
</section>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation Component -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg border-t-4 border-surface-variant">
<button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-75">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="map">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</button>
<button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-75">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="menu_book">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</button>
<button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0 active:translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-75">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="quiz">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</button>
</nav>
<script>
        let selectedColor = null;

        function selectColor(color, element) {
            selectedColor = color;
            // Clear previous selection styles
            document.querySelectorAll('.color-tool').forEach(tool => {
                tool.classList.remove('ring-4', 'ring-primary', 'brush-active');
            });
            // Apply new selection
            element.classList.add('ring-4', 'ring-primary', 'brush-active');
        }

        function paintBand(id) {
            if (!selectedColor) return;
            const band = document.getElementById(id);
            band.style.backgroundColor = selectedColor;
            band.innerHTML = ''; // Remove the paint icon
            
            checkCompletion();
        }

        function checkCompletion() {
            const b1 = document.getElementById('band-1').style.backgroundColor;
            const b2 = document.getElementById('band-2').style.backgroundColor;
            const b3 = document.getElementById('band-3').style.backgroundColor;

            // Simple validation (Green: #2b6c00, White: #ffffff)
            // Note: color strings might return as rgb()
            if (b1 && b2 && b3) {
                // If all painted, show a mini celebration effect or audio
                console.log("¡Bandera pintada!");
            }
        }

        function playAudio(term) {
            console.log("Reproduciendo audio para: " + term);
            // In a real app, this would trigger a speech synthesis or audio file
            // Let's add a visual feedback for children
            const ripple = document.createElement('div');
            ripple.className = 'fixed inset-0 pointer-events-none flex items-center justify-center z-[100]';
            ripple.innerHTML = `<div class="bg-white/30 rounded-full p-10 animate-ping"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-6xl text-primary">volume_up</span></div>`;
            document.body.appendChild(ripple);
            setTimeout(() => ripple.remove(), 1000);
        }
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Tailandia) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport">
<title>Estación de Pintura (Tailandia)</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        body { font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; }
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 24;
        }
        .chunky-button-primary {
            background-color: #006495;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        .chunky-button-primary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        .chunky-button-secondary {
            background-color: #ffffff;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #dee3e9;
        }
        .chunky-button-secondary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #dee3e9;
        }
        .audio-pulse {
            animation: pulse-ring 2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1) infinite;
        }
        @keyframes pulse-ring {
            0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
            50% { transform: scale(1.1); opacity: 0.8; }
        }
        .flag-canvas {
            border: 8px solid #eaeef5;
            border-radius: 2rem;
            overflow: hidden;
            box-shadow: inset 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
        }
        .paint-splat {
            transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275);
        }
        .paint-splat:hover {
            transform: scale(1.1) rotate(5deg);
        }
        .color-well {
            cursor: pointer;
            width: 80px;
            height: 80px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }
        .color-well.active {
            border: 6px solid #006495;
            transform: scale(1.1);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-surface min-h-screen flex flex-col">
<!-- TopAppBar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky bg-background dark:bg-background z-50">
<div class="bg-surface-container-low flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit h-16">
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary text-center flex-grow">Estación de Pintura (Tailandia)</h1>
<button class="flex items-center gap-1 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container px-4 py-2 rounded-full border-b-4 border-on-secondary-fixed-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-lg"><span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">notifications_active</span><span class="font-label-bold text-[10px] uppercase tracking-tighter">¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm</span></button><button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</header>
<main class="flex-grow flex flex-col items-center px-container-margin py-8 space-y-8 max-w-4xl mx-auto w-full">
<!-- Interactive Flag Area -->
<section class="w-full space-y-4">
<div class="flag-canvas w-full aspect-[3/2] bg-white flex flex-col cursor-crosshair" id="flag-canvas">
<!-- Band 1: Red -->
<div class="h-1/6 bg-white border-b-2 border-surface-variant/20 transition-colors duration-300" id="band-0" onclick="paintBand(0)"></div>
<!-- Band 2: White -->
<div class="h-1/6 bg-white border-b-2 border-surface-variant/20 transition-colors duration-300" id="band-1" onclick="paintBand(1)"></div>
<!-- Band 3: Blue (Double Width) -->
<div class="h-2/6 bg-white border-b-2 border-surface-variant/20 transition-colors duration-300" id="band-2" onclick="paintBand(2)"></div>
<!-- Band 4: White -->
<div class="h-1/6 bg-white border-b-2 border-surface-variant/20 transition-colors duration-300" id="band-3" onclick="paintBand(3)"></div>
<!-- Band 5: Red -->
<div class="h-1/6 bg-white transition-colors duration-300" id="band-4" onclick="paintBand(4)"></div>
</div>
<p class="text-center font-body-md text-on-surface-variant">¡Toca las bandas para pintarlas!</p>
</section>
<!-- Paint Palette & Audio Buttons -->
<section class="w-full grid grid-cols-3 gap-gutter">
<!-- Rojo -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center space-y-3">
<div class="color-well bg-[#ba1a1a] shadow-lg active:scale-95 active" id="well-red" onclick="selectColor('#ba1a1a', 'well-red')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white text-4xl">format_paint</span>
</div>
<button class="flex items-center justify-center w-14 h-14 rounded-full bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container shadow-md audio-pulse" onclick="playAudio('Rojo')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">volume_up</span>
</button>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Rojo</span>
</div>
<!-- Blanco -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center space-y-3">
<div class="color-well bg-white border-4 border-surface-variant shadow-lg active:scale-95" id="well-white" onclick="selectColor('#ffffff', 'well-white')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-surface-variant text-4xl">format_paint</span>
</div>
<button class="flex items-center justify-center w-14 h-14 rounded-full bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container shadow-md" onclick="playAudio('Blanco')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">volume_up</span>
</button>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Blanco</span>
</div>
<!-- Azul -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center space-y-3">
<div class="color-well bg-primary shadow-lg active:scale-95" id="well-blue" onclick="selectColor('#006495', 'well-blue')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white text-4xl">format_paint</span>
</div>
<button class="flex items-center justify-center w-14 h-14 rounded-full bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container shadow-md" onclick="playAudio('Azul')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">volume_up</span>
</button>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Azul</span>
</div>
</section>
<!-- Fun Fact Card -->
<section class="w-full">
<div class="bg-surface-container-high rounded-lg p-card-padding flex items-start space-x-4 border-l-8 border-tertiary-container shadow-sm">
<div class="bg-tertiary-container text-on-tertiary p-3 rounded-full shrink-0">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">lightbulb</span>
</div>
<div>
<h3 class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-tertiary-container uppercase tracking-wider mb-1">¿Sabías que...?</h3>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-surface">En Tailandia hay templos muy brillantes y elefantes.</p>
</div>
</div>
</section>
<!-- Action Button -->
<div class="py-8 w-full">
<button class="w-full chunky-button-primary py-5 rounded-lg text-white font-headline-md text-headline-md flex items-center justify-center space-x-2">
<span class="">¡Listo!</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">check_circle</span>
</button>
</div>
</main>
<!-- BottomNavBar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest dark:bg-surface-container-lowest border-t-4 border-surface-variant shadow-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="map">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="menu_book">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="quiz" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Bottom Spacing for Nav -->
<div class="h-24"></div>
<script>
        let selectedColor = '#ba1a1a';

        function selectColor(color, elementId) {
            selectedColor = color;
            // Clear previous active states
            document.querySelectorAll('.color-well').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active'));
            // Set new active state
            document.getElementById(elementId).classList.add('active');
            
            // Add a little feedback sound feel
            if (window.navigator.vibrate) window.navigator.vibrate(10);
        }

        function paintBand(index) {
            const band = document.getElementById(`band-${index}`);
            band.style.backgroundColor = selectedColor;
            
            // Splash effect (visual)
            const splash = document.createElement('div');
            splash.className = 'absolute pointer-events-none opacity-50';
            // Since we can't easily overlay multiple splats on specific bands without absolute positioning, 
            // we just handle the color change as the primary tactile feedback.
        }

        function playAudio(text) {
            console.log(`Playing audio for: ${text}`);
            // In a real app, this would trigger SpeechSynthesis or an MP3
            const utter = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text);
            utter.lang = 'es-ES';
            window.speechSynthesis.speak(utter);
            
            // Visual feedback
            const btn = event.currentTarget;
            btn.classList.add('scale-110');
            setTimeout(() => btn.classList.remove('scale-110'), 200);
        }

        // Initialize first color
        selectColor('#ba1a1a', 'well-red');
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Noruega) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport">
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
