<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        .chunky-button-primary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        .chunky-button-primary:active {
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 #004b71;
            transform: translateY(6px);
        }
        .chunky-button-secondary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #bec8d3;
        }
        .chunky-button-secondary:active {
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 #bec8d3;
            transform: translateY(6px);
        }
        .chunky-card {
            box-shadow: 0 8px 0 0 #dee3e9;
        }
        .audio-pulse {
            animation: pulse 2s infinite;
        }
        @keyframes pulse {
            0% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background font-body-md text-on-background min-h-screen pb-24">
<!-- TopAppBar -->
<nav class="w-full top-0 sticky bg-surface-container-low flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit z-50">
<div class="flex items-center gap-4">
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-headline-md-mobile" data-icon="menu">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary font-bold">Estación de Pintura (Noruega)</h1>
</div>
<button class="flex items-center gap-1 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container px-4 py-2 rounded-full border-b-4 border-on-secondary-fixed-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-lg"><span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">notifications_active</span><span class="font-label-bold text-[10px] uppercase tracking-tighter">¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm</span></button><button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-headline-md-mobile" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</button>
</nav>
<main class="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-container-margin pt-unit">
<!-- Interactive Instruction -->
<div class="mt-4 flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center gap-6 p-card-padding bg-secondary-container rounded-lg chunky-card border-2 border-on-secondary-container/10">
<div class="w-24 h-24 rounded-full bg-white flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden border-4 border-white shadow-sm shrink-0">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A friendly, cute cartoon arctic fox mascot wearing a tiny adventurer hat and holding a paintbrush. The fox has large kind eyes and a warm smile, set against a bright, clean, premium educational illustration style with vibrant primary colors and soft lighting." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuBr7_CTVlT8_n4pVR9A-d9yG558LhGNsXhJCVAjVvU9xiGRnpQQwmXKUgZ5q63q74jDfSyWpTDww4f7X-8Bjzq0zaoOejNH0kmD2udSUynA8g0M4bSLiudl-jXDiWcraY0SlS-caCldl1lDoB_RxVgBv7Ua0vSt3osRzE0XsgQCVxnZnZUjUb4x9lnerjIuZcgCRMbVxRNE8caPlW5nAJzyvAnNMMSKobuDSE5ZAKNfcIANAxHj6nvRpr0YKKlVQwhXg9Rgw3Iy-eM">
</div>
<div>
<h2 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-on-secondary-container mb-1">¡Vamos a pintar!</h2>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-secondary-container">Usa tus pinceles mágicos para colorear la bandera de Noruega.</p>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Canvas Area -->
<div class="mt-10 grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8">
<!-- Flag Canvas (Left/Main) -->
<div class="lg:col-span-8 flex flex-col gap-6">
<div class="bg-white p-6 rounded-lg chunky-card border-2 border-surface-variant relative aspect-[3/2] flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden">
<!-- Flag Template -->
<div class="w-full h-full relative border-4 border-surface-variant/20 rounded-sm" id="flag-canvas">
<!-- Norway Base Red -->
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-white transition-colors duration-300 cursor-pointer flex items-center justify-center group" id="part-red" onclick="paint('red')">
<span class="text-surface-variant opacity-30 group-hover:opacity-50 transition-opacity material-symbols-outlined text-6xl" data-icon="format_paint">format_paint</span>
</div>
<!-- White Cross -->
<div class="absolute left-0 top-[calc(50%-15%)] w-full h-[30%] bg-surface-container transition-colors duration-300 cursor-pointer" id="part-white-h" onclick="paint('white')"></div>
<div class="absolute top-0 left-[calc(33%-10%)] h-full w-[20%] bg-surface-container transition-colors duration-300 cursor-pointer" id="part-white-v" onclick="paint('white')"></div>
<!-- Blue Cross -->
<div class="absolute left-0 top-[calc(50%-5%)] w-full h-[10%] bg-surface-variant transition-colors duration-300 cursor-pointer" id="part-blue-h" onclick="paint('blue')"></div>
<div class="absolute top-0 left-[calc(33%-5%)] h-full w-[10%] bg-surface-variant transition-colors duration-300 cursor-pointer" id="part-blue-v" onclick="paint('blue')"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Fun Fact Card -->
<div class="bg-tertiary-container/10 p-card-padding rounded-lg border-2 border-tertiary-container/30 flex items-start gap-4">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-tertiary text-4xl" data-icon="lightbulb" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">lightbulb</span>
<p class="font-body-md text-body-md text-on-tertiary-container">
<strong>¿Sabías qué?</strong> Noruega tiene montañas nevadas y hermosos fiordos.
                    </p>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Paint Palette & Audio (Right) -->
<div class="lg:col-span-4 flex flex-col gap-6">
<div class="bg-surface-container-low p-6 rounded-lg chunky-card border-2 border-surface-variant">
<h3 class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface-variant uppercase mb-4 tracking-wider">Paleta de Colores</h3>
<div class="flex flex-col gap-4">
<!-- Color Rojo -->
<div class="flex items-center justify-between gap-3 p-3 bg-white rounded-lg border-2 border-surface-variant">
<div class="flex items-center gap-3">
<button class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-[#ba1a1a] border-4 border-white shadow-sm ring-2 ring-transparent active:ring-primary transition-all" onclick="selectColor('red')"></button>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Rojo</span>
</div>
<button class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-secondary-container flex items-center justify-center audio-pulse shadow-sm active:scale-95 transition-transform">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
<!-- Color Blanco -->
<div class="flex items-center justify-between gap-3 p-3 bg-white rounded-lg border-2 border-surface-variant">
<div class="flex items-center gap-3">
<button class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-white border-4 border-surface-variant/30 shadow-sm ring-2 ring-transparent active:ring-primary transition-all" onclick="selectColor('white')"></button>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Blanco</span>
</div>
<button class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-secondary-container flex items-center justify-center audio-pulse shadow-sm active:scale-95 transition-transform">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
<!-- Color Azul -->
<div class="flex items-center justify-between gap-3 p-3 bg-white rounded-lg border-2 border-surface-variant">
<div class="flex items-center gap-3">
<button class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-[#006495] border-4 border-white shadow-sm ring-2 ring-transparent active:ring-primary transition-all" onclick="selectColor('blue')"></button>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Azul</span>
</div>
<button class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-secondary-container flex items-center justify-center audio-pulse shadow-sm active:scale-95 transition-transform">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Action Button -->
<button class="w-full py-5 chunky-button-primary bg-primary text-white font-headline-md rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center gap-2 transition-all">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="check_circle">check_circle</span>
                    Terminar
                </button>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Landscape Context (Thematic Background Elements) -->
<div class="mt-12 opacity-80 pointer-events-none">
<div class="flex justify-between items-end h-32 px-4">
<img class="h-full w-full object-contain" data-alt="A stylized digital illustration of a snowy mountain range in Norway with deep blue fjords at the base. High-contrast, clean lines, and vibrant whites and blues. Educational playful style for kids." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuA5x1il8L153zFP-hlq74lCiwBRzq1AO2ckmYFazXPf6Xsn6dG7Q4zXgQBRR8-g-Pa7XBTnLSHCLh0YHYTCKvyxW9XVQ9hM-0DHXqWZiUaIM-oA6tQO-EsaYV_s9saxWdAPN-7A2Eqhjj6PHdNibzWetFXCp5uXSm8_wZyET1ZqhObD-M-dttBKy5QBrYZjRYEbekA_6bmlFaTZ_PWVFXerjMGO4atsn7L0-B_7D66NJ7sdBjekC-VJRXCG1mq-sfhcWHkE_8G5fN8">
</div>
</div>
</main>
<!-- BottomNavBar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest border-t-4 border-surface-variant shadow-lg md:hidden">
<div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="map">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="menu_book">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="quiz" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</div>
</nav>
<!-- Interactive Painting Script -->
<script>
        let currentColor = 'red';
        const colorMap = {
            'red': '#ba1a1a',
            'white': '#ffffff',
            'blue': '#006495'
        };

        function selectColor(color) {
            currentColor = color;
            // Visual feedback could be added here to highlight the active palette item
        }

        function paint(part) {
            const hex = colorMap[currentColor];
            
            if (part === 'red') {
                document.getElementById('part-red').style.backgroundColor = hex;
                document.getElementById('part-red').innerHTML = ''; // Remove icon once painted
            } else if (part === 'white') {
                document.getElementById('part-white-h').style.backgroundColor = hex;
                document.getElementById('part-white-v').style.backgroundColor = hex;
            } else if (part === 'blue') {
                document.getElementById('part-blue-h').style.backgroundColor = hex;
                document.getElementById('part-blue-v').style.backgroundColor = hex;
            }
            
            // Check for completion logic could be here
        }
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Quiz Nivel 3: Portugal -->
<!DOCTYPE html>

<html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@400;500;600;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        .filled-icon {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;
        }
        
        /* Tactile Button Effect */
        .btn-tactile-primary {
            @apply transition-all duration-75 active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 0 #004b71;
        }
        .btn-tactile-secondary {
            @apply transition-all duration-75 active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 0 #bec8d3;
        }
        .btn-tactile-yellow {
            @apply transition-all duration-75 active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 #b38f00;
        }
        
        /* Card Tactile Effect */
        .card-tactile {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 #eaeef5;
            transition: transform 0.1s ease, box-shadow 0.1s ease;
        }
        .card-tactile:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 #eaeef5;
        }

        /* Progress Bar Animation */
        @keyframes pulse-soft {
            0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
        }
        .pulse-audio {
            animation: pulse-soft 2s infinite ease-in-out;
        }
    </style>
<script id="tailwind-config">
        tailwind.config = {
            darkMode: "class",
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    "colors": {
                        "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                        "outline": "#6e7882",
                        "on-background": "#171c21",
                        "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                        "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                        "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                        "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                        "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                        "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                        "background": "#f7f9ff",
                        "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                        "secondary": "#735c00",
                        "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                        "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                        "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                        "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                        "error": "#ba1a1a",
                        "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                        "primary": "#006495",
                        "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                        "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                        "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                        "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                        "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                        "on-surface": "#171c21",
                        "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                        "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                        "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                        "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                        "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                        "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                        "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                        "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                        "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                        "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                        "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                        "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                        "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                        "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                        "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                        "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                        "surface-tint": "#006495",
                        "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                        "on-error": "#ffffff",
                        "surface-dim": "#d6dae1"
                    },
                    "borderRadius": {
                        "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                        "lg": "2rem",
                        "xl": "3rem",
                        "full": "9999px"
                    },
                    "spacing": {
                        "card-padding": "20px",
                        "touch-target-min": "48px",
                        "gutter": "16px",
                        "unit": "8px",
                        "container-margin": "24px"
                    },
                    "fontFamily": {
                        "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                        "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                        "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                        "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                        "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                        "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
                    },
                    "fontSize": {
                        "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                        "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                        "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                        "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                        "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                        "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
                    }
                },
            },
        }
    </script>
<style>
    body {
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);
    }
  </style>
  </head>
<body class="bg-background font-body-md text-on-background min-h-screen flex flex-col overflow-x-hidden">
<!-- TopAppBar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky z-50 bg-surface-container-low flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit h-16">
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container transition-all active:translate-y-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary font-bold">Flag Adventure</h1>
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container transition-all active:translate-y-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary">volume_up</span>
</button>
</header>
<main class="flex-1 flex flex-col items-center px-container-margin pt-4 pb-24 max-w-2xl mx-auto w-full">
<!-- Progress Bar Section -->
<div class="w-full flex items-center gap-4 mb-8">
<div class="flex-1 h-4 bg-surface-container-high rounded-full overflow-hidden border-2 border-surface-variant">
<div class="h-full bg-tertiary-container w-[40%] rounded-r-full transition-all duration-500 shadow-inner"></div>
</div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">4/10</span>
</div>
<!-- Question Section -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center text-center mb-10">
<!-- Audio Replay Button -->
<button class="pulse-audio w-24 h-24 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-6 btn-tactile-yellow group">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-5xl filled-icon">volume_up</span>
</button>
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-on-surface mb-2">
                ¿Cuál es la bandera de Portugal?
            </h2>
<p class="font-body-md text-body-md text-on-surface-variant italic">
                (Which is the flag of Portugal?)
            </p>
</div>
<!-- Flag Options Grid -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 w-full mb-12">
<!-- Option 1: Chile -->
<button class="card-tactile group relative w-full aspect-[2/1] bg-surface-container-lowest border-2 border-surface-variant rounded-lg p-4 flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden">
<div class="w-full h-full relative rounded-md overflow-hidden border border-outline-variant">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="The national flag of Chile, featuring two horizontal bands of white and red with a blue square in the upper hoist-side corner containing a single white five-pointed star. The image is rendered in high-fidelity digital art style with vibrant colors and crisp edges, presented in a clean, professional educational UI aesthetic." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuAyKR-zv13jXuaFzgCGyBkebDaZr6U9IWZrSSYnmTEQU8nyU2sCQyvLGgg-E5fVSWXBanxRqHYwx5rBHZx9wEvmkbY8vbNcZU3WuhcPS-G-R7mVbFVhEUqnbmbi3_yaz4CuRuEAzbHFBQIECsJ9dvjEKb7DueqQ-0j99AJ1E0J-t_hR2c4gHwf0cy_wQVQTusE37udxPqsaQCn32-clKT81pcoQlOcGGW-XH93WTT8wDxEbO-0kMU5xEyDhbsW9nw0kv4ZjwPZgxu0"/>
</div>
<!-- Selection indicator (hidden by default) -->
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-primary/10 opacity-0 group-active:opacity-100 transition-opacity"></div>
</button>
<!-- Option 2: Portugal (Correct) -->
<button class="card-tactile group relative w-full aspect-[2/1] bg-surface-container-lowest border-2 border-surface-variant rounded-lg p-4 flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden">
<div class="w-full h-full relative rounded-md overflow-hidden border border-outline-variant">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="The national flag of Portugal, a vertical bicolor of green and red with the national coat of arms centered on the color boundary. The green section is smaller than the red. The design is bright and clean with a tactile feel, captured in a flat but premium vector style for a children's learning application." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuDnAUAT9xfeFSfY5-v5fofAqV54hYTX_Vhz5nTSKVZF-zTXmH8Juqk4NzQz2_K4wLx0UXCeyBGi1CURGOXcjAmcAG4DnJKuZH4ptxiFCKYztxfK0u-AmkGm009x5LMo27-p_ZXv7I8IxopWjpNva3H9AHd9y1EZHmeZ_4JpAcWhnQW7XXue8_x5xdMZ8PrlIscfNrrsxB0nyR42zt5QpFepOnM8idgITUcvHTsSZ7kcQ274NMf4irUNoG0Ci7HLMVW_5jrFnPwA5eI"/>
</div>
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-primary/10 opacity-0 group-active:opacity-100 transition-opacity"></div>
</button>
<!-- Option 3: Turkey -->
<button class="card-tactile group relative w-full aspect-[2/1] bg-surface-container-lowest border-2 border-surface-variant rounded-lg p-4 flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden">
<div class="w-full h-full relative rounded-md overflow-hidden border border-outline-variant">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="The national flag of Turkey, consisting of a vibrant red field with a white crescent moon and a white five-pointed star slightly to the right of the center. The colors are saturated and cheerful, following a premium educational design theme with soft lighting and high contrast." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuCkwvq3yxeaUi8sEMl_-89OP085IN4Bq-ceI_dixKGzyMrQdvBBX-cpvP7WPQEn7UXTR9t-CGHudEFTNBmfxEgzpXZkFKK2f_RF3czs0E8ZTm8gYadMD_v8AyQ3aVqwcejpfiNPCQHlGtoVi3xWPJ3JOEQjBHktK83ZufQnj90xg23slT7tOdoebbA1HII4hLS369PPnC8Xl9Q1AqxkJ-sHMfU3l9w6Nb0Pj4PvdAiL8JTKOMAoz2kkBdkuvl7Xws8J3bDyjcXOWL8"/>
</div>
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-primary/10 opacity-0 group-active:opacity-100 transition-opacity"></div>
</button>
</div>
<!-- Star Reward System -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-3">
<p class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-secondary uppercase tracking-widest">Rewards</p>
<div class="flex gap-4">
<div class="w-14 h-14 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-md border-2 border-white">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-4xl filled-icon">star</span>
</div>
<div class="w-14 h-14 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-md border-2 border-white">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-4xl filled-icon">star</span>
</div>
<div class="w-14 h-14 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-md border-2 border-white">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-4xl filled-icon">star</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</main>
<!-- BottomNavBar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg border-t-4 border-surface-variant rounded-t-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined filled-icon">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
</nav>
<script>
        // Simple micro-interaction for flag selection
        document.querySelectorAll('.card-tactile').forEach(button => {
            button.addEventListener('click', function() {
                // Audio feedback would go here in a real app
                const isCorrect = this.querySelector('img').getAttribute('data-alt').includes('Portugal');
                
                if(isCorrect) {
                    this.classList.remove('border-surface-variant');
                    this.classList.add('border-tertiary-container', 'bg-tertiary-fixed');
                    // Create simple celebration effect
                    const stars = document.querySelectorAll('.filled-icon');
                    stars.forEach(star => {
                        star.classList.add('animate-bounce');
                        setTimeout(() => star.classList.remove('animate-bounce'), 1000);
                    });
                } else {
                    this.classList.add('animate-shake');
                    this.classList.remove('border-surface-variant');
                    this.classList.add('border-error');
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        this.classList.remove('animate-shake', 'border-error');
                        this.classList.add('border-surface-variant');
                    }, 500);
                }
            });
        });

        // Add shake animation style
        const style = document.createElement('style');
        style.textContent = `
            @keyframes shake {
                0%, 100% { transform: translateX(0); }
                25% { transform: translateX(-8px); }
                75% { transform: translateX(8px); }
            }
            .animate-shake {
                animation: shake 0.2s cubic-bezier(.36,.07,.19,.97) both;
            }
        `;
        document.head.appendChild(style);
    </script>
</body></html>

<!-- Quiz Nivel 3: Suecia -->
<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/>
<title>Flag Adventure - Quiz</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>

<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<!-- Tailwind Configuration -->
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",

          extend: {

                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",

                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "container-margin": "24px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        
        .tactile-button-primary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0px #004b71;
        }
        .tactile-button-primary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0px #004b71;
        }

        .tactile-button-secondary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0px #bec8d3;
        }
        .tactile-button-secondary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0px #bec8d3;
        }

        .tactile-audio {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0px #bca100;
        }
        .tactile-audio:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0px #bca100;
        }

        .flag-card {
            box-shadow: 0 8px 0px #dee3e9;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }
        .flag-card:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 4px 0px #dee3e9;
        }

        @keyframes pulse-soft {
            0% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); }
        }
        .animate-pulse-soft {
            animation: pulse-soft 2s infinite ease-in-out;
        }
    </style>
<style>
    body {
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);
    }
  </style>
  </head>
<body class="bg-background font-body-md text-on-background min-h-screen flex flex-col overflow-x-hidden">
<!-- Top Navigation Anchor (Shared Component: TopAppBar) -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky bg-surface-container-low flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit z-50">
<div class="flex items-center gap-4">
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="menu">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary font-bold">Flag Adventure</h1>
</div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<div class="flex items-center bg-secondary-container px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-on-secondary-container font-label-bold">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined mr-1" data-icon="star" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
                Level 3
            </div>
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</header>
<!-- Main Learning Canvas -->
<main class="flex-1 container mx-auto px-container-margin py-unit max-w-lg flex flex-col items-center">
<!-- Progress Indicator -->
<div class="w-full mt-4 mb-8">
<div class="flex justify-between items-end mb-2">
<span class="text-label-bold font-label-bold text-primary">Progress</span>
<span class="text-label-bold font-label-bold text-primary">4 / 10</span>
</div>
<div class="w-full h-4 bg-surface-variant rounded-full overflow-hidden">
<div class="h-full bg-tertiary-container rounded-full" style="width: 40%"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Question Area -->
<section class="text-center mb-8">
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-on-surface mb-6">¿Cuál es la bandera de Suecia?</h2>
<!-- Large Tactile Audio Button -->
<button class="tactile-audio bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container w-24 h-24 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center animate-pulse-soft transition-transform mb-4">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[48px]" data-icon="volume_up" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</button>
<p class="text-on-surface-variant font-label-bold">¡Escucha la pregunta!</p>
</section>
<!-- Flag Selection Grid (Chunky Pattern) -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 w-full mb-12">
<!-- Correct Option: Sweden -->
<button class="flag-card bg-surface-container-lowest border-2 border-outline-variant p-card-padding rounded-lg flex items-center gap-6 group hover:border-primary transition-colors text-left" onclick="this.classList.add('border-tertiary-container', 'bg-tertiary-container/10')">
<div class="w-32 h-20 rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-outline-variant flex-shrink-0 bg-white">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A clean, flat vector illustration of the Swedish flag featuring a yellow Nordic cross on a solid blue background. The style is educational and child-friendly with vibrant primary colors and sharp, clear lines. High contrast lighting makes the flag pop against its minimal white frame." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuAV_1OkVEyUjP7R11l2BDc_vdf0SNc0xH_TZDsEl8T3WEdiYar0oZ_UxEUPDMnWdfXzCEXVMEbtAGNnIfWupst95aQKFLtdHd_Tsuyz8DBo18hmy5DnguUOAwThSF88HpTu65l6xwtvovXfcxbFNSvRinDWko4qAIqqSfdnfyE-L8Fj1yDE4aaKqISOILbU4QUWIoreRu6Dbx6TYo6mnnaUcbG9bHDnkH50MC46wduH_gvLQQLRlFWqX0pVp-wZJZxWKgomm6pkIrQ"/>
</div>
<span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-on-surface group-hover:text-primary">Suecia</span>
</button>
<!-- Option: Iceland -->
<button class="flag-card bg-surface-container-lowest border-2 border-outline-variant p-card-padding rounded-lg flex items-center gap-6 group hover:border-primary transition-colors text-left" onclick="this.classList.add('border-error', 'bg-error-container/10')">
<div class="w-32 h-20 rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-outline-variant flex-shrink-0 bg-white">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A clean, flat vector illustration of the Icelandic flag showing a red cross with a white border set against a deep blue field. The illustration is minimalist and educational, part of a high-quality geography learning suite for children. Bright, clear colors and simple geometry are highlighted." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuAozipQX4vnCB8bB6YH7EHhFDQzhybAMFh7-2C4QqGvJ90yRsZV81kbit7EVUAHXi9Wbv6m2Tpri-FSSrmPAOPAH007Y1dJQtmEj1__x6nQ0OJO7t-ioPNrzFY7HKKwP30BzMj5ocPqrSsExqrMz1ioksyQkJozI019PdcyC94tN_Vhzk4UW1CgrV8m6dfV4sTlf9YJUhmL9X4h_CGke4WFeUEdrKAzjf32HexwAg0m5kMNCUZg0SQmM8VW_-flHLoX7Q1hz7gpGVs"/>
</div>
<span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-on-surface group-hover:text-primary">Islandia</span>
</button>
<!-- Option: Norway -->
<button class="flag-card bg-surface-container-lowest border-2 border-outline-variant p-card-padding rounded-lg flex items-center gap-6 group hover:border-primary transition-colors text-left" onclick="this.classList.add('border-error', 'bg-error-container/10')">
<div class="w-32 h-20 rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-outline-variant flex-shrink-0 bg-white">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A clean, flat vector illustration of the Norwegian flag with a dark blue cross outlined in white on a vibrant red field. The style is consistent with a premium educational app for young learners, emphasizing clear visual identification through saturated colors and bold shapes." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuDVqUV8ECfDXx9fw_ZDEeHEd9AGrSKxS9-1-TcKE-4hGqsJaehk2oDwJxzcv2Y7eBKo3jO-dP17it7xLMWJPcE_KMvvKbDaWSsMLGvhYdrJHxiH711YH7-mVEsqa2S4lCvFM76V8RC5QcYojg9hrntNN2AvGALrGYMndFuLlhsU5QZZevjjDISreYgfBEfiG5tTCGry7-G6-pcTNIeOQ3byFLVBBy4OuztgXmgUNKvI8PUh3-eRmLSOcczEXRcu-aWBDSJo7QAF1qg"/>
</div>
<span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-on-surface group-hover:text-primary">Noruega</span>
</button>
</div>
<!-- Mastery Stars Footer Area -->
<section class="w-full flex flex-col items-center gap-4 pb-24">
<p class="text-on-surface-variant font-label-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-[12px]">Tus Estrellas</p>
<div class="flex gap-4">
<!-- Earned Star -->
<div class="w-14 h-14 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg transform rotate-[-12deg]">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[32px]" data-icon="grade" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">grade</span>
</div>
<!-- Earned Star -->
<div class="w-14 h-14 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg transform translate-y-[-8px]">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[32px]" data-icon="grade" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">grade</span>
</div>
<!-- Empty Star Slot -->
<div class="w-14 h-14 bg-surface-variant text-outline-variant rounded-full flex items-center justify-center transform rotate-[12deg]">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[32px]" data-icon="grade" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0;">grade</span>
</div>
</div>
</section>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation Shell (Shared Component: BottomNavBar) -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg border-t-4 border-surface-variant">
<!-- Explore Tab -->
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="map">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</a>
<!-- Passport Tab -->
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="menu_book">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</a>
<!-- Play Tab (ACTIVE) -->
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="quiz">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
</nav>

            card.addEventListener('click', () => {

<!-- Quiz Nivel 3: Perú -->
<!DOCTYPE html>

<html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/>
<title>Flag Adventure - Nivel 3</title>
<!-- Google Fonts: Quicksand for kid-friendly readability -->
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<!-- Material Symbols -->

<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
