                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "container-margin": "24px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md-mobile": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md-mobile": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        
        /* Tactical Shadows for Buttons & Cards */
        .tactile-card {
            box-shadow: 0 8px 0 0 #dee3e9;
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
        }
        .tactile-card:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 4px 0 0 #dee3e9;
        }

        .tactile-button-primary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        .tactile-button-primary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #004b71;
        }

        .tactile-button-secondary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #bec8d3;
        }
        .tactile-button-secondary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #bec8d3;
        }

        /* Pulse animation for audio button */
        @keyframes subtle-pulse {
            0% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); }
        }
        .animate-pulse-slow {
            animation: subtle-pulse 2s infinite ease-in-out;
        }

        .correct-answer {
            border-color: #59be1b !important;
            background-color: #e8f5e9 !important;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 0 0 #2b6c00 !important;
        }

        .wrong-answer {
            border-color: #ba1a1a !important;
            background-color: #ffebee !important;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 0 0 #93000a !important;
        }
    </style>
<style>
    body {
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);
    }
  </style>
  </head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background font-body-md min-h-screen pb-32">
<!-- TopAppBar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky z-50 bg-surface-container-low flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit h-16">
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 hover:bg-primary-container rounded-full">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-size: 32px;">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary font-bold">Flag Adventure</h1>
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 hover:bg-primary-container rounded-full">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-size: 32px;">volume_up</span>
</button>
</header>
<main class="max-w-md mx-auto px-container-margin pt-unit flex flex-col gap-8">
<!-- Progress Section -->
<div class="mt-4">
<div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-2">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">Level 3</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-primary">Quest 4/10</span>
</div>
<div class="w-full bg-surface-container-highest rounded-full h-4">
<div class="bg-tertiary-container h-4 rounded-full w-[40%] transition-all duration-500"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Question Section -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center text-center gap-6">
<div class="relative">
<button class="w-20 h-20 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center tactile-button-secondary border-4 border-white animate-pulse-slow" id="play-audio">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container" style="font-size: 40px; font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-on-background px-4">
                ¿Cuál es la bandera de Perú?
            </h2>
</div>
<!-- Answer Options (Bento-like layout for variety) -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 pb-8">
<!-- Correct Answer: Peru -->
<button class="tactile-card bg-surface-container-lowest border-2 border-outline-variant rounded-lg p-card-padding flex flex-col items-center gap-4 w-full" onclick="handleSelect(this, true)">
<div class="w-full aspect-[3/2] rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-surface-variant">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A clean, vibrant digital illustration of the national flag of Peru featuring three vertical stripes of red, white, and red. The white stripe is centered and clear. The style is educational and minimalist, set against a soft studio-lit background that fits a child-friendly mobile game interface with high saturation and bright lighting." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuD4d_Bc0gc2GK92T4DrsseL38WDlrjXNsxcHMALZniQqJD7W-t2eh5fTaanlMu4BX1F4GHtkpbhrvzew33akg2OB3D1dBtf6mcTEGQY7blNv2RtsHj08Yvul3Jn00S0kay3u1rjb1lyLmHW_0Jpxrxb1GP4jaM2NOXpZWW4UaqP8uc4VYiIVVHAa2boHQT_wRvlQ8kn_CdJ5lBp00TwHNrf272PsI1OEmq1eI-EFgDyheQ50V73iUuviPUrgH-je4voCMtakb9VQwg"/>
</div>
<span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-on-surface">Perú</span>
</button>
<div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
<!-- Option: Nigeria -->
<button class="tactile-card bg-surface-container-lowest border-2 border-outline-variant rounded-lg p-4 flex flex-col items-center gap-2" onclick="handleSelect(this, false)">
<div class="w-full aspect-[3/2] rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-surface-variant">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A detailed digital educational illustration of the national flag of Nigeria, consisting of three vertical bands of green, white, and green. The lighting is bright and cheerful, designed for a premium educational app for children. The colors are punchy and highly legible, maintaining a clean 3D-block aesthetic." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuDjbHZcIpm0J4TFGZXem_ZJ6VK29ap_EBnbcXaUte0cQIPMLhLOoxG4p9MFiSpGrdqaM5yke_YMI32FfE9F3TAYYipUQHSU4oiMWD8-Z6jiQlTO_BuR4RlQvTEtadg5xham9ybEs_2hKp-ZUnEhSYuc6FkS3rfWprzraQHpXclSIYRPc1vp63BM4EnkhNQQHSZGWSQTAS_iPG_nsFKSDvzRec2Nshq-qihihLoGtCQSEgrzBz5cKp8gYaK9Qo7i_LzlTZW-gFq7zZk"/>
</div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">Nigeria</span>
</button>
<!-- Option: Thailand -->
<button class="tactile-card bg-surface-container-lowest border-2 border-outline-variant rounded-lg p-4 flex flex-col items-center gap-2" onclick="handleSelect(this, false)">
<div class="w-full aspect-[3/2] rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-surface-variant">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A vibrant digital illustration of the national flag of Thailand, showcasing its horizontal stripes of red, white, blue, white, and red. The blue middle stripe is double the width of the others. The artwork follows a premium educational style with soft shadows and high-key lighting for young learners." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuC5q4M0tJKEtWu4uWxc22uZ-Z5PtNvhSPvrz0SOtl6uh_ahk479kQJTz-5t5Jb2CzdN2oZ2rz7_k9JjEUtEwZlUj8BWc6NPwUy_TYeuwv5Fi0bE0HJE-Ptlfp8ArIu00Qn7CEU295VgGncXL9jHu-qwh6duAt6OV8ajDBVzmDJvT2VLezhTpZ6K9spF5FON4ng9TttGtFhCmvN8I90eR0iC3OkXbzOXRSokfseDbCzi33_PR_CG30zacso96SuPuWPFYHMmLSK2WWk"/>
</div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">Tailandia</span>
</button>
</div>
</div>
</main>
<!-- BottomNavBar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 bg-surface-container-lowest border-t-4 border-surface-variant shadow-lg flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="map">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="menu_book">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="quiz" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Floating Confetti Effect Layer (Hidden by default) -->
<div class="fixed inset-0 pointer-events-none z-[100] hidden" id="confetti-container"></div>
<script>
        function handleSelect(element, isCorrect) {
            // Remove previous highlights
            document.querySelectorAll('.tactile-card').forEach(card => {
                card.classList.remove('correct-answer', 'wrong-answer');
            });

            if (isCorrect) {
                element.classList.add('correct-answer');
                showConfetti();
                // Play sound logic would go here
            } else {
                element.classList.add('wrong-answer');
                // Shake effect
                element.classList.add('animate-shake');
                setTimeout(() => element.classList.remove('animate-shake'), 500);
            }
        }

        function showConfetti() {
            const container = document.getElementById('confetti-container');
            container.classList.remove('hidden');
            
            for (let i = 0; i < 50; i++) {
                const confetti = document.createElement('div');
                confetti.style.position = 'absolute';
                confetti.style.width = '10px';
                confetti.style.height = '10px';
                confetti.style.backgroundColor = ['#fccc00', '#2bb1ff', '#59be1b', '#ba1a1a'][Math.floor(Math.random() * 4)];
                confetti.style.left = Math.random() * 100 + 'vw';
                confetti.style.top = '-10px';
                confetti.style.borderRadius = '2px';
                confetti.style.transform = `rotate(${Math.random() * 360}deg)`;
                
                container.appendChild(confetti);

                const animation = confetti.animate([
                    { transform: `translate3d(0, 0, 0) rotate(0deg)`, opacity: 1 },
                    { transform: `translate3d(${(Math.random() - 0.5) * 200}px, 100vh, 0) rotate(${Math.random() * 1000}deg)`, opacity: 0 }
                ], {
                    duration: 2000 + Math.random() * 2000,
                    easing: 'cubic-bezier(0, .9, .57, 1)'
                });

                animation.onfinish = () => confetti.remove();
            }
            
            setTimeout(() => {
                container.classList.add('hidden');
            }, 4000);
        }

        // Pulse logic for audio button
        const audioBtn = document.getElementById('play-audio');
        audioBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            audioBtn.classList.remove('animate-pulse-slow');
            setTimeout(() => audioBtn.classList.add('animate-pulse-slow'), 100);
        });
    </script>
<style>
        @keyframes shake {
            0%, 100% { transform: translateX(0); }
            25% { transform: translateX(-5px); }
            75% { transform: translateX(5px); }
        }
        .animate-shake {
            animation: shake 0.2s cubic-bezier(.36,.07,.19,.97) both;
            animation-iteration-count: 2;
        }
    </style>
</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Islandia) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport">
<title>Estación de Pintura (Islandia)</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        .tactile-shadow-primary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        .tactile-shadow-secondary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #dee3e9;
        }
        .tactile-shadow-yellow {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #b28900;
        }
        .active-press:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 transparent;
        }
        .flag-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 7fr 1fr 2fr 1fr 14fr;
            grid-template-rows: 7fr 1fr 2fr 1fr 7fr;
            aspect-ratio: 25 / 18;
        }
        .pulsing {
            animation: pulse-ring 2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1) infinite;
        }
        @keyframes pulse-ring {
            0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
        }
    </style>
<script id="tailwind-config">
        tailwind.config = {
            darkMode: "class",
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    "colors": {
                        "primary": "#006495",
                        "on-surface": "#171c21",
                        "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                        "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                        "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                        "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                        "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                        "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                        "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                        "error": "#ba1a1a",
                        "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                        "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                        "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                        "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                        "on-background": "#171c21",
                        "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                        "surface-tint": "#006495",
                        "outline": "#6e7882",
                        "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                        "secondary": "#735c00",
                        "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                        "on-error": "#ffffff",
                        "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                        "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                        "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                        "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                        "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                        "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                        "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                        "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                        "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                        "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                        "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                        "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                        "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                        "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                        "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                        "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                        "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                        "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                        "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                        "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                        "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                        "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                        "background": "#f7f9ff"
                    },
                    "borderRadius": {
                        "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                        "lg": "2rem",
                        "xl": "3rem",
                        "full": "9999px"
                    },
                    "spacing": {
                        "gutter": "16px",
                        "container-margin": "24px",
                        "card-padding": "20px",
                        "unit": "8px",
                        "touch-target-min": "48px"
                    },
                    "fontFamily": {
                        "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                        "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                        "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                        "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                        "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                        "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"]
                    },
                    "fontSize": {
                        "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                        "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                        "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                        "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                        "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                        "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}]
                    }
                },
            },
        }
    </script>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background font-body-md min-h-screen pb-32">
<!-- TopAppBar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky bg-surface-container-low z-40 flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit h-16">
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 hover:bg-primary-container rounded-full">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="menu">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary font-bold tracking-tight">Estación de Pintura</h1>
<button class="flex items-center gap-1 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container px-4 py-2 rounded-full border-b-4 border-on-secondary-fixed-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-lg"><span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">notifications_active</span><span class="font-label-bold text-[10px] uppercase tracking-tighter">¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm</span></button><button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 hover:bg-primary-container rounded-full">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</button>
</header>
<main class="max-w-md mx-auto px-container-margin mt-8 space-y-8">
<!-- Progress Bar -->
<div class="space-y-2">
<div class="flex justify-between items-end">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-primary">Tu Progreso</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-primary">60%</span>
</div>
<div class="w-full h-4 bg-surface-variant rounded-full overflow-hidden">
<div class="h-full bg-tertiary-container w-[60%] rounded-full transition-all duration-500"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Flag Canvas Section -->
<section class="bg-surface-container-lowest p-card-padding rounded-lg border-2 border-surface-variant shadow-lg">
<h2 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-center mb-6">Bandera de Islandia</h2>
<div class="flag-grid rounded-lg overflow-hidden border-4 border-surface-variant bg-surface-dim">
<!-- Blue Sections -->
<div class="bg-primary hover:opacity-90 cursor-pointer transition-opacity"></div>
<div class="bg-surface-container-lowest"></div> <!-- White horizontal outline -->
<div class="bg-error"></div> <!-- Red horizontal cross -->
<div class="bg-surface-container-lowest"></div> <!-- White horizontal outline -->
<div class="bg-primary hover:opacity-90 cursor-pointer transition-opacity"></div>
<div class="bg-surface-container-lowest col-span-5"></div> <!-- Top white vertical outline -->
<div class="bg-error col-span-5 h-full"></div> <!-- Middle red vertical cross (simplified for grid display) -->
<div class="bg-surface-container-lowest col-span-5"></div> <!-- Bottom white vertical outline -->
<div class="bg-primary hover:opacity-90 cursor-pointer transition-opacity"></div>
<div class="bg-surface-container-lowest"></div>
<div class="bg-error"></div>
<div class="bg-surface-container-lowest"></div>
<div class="bg-primary hover:opacity-90 cursor-pointer transition-opacity"></div>
</div>
<p class="mt-6 text-center text-on-surface-variant font-body-md italic">¡Toca los colores para pintar!</p>
</section>
<!-- Audio Buttons (Color Learning) -->
<section class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4">
<!-- Azul -->
<button class="flex flex-col items-center gap-2 group" onclick="playAudio('azul')">
<div class="w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-secondary-container tactile-shadow-yellow active-press flex items-center justify-center pulsing">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container scale-150" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface">Azul</span>
</button>
<!-- Blanco -->
<button class="flex flex-col items-center gap-2 group" onclick="playAudio('blanco')">
<div class="w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-secondary-container tactile-shadow-yellow active-press flex items-center justify-center">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container scale-150" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface">Blanco</span>
</button>
<!-- Rojo -->
<button class="flex flex-col items-center gap-2 group" onclick="playAudio('rojo')">
<div class="w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-secondary-container tactile-shadow-yellow active-press flex items-center justify-center">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container scale-150" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface">Rojo</span>
</button>
</section>
<!-- Fun Fact Card -->
<section class="bg-primary-container p-card-padding rounded-lg relative overflow-hidden tactile-shadow-primary">
<div class="relative z-10 flex items-start gap-4">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-primary-container" data-icon="lightbulb" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">lightbulb</span>
<div>
<h3 class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-primary-container uppercase tracking-wider">¿Sabías que?</h3>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-primary-container mt-1 font-bold">Islandia es la isla del hielo y el fuego.</p>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Decorative circle -->
<div class="absolute -right-8 -bottom-8 w-24 h-24 bg-on-primary-container opacity-10 rounded-full"></div>
</section>
<!-- Action Button -->
<div class="pt-4">
<button class="w-full h-14 bg-primary text-on-primary font-headline-md rounded-lg tactile-shadow-primary active-press flex items-center justify-center gap-3">
<span class="">¡Terminar!</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="check_circle">check_circle</span>
</button>
</div>
</main>
<!-- BottomNavBar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg border-t-4 border-surface-variant">
<button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-75 hover:bg-surface-variant rounded-lg">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="map">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</button>
<button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-75 hover:bg-surface-variant rounded-lg">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="menu_book">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</button>
<button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0 active:translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-75">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="quiz">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</button>
</nav>
<script>
        function playAudio(color) {
            // Simulated audio feedback for children
            const utterance = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(color);
            utterance.lang = 'es-ES';
            window.speechSynthesis.speak(utterance);
            
            // Visual feedback
            console.log("Playing audio for: " + color);
        }

        // Simple interaction for the "painting" feel
        document.querySelectorAll('.flag-grid > div').forEach(part => {
            part.addEventListener('click', function() {
                this.classList.add('scale-95');
                setTimeout(() => this.classList.remove('scale-95'), 100);
            });
        });
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Suiza) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport">
<title>Paint Adventure - Switzerland</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@100..900&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "card-padding": "20px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        .chunky-button-primary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        .chunky-button-primary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        .chunky-button-secondary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #bec8d3;
        }
        .chunky-button-secondary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #bec8d3;
        }
        .chunky-card {
            box-shadow: 0 8px 0 0 #e4e8ef;
        }
        .pulse-animation {
            animation: pulse 2s infinite;
        }
        @keyframes pulse {
            0% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); }
        }
        .canvas-bg {
            background-image: radial-gradient(#bec8d3 1px, transparent 1px);
            background-size: 24px 24px;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background min-h-screen flex flex-col font-body-md overflow-x-hidden">
<!-- Top AppBar -->
<header class="flex justify-between items-center px-container-margin h-touch-target-min w-full z-50 bg-surface fixed top-0 docked full-width">
<div class="flex items-center gap-4">
<button class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 p-2 rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container">arrow_back</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md font-bold text-primary">Paint Adventure</h1>
</div>
<button class="flex items-center gap-2 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container px-4 py-2 rounded-full font-label-bold text-label-bold active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 shadow-md"><span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">notifications_active</span><span class="">¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm</span></button><button class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 p-2 rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container">volume_up</button>
</header>
<main class="flex-grow pt-20 pb-24 px-container-margin max-w-4xl mx-auto w-full">
<!-- Switzerland Intro Section -->
<div class="mb-8 flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center gap-6">
<div class="w-full md:w-1/3">
<div class="aspect-square rounded-lg bg-surface-container-lowest chunky-card p-4 flex items-center justify-center relative overflow-hidden">
<img class="w-full h-full object-contain" data-alt="A friendly, chunky 3D illustration of a Swiss mountain dog wearing a small bell, sitting next to a giant bar of chocolate with the snow-capped Alps in the background. The style is bright, clean, and cheerful for young children, with soft rounded edges and vibrant primary colors." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuDt70yjhCAoSbiY5Vy7YFSn3qQBA9GNM2rhzxYPqvQ-o3YbrtfctDVrMK28tLpno0Cr8juuUVyRYsp33SgNQ7DYI46PYtYoctyrcvyVVDC0hEesSVo9sddZ7vPoX4zbzHuRN-8Z-O8n0z8WUhjSFSkDAW52REjX12Cn_dkdd8SSz_9c3yZb3OnIwVfWaT4a3pFOQaCfNe8hppNCoJiGSSHy-tQ_6Lzoz6uyf0QaD8abf7m5m5lVCReVHfv-GkEHYrG9w3UcvoNEzWQ">
</div>
</div>
<div class="w-full md:w-2/3 flex flex-col gap-4">
<div class="flex items-center gap-3">
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile md:font-headline-lg text-headline-lg-mobile md:text-headline-lg text-on-surface">Suiza / Switzerland</h2>
<button class="bg-secondary-container p-3 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center pulse-animation shadow-md active:translate-y-1" onclick="this.classList.remove('pulse-animation')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
<p class="text-body-lg text-on-surface-variant leading-relaxed">
                    Suiza es famosa por sus montañas nevadas y chocolates.
                </p>
</div>
</div>
<!-- The Painting Canvas Area -->
<div class="relative mb-10">
<div class="bg-white rounded-lg p-6 chunky-card canvas-bg border-2 border-surface-variant">
<div class="aspect-[4/3] w-full max-w-md mx-auto bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-md flex items-center justify-center relative shadow-inner overflow-hidden border-4 border-white">
<!-- Flag Visualization -->
<div class="w-64 h-64 relative bg-slate-100 flex items-center justify-center transition-colors duration-500" id="flag-container">
<!-- Vertical Bar of the Cross -->
<div class="absolute bg-white w-12 h-40 transition-colors duration-300" id="cross-v"></div>
<!-- Horizontal Bar of the Cross -->
<div class="absolute bg-white w-40 h-12 transition-colors duration-300" id="cross-h"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Painting Tools / Palette -->
<div class="mt-8 flex justify-center gap-8">
<!-- Red Tool -->
<button class="group flex flex-col items-center gap-2" onclick="applyColor('red')">
<div class="w-20 h-20 bg-[#D52B1E] rounded-full ring-4 ring-offset-4 ring-transparent group-active:ring-primary transition-all chunky-button-secondary"></div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface">Rojo</span>
<div class="bg-secondary-container p-2 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center scale-75 shadow-sm">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-sm" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</div>
</button>
<!-- White Tool -->
<button class="group flex flex-col items-center gap-2" onclick="applyColor('white')">
<div class="w-20 h-20 bg-white border-2 border-surface-variant rounded-full ring-4 ring-offset-4 ring-transparent group-active:ring-primary transition-all chunky-button-secondary"></div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface">Blanco</span>
<div class="bg-secondary-container p-2 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center scale-75 shadow-sm">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-sm" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</div>
</button>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Success Hint -->
<div class="hidden absolute -top-4 -right-4 bg-tertiary-container text-on-tertiary p-4 rounded-full shadow-lg rotate-12 flex items-center gap-2 border-4 border-white" id="success-badge">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">stars</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">¡Perfecto!</span>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Fun Progress / Fact Card -->
<div class="bg-primary-container/10 border-2 border-dashed border-primary-container p-card-padding rounded-lg flex items-start gap-4">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary-container text-4xl">lightbulb</span>
<div>
<h3 class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-primary-container mb-1">Did you know?</h3>
<p class="text-body-md text-on-surface-variant">The Swiss flag is one of only two square national flags in the world! (The other one is Vatican City).</p>
</div>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation Bar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-gutter py-2 pb-safe bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg rounded-t-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-variant transition-all duration-100" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">public</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">World Map</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-variant transition-all duration-100" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">palette</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">My Gallery</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">videogame_asset</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-variant transition-all duration-100" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">stars</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Awards</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Audio Interaction Layer (Visual Feedback Only) -->
<script>
        function applyColor(color) {
            const container = document.getElementById('flag-container');
            const successBadge = document.getElementById('success-badge');
            
            if (color === 'red') {
                container.style.backgroundColor = '#D52B1E';
                // Trigger celebratory check
                setTimeout(() => {
                    successBadge.classList.remove('hidden');
                    successBadge.classList.add('animate-bounce');
                }, 400);
            } else if (color === 'white') {
                // In this simplified version, white is for the cross
                // But typically user would "paint" the background red first
                container.style.backgroundColor = '#f8fafc';
                successBadge.classList.add('hidden');
            }
            
            // Visual feedback for "painting"
            container.classList.add('scale-105');
            setTimeout(() => container.classList.remove('scale-105'), 200);
        }

        // Handle simple navigation logic for "Active" states as per instructions
        // In this case "Play" is active because we are in a paint activity.
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Vietnam) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport">
<title>Paint Adventure - Vietnam</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@100..900&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        .tactile-primary {
            box-shadow: 0 4px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        .tactile-primary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        .tactile-secondary {
            box-shadow: 0 4px 0 0 #bec8d3;
        }
        .tactile-secondary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 #bec8d3;
        }
        .tactile-yellow {
            box-shadow: 0 4px 0 0 #b38f00;
        }
        .tactile-yellow:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 #b38f00;
        }
        .flag-container {
            aspect-ratio: 3 / 2;
        }
        @keyframes pulse-audio {
            0% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.1); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); }
        }
        .pulse-animation {
            animation: pulse-audio 2s infinite ease-in-out;
        }
        .glass-card {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
            backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
        }
    </style>
<script id="tailwind-config">
        tailwind.config = {
            darkMode: "class",
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    "colors": {
                        "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                        "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                        "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                        "outline": "#6e7882",
                        "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                        "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                        "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                        "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                        "surface-tint": "#006495",
                        "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                        "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                        "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                        "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                        "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                        "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                        "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                        "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                        "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                        "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                        "on-surface": "#171c21",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                        "background": "#f7f9ff",
                        "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                        "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                        "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                        "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                        "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                        "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                        "on-background": "#171c21",
                        "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                        "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                        "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                        "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                        "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                        "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                        "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                        "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                        "primary": "#006495",
                        "on-error": "#ffffff",
                        "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                        "secondary": "#735c00",
                        "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                        "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                        "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                        "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                        "error": "#ba1a1a"
                    },
                    "borderRadius": {
                        "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                        "lg": "2rem",
                        "xl": "3rem",
                        "full": "9999px"
                    },
                    "spacing": {
                        "unit": "8px",
                        "container-margin": "24px",
                        "touch-target-min": "48px",
                        "gutter": "16px",
                        "card-padding": "20px"
                    },
                    "fontFamily": {
                        "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                        "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                        "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                        "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                        "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                        "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
                    },
                    "fontSize": {
                        "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                        "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                        "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                        "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                        "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                        "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
                    }
                },
            },
        }
    </script>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-surface min-h-screen flex flex-col font-body-md overflow-x-hidden">
<!-- TopAppBar -->
<header class="bg-surface dark:bg-surface flex justify-between items-center px-container-margin h-touch-target-min w-full z-50 fixed top-0 bg-surface-container-low dark:bg-surface-container-low">
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center text-primary dark:text-primary-fixed-dim active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">arrow_back</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md font-bold text-primary dark:text-primary-fixed-dim">Paint Adventure</h1>
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center text-primary dark:text-primary-fixed-dim active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">volume_up</span>
</button>
</header>
<!-- Main Canvas Area -->
<main class="flex-grow pt-20 pb-28 px-container-margin max-w-4xl mx-auto w-full">
<!-- Learning & Title Section -->
<section class="mb-gutter text-center">
<div class="flex items-center justify-center gap-4 mb-4">
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile md:font-headline-lg md:text-headline-lg text-primary">Vietnam</h2>
<button class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container flex items-center justify-center tactile-yellow pulse-animation" onclick="playAudio('Vietnam')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
<!-- Progress Bar -->
<div class="w-full bg-surface-container-highest rounded-full h-4 mb-gutter">
<div class="bg-tertiary-container h-4 rounded-full" style="width: 60%;"></div>
</div>
</section>
<!-- The Painting Station -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-gutter">
<!-- Interactive Flag Canvas -->
<div class="md:col-span-8 bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-lg border-2 border-outline-variant p-4 flex items-center justify-center relative overflow-hidden shadow-sm">
<div class="flag-container w-full max-w-[500px] bg-white border-2 border-surface-variant rounded-sm relative cursor-pointer group transition-transform active:scale-95" id="flag-canvas">
<!-- The Background (Red to be painted) -->
<div class="absolute inset-0 transition-colors duration-500 bg-surface-variant" id="flag-bg"></div>
<!-- The Star (Yellow to be painted) -->
<div class="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center pointer-events-none" id="flag-star">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[160px] text-surface-variant transition-colors duration-500" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
</div>
<!-- Paint Drop Visual Hint -->
<div class="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-outline text-6xl">format_paint</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Palette & Audio Controls -->
<div class="md:col-span-4 flex flex-col gap-gutter">
<!-- Color Options -->
<div class="bg-surface-container-high rounded-lg p-card-padding flex flex-col gap-4">
<h3 class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface-variant uppercase tracking-wider">Colores</h3>
<!-- Color Button: Red -->
<button class="w-full flex items-center gap-4 bg-surface-container-lowest p-3 rounded-lg border-2 border-outline-variant transition-all hover:bg-white active:translate-y-1 tactile-secondary" id="btn-red" onclick="selectColor('red')">
<div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-red-600 border-4 border-white shadow-sm"></div>
<div class="text-left">
<p class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Rojo</p>
<span class="text-sm text-outline">Pinta el fondo</span>
</div>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined ml-auto text-secondary" onclick="event.stopPropagation(); playAudio('Rojo')">volume_up</span>
</button>
<!-- Color Button: Yellow -->
<button class="w-full flex items-center gap-4 bg-surface-container-lowest p-3 rounded-lg border-2 border-outline-variant transition-all hover:bg-white active:translate-y-1 tactile-secondary" id="btn-yellow" onclick="selectColor('yellow')">
<div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-secondary-container border-4 border-white shadow-sm"></div>
<div class="text-left">
<p class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Amarillo</p>
<span class="text-sm text-outline">Pinta la estrella</span>
</div>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined ml-auto text-secondary" onclick="event.stopPropagation(); playAudio('Amarillo')">volume_up</span>
</button>
<button class="w-full flex items-center gap-4 bg-surface-container-lowest p-3 rounded-lg border-2 border-outline-variant transition-all hover:bg-white active:translate-y-1 tactile-yellow" id="btn-alarm" onclick="playAudio('Alarma')">
<div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-secondary-container flex items-center justify-center border-4 border-white shadow-sm">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container">notifications_active</span>
</div>
<div class="text-left">
<p class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">¡Alarma!</p>
<span class="text-sm text-outline">Sound Alarm</span>
</div>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined ml-auto text-secondary">volume_up</span>
</button></div>
<!-- Fun Fact Card -->
<div class="bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container rounded-lg p-card-padding relative overflow-hidden tactile-primary">
<div class="relative z-10">
<div class="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">lightbulb</span>
<span class="font-label-bold">¿Sabías que?</span>
</div>
<p class="font-body-md italic leading-tight text-on-primary-container">"Vietnam tiene hermosas bahías y sombreros de paja."</p>
</div>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined absolute -bottom-4 -right-4 text-8xl opacity-20 rotate-12">beach_access</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Success Message (Hidden by default) -->
<div class="fixed inset-0 z-[60] hidden pointer-events-none flex items-center justify-center" id="celebration">
<div class="bg-secondary-container p-8 rounded-xl shadow-2xl text-center transform scale-150 animate-bounce pointer-events-auto">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-6xl text-on-secondary-container">stars</span>
<h2 class="text-headline-md font-bold mt-2">¡Excelente!</h2>
<p class="">¡Has creado la bandera de Vietnam!</p>
</div>
</div>
</main>
<!-- BottomNavBar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-gutter py-2 pb-safe bg-surface-container-lowest dark:bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg rounded-t-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-variant transition-all active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">public</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">World Map</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-variant transition-all active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">palette</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">My Gallery</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 transition-all active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">videogame_asset</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-variant transition-all active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">stars</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Awards</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Background Decorative Scene -->
<div class="fixed inset-0 -z-10 opacity-30 pointer-events-none">
<div class="absolute top-20 left-10 w-32 h-32 bg-primary opacity-10 rounded-full blur-3xl"></div>
<div class="absolute bottom-40 right-10 w-48 h-48 bg-secondary-container opacity-20 rounded-full blur-3xl"></div>
</div>
<script>
        let selectedColor = null;
        let paintedRed = false;
        let paintedYellow = false;

        function selectColor(color) {
            selectedColor = color;
            
            // UI Feedback for selection
            document.getElementById('btn-red').classList.remove('border-primary', 'bg-primary-fixed');
            document.getElementById('btn-yellow').classList.remove('border-primary', 'bg-primary-fixed');
            
            if (color === 'red') {
                document.getElementById('btn-red').classList.add('border-primary', 'bg-primary-fixed');
            } else {
                document.getElementById('btn-yellow').classList.add('border-primary', 'bg-primary-fixed');
            }
        }

        const flagCanvas = document.getElementById('flag-canvas');
        const flagBg = document.getElementById('flag-bg');
        const flagStar = document.getElementById('flag-star').querySelector('span');

        flagCanvas.addEventListener('click', () => {
            if (!selectedColor) {
                alert("¡Primero elige un color!");
                return;
            }

            if (selectedColor === 'red') {
                flagBg.classList.remove('bg-surface-variant');
                flagBg.classList.add('bg-red-600');
                paintedRed = true;
            } else if (selectedColor === 'yellow') {
                flagStar.classList.remove('text-surface-variant');
                flagStar.classList.add('text-secondary-container');
                paintedYellow = true;
            }

            checkSuccess();
        });

        function checkSuccess() {
            if (paintedRed && paintedYellow) {
                const celebration = document.getElementById('celebration');
                celebration.classList.remove('hidden');
                setTimeout(() => {
                    celebration.classList.add('hidden');
                }, 3000);
            }
        }

        function playAudio(word) {
            // In a real app, this would trigger an MP3 file
            console.log(`Playing audio for: ${word}`);
            
            // Visual feedback for speaker
            const utterance = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(word);
            utterance.lang = word === 'Vietnam' ? 'en-US' : 'es-ES';
            window.speechSynthesis.speak(utterance);
        }
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Recompensa de Nivel 3: Capitán del Mundo -->
<!DOCTYPE html>

<html class="light" lang="en"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport"/>
<title>Paint Adventure - World Captain Reward</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@300;400;500;600;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "card-padding": "20px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 24;
        }
        .chunky-button-primary {
            @apply bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container border-b-[6px] border-primary active:border-b-0 active:translate-y-[4px] transition-all;
        }
        .chunky-button-secondary {
            @apply bg-surface-container-lowest text-primary border-b-[6px] border-surface-variant active:border-b-0 active:translate-y-[4px] transition-all;
        }
        .chunky-card {
            @apply bg-surface-container-lowest border-[2px] border-surface-variant rounded-lg shadow-[0_4px_0_0_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)];
        }
        .confetti-canvas {
            pointer-events: none;
            position: fixed;
            inset: 0;
            z-index: 100;
        }
        @keyframes pulse-yellow {
            0% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(252, 204, 0, 0.7); }
            70% { transform: scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 0 0 15px rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
        }
        .animate-pulse-yellow {
            animation: pulse-yellow 2s infinite;
        }
    </style>
<style>
    body {
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background font-body-md text-on-background min-h-screen pb-24 overflow-x-hidden">
<!-- Celebration Header / TopAppBar -->
<header class="bg-surface-container-low flex justify-between items-center px-container-margin h-touch-target-min w-full z-50 fixed top-0 left-0">
<button class="active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 flex items-center justify-center w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-headline-md">arrow_back</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md font-bold text-primary">Paint Adventure</h1>
<button class="active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 flex items-center justify-center w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min" onclick="playAudio()">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-headline-md">volume_up</span>
</button>
</header>
<main class="mt-20 px-container-margin max-w-4xl mx-auto">
<!-- Celebration Hero -->
<section class="relative py-8 text-center">
<div class="absolute inset-0 -z-10 opacity-20">

</div>
<div class="mb-6 inline-block relative">
<div class="w-32 h-32 md:w-48 md:h-48 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center border-b-[8px] border-secondary mx-auto shadow-lg relative overflow-hidden">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-6xl md:text-8xl text-on-secondary-container" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">stars</span>
</div>
<div class="absolute -top-2 -right-2 bg-tertiary-container text-on-tertiary px-4 py-1 rounded-full font-label-bold shadow-md transform rotate-12">
                    LVL 3
                </div>
</div>
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile md:font-headline-lg text-headline-lg-mobile md:text-headline-lg text-on-surface mb-2">¡Increíble, Capitán del Mundo!</h2>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-surface-variant mb-4">Amazing, World Captain!</p>
<!-- Audio Trigger -->
<button class="w-16 h-16 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-8 animate-pulse-yellow shadow-md hover:scale-110 transition-transform active:scale-95" onclick="playAudio()">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-3xl">play_arrow</span>
</button>
</section>
<!-- Flag Grid -->
<section class="mb-12">
<div class="flex items-center gap-2 mb-6">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">palette</span>
<h3 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-on-surface">Colección de Banderas</h3>
</div>
<div class="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-5 gap-4">
<!-- Portugal -->
<div class="chunky-card p-4 flex flex-col items-center gap-2 group transition-transform hover:scale-105">
<div class="w-full aspect-[3/2] rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-surface-variant">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A vibrant digital illustration of the Portuguese flag, featuring the vertical green and red bands and the national coat of arms in the center. The style is clean and playful for children, with bright colors and a soft matte texture against a minimalist light-mode background." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuAWx_Y3nm_z6eIibJ6GuVowx0Vzara0L3-dbYPiiNvOsFStsXtFCEPkv6wKfoFBtinEv5-q26Db_9LjaX5yp8Kmj-JVSO82Qwu3SGuuhtESIPOEY-DvgdR0n2SVlYOG8bV1JTDa9Rn-RV7d_QowvfD_uvaMPS7olSoHKcKkjftl_fbCcOKTsiONbYNTNDVtNllXKy4jVsfaE333qTAX932yqQ-2Q-s8Ee_0zWrpQ-I3G7jJVmegfTLMyZting2AKobmQKeLM8IJngc"/>
</div>
<p class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface text-center">Portugal</p>
</div>
<!-- Netherlands -->
<div class="chunky-card p-4 flex flex-col items-center gap-2 group transition-transform hover:scale-105">
<div class="w-full aspect-[3/2] rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-surface-variant">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A bright, cheerful digital rendering of the Dutch flag with horizontal stripes of vermilion, white, and cobalt blue. The lighting is soft and high-key, maintaining a friendly educational aesthetic suitable for 4-8 year olds. The texture is smooth and slightly tactile." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuBxP-yEu7Ytp3NO2ow--KF-jXqUDBJ6IlcbvwbgjYp3QEReLJg75gFPkR5Pn8ooYuTftMXT4dyDwZdi4RyPbuOfEz7NlzIWSEvUFsAo9UXvSp9BRrlJ-cYd36YbZeEpy4lcOSN0SkVmUohz0WMSQNFnqBRo9vSpx4fNMbNcU-zpqohwlqheBl-ZziqIOjtab9K3KQFzTx1MtrgiW5UrQT50PBVh9pe6M5dtFQP2ZRFJ7ymGB4_W67E0wWrjk-CYAPPUA1cr-xdR084"/>

</div>
<!-- Turkey -->

<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A premium 3D digital illustration of the Turkish flag, showcasing its bold red field with the iconic white crescent and star. The design is rendered with a friendly, educational feel, featuring vibrant saturation and soft-rounded edges that fit a premium learning app's UI." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuB0EMlqM6htim_aHCWO59AXy8lLHyJx9DjVMQtbV7Jm-29hZXItmXEHGQ_g8XlkeE3Rj1QioCsMzCXjUpp-TNgQmKBXbm74QCDod4Zz4F7nsLhe6-UFCglUbh4UURbC9vrq6VireMuRyWvoWK22zA6QjybptrFfrcaHngwELEb9nCCMTcnWzu2kb9OGWNg0YIxiUpZD3q9m9SoIy55i8N2QB4i5AyW4rotf5zk7r0c1QFB3YRT131zc1L9ha31tmzAz_-EDtuD73TQ"/>

<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A high-quality educational illustration of the Peruvian flag, featuring bold red and white vertical stripes. The color palette follows the premium educational theme, using high-contrast, cheerful yellow and sky blue against a soft white background." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuCr-UHEvnJsk3LumKKzny6QPczlXB9OoyagrEh5cwMn-ocEubZfDv-5pkO5wOFcSjo7RC2W8Wd2pk-EK_Yw9PevJkWEbLTBixf321V27W93k7qk49wTdM4L5vnxeUtDJ_42gEcXTCxVUDWwW9ZNBEM6ON3vgywsaxVsqMSVnpH7dUVD_nFNIE9tmge66DvL-AcvVKTro0KPJSnhyRNTiighKkj3q_KihOKwpEC2uyZKlMHh8FxjmlR1-f1LNM2U178Wagw4G3a_VZc"/>

The style is 'squishy' and approachable for children aged 4-8, with bold lines and a tactile, physical appearance like a toy block." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuDfqtD-bwmcLjCgmITu2oHnYHF095c98K5N9hHdHF99MtseMFQnVPW-Bz_-fOIGaMcH9NMJFu2t9YW3ZO9vGoXMmBSjLPtlaLvQL52YOR01VKBqoqK5Ja_yq6dTq_L8kmT9Zq31n330KgJAkJ6xr-xrENXlH7zgb85JPDLTcAQ-IiZu6a6dnM0A_pg0VZlHIDRJuNgiFHajFfmQTv1RnbSNj99efvGe1WapS0I7sne1TLvgPBTuhRibAr2-JhdOc-8tL5B5376CEVs"/>

<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A premium digital artwork of the Icelandic flag with its red cross outlined in white on a dark blue field. The colors are punchy and clear, rendered in a high-key lighting environment to keep the mood joyful and educational for the young user." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuBKOWYzz7UZRTtp4grR4EJFvt29RiSpJ9-kShx5zS7vUxqegP6lP_j32yNmlMUrR3KBqKRCgcQdC2UL0SoHI1xqa0ffOyzE3bumTGy_jobkxsR2uANzQeTf3591_DoQMHO_mih3U9DLzeJS9mDiZdu0vx_zBt2byV0B_uF0co_sUVCGM5uRjxi8dKWNOeR4_RoffhwKn9yA-7IyTU60ZJ43UeHQllVzx7SkcWFNYJC-4T4yVcUY6W6UlhBXqUuYmwIFargjMS7sn84"/>
</div>

</div>
</div>
</section>
<!-- Primary Action -->
<section class="flex flex-col items-center gap-4 py-8">
<button class="chunky-button-primary w-full max-w-sm h-16 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center gap-2" onclick="claimStamp()">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">approval_delegation</span>
<span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md">Claim Stamp</span>
</button>
<p class="text-on-surface-variant font-body-md">¡Recoge tu sello de Capitán!</p>
</section>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation Bar (Active: Awards) -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-gutter py-2 pb-safe bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg rounded-t-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">public</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">World Map</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">palette</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">My Gallery</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">videogame_asset</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">stars</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Awards</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Confetti / Success Modal Layer -->
<div class="hidden fixed inset-0 z-[100] flex items-center justify-center p-6" id="celebration-modal">
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-on-surface/40 backdrop-blur-sm"></div>
<div class="bg-surface relative z-10 w-full max-w-md rounded-lg p-card-padding flex flex-col items-center text-center shadow-2xl scale-0 transition-transform duration-500" id="modal-content">
<div class="absolute -top-16 w-32 h-32 bg-secondary-container rounded-full border-4 border-surface flex items-center justify-center shadow-xl">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-6xl text-on-secondary-container" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">workspace_premium</span>
</div>
<div class="mt-16 space-y-4">
<h2 class="font-headline-lg text-headline-lg text-primary">¡Felicidades!</h2>
<p class="font-body-lg text-on-surface-variant">You've earned the Level 3 Stamp! You are truly a global artist.</p>
<div class="h-40 w-40 bg-surface-container-low rounded-lg mx-auto border-dashed border-2 border-primary-container flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden">
<img class="w-32 h-32 rotate-12" data-alt="A detailed digital 3D stamp design featuring a captain's wheel intertwined with a paintbrush. The stamp has a vibrant red ink texture and says 'WORLD CAPTAIN - LEVEL 3' in bold, friendly lettering. The style is tactile and premium, suitable for a kid's achievement award." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuCgcIIJmrrGW6eYwsv7aUsMiWCuugKQOjdokMEfrmHo5kr5kOc49txVbDSUet1jJO458V05imhhiBuhmxhq8A8TtYsJhN7WY8FBFcx4RvL2lHWdbQvuPkV9Mze2T4gzYUor-xtrQO9G5bZTgcejq178ozt3UAzzNNSHPqTFGTvytIdyfRJsA0tML4YmPhwxyDf72CTfV7jJSW9LZ7ElpNJ--BWvoQ-iGsCfIFj2L6d6cqmwBlupWdG02YZx1hMINFCXGNTesR1-hdc"/>
</div>
<button class="chunky-button-primary w-full h-14 rounded-lg font-label-bold" onclick="closeModal()">
                    Back to Gallery
                </button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<canvas class="confetti-canvas" id="confetti"></canvas>
<script>
        function playAudio() {
            // Mock audio playback feedback
            const btn = document.querySelector('button[onclick="playAudio()"]');
            btn.classList.add('scale-125');
            setTimeout(() => btn.classList.remove('scale-125'), 200);
            
            // Console log the bilingual message for simulation
            console.log("Audio: ¡Felicidades! Has completado el nivel tres. Eres un verdadero Capitán del Mundo. Congratulations! You've completed level three. You are a true World Captain.");
        }

        function claimStamp() {
            const modal = document.getElementById('celebration-modal');
            const content = document.getElementById('modal-content');
            modal.classList.remove('hidden');
            setTimeout(() => {
                content.classList.remove('scale-0');
                content.classList.add('scale-100');
                startConfetti();
            }, 10);
        }

        function closeModal() {
            const modal = document.getElementById('celebration-modal');
            const content = document.getElementById('modal-content');
            content.classList.remove('scale-100');
            content.classList.add('scale-0');
            setTimeout(() => {
                modal.classList.add('hidden');
            }, 500);
        }

        // Simple Confetti Animation
        function startConfetti() {
            const canvas = document.getElementById('confetti');
            const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
            canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
            canvas.height = window.innerHeight;

            let particles = [];
            const colors = ['#006495', '#fccc00', '#2bb1ff', '#59be1b', '#ba1a1a'];

            for (let i = 0; i < 150; i++) {
                particles.push({
                    x: Math.random() * canvas.width,
                    y: Math.random() * canvas.height - canvas.height,
                    size: Math.random() * 8 + 4,
                    color: colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)],
                    speed: Math.random() * 3 + 2,
                    angle: Math.random() * 6.28
                });
            }

            function update() {
                ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
                particles.forEach(p => {
                    p.y += p.speed;
                    p.x += Math.sin(p.angle) * 2;
                    p.angle += 0.05;

                    ctx.fillStyle = p.color;
                    ctx.beginPath();
                    ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, p.size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                    ctx.fill();

                    if (p.y > canvas.height) p.y = -10;
                });
                requestAnimationFrame(update);
            }
            update();
            setTimeout(() => { particles = []; ctx.clearRect(0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height); }, 4000);
        }
    </script>
</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Marruecos) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="en"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport">
