<title>Paint Adventure - Morocco</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@400;500;600;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "card-padding": "20px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        body { font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; }
        
        .chunky-button-primary {
            @apply relative transition-all duration-100 active:translate-y-1;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        .chunky-button-primary:active { box-shadow: 0 0px 0 0 #004b71; }

        .chunky-button-secondary {
            @apply relative transition-all duration-100 active:translate-y-1;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #bec8d3;
        }
        .chunky-button-secondary:active { box-shadow: 0 0px 0 0 #bec8d3; }

        .chunky-button-yellow {
            @apply relative transition-all duration-100 active:translate-y-1;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #6d5700;
        }
        .chunky-button-yellow:active { box-shadow: 0 0px 0 0 #6d5700; }

        .flag-canvas {
            cursor: url('https://fonts.gstatic.com/s/i/materialsymbolsoutlined/brush/v1/24px.svg'), auto;
        }

        @keyframes pulse-slow {
            0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
        }
        .pulse-audio { animation: pulse-slow 2s infinite ease-in-out; }

        .scribble-texture {
            background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='100' height='100' viewBox='0 0 100 100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cpath d='M10 10 Q 20 5 30 15 T 50 10' fill='none' stroke='%230002' stroke-width='1'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background min-h-screen pb-24">
<!-- TopAppBar -->
<header class="flex justify-between items-center px-container-margin h-touch-target-min w-full z-50 bg-surface dark:bg-surface sticky top-0">
<div class="flex items-center gap-4">
<button class="active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 p-2 rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary font-headline-md">arrow_back</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md font-bold text-primary dark:text-primary-fixed-dim">Paint Adventure</h1>
</div>
<button class="active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 p-2 rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary font-headline-md">volume_up</span>
</button>
</header>
<main class="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-container-margin py-8">
<!-- Morocco Flag Hero Area -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-gutter">
<!-- Left Panel: Learning & Audio -->
<div class="md:col-span-4 flex flex-col gap-gutter">
<div class="bg-surface-container-lowest p-card-padding rounded-lg shadow-lg border-b-8 border-surface-container-highest">
<h2 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-primary mb-2">Marruecos</h2>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-surface-variant mb-6">Morocco</p>
<button class="chunky-button-yellow bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container w-full py-4 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center gap-3 mb-4 pulse-audio" onclick="playAudio('Marruecos / Morocco')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Listen Name</span>
</button><button class="chunky-button-yellow bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container w-full py-4 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center gap-3 mb-4" onclick="playAudio('¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm')"><span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">notifications_active</span><span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm</span></button>
</div>
<div class="bg-surface-container-lowest p-card-padding rounded-lg shadow-lg border-b-8 border-surface-container-highest">
<p class="font-body-md text-body-md text-on-surface italic mb-4 leading-relaxed">
                        "Marruecos tiene desiertos y camellos muy simpáticos."
                    </p>
<div class="w-full h-32 rounded-lg bg-cover bg-center" data-alt="A friendly, cartoon-style illustration of a smiling camel wearing a colorful saddle, standing against a backdrop of golden Saharan sand dunes under a bright blue sky. The visual style is premium educational with soft gradients and clean, chunky outlines, matching a child-friendly interface. Warm golden lighting highlights the sandy textures." style="background-image: url('https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuB7sVfecVorhO2HUXftOf71_h4kTxtokJB2FyYm_o5F40eZch6OUHe_FuU6z64S3K1V3S45tOUF8EfpxoJEFHeF6QNYsGpZJ_TZxJr2ERtxc-ddL1U_xngAOMbxIFwrjXi2LOqD0BNf_km5OF823UQ7r7t5M6S6wWLrRtevQZthaEEkWG4mnUIA1BVcsIfgIkGnN6qfZze4_IydHmVnrY8fhkXUhzqHFGXYJJdJxkkeT1eJWIGrSwp9P5fcbV_NMhcm8TckT4SvROk')"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Right Panel: Painting Canvas -->
<div class="md:col-span-8">
<div class="bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-lg shadow-lg p-card-padding border-b-8 border-surface-container-highest relative overflow-hidden">
<div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
<h3 class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-outline">Paint the Flag!</h3>
<div class="flex gap-2">
<button class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-surface-container border-2 border-outline-variant flex items-center justify-center">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-outline">undo</span>
</button>
<button class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-surface-container border-2 border-outline-variant flex items-center justify-center">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-outline">delete</span>
</button>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Flag Interactive Area -->
<div class="flag-canvas aspect-[3/2] bg-white border-2 border-outline-variant rounded-lg relative flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden" id="paint-canvas">
<!-- Flag Background (Base) -->
<div class="absolute inset-0 transition-colors duration-500 bg-surface-variant scribble-texture" id="flag-bg"></div>
<!-- Moroccan Star (Masked) -->
<svg class="w-1/2 z-10 transition-all duration-500 text-surface-container" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="4" viewBox="0 0 100 100">
<path d="M50 5 L63 40 H95 L68 60 L78 95 L50 75 L22 95 L32 60 L5 40 H37 Z" id="flag-star"></path>
</svg>
<!-- Success Overlay (Hidden) -->
<div class="absolute inset-0 z-20 bg-secondary-container/90 hidden flex-col items-center justify-center text-center p-6 animate-fade-in" id="success-overlay">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-6xl text-on-secondary-container mb-4" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">stars</span>
<h4 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-on-secondary-container">¡Excelente!</h4>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-secondary-container">You painted Morocco!</p>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Color Palette -->
<div class="flex justify-center gap-container-margin mt-8">
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
<button class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-[#C1272D] border-4 border-white shadow-lg active:scale-95 transition-transform" onclick="selectColor('red')"></button>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-outline">Rojo</span>
<button class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-secondary-container flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm" onclick="playAudio('Rojo')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-sm">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
<button class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-[#006233] border-4 border-white shadow-lg active:scale-95 transition-transform" onclick="selectColor('green')"></button>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-outline">Verde</span>
<button class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-secondary-container flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm" onclick="playAudio('Verde')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-sm">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Progress Indicator -->
<div class="mt-12 max-w-md mx-auto">
<div class="flex justify-between items-end mb-2">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-primary">Map Progress</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-primary">12/50</span>
</div>
<div class="h-4 w-full bg-surface-container rounded-full overflow-hidden">
<div class="h-full bg-tertiary-container w-[24%] rounded-full transition-all duration-1000"></div>
</div>
</div>
</main>
<!-- BottomNavBar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-gutter py-2 pb-safe bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg rounded-t-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-variant rounded-lg transition-all" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">public</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">World Map</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-variant rounded-lg transition-all" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">palette</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">My Gallery</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">videogame_asset</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-variant rounded-lg transition-all" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">stars</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Awards</span>
</a>
</nav>
<script>
        let selectedColor = null;
        let paintedBg = false;
        let paintedStar = false;

        function selectColor(color) {
            selectedColor = color;
            // Visual feedback on selected color
            document.querySelectorAll('.flex-col.items-center button').forEach(btn => {
                btn.style.transform = 'scale(1)';
                btn.style.boxShadow = '0 10px 15px -3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1)';
            });
            event.target.style.transform = 'scale(1.2)';
            event.target.style.boxShadow = '0 0 0 4px #006495';
        }

        const canvas = document.getElementById('paint-canvas');
        const flagBg = document.getElementById('flag-bg');
        const flagStar = document.getElementById('flag-star').parentElement;
        const success = document.getElementById('success-overlay');

        canvas.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            if (!selectedColor) return;

            // Simple hit detection for background vs star
            const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
            const x = e.clientX - rect.left;
            const y = e.clientY - rect.top;
            
            // Check if clicking near the center (the star)
            const centerX = rect.width / 2;
            const centerY = rect.height / 2;
            const distance = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(x - centerX, 2) + Math.pow(y - centerY, 2));

            if (distance < rect.width * 0.15) {
                // Clicked on star
                if (selectedColor === 'green') {
                    flagStar.classList.remove('text-surface-container');
                    flagStar.classList.add('text-[#006233]');
                    paintedStar = true;
                    playAudio('Verde');
                }
            } else {
                // Clicked on background
                if (selectedColor === 'red') {
                    flagBg.style.backgroundColor = '#C1272D';
                    flagBg.classList.remove('scribble-texture');
                    paintedBg = true;
                    playAudio('Rojo');
                }
            }

            checkWin();
        });

        function checkWin() {
            if (paintedBg && paintedStar) {
                setTimeout(() => {
                    success.classList.remove('hidden');
                    success.classList.add('flex');
                    playAudio('Victory');
                }, 500);
            }
        }

        function playAudio(text) {
            console.log("Playing audio for: " + text);
            // In a real app, this would trigger a SpeechSynthesis or play a sound file
            if ('speechSynthesis' in window) {
                const utterance = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text);
                utterance.lang = text.includes('/') ? 'en-US' : 'es-ES';
                window.speechSynthesis.speak(utterance);
            }
        }
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Filipinas) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="en"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport">
<title>Paint Adventure - Philippines</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "card-padding": "20px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        .tactile-shadow-blue { box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #004b71; }
        .tactile-shadow-blue:active { transform: translateY(4px); box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #004b71; }
        
        .tactile-shadow-white { box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #bec8d3; }
        .tactile-shadow-white:active { transform: translateY(4px); box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #bec8d3; }

        .tactile-shadow-yellow { box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #9e8300; }
        .tactile-shadow-yellow:active { transform: translateY(4px); box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #9e8300; }

        .flag-zone { transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275); }
        .flag-zone.active { transform: scale(1.02); }

        .floating-islands { animation: float 6s ease-in-out infinite; }
        @keyframes float {
            0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0px); }
            50% { transform: translateY(-15px); }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background min-h-screen flex flex-col font-body-md overflow-x-hidden">
<!-- TopAppBar -->
<header class="bg-surface dark:bg-surface flex justify-between items-center px-container-margin h-touch-target-min w-full z-50 fixed top-0 docked full-width">
<button class="text-primary dark:text-primary-fixed-dim active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 flex items-center justify-center h-touch-target-min w-touch-target-min">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[32px]">arrow_back</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md font-bold text-primary dark:text-primary-fixed-dim">Paint Adventure</h1>
<button class="text-primary dark:text-primary-fixed-dim active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 flex items-center justify-center h-touch-target-min w-touch-target-min" onclick="playAudio('title')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[32px]">volume_up</span>
</button>
</header>
<main class="flex-grow pt-20 pb-32 px-container-margin flex flex-col items-center max-w-4xl mx-auto w-full">
<!-- Header & Audio Station -->
<div class="w-full text-center mb-8">
<div class="inline-flex items-center gap-4 bg-surface-container-low p-4 rounded-lg mb-4">
<button class="w-16 h-16 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center tactile-shadow-yellow transition-transform active:translate-y-1" onclick="playAudio('philippines')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-4xl">volume_up</span>
</button>
<div class="text-left">
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile md:font-headline-lg md:text-headline-lg text-primary">Filipinas</h2>
<p class="font-body-lg text-on-surface-variant">Philippines</p>
</div>
</div>
<div class="mt-4 flex justify-center"><button class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container px-6 py-3 rounded-full tactile-shadow-yellow transition-transform active:translate-y-1 group" onclick="playAudio('alarm')"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">notifications_active</span><div class="text-left flex flex-col"><span class="font-label-bold text-sm leading-none">¡Alarma!</span><span class="text-[10px] opacity-80 leading-none">Sound Alarm</span></div></button></div></div>
<!-- Painting Canvas Area -->
<div class="w-full relative aspect-[3/2] bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-lg border-4 border-surface-variant shadow-lg overflow-hidden flag-zone" id="paintingCanvas">
<!-- Background Image (Educational/Contextual) -->
<div class="absolute inset-0 opacity-10 pointer-events-none" data-alt="A whimsical, child-friendly illustration of a tropical landscape with palm trees and a bright smiling sun over crystal clear ocean waters. The style is playful and educational, using soft pastel colors like baby blue and lime green. The lighting is sunny and cheerful, perfectly matching a primary school learning app aesthetic." style="background-image: url('https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuC1dj2hlZRWAQa4-P8jmWJ5xC9kD5BqWYnzJ5sobPDzPwHL1ZKsRfw7ScNpvAjn7xoEjt1Hrz4BZLRKa9W7HV7aZE86zgQabvUux80DYrZVFF6az6f9zHihTuH3yg74kF291y_nIkdpzVI-YR4Z61jO6rEXFm-hmzz_aTIfXa8DyN09-B7XxTNTrIFT2OvZV_43HHIZGEaER3_uUeVKc7tduALV8kXnhNxmwQYWrWvc2zPJBeprJmfSX1WiW0icYXSjojJn1QPSLsc')"></div>
<!-- Flag Outline Structure (Scalable) -->
<svg class="w-full h-full cursor-pointer" viewBox="0 0 900 600">
<!-- Blue Top Stripe -->
<rect fill="#e4e8ef" height="300" id="stripe-blue" onclick="applyColor('stripe-blue', '#0038a8')" stroke="#bec8d3" stroke-width="2" width="900" x="0" y="0"></rect>
<!-- Red Bottom Stripe -->
<rect fill="#e4e8ef" height="300" id="stripe-red" onclick="applyColor('stripe-red', '#ce1126')" stroke="#bec8d3" stroke-width="2" width="900" x="0" y="300"></rect>
<!-- White Triangle -->
<polygon fill="#f7f9ff" id="triangle-white" onclick="applyColor('triangle-white', '#ffffff')" points="0,0 450,300 0,600" stroke="#bec8d3" stroke-width="2"></polygon>
<!-- Sun and Stars Group -->
<g id="stars-sun" onclick="applyColor('stars-sun', '#fccc00')">
<!-- Sun -->
<circle cx="150" cy="300" fill="#dee3e9" r="60" stroke="#bec8d3" stroke-width="1"></circle>
<!-- Simple Rays (Simplified for kids) -->
<g stroke="#bec8d3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-width="8">
<line x1="150" x2="150" y1="210" y2="180"></line>
<line x1="150" x2="150" y1="390" y2="420"></line>
<line x1="60" x2="30" y1="300" y2="300"></line>
<line x1="240" x2="270" y1="300" y2="300"></line>
</g>
<!-- Three Stars -->
<polygon fill="#dee3e9" points="50,100 60,130 90,130 65,150 75,180 50,160 25,180 35,150 10,130 40,130" stroke="#bec8d3"></polygon>
<polygon fill="#dee3e9" points="50,500 60,530 90,530 65,550 75,580 50,560 25,580 35,550 10,530 40,530" stroke="#bec8d3"></polygon>
<polygon fill="#dee3e9" points="380,300 390,330 420,330 395,350 405,380 380,360 355,380 365,350 340,330 370,330" stroke="#bec8d3"></polygon>
</g>
</svg>
</div>
<!-- Color Palette & Tools -->
<div class="w-full mt-8 grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
<!-- Azul -->
<button class="flex flex-col items-center gap-2 group" onclick="selectColor('#0038a8', 'Azul')">
<div class="w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-[#0038a8] border-4 border-white tactile-shadow-white group-active:translate-y-1"></div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-1">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Azul</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-sm">volume_up</span>
</div>
</button>
<!-- Rojo -->
<button class="flex flex-col items-center gap-2 group" onclick="selectColor('#ce1126', 'Rojo')">
<div class="w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-[#ce1126] border-4 border-white tactile-shadow-white group-active:translate-y-1"></div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-1">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Rojo</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-sm">volume_up</span>
</div>
</button>
<!-- Amarillo -->
<button class="flex flex-col items-center gap-2 group" onclick="selectColor('#fccc00', 'Amarillo')">
<div class="w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-[#fccc00] border-4 border-white tactile-shadow-white group-active:translate-y-1"></div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-1">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Amarillo</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-sm">volume_up</span>
</div>
</button>
<!-- Blanco -->
<button class="flex flex-col items-center gap-2 group" onclick="selectColor('#ffffff', 'Blanco')">
<div class="w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-white border-4 border-surface-variant tactile-shadow-white group-active:translate-y-1"></div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-1">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Blanco</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-sm">volume_up</span>
</div>
</button>
</div>
<!-- Fun Fact Bento Box -->
<div class="w-full mt-12 p-card-padding bg-tertiary-container text-on-tertiary-container rounded-lg flex items-center gap-6 shadow-md relative overflow-hidden">
<div class="flex-shrink-0 floating-islands">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-6xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">landscape</span>
</div>
<div>
<h3 class="font-label-bold text-label-bold uppercase tracking-wider opacity-80 mb-1">¿Sabías que?</h3>
<p class="font-headline-md text-headline-md leading-tight">¡Filipinas tiene más de 7,000 islas!</p>
</div>
<!-- Decorative Elements -->
<div class="absolute -right-4 -bottom-4 opacity-20 transform rotate-12">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-9xl">sailing</span>
</div>
</div>
</main>
<!-- BottomNavBar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-gutter py-2 pb-safe bg-surface-container-lowest dark:bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg rounded-t-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-variant transition-all" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">public</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-[10px]">World Map</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 transition-all" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">palette</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-[10px]">My Gallery</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-variant transition-all" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">videogame_asset</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-[10px]">Play</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-variant transition-all" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">stars</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-[10px]">Awards</span>
</a>
</nav>
<script>
        let currentColor = null;
        let currentLabel = "";

        function selectColor(color, label) {
            currentColor = color;
            currentLabel = label;
            
            // Visual feedback for selected color
            document.querySelectorAll('.group div').forEach(el => {
                el.classList.remove('ring-4', 'ring-primary', 'scale-110');
            });
            event.currentTarget.querySelector('div').classList.add('ring-4', 'ring-primary', 'scale-110');
            
            playAudio(label.toLowerCase());
        }

        function applyColor(elementId, correctColor) {
            if (!currentColor) {
                alert("Primero elige un color de abajo!");
                return;
            }

            const element = document.getElementById(elementId);
            
            // In a real app, we'd check if the user picked the "correct" color for that section
            // but for a "Paint Station" for kids, we let them paint but maybe reward correctness.
            element.setAttribute('fill', currentColor);
            element.setAttribute('stroke', 'none');
            
            // Pop effect
            const canvas = document.getElementById('paintingCanvas');
            canvas.classList.add('active');
            setTimeout(() => canvas.classList.remove('active'), 200);
        }

        function playAudio(term) {
            // Simulated Bilingual Audio Engine
            const voices = {
                'philippines': 'Filipinas... Philippines!',
                'azul': 'Azul... Blue!',
                'rojo': 'Rojo... Red!',
                'amarillo': 'Amarillo... Yellow!',
                'blanco': 'Blanco... White!',
                'title': 'Paint Adventure: The Philippines'
            };
            
            if (window.speechSynthesis) {
                const utterance = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(voices[term] || term);
                utterance.lang = term === 'philippines' ? 'es-ES' : 'es-ES'; // Can alternate
                window.speechSynthesis.speak(utterance);
            }
            console.log("Playing audio for: " + term);
        }
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Bélgica) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport">
<title>Paint Adventure - Bélgica</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@400;500;600;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "card-padding": "20px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          }
        }
      }
    </script>
<style>
        body { font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; }
        
        .tactile-button-primary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #004b71;
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
        }
        .tactile-button-primary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        
        .tactile-button-secondary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #bec8d3;
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
        }
        .tactile-button-secondary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #bec8d3;
        }

        .audio-pulse {
            animation: pulse-ring 2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1) infinite;
        }
        @keyframes pulse-ring {
            0% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(252, 204, 0, 0.7); }
            70% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 15px rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
            100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
        }

        .flag-canvas {
            border: 4px solid #eaeef5;
            box-shadow: inset 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
        }

        .confetti-piece {
            position: absolute;
            width: 10px;
            height: 10px;
            background-color: #ffd300;
            top: -10px;
            opacity: 0;
        }
    </style>
<style>
            @keyframes confetti-fall {
                0% { transform: translateY(-10vh) rotate(0deg); opacity: 1; }
                100% { transform: translateY(110vh) rotate(720deg); opacity: 0; }
            }
        </style></head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-surface min-h-screen pb-32">
<!-- Top Navigation Bar -->
<header class="bg-surface sticky top-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-between items-center px-container-margin h-touch-target-min transition-all duration-100">
<div class="flex items-center gap-4">
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container active:translate-y-1 transition-all">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0;">arrow_back</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md font-bold text-primary">Paint Adventure</h1>
</div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-2"><button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container hover:bg-secondary-container/80 active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-md" title="¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">notifications_active</span>
</button>
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container active:translate-y-1 transition-all">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</header>
<main class="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-container-margin pt-6">
<!-- Header Info Area -->
<section class="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-end justify-between gap-6 mb-8">
<div class="space-y-2">
<div class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-1 bg-secondary-container rounded-full mb-2">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-sm">location_on</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-secondary-container">Europa</span>
</div>
<h2 class="font-headline-lg text-headline-lg-mobile md:text-headline-lg text-on-surface">Bélgica / Belgium</h2>
<p class="font-body-md text-on-surface-variant max-w-md">¡Vamos a pintar la bandera belga! Usa los colores correctos para ganar una estrella.</p>
</div>
<!-- Audio Trigger -->
<button class="w-20 h-20 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center audio-pulse tactile-button-secondary border-4 border-white" onclick="playAudio('belgica')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-4xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</button>
</section>
<!-- Main Paint Station Bento Grid -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6">
<!-- Color Palette Side -->
<div class="md:col-span-3 flex md:flex-col gap-4">
<button class="flex-1 md:flex-none aspect-square rounded-lg tactile-button-secondary bg-[#171c21] border-4 border-white flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2 group" onclick="selectColor('#171c21', 'Negro')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white opacity-0 group-[.active]:opacity-100 transition-opacity">check_circle</span>
<span class="hidden md:block font-label-bold text-white uppercase tracking-wider">Negro</span>
</button>
<button class="flex-1 md:flex-none aspect-square rounded-lg tactile-button-secondary bg-[#fccc00] border-4 border-white flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2 group" onclick="selectColor('#fccc00', 'Amarillo')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container opacity-0 group-[.active]:opacity-100 transition-opacity">check_circle</span>
<span class="hidden md:block font-label-bold text-on-secondary-container uppercase tracking-wider">Amarillo</span>
</button>
<button class="flex-1 md:flex-none aspect-square rounded-lg tactile-button-secondary bg-[#ba1a1a] border-4 border-white flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2 group" onclick="selectColor('#ba1a1a', 'Rojo')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white opacity-0 group-[.active]:opacity-100 transition-opacity">check_circle</span>
<span class="hidden md:block font-label-bold text-white uppercase tracking-wider">Rojo</span>
</button>
</div>
<!-- Flag Painting Area -->
<div class="md:col-span-9 bg-surface-container-low rounded-lg p-card-padding flex flex-col items-center justify-center flag-canvas">
<div class="w-full aspect-[3/2] grid grid-cols-3 bg-white rounded-lg overflow-hidden border-8 border-white shadow-xl max-w-lg cursor-crosshair" id="flag-grid">
<div class="bg-surface-variant transition-colors duration-300 border-r border-background flex items-center justify-center group" id="stripe-0" onclick="paintStripe(0)">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-outline group-hover:scale-125 transition-transform">format_paint</span>
</div>
<div class="bg-surface-variant transition-colors duration-300 border-r border-background flex items-center justify-center group" id="stripe-1" onclick="paintStripe(1)">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-outline group-hover:scale-125 transition-transform">format_paint</span>
</div>
<div class="bg-surface-variant transition-colors duration-300 flex items-center justify-center group" id="stripe-2" onclick="paintStripe(2)">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-outline group-hover:scale-125 transition-transform">format_paint</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="mt-8 flex gap-4 w-full">
<button class="flex-1 font-label-bold text-primary tactile-button-secondary bg-surface-container-lowest h-touch-target-min rounded-lg border-2 border-outline-variant" onclick="resetFlag()">
                        Limpiar
                    </button>
<button class="flex-[2] font-label-bold text-white tactile-button-primary bg-primary h-touch-target-min rounded-lg" id="check-btn" onclick="checkFlag()">
                        ¡Listo!
                    </button>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Fun Fact Card -->
<div class="md:col-span-12 bg-tertiary-container text-on-tertiary-container rounded-lg p-card-padding flex items-center gap-6 shadow-md relative overflow-hidden">
<div class="absolute -right-4 -bottom-4 opacity-20 transform rotate-12">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[120px]">restaurant</span>
</div>
<div class="z-10 bg-white rounded-full p-4 shrink-0 shadow-inner">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-4xl text-tertiary">lightbulb</span>
</div>
<div class="z-10">
<h4 class="font-label-bold uppercase text-xs opacity-80 mb-1">Dato Divertido</h4>
<p class="font-headline-md text-body-lg">"En Bélgica se inventaron las papas fritas."</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation Bar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-gutter py-2 pb-safe bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg rounded-t-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 rounded-lg" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0;">public</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">World Map</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 rounded-lg" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0;">palette</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">My Gallery</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">videogame_asset</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 rounded-lg" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0;">stars</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Awards</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Success Modal -->
<div class="fixed inset-0 z-[100] hidden flex items-center justify-center p-6 bg-primary/40 backdrop-blur-sm" id="success-modal">
<div class="bg-surface-container-lowest w-full max-w-sm rounded-lg p-8 text-center shadow-2xl scale-0 transition-transform duration-300" id="modal-content">
<div class="w-32 h-32 bg-secondary-container rounded-full mx-auto mb-6 flex items-center justify-center border-8 border-white shadow-lg animate-bounce">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-6xl text-on-secondary-container" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
</div>
<h2 class="font-headline-lg text-on-surface mb-2">¡Excelente!</h2>
<p class="font-body-md text-on-surface-variant mb-8">Has pintado la bandera de Bélgica perfectamente.</p>
<button class="w-full font-label-bold text-white tactile-button-primary bg-primary h-touch-target-min rounded-lg" onclick="closeModal()">
                ¡Siguiente Aventura!
            </button>
</div>
</div>
<script>
        let currentColor = null;
        let currentLabel = '';
        let paintedColors = [null, null, null];
        const correctFlag = ['#171c21', '#fccc00', '#ba1a1a']; // Black, Yellow, Red

        function selectColor(color, label) {
            currentColor = color;
            currentLabel = label;
            
            // Remove active classes from all color buttons
            document.querySelectorAll('.aspect-square').forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove('active'));
            // Add to target
            event.currentTarget.classList.add('active');
            
            playAudio(label.toLowerCase());
        }

        function paintStripe(index) {
            if (!currentColor) {
                alert("¡Primero elige un color!");
                return;
            }
            
            const stripe = document.getElementById(`stripe-${index}`);
            stripe.style.backgroundColor = currentColor;
            stripe.innerHTML = ''; // Remove icon
            paintedColors[index] = currentColor;
        }

        function resetFlag() {
            paintedColors = [null, null, null];
            for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
                const stripe = document.getElementById(`stripe-${i}`);
                stripe.style.backgroundColor = '';
                stripe.classList.add('bg-surface-variant');
                stripe.innerHTML = '<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-outline group-hover:scale-125 transition-transform">format_paint</span>';
            }
        }

        function checkFlag() {
            const isCorrect = paintedColors.every((color, index) => color === correctFlag[index]);
            
            if (isCorrect) {
                showSuccess();
            } else {
                alert("¡Oh oh! La bandera de Bélgica tiene Negro, Amarillo y Rojo en ese orden. ¡Inténtalo de nuevo!");
                resetFlag();
            }
        }

        function showSuccess() {
            const modal = document.getElementById('success-modal');
            const content = document.getElementById('modal-content');
            modal.classList.remove('hidden');
            setTimeout(() => {
                content.classList.remove('scale-0');
                content.classList.add('scale-100');
            }, 10);
            createConfetti();
        }

        function closeModal() {
            const modal = document.getElementById('success-modal');
            modal.classList.add('hidden');
        }

        function createConfetti() {
            for(let i=0; i<50; i++) {
                const confetti = document.createElement('div');
                confetti.className = 'confetti-piece';
                confetti.style.left = Math.random() * 100 + 'vw';
                confetti.style.backgroundColor = ['#fccc00', '#006495', '#ba1a1a', '#77de3d'][Math.floor(Math.random() * 4)];
                confetti.style.animation = `confetti-fall ${Math.random() * 3 + 2}s linear forwards`;
                confetti.style.zIndex = '101';
                document.body.appendChild(confetti);
            }
        }

        // Mock audio function
        function playAudio(term) {
            console.log("Playing audio for: " + term);
            // In a real app, this would trigger a SpeechSynthesis or play a sound file
            const utterance = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(term);
            utterance.lang = term === 'belgica' ? 'es-ES' : 'es-ES';
            window.speechSynthesis.speak(utterance);
        }

        // Add CSS for confetti
        const style = document.createElement('style');
        style.innerHTML = `
            @keyframes confetti-fall {
                0% { transform: translateY(-10vh) rotate(0deg); opacity: 1; }
                100% { transform: translateY(110vh) rotate(720deg); opacity: 0; }
            }
        `;
        document.head.appendChild(style);
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Arabia Saudita) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport">
<title>Paint Adventure - Saudi Arabia</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@400;500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "card-padding": "20px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        body { font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; background-color: #f7f9ff; }
        .material-symbols-outlined { font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48; }
        
        /* Tactile Button Styles */
        .btn-tactile-primary {
            @apply bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container font-label-bold text-label-bold px-6 py-3 rounded-lg transition-all duration-100;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0px 0px #004b71;
        }
        .btn-tactile-primary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0px 0px #004b71;
        }

        .btn-tactile-secondary {
            @apply bg-surface-container-lowest text-primary font-label-bold text-label-bold px-6 py-3 rounded-lg transition-all duration-100 border-2 border-primary-container;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0px 0px #bec8d3;
        }
        .btn-tactile-secondary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0px 0px #bec8d3;
        }

        .audio-pulse {
            animation: pulse-ring 2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1) infinite;
        }
        @keyframes pulse-ring {
            0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
            50% { transform: scale(1.1); opacity: 0.8; }
        }

        .flag-canvas {
            aspect-ratio: 3 / 2;
            background: #ffffff;
            border: 8px solid #dee3e9;
            box-shadow: inset 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
        }

        .brush-active {
            transform: scale(1.1) translateY(-8px);
            filter: drop-shadow(0 10px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1));
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-surface text-on-surface min-h-screen pb-24">
<!-- Top Navigation (Shared Component Integration) -->
<header class="bg-surface-container-low flex justify-between items-center px-container-margin h-touch-target-min w-full z-50 fixed top-0 left-0">
<div class="flex items-center gap-4">
<button class="active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-headline-md">arrow_back</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md font-bold text-primary">Paint Adventure</h1>
</div>
<button class="active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-secondary-container hover:bg-secondary-fixed text-on-secondary-container" title="¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm">
  <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-headline-md">notifications_active</span>
</button><button class="active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-headline-md">volume_up</span>
</button>
</header>
<main class="pt-20 px-container-margin max-w-4xl mx-auto">
<!-- Header & Audio Station -->
<section class="flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center justify-between gap-6 mb-8">
<div class="text-center md:text-left">
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile md:font-headline-lg text-headline-lg-mobile md:text-headline-lg text-on-surface mb-2">Saudi Arabia</h2>
<div class="flex items-center gap-3 justify-center md:justify-start">
<span class="px-4 py-1 bg-tertiary-container text-on-tertiary-container rounded-full font-label-bold text-label-bold">Kingdom</span>
<button class="audio-pulse w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg active:translate-y-1 transition-all" onclick="playAudio('saudi')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</div>
<div class="bg-primary-container/10 p-4 rounded-lg border-l-4 border-primary-container">
<p class="font-body-md text-body-md italic text-on-surface-variant max-w-xs">
                    "En Arabia Saudita hay dunas de arena gigantes."
                </p>
</div>
</section>
<!-- Main Paint Canvas Area -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8">
<!-- Left: Brush Tools (Bento Style) -->
<div class="lg:col-span-3 flex lg:flex-col gap-4 overflow-x-auto pb-4 lg:pb-0 scrollbar-hide">
<button class="brush-active flex-shrink-0 flex flex-col items-center gap-2 p-4 bg-surface-container-highest rounded-lg transition-all border-b-8 border-green-800" id="brush-green" onclick="selectColor('green')">
<div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-[#006C35] border-4 border-white shadow-inner"></div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Verde</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary">volume_up</span>
</button>
<button class="flex-shrink-0 flex flex-col items-center gap-2 p-4 bg-surface-container-highest rounded-lg transition-all border-b-8 border-gray-300" id="brush-white" onclick="selectColor('white')">
<div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-white border-4 border-surface-variant shadow-inner"></div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Blanco</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary">volume_up</span>
</button>
<div class="hidden lg:flex flex-col items-center gap-2 p-4 bg-secondary-fixed rounded-lg border-b-8 border-secondary-fixed-dim">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-4xl text-on-secondary-fixed">auto_fix_high</span>
<p class="text-center font-label-bold text-[12px] text-on-secondary-fixed">Magic Fill</p>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Center: The Flag Canvas -->
<div class="lg:col-span-9">
<div class="flag-canvas rounded-lg overflow-hidden relative cursor-crosshair group">
<!-- Base Template (Kids usually color inside the lines) -->
<svg class="w-full h-full" id="flag-svg" viewBox="0 0 300 200">
<rect class="transition-colors duration-500" fill="#f0f4fb" height="200" id="flag-bg" width="300"></rect>
<!-- Outline of script and sword for kids to follow -->
<g class="opacity-100 transition-all duration-300" fill="none" id="flag-elements" stroke="#bec8d3" stroke-width="2">
<!-- Simplified Saudi Script Outline -->
<path d="M100,80 C120,70 180,70 200,80 M100,100 C120,90 180,90 200,100"></path>
<!-- Simplified Sword Outline -->
<path d="M90,130 L210,130 M210,130 L205,125 M210,130 L205,135 M90,130 L95,135 M90,130 L95,125"></path>
</g>
</svg>
<!-- Decorative Overlay for feedback -->
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-white/0 pointer-events-none flex items-center justify-center transition-all duration-500" id="success-overlay">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-secondary-container text-9xl scale-0 transition-transform duration-500" id="star-icon">stars</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="mt-6 flex justify-between items-center">
<button class="btn-tactile-secondary flex items-center gap-2">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">restart_alt</span>
                        Start Over
                    </button>
<button class="btn-tactile-primary flex items-center gap-2" onclick="completeFlag()">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">check_circle</span>
                        Finish Painting
                    </button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Educational Bento Section -->
<section class="mt-16 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
<div class="bg-surface-container-high p-card-padding rounded-lg flex flex-col gap-4">
<div class="w-full h-40 rounded-lg overflow-hidden shadow-md">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A cinematic, vibrant photo of massive, undulating golden sand dunes in the Arabian desert under a bright, high-contrast blue sky. The lighting is warm and golden hour, highlighting the textures of the sand ripples. Minimalist and clean composition that feels like a travel adventure." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuDAS2d5-38rE5Nlo9K7q4wSzP8lE8TUESjeezB7wZk5WxlGowf6sxbqD2LgZ4CoVndjfgEqfcCwTNLuJrIU63qquaGZ86RRVWiSJJupi8Jm33IhZFr9xLSl8B8FmIXdjIDbloWoa5aqDBQ75bbimkpD2_i-Ta14PM0OeDhpjxlpV79QVcMIW7wD5UGF6yp-XiCmTuctP4FVLb1yUiEp2Q5BO0akffBuhs6CFm-rqzInBmZAANbkPiZgI1spqPdryqBjy7yj3xq-OaY">
</div>
<h3 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-primary">Huge Sand Dunes</h3>
<p class="font-body-md text-body-md text-on-surface-variant">The "Rub' al Khali" is the largest sand desert in the world!</p>
</div>
<div class="bg-secondary-container/20 p-card-padding rounded-lg flex flex-col justify-center items-center text-center gap-4">
<div class="w-24 h-24 rounded-full bg-white flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-6xl text-secondary">explore</span>
</div>
<h3 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-secondary">Geography Quiz</h3>
<p class="font-body-md text-body-md text-on-surface-variant">Can you find the Red Sea on the map?</p>
<button class="btn-tactile-secondary w-full">Let's Go!</button>
</div>
<div class="bg-surface-container-highest p-card-padding rounded-lg relative overflow-hidden">
<div class="absolute -right-10 -bottom-10 opacity-10">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[160px]">palette</span>
</div>
<h3 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-primary mb-2">Color Meaning</h3>
<ul class="space-y-4">
<li class="flex items-center gap-3">
<div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-[#006C35]"></div>
<span class="font-body-md text-body-md">Green: Growth &amp; Peace</span>
</li>
<li class="flex items-center gap-3">
<div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-white border border-outline-variant"></div>
<span class="font-body-md text-body-md">White: Purity &amp; Truth</span>
</li>
</ul>
</div>
</section>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation Shell (Shared Component Integration) -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-gutter py-2 pb-safe bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg rounded-t-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-variant transition-all" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">public</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">World Map</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-variant transition-all" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">palette</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">My Gallery</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">videogame_asset</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-variant transition-all" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">stars</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Awards</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Floating Action Button (Only on Home/Relevant Hubs - Suppressed here for focus as per guidelines) -->
<script>
        let currentColor = 'green';

        function selectColor(color) {
            currentColor = color;
            document.querySelectorAll('[id^="brush-"]').forEach(btn => {
                btn.classList.remove('brush-active');
            });
            document.getElementById(`brush-${color}`).classList.add('brush-active');
            
            // Bilingual Audio Playback logic (Mock)
            const words = {
                'green': 'Verde',
                'white': 'Blanco'
            };
            console.log(`Playing audio for: ${words[color]}`);
        }

        // Handle Canvas Interaction
        const canvas = document.getElementById('flag-svg');
        const flagBg = document.getElementById('flag-bg');
        const flagElements = document.getElementById('flag-elements');

        canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', () => {
            if (currentColor === 'green') {
                flagBg.setAttribute('fill', '#006C35');
                playAudio('verde');
            } else if (currentColor === 'white') {
                flagElements.setAttribute('fill', '#ffffff');
                flagElements.setAttribute('stroke', '#ffffff');
                flagElements.classList.remove('opacity-20');
                playAudio('blanco');
            }
        });

        function completeFlag() {
            const overlay = document.getElementById('success-overlay');
            const star = document.getElementById('star-icon');
            
            overlay.classList.remove('bg-white/0');
            overlay.classList.add('bg-white/60');
            star.classList.remove('scale-0');
            star.classList.add('scale-100');

            setTimeout(() => {
                alert("¡Felicidades! You painted the flag of Saudi Arabia.");
                overlay.classList.add('bg-white/0');
                overlay.classList.remove('bg-white/60');
                star.classList.add('scale-0');
                star.classList.remove('scale-100');
            }, 2000);
        }

        function playAudio(term) {
            // Virtual audio feedback
            const feedback = {
                'saudi': 'Arabia Saudita / Saudi Arabia',
                'verde': 'Verde',
                'blanco': 'Blanco'
            };
            console.log("Audio Playback:", feedback[term]);
        }
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Israel) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport">
<title>Paint Adventure - Israel</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "card-padding": "20px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 24;
            user-select: none;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-primary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-primary:active {
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 #004b71;
            transform: translateY(6px);
        }
        .chunky-shadow-secondary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #bec8d3;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-secondary:active {
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 #bec8d3;
            transform: translateY(6px);
        }
        .chunky-shadow-yellow {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #6d5700;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-yellow:active {
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 #6d5700;
            transform: translateY(6px);
        }
        .flag-outline {
            border: 4px solid #3e4851;
            border-radius: 12px;
            overflow: hidden;
            background: #ffffff;
            cursor: crosshair;
        }
        .pulse-audio {
            animation: pulse 2s infinite;
        }
        @keyframes pulse {
            0% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); }
        }
        body {
            overscroll-behavior: none;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-surface font-body-md min-h-screen flex flex-col">
<!-- TopAppBar -->
<header class="flex justify-between items-center px-container-margin h-touch-target-min w-full z-50 bg-surface dark:bg-surface top-0 fixed">
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="arrow_back">arrow_back</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md font-bold text-primary dark:text-primary-fixed-dim">Paint Adventure</h1>
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</button>
</header>
<main class="flex-grow pt-20 pb-32 px-container-margin flex flex-col gap-6">
<!-- Flag Painting Station -->
<div class="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto flex flex-col gap-6">
<!-- Bilingual Name Header -->
<div class="flex items-center justify-between bg-surface-container-low p-card-padding rounded-lg">
<div>
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-on-surface">Israel</h2>
<p class="text-primary font-label-bold">ישראל</p>
</div>
<button class="w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-secondary-container flex items-center justify-center chunky-shadow-yellow pulse-audio" onclick="playAudio('Israel')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-4xl text-on-secondary-container" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</button>
<button class="w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-secondary-container flex flex-col items-center justify-center chunky-shadow-yellow active:translate-y-1 transition-all" onclick="playAudio('Alarma')"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-4xl text-on-secondary-container" data-icon="notifications_active">notifications_active</span><span class="text-[10px] font-bold text-on-secondary-container leading-none mt-1">¡Alarma!</span><span class="text-[8px] text-on-secondary-container leading-none">Sound Alarm</span></button></div>
<!-- Drawing Canvas Area -->
<div class="relative w-full aspect-[3/2] flag-outline shadow-xl flex flex-col">
<!-- Top Stripe Zone (Interactive Placeholder) -->
<div class="h-1/5 w-full bg-surface-container-high transition-colors duration-300 border-b-2 border-outline-variant flex items-center justify-center" id="stripe-top">
<span class="text-outline-variant font-label-bold opacity-50">Azul</span>
</div>
<!-- Middle Zone (Star of David) -->
<div class="h-3/5 w-full bg-white relative flex items-center justify-center p-8" id="star-zone">
<svg class="w-40 h-40" viewBox="0 0 100 100">
<path d="M50 5 L90 75 L10 75 Z" fill="none" id="david-star" stroke="#bec8d3" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="4"></path>
<path d="M50 95 L90 25 L10 25 Z" fill="none" id="david-star-inv" stroke="#bec8d3" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="4"></path>
</svg>
</div>
<!-- Bottom Stripe Zone -->
<div class="h-1/5 w-full bg-surface-container-high transition-colors duration-300 border-t-2 border-outline-variant flex items-center justify-center" id="stripe-bottom">
<span class="text-outline-variant font-label-bold opacity-50">Azul</span>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Color Palette -->
<div class="flex justify-center gap-6">
<button class="group flex flex-col items-center gap-2" onclick="selectColor('azul')">
<div class="w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-[#0038b8] border-4 border-white shadow-lg chunky-shadow-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all"></div>
