<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface">Azul</span>
</button><button class="text-primary-container" onclick="playAudio('Azul')"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-sm" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span></button>
<button class="group flex flex-col items-center gap-2" onclick="selectColor('blanco')">
<div class="w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-white border-4 border-outline-variant shadow-lg chunky-shadow-secondary active:translate-y-1 transition-all"></div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface">Blanco</span>
</button><button class="text-primary-container" onclick="playAudio('Blanco')"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-sm" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span></button>
</div>
<!-- Fun Fact Bento Card -->
<div class="bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container p-card-padding rounded-lg flex items-start gap-4">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-3xl" data-icon="lightbulb">lightbulb</span>
<div>
<h3 class="font-label-bold mb-1">¿Sabías que?</h3>
<p class="font-body-md">La estrella de la bandera se llama Estrella de David.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Success Modal (Hidden by default) -->
<div class="fixed inset-0 z-[100] hidden flex items-center justify-center p-gutter bg-on-surface/40 backdrop-blur-sm" id="success-modal">
<div class="bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-lg p-8 max-w-sm w-full text-center shadow-2xl scale-0 transition-transform duration-500" id="modal-content">
<div class="w-24 h-24 bg-tertiary-container text-on-tertiary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-6">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-6xl" data-icon="stars" data-weight="fill" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">stars</span>
</div>
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-on-surface mb-2">¡Excelente!</h2>
<p class="font-body-md text-on-surface-variant mb-6">Has pintado la bandera de Israel perfectamente.</p>
<button class="w-full py-4 bg-primary text-on-primary font-label-bold rounded-full chunky-shadow-primary active:translate-y-1" onclick="location.reload()">Continuar Aventura</button>
</div>
</div>
<!-- BottomNavBar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-gutter py-2 pb-safe bg-surface-container-lowest dark:bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg rounded-t-lg">
<div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-variant transition-all cursor-pointer">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="public">public</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">World Map</span>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-variant transition-all cursor-pointer">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="palette">palette</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">My Gallery</span>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="videogame_asset">videogame_asset</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-variant transition-all cursor-pointer">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="stars">stars</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Awards</span>
</div>
</nav>
<script>
        let currentColor = null;
        let progress = {
            top: false,
            bottom: false,
            star: false
        };

        function selectColor(color) {
            currentColor = color;
            // Visual feedback for selection could go here
            console.log('Selected:', color);
        }

        function playAudio(term) {
            console.log('Playing audio for:', term);
            // In a real app, this would trigger an actual audio file
            const synth = window.speechSynthesis;
            const utter = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(term);
            utter.lang = term === 'Israel' ? 'he-IL' : 'es-ES';
            synth.speak(utter);
        }

        // Logic for filling the flag
        document.getElementById('stripe-top').addEventListener('click', function() {
            if (currentColor === 'azul') {
                this.style.backgroundColor = '#0038b8';
                this.innerHTML = '';
                progress.top = true;
                checkCompletion();
            }
        });

        document.getElementById('stripe-bottom').addEventListener('click', function() {
            if (currentColor === 'azul') {
                this.style.backgroundColor = '#0038b8';
                this.innerHTML = '';
                progress.bottom = true;
                checkCompletion();
            }
        });

        document.getElementById('star-zone').addEventListener('click', function() {
            if (currentColor === 'azul') {
                document.getElementById('david-star').setAttribute('fill', '#0038b8');
                document.getElementById('david-star').setAttribute('stroke', '#0038b8');
                document.getElementById('david-star-inv').setAttribute('fill', '#0038b8');
                document.getElementById('david-star-inv').setAttribute('stroke', '#0038b8');
                progress.star = true;
                checkCompletion();
            }
        });

        function checkCompletion() {
            if (progress.top && progress.bottom && progress.star) {
                const modal = document.getElementById('success-modal');
                const content = document.getElementById('modal-content');
                modal.classList.remove('hidden');
                setTimeout(() => {
                    content.classList.remove('scale-0');
                    content.classList.add('scale-100');
                }, 100);
            }
        }
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Nueva Zelanda) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport">
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@300;400;500;600;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif;
            -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
            overflow-x: hidden;
        }
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        .tactile-button-primary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #004b71;
            transition: all 0.1s active;
        }
        .tactile-button-primary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        .tactile-button-secondary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #bec8d3;
            transition: all 0.1s active;
        }
        .tactile-button-secondary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #bec8d3;
        }
        .tactile-card {
            box-shadow: 0 8px 0 0 #eaeef5;
        }
        @keyframes pulse-yellow {
            0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
        }
        .audio-pulse {
            animation: pulse-yellow 2s infinite ease-in-out;
        }
        .flag-grid-dot {
            background-image: radial-gradient(#bec8d3 1px, transparent 1px);
            background-size: 20px 20px;
        }
    </style>
<script id="tailwind-config">
        tailwind.config = {
            darkMode: "class",
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    "colors": {
                        "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                        "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                        "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                        "outline": "#6e7882",
                        "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                        "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                        "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                        "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                        "surface-tint": "#006495",
                        "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                        "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                        "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                        "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                        "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                        "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                        "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                        "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                        "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                        "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                        "on-surface": "#171c21",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                        "background": "#f7f9ff",
                        "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                        "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                        "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                        "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                        "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                        "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                        "on-background": "#171c21",
                        "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                        "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                        "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                        "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                        "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                        "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                        "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                        "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                        "primary": "#006495",
                        "on-error": "#ffffff",
                        "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                        "secondary": "#735c00",
                        "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                        "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                        "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                        "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                        "error": "#ba1a1a"
                    },
                    "borderRadius": {
                        "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                        "lg": "2rem",
                        "xl": "3rem",
                        "full": "9999px"
                    },
                    "spacing": {
                        "unit": "8px",
                        "container-margin": "24px",
                        "touch-target-min": "48px",
                        "gutter": "16px",
                        "card-padding": "20px"
                    },
                    "fontFamily": {
                        "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                        "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                        "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                        "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                        "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                        "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
                    },
                    "fontSize": {
                        "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                        "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                        "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                        "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                        "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                        "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
                    }
                },
            },
        }
    </script>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-surface">
<!-- TopAppBar -->
<header class="bg-surface-container-low flex justify-between items-center px-container-margin h-touch-target-min w-full z-50 fixed top-0 active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<div class="flex items-center gap-4">
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container text-primary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">arrow_back</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md font-bold text-primary">Paint Adventure</h1>
</div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-2"><button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container hover:bg-primary-fixed-dim transition-all active:scale-95 shadow-sm" title="¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm"><span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">notifications_active</span></button>
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container text-primary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</header>
<main class="pt-20 pb-32 px-container-margin max-w-5xl mx-auto">
<!-- Header Section -->
<section class="mb-gutter text-center">
<div class="flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center justify-center gap-4 mb-4">
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile md:text-headline-lg md:font-headline-lg text-on-surface">Nueva Zelanda</h2>
<button class="audio-pulse bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container p-3 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg active:scale-95 transition-transform" onclick="playAudio('New Zealand')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-surface-variant italic">New Zealand</p>
</section>
<!-- Canvas Area -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-gutter">
<!-- Tools Palette (Left on Desktop) -->
<aside class="lg:col-span-3 flex flex-row lg:flex-col gap-4 overflow-x-auto pb-4 lg:pb-0">
<div class="bg-surface-container-lowest p-card-padding rounded-lg tactile-card border-2 border-surface-container-high flex flex-col gap-4 min-w-[160px] lg:min-w-0 w-full">
<h3 class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-outline uppercase tracking-wider text-center">Colores</h3>
<button class="flex items-center gap-4 p-3 rounded-lg border-2 border-primary bg-primary-fixed hover:bg-primary-fixed-dim transition-colors group">
<div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-[#00247D] border-4 border-white shadow-sm"></div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-start">
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-primary-fixed">Azul</span>
<span class="text-xs text-on-primary-fixed-variant">Blue</span>
</div>
</button>
<button class="flex items-center gap-4 p-3 rounded-lg border-2 border-transparent bg-surface-container hover:bg-surface-variant transition-colors group">
<div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-[#CC142B] border-4 border-white shadow-sm"></div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-start">
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface">Rojo</span>
<span class="text-xs text-on-surface-variant">Red</span>
</div>
</button>
<button class="flex items-center gap-4 p-3 rounded-lg border-2 border-transparent bg-surface-container hover:bg-surface-variant transition-colors group">
<div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-white border-4 border-surface-variant shadow-sm"></div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-start">
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface">Blanco</span>
<span class="text-xs text-on-surface-variant">White</span>
</div>
</button>
</div>
</aside>
<!-- Main Painting Canvas -->
<section class="lg:col-span-9">
<div class="bg-surface-container-lowest p-gutter rounded-lg tactile-card border-2 border-surface-container-high relative overflow-hidden h-[300px] md:h-[500px] flex items-center justify-center flag-grid-dot">
<!-- New Zealand Flag Placeholder Representation -->
<div class="w-full max-w-[600px] aspect-[2/1] bg-white shadow-2xl relative overflow-hidden rounded-sm border-4 border-surface-variant">
<!-- Blue Field (Base) -->
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-[#00247D] opacity-20 flex items-center justify-center">
<span class="text-on-surface-variant font-bold text-xl uppercase opacity-40">¡Pinta aquí!</span>
</div>
<!-- Placeholder for Union Jack -->
<div class="absolute top-0 left-0 w-1/2 h-1/2 border-r-2 border-b-2 border-dashed border-primary bg-white/50 flex items-center justify-center">
<div class="text-center">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-4xl">auto_fix_high</span>
<p class="text-[10px] font-bold text-primary px-2">UNION JACK</p>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Southern Cross Stars Placeholders -->
<div class="absolute right-0 w-1/2 h-full">
<!-- Star 1 -->
<div class="absolute top-[15%] left-[45%] w-10 h-10 border-2 border-dashed border-error rounded-full flex items-center justify-center bg-white/40">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-error text-xl">star</span>
</div>
<!-- Star 2 -->
<div class="absolute top-[45%] left-[20%] w-10 h-10 border-2 border-dashed border-error rounded-full flex items-center justify-center bg-white/40">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-error text-xl">star</span>
</div>
<!-- Star 3 -->
<div class="absolute top-[45%] left-[70%] w-10 h-10 border-2 border-dashed border-error rounded-full flex items-center justify-center bg-white/40">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-error text-xl">star</span>
</div>
<!-- Star 4 -->
<div class="absolute top-[75%] left-[45%] w-10 h-10 border-2 border-dashed border-error rounded-full flex items-center justify-center bg-white/40">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-error text-xl">star</span>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Subtle overlay texture for "painting" feel -->
<div class="absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none mix-blend-overlay opacity-30 bg-[url('https://www.transparenttextures.com/patterns/canvas-orange.png')]"></div>
</div>
<!-- Progress Indicator -->
<div class="absolute bottom-4 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-48 h-4 bg-surface-container rounded-full overflow-hidden border-2 border-white">
<div class="h-full w-1/3 bg-tertiary-container transition-all duration-500" style="width: 35%"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Fun Fact Card -->
<div class="mt-gutter bg-tertiary-container/10 border-2 border-tertiary-container/30 p-card-padding rounded-lg flex items-center gap-6 relative overflow-hidden">
<div class="w-20 h-20 bg-tertiary-fixed rounded-full flex-shrink-0 flex items-center justify-center shadow-inner overflow-hidden">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A cute, chubby, stylized 3D illustration of a Kiwi bird with fuzzy brown feathers and a long beak, standing in a lush New Zealand fern forest with soft cinematic lighting, child-friendly educational style." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuBn2SufUQL2Mx1Jt2gszxrjceoYFGZJGjhTeBa9HUYVX0PgJpR8GXSPMNKuvRhY9IaEKOoEzrSBvBfPpqBWODVIn4vLHqt0U6x0YKjfkQnCreyXbEtBuiZ0bVeoX8Q_Y2kb0SIFy1VMNmiRoqLtNpw0vww2rcOKOxdIQC_0-Havc5cv9FJXGFibOaBPu6BZLrHQGl9aAq_SymwXFMwox0lC6zHyiA0_tGWvYWwcypwYvgw_OH6q6IOqKRH3CUuKXB7w5JTqOBEXYgc">
</div>
<div>
<h4 class="font-label-bold text-tertiary flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-sm">lightbulb</span>
                            Dato Divertido
                        </h4>
<p class="font-body-md text-on-tertiary-container leading-tight">
                            "En Nueva Zelanda vive un ave que no vuela llamada <strong>Kiwi</strong>."
                        </p>
</div>
<!-- Decorative element -->
<span class="material-symbols-outlined absolute -right-4 -bottom-4 text-8xl opacity-10 text-tertiary rotate-12">pets</span>
</div>
</section>
</div>
<!-- Action Buttons -->
<div class="mt-8 flex justify-center gap-gutter">
<button class="tactile-button-secondary bg-surface-container-lowest text-primary font-label-bold px-8 py-4 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-2 border-2 border-surface-container-high">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">restart_alt</span>
                Borrar
            </button>
<button class="tactile-button-primary bg-primary text-on-primary font-label-bold px-12 py-4 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-2">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">check_circle</span>
                ¡Listo!
            </button>
</div>
</main>
<!-- BottomNavBar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-gutter py-2 pb-safe bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg rounded-t-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-variant rounded-lg transition-all duration-100 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">public</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-[12px]">World Map</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-variant rounded-lg transition-all duration-100 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">palette</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-[12px]">My Gallery</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 transition-all duration-100 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">videogame_asset</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-[12px]">Play</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-variant rounded-lg transition-all duration-100 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">stars</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-[12px]">Awards</span>
</a>
</nav>
<script>
        function playAudio(text) {
            console.log("Playing audio for: " + text);
            // In a real app, this would trigger the speech synthesis or play a recorded clip
            const utterance = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text);
            utterance.lang = text.includes('Nueva') ? 'es-ES' : 'en-US';
            window.speechSynthesis.speak(utterance);
        }

        // Add haptic feel to color buttons
        const colorButtons = document.querySelectorAll('aside button');
        colorButtons.forEach(btn => {
            btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                colorButtons.forEach(b => b.classList.replace('border-primary', 'border-transparent'));
                colorButtons.forEach(b => b.classList.replace('bg-primary-fixed', 'bg-surface-container'));
                
                btn.classList.replace('border-transparent', 'border-primary');
                btn.classList.replace('bg-surface-container', 'bg-primary-fixed');
                
                // Play color audio
                const colorTextSp = btn.querySelector('.font-label-bold').innerText;
                const colorTextEn = btn.querySelector('.text-xs').innerText;
                playAudio(colorTextSp);
                setTimeout(() => playAudio(colorTextEn), 1000);
            });
        });
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Finlandia) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport">
<title>Paint Adventure - Finland</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "card-padding": "20px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        body { font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; }
        .material-symbols-outlined { font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48; }
        .chunky-shadow-primary { box-shadow: 0 4px 0 0 #004b71; }
        .chunky-shadow-secondary { box-shadow: 0 4px 0 0 #d1d5db; }
        .chunky-shadow-yellow { box-shadow: 0 4px 0 0 #b38f00; }
        .active-press:active { transform: translateY(4px); box-shadow: none; }
        
        .flag-canvas {
            aspect-ratio: 18 / 11;
            background: #ffffff;
            border: 4px solid #dee3e9;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .cross-h {
            position: absolute;
            top: 40%;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 20%;
            background: transparent;
            transition: background 0.3s ease;
        }
        .cross-v {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 30%;
            width: 12%;
            height: 100%;
            background: transparent;
            transition: background 0.3s ease;
        }
        .cross-filled { background: #006495 !important; }
        
        @keyframes pulse-audio {
            0% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); }
        }
        .animate-pulse-slow { animation: pulse-audio 2s infinite ease-in-out; }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-surface min-h-screen pb-32">
<!-- TopAppBar -->
<header class="fixed top-0 left-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-between items-center px-container-margin h-touch-target-min bg-surface dark:bg-surface">
<button class="active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 p-2">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary dark:text-primary-fixed-dim">arrow_back</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md font-bold text-primary dark:text-primary-fixed-dim">Paint Adventure</h1>
<button class="active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 p-2">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary dark:text-primary-fixed-dim">volume_up</span>
</button>
</header>
<main class="pt-20 px-container-margin max-w-4xl mx-auto">
<!-- Progress Bar -->
<div class="w-full bg-surface-container-high h-4 rounded-full mb-8 overflow-hidden">
<div class="bg-tertiary-container h-full w-2/3 rounded-full transition-all duration-500"></div>
</div>
<!-- Header Section -->
<div class="flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-start md:items-center mb-6 gap-4">
<div>
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile md:font-headline-lg text-headline-lg-mobile md:text-headline-lg text-on-surface">Finlandia / Finland</h2>
<p class="font-body-md text-body-md text-on-surface-variant">¡Vamos a pintar la bandera!</p>
</div>
<button class="w-20 h-20 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center chunky-shadow-yellow active-press animate-pulse-slow" onclick="playAudio('Finlandia, Finland')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-4xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</button><button class="w-20 h-20 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center chunky-shadow-yellow active-press" onclick="playAudio('¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm')"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-3xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">notifications_active</span><span class="text-[10px] font-bold text-on-secondary-container leading-tight">¡Alarma!</span></button>
</div>
<!-- Flag Canvas -->
<div class="relative group mb-10">
<div class="flag-canvas rounded-lg shadow-inner bg-white cursor-crosshair" id="flag-container">
<div class="cross-v" id="cross-v"></div>
<div class="cross-h" id="cross-h"></div>
</div>
<div class="absolute -bottom-4 right-4 bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container px-4 py-2 rounded-full font-label-bold text-label-bold shadow-md">
                Toca para pintar
            </div>
</div>
<!-- Paint Palette -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-gutter mb-10">
<!-- Blue Option -->
<button class="flex items-center gap-4 p-card-padding bg-surface-container-low rounded-lg border-2 border-transparent hover:border-primary transition-all active-press chunky-shadow-secondary" id="btn-blue" onclick="selectColor('blue')">
<div class="w-12 h-12 bg-primary rounded-full shadow-md"></div>
<div class="text-left">
<span class="block font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface">Azul</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary">volume_up</span>
</div>
</button>
<!-- White Option -->
<button class="flex items-center gap-4 p-card-padding bg-surface-container-low rounded-lg border-2 border-transparent hover:border-primary transition-all active-press chunky-shadow-secondary" id="btn-white" onclick="selectColor('white')">
<div class="w-12 h-12 bg-white border border-outline-variant rounded-full shadow-md"></div>
<div class="text-left">
<span class="block font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface">Blanco</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-outline">volume_up</span>
</div>
</button>
</div>
<!-- Fun Fact Card -->
<div class="bg-tertiary-container/20 rounded-lg p-card-padding border-2 border-tertiary-container flex items-start gap-4">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-tertiary text-3xl">lightbulb</span>
<p class="font-body-md text-body-md text-on-tertiary-container italic">
                "Finlandia es la tierra de los mil lagos."
            </p>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-gutter py-2 pb-safe bg-surface-container-lowest dark:bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg rounded-t-lg">
<div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-variant rounded-lg cursor-pointer">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">public</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">World Map</span>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-variant rounded-lg cursor-pointer">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">palette</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">My Gallery</span>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">videogame_asset</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-variant rounded-lg cursor-pointer">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">stars</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Awards</span>
</div>
</nav>
<!-- Success Modal (Hidden by default) -->
<div class="hidden fixed inset-0 z-[100] flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm p-container-margin" id="success-modal">
<div class="bg-white rounded-xl w-full max-w-md overflow-hidden flex flex-col items-center text-center p-8 relative">
<div class="absolute inset-0 z-0 pointer-events-none opacity-20">

</div>
<div class="z-10">
<div class="w-24 h-24 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-6 chunky-shadow-yellow">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-6xl text-on-secondary-container">stars</span>
</div>
<h3 class="font-headline-lg text-headline-lg text-primary mb-2">¡Excelente!</h3>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-surface-variant mb-8">Has pintado la bandera de Finlandia perfectamente.</p>
<button class="w-full py-4 bg-primary text-on-primary font-headline-md text-headline-md rounded-lg chunky-shadow-primary active-press" onclick="location.reload()">
                    ¡Siguiente reto!
                </button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<script>
        let currentColor = null;
        let paintedParts = { h: false, v: false };

        function selectColor(color) {
            currentColor = color;
            document.querySelectorAll('#btn-blue, #btn-white').forEach(btn => {
                btn.classList.remove('ring-4', 'ring-primary-container');
            });
            document.getElementById(`btn-${color}`).classList.add('ring-4', 'ring-primary-container');
            
            if (color === 'blue') playAudio('Azul');
            if (color === 'white') playAudio('Blanco');
        }

        function playAudio(text) {
            console.log("Playing audio for: " + text);
            // In a real app, this would trigger a speech synthesis or play a sound asset
            const utter = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text);
            utter.lang = text.includes('Finland') ? 'en-US' : 'es-ES';
            window.speechSynthesis.speak(utter);
        }

        const crossV = document.getElementById('cross-v');
        const crossH = document.getElementById('cross-h');
        const flagContainer = document.getElementById('flag-container');

        flagContainer.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            if (!currentColor) {
                alert("¡Primero selecciona un color!");
                return;
            }

            if (currentColor === 'blue') {
                crossV.classList.add('cross-filled');
                crossH.classList.add('cross-filled');
                paintedParts.v = true;
                paintedParts.h = true;
                checkCompletion();
            }
        });

        function checkCompletion() {
            if (paintedParts.v && paintedParts.h) {
                setTimeout(() => {
                    document.getElementById('success-modal').classList.remove('hidden');
                }, 800);
            }
        }
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Austria) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="en"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport">
<title>Paint Adventure - Austria</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@300;400;500;600;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<!-- Design System Tokens & Configuration -->
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                "outline": "#6e7882",
                "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                "surface-tint": "#006495",
                "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                "on-surface": "#171c21",
                "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                "background": "#f7f9ff",
                "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                "on-background": "#171c21",
                "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                "primary": "#006495",
                "on-error": "#ffffff",
                "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                "secondary": "#735c00",
                "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                "error": "#ba1a1a"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                "lg": "2rem",
                "xl": "3rem",
                "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                "unit": "8px",
                "container-margin": "24px",
                "touch-target-min": "48px",
                "gutter": "16px",
                "card-padding": "20px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          }
        }
      }
    </script>
<style>
        body { font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; }
        
        .tactile-shadow-primary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        .tactile-shadow-primary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        
        .tactile-shadow-secondary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #fccc00;
        }
        .tactile-shadow-secondary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #fccc00;
        }

        .flag-stripe {
            transition: background-color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
        }

        .pulse-animation {
            animation: pulse 2s infinite;
        }
        @keyframes pulse {
            0% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); }
        }

        .bg-pattern {
            background-image: radial-gradient(#2bb1ff 1px, transparent 1px);
            background-size: 20px 20px;
            opacity: 0.1;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-surface min-h-screen flex flex-col overflow-x-hidden select-none">
<!-- Top Navigation -->
<header class="flex justify-between items-center px-container-margin h-touch-target-min w-full z-50 bg-surface dark:bg-surface fixed top-0">
<div class="flex items-center gap-2 active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 cursor-pointer">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary font-headline-md">arrow_back</span>
<h1 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md font-bold text-primary dark:text-primary-fixed-dim">Paint Adventure</h1>
</div>
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-surface-container hover:bg-primary-container transition-all active:translate-y-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary">volume_up</span>
</button>
</header>
<!-- Main Canvas Area -->
<main class="flex-1 mt-16 mb-24 px-container-margin flex flex-col items-center">
<!-- Header Info -->
<div class="w-full max-w-2xl py-6 flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center gap-6">
<div class="flex-1 text-center md:text-left">
<div class="flex items-center justify-center md:justify-start gap-3 mb-2">
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile md:font-headline-lg md:text-headline-lg text-on-surface">Austria</h2>
<button class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container flex items-center justify-center tactile-shadow-secondary pulse-animation" onclick="playAudio('Austria')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
<p class="font-body-md text-body-md text-on-surface-variant italic">Let's paint the tricolor flag!</p>
</div>
<!-- Fun Fact Card -->
<div class="bg-surface-container-low p-card-padding rounded-lg border-2 border-primary-fixed flex items-start gap-4 max-w-sm">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary-container text-4xl">lightbulb</span>
<p class="font-body-md text-body-md leading-tight text-on-surface">
<span class="font-bold block mb-1">Fun Fact:</span>
                    Austria tiene montañas muy altas llamadas los Alpes.
                </p>
</div>
</div>
<!-- The Flag Canvas -->
<div class="w-full max-w-3xl aspect-[3/2] bg-white rounded-lg shadow-xl p-4 md:p-8 flex flex-col gap-4 border-8 border-surface-container-highest relative overflow-hidden">
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-pattern pointer-events-none"></div>
<!-- Stripe 1: Red -->
<div class="flag-stripe flex-1 rounded-md border-2 border-dashed border-outline-variant flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer group" id="stripe-top" onclick="paintStripe('stripe-top', 'red')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-4xl text-outline-variant opacity-40 group-hover:scale-125 transition-transform">format_paint</span>
</div>
<!-- Stripe 2: White -->
<div class="flag-stripe flex-1 rounded-md border-2 border-dashed border-outline-variant flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer group" id="stripe-middle" onclick="paintStripe('stripe-middle', 'white')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-4xl text-outline-variant opacity-40 group-hover:scale-125 transition-transform">format_paint</span>
</div>
<!-- Stripe 3: Red -->
<div class="flag-stripe flex-1 rounded-md border-2 border-dashed border-outline-variant flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer group" id="stripe-bottom" onclick="paintStripe('stripe-bottom', 'red')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-4xl text-outline-variant opacity-40 group-hover:scale-125 transition-transform">format_paint</span>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Palette & Controls -->
<div class="mt-8 w-full max-w-2xl grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
<!-- Paint Brush Red -->
<button class="flex flex-col items-center gap-2 p-4 bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-lg tactile-shadow-primary border-2 border-transparent focus:border-primary transition-all" onclick="setSelectedColor('#FF0000', 'Rojo')">
<div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-[#FF0000] border-4 border-white shadow-inner"></div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-1">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-primary">Rojo</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-sm">volume_up</span>
</div>
</button>
<!-- Paint Brush White -->
<button class="flex flex-col items-center gap-2 p-4 bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-lg tactile-shadow-primary border-2 border-transparent focus:border-primary transition-all" onclick="setSelectedColor('#FFFFFF', 'Blanco')">
<div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-[#FFFFFF] border-4 border-surface-variant shadow-inner"></div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-1">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-primary">Blanco</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-sm">volume_up</span>
</div>
</button>
<!-- Location Background Image -->
<div class="col-span-2 hidden md:block rounded-lg overflow-hidden relative shadow-md">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A cinematic, vibrant photo of the Austrian Alps with snow-capped peaks against a brilliant blue sky. Lush green valleys and a small traditional wooden chalet are visible in the foreground. The lighting is warm and golden, reflecting the premium educational adventure aesthetic of the app with high contrast and saturated colors." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuA-aWXfTiAcSFXw92_kFqeFeWGJYlnu2ZRNvTwcVGRh-U2C-KTR0ZSvO6h1A7HtaYGNTXeTTdAdSXnpdHf2J7DgsPR7zt5JEYkyNO9fVQoQBLe_sMSD_cKU5hH7s3lpbUtoXREBGmYh_lTjpnmoVLv4KMTFiZzbR03lm88Near8kKQmhfw8G9p5qUw4Yg9xzq0bEa2mWqeXicqMQkiBfo6Erc8bgfFqPlfcLL5AMFCJUhdJvKVhXhHfTcUMMChVS54VtGP4l2dzWso">
<div class="absolute bottom-2 left-2 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-md px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-white text-xs font-bold">
                    Alps, Austria
                </div>
</div>
<button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2 p-4 bg-secondary-container rounded-lg tactile-shadow-secondary border-2 border-transparent focus:border-primary transition-all" onclick="playAudio('Alarm')">
  <div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-white flex items-center justify-center shadow-inner">
    <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-secondary text-4xl">notifications_active</span>
  </div>
  <div class="flex flex-col items-center">
    <span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-secondary-container">¡Alarma!</span>
    <span class="text-xs text-on-secondary-container opacity-80">Sound Alarm</span>
  </div>
</button></div>
</main>
<!-- Success Feedback Overlay (Hidden by default) -->
<div class="fixed inset-0 z-[100] flex items-center justify-center bg-primary/80 backdrop-blur-sm hidden animate-in fade-in zoom-in duration-300" id="success-modal">
<div class="bg-surface rounded-xl p-8 max-w-sm w-full text-center shadow-2xl relative overflow-hidden">

<div class="relative z-10">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-secondary text-8xl mb-4" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">stars</span>
<h3 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-primary mb-2">¡Excelente!</h3>
<p class="font-body-md text-body-md text-on-surface mb-6">You painted the Austrian flag perfectly!</p>
<button class="w-full py-4 bg-primary text-white font-label-bold text-label-bold rounded-lg tactile-shadow-primary" onclick="closeSuccess()">Next Flag</button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Bottom Navigation Bar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-gutter py-2 pb-safe bg-surface-container-lowest dark:bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg rounded-t-lg">
<div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-variant transition-all">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">public</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">World Map</span>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">palette</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">My Gallery</span>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-variant transition-all">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">videogame_asset</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-variant transition-all">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">stars</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Awards</span>
</div>
</nav>
<script>
        let currentColor = null;
        let colorName = null;
        const progress = {
            'stripe-top': false,
            'stripe-middle': false,
            'stripe-bottom': false
        };

        function setSelectedColor(hex, name) {
            currentColor = hex;
            colorName = name;
            playAudio(name);
            
            // Visual feedback on selected color
            document.querySelectorAll('button[onclick*="setSelectedColor"]').forEach(btn => {
                btn.classList.remove('border-primary');
            });
            event.currentTarget.classList.add('border-primary');
        }

        function paintStripe(stripeId, targetType) {
            if (!currentColor) {
                alert('Pick a color first!');
                return;
            }

            const stripe = document.getElementById(stripeId);
            
            // Logical check for Austria (Red-White-Red)
            let isCorrect = false;
            if (targetType === 'red' && currentColor === '#FF0000') isCorrect = true;
            if (targetType === 'white' && currentColor === '#FFFFFF') isCorrect = true;

            if (isCorrect) {
                stripe.style.backgroundColor = currentColor;
                stripe.classList.remove('border-dashed', 'border-outline-variant');
                stripe.classList.add('border-transparent');
                stripe.innerHTML = ''; // Remove icon
                progress[stripeId] = true;
                
                // Check if finished
                if (Object.values(progress).every(v => v === true)) {
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        document.getElementById('success-modal').classList.remove('hidden');
                    }, 500);
                }
            } else {
                // Shake animation for error
                stripe.classList.add('animate-pulse', 'border-error');
                setTimeout(() => {
                    stripe.classList.remove('animate-pulse', 'border-error');
                }, 500);
            }
        }

        function playAudio(text) {
            // In a real app, this would trigger a localized audio file
            console.log(`Playing audio for: ${text}`);
            
            // Simple visual feedback for kids
            const synth = window.speechSynthesis;
            const utter = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text);
            utter.lang = text === 'Austria' ? 'en-US' : 'es-ES';
            synth.speak(utter);
        }

        function closeSuccess() {
            document.getElementById('success-modal').classList.add('hidden');
            // Reset for next demo loop or redirect
            location.reload();
        }
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Quiz Nivel 4: Suiza -->
<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/>
<title>Flag Adventure - Quiz Level 4</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<script id="tailwind-config">
        tailwind.config = {
          darkMode: "class",
          theme: {
            extend: {
              "colors": {
                      "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                      "surface-tint": "#006495",
                      "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                      "on-background": "#171c21",
                      "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                      "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                      "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                      "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                      "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                      "on-error": "#ffffff",
                      "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                      "secondary": "#735c00",
                      "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                      "outline": "#6e7882",
                      "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                      "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                      "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                      "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                      "primary": "#006495",
                      "on-surface": "#171c21",
                      "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                      "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                      "error": "#ba1a1a",
                      "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                      "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                      "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                      "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                      "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                      "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                      "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                      "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                      "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                      "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                      "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                      "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                      "background": "#f7f9ff",
                      "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                      "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                      "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                      "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                      "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                      "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                      "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                      "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                      "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                      "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                      "surface-dim": "#d6dae1"
              },
              "borderRadius": {
                      "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                      "lg": "2rem",
                      "xl": "3rem",
                      "full": "9999px"
              },
              "spacing": {
                      "container-margin": "24px",
                      "card-padding": "20px",
                      "gutter": "16px",
                      "touch-target-min": "48px",
                      "unit": "8px"
              },
              "fontFamily": {
                      "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                      "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                      "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                      "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                      "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                      "body-lg": ["Quicksand"]
              },
              "fontSize": {
                      "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                      "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                      "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                      "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                      "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                      "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}]
              }
            },
          },
        }
    </script>
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
            user-select: none;
        }
        .chunky-button-shadow {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
        }
        .chunky-button-primary {
            background-color: #2bb1ff;
            border-bottom: 6px solid #006495;
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
        }
        .chunky-button-primary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            border-bottom-width: 2px;
        }
        .chunky-card {
            border: 2px solid #dee3e9;
            border-bottom: 8px solid #dee3e9;
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
        }
        .chunky-card:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            border-bottom-width: 4px;
        }
        .audio-pulse {
            animation: pulse 2s infinite;
            background-color: #fccc00;
            border-bottom: 6px solid #735c00;
        }
        @keyframes pulse {
            0% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); }
        }
        .progress-track {
            height: 16px;
            background-color: #dee3e9;
            border-radius: 999px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .progress-fill {
            height: 100%;
            background-color: #59be1b;
            border-radius: 999px;
            transition: width 0.5s ease-out;
        }
    </style>
<style>
    body {
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);
    }
  </style>
  </head>
<body class="bg-background font-body-md text-on-surface min-h-screen flex flex-col">
<!-- Top App Bar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky bg-surface-container-low flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit z-40">
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 text-primary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="menu">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary font-bold">Level 4</h1>
</div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 text-primary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</header>
<main class="flex-grow container mx-auto max-w-lg px-container-margin py-6 flex flex-col gap-8">
<!-- Progress Section -->
<div class="w-full flex flex-col gap-2">
<div class="flex justify-between items-end">
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">Question 4 of 10</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-tertiary">40%</span>
</div>
<div class="progress-track">
<div class="progress-fill" style="width: 40%"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Question Section -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center text-center gap-4 py-4">
<!-- Audio Speaker -->
<button class="w-32 h-32 rounded-full audio-pulse flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg active:translate-y-1 transition-transform">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white" data-icon="volume_up" data-weight="fill" style="font-size: 64px;">volume_up</span>
</button>
<div class="mt-4">
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-on-surface mb-1">¿Cuál es la bandera de Suiza?</h2>
<p class="font-body-lg text-on-surface-variant">Which is the flag of Switzerland?</p>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Flag Options Bento-style Grid -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 gap-gutter">
<!-- Option 1: Switzerland -->
<button class="chunky-card bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-lg p-card-padding flex items-center gap-gutter w-full group">
<div class="w-24 h-16 bg-surface-variant rounded-md overflow-hidden flex-shrink-0 border border-outline-variant">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A clean, vibrant illustration of the Swiss flag, a bold white cross on a square red background, presented in a premium 3D toy-like style with rounded corners and high-quality textures on a white educational surface." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuD1dG0ZB_jZxTI1_9PafCV4hw3KWrXdMHDwaRFndZ36mP4SJTFBMQTYyjdzIGhuhaOVq0X3ipBTBypKpvNeULnUSruwPBftmw9ZLvCNrMAi0jf7mHv3klTI0VNjYqrapPo4na5Cd7nVIZEKw8aCOa00EKhQY0ydl-fAUsOm4yQtUAMg1nH8g5Uvu2HPcKb8OgGKs0XjHyTT1izKsk3mvSqbBpRK2vNvQnpHoL8AGa_YkaO7C6rOAwA6LLZxZ6EdQQ7Dlv6Qev68dRQ"/>
</div>
<div class="text-left">
<span class="font-label-bold text-primary block">A</span>
<span class="font-headline-md text-on-surface">Suiza</span>
</div>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined ml-auto text-outline-variant group-active:text-primary" data-icon="circle">circle</span>
</button>
<!-- Option 2: Austria -->
<button class="chunky-card bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-lg p-card-padding flex items-center gap-gutter w-full group">
<div class="w-24 h-16 bg-surface-variant rounded-md overflow-hidden flex-shrink-0 border border-outline-variant">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A high-quality educational illustration of the Austrian flag, featuring horizontal bands of red, white, and red. The style is bright and clean, mimicking a physical puzzle piece for children with a soft matte finish and playful 8px corner radius." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuBwEhBkr81wWmlPLiWm-vm_0V5DRIS5YC294jPER1dvmKgMOme2RFnC9AEcWgeSKQs9_gHgPOgJcelbsmylVHVGbaUdTMYe2lK3I4-O0A0L8b5o_VQleeNHM2RqQMOOSo5FULSJ5AtfjEt2bpkyNXE8Btz-IMTTRjh_1b5oaQx3z0qvZfh_m-8HdbdcHwIJEdS0rqn_LoKOd-TcQ4niyDG1Tfd4-uu7dXkG4XfwJvFms-5JcTDX8CDGYJjhkOJ7mpmBmLG0zFU08wA"/>
</div>
<div class="text-left">
<span class="font-label-bold text-primary block">B</span>
<span class="font-headline-md text-on-surface">Austria</span>
</div>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined ml-auto text-outline-variant" data-icon="circle">circle</span>
</button>
<!-- Option 3: Belgium -->
<button class="chunky-card bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-lg p-card-padding flex items-center gap-gutter w-full group">
<div class="w-24 h-16 bg-surface-variant rounded-md overflow-hidden flex-shrink-0 border border-outline-variant">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A professional educational graphic showing the Belgian flag with its black, yellow, and red vertical stripes. The lighting is soft and even, emphasizing the vibrant colors and clean lines, styled to fit within a high-end minimalist kid's learning app." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuBsZRvcY-T6-trSeEM11Q2Hft68LNPO_I7Xf-JRP9qTpOAa7LjdC0GAZAgzyvHgk3y1JIm3k5a6tT9UmPwpj24sp0oMG7rdKM-4bdt1wm4NcIK6cB3Ge757uiJ5jXy8mMbbVFJpdMfjUIdjdKvz9ke3tveDUlUdgieltuAix4CoZcpBnhHmpDy86c5aSz-Bw7RqIZ97epvQThSZsG6HWK3PIdZC04y0A2sRBLGrykOinoU_ZIR0s5vgTUvIQk6rU3blH3ZTuPb6rqU"/>
</div>
<div class="text-left">
<span class="font-label-bold text-primary block">C</span>
<span class="font-headline-md text-on-surface">Bélgica</span>
</div>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined ml-auto text-outline-variant" data-icon="circle">circle</span>
</button>
</div>
<!-- Submit Placeholder (Optional for UX) -->
<div class="mt-4 pb-24">
<button class="chunky-button-primary w-full py-5 rounded-lg text-white font-headline-md flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
                Check Answer
                <span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="arrow_forward">arrow_forward</span>
</button>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Nav Bar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg border-t-4 border-surface-variant">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-all" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="map">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-all" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="menu_book">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0 shadow-inner" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="quiz" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Simple click interaction simulation -->
<script>
        document.querySelectorAll('.chunky-card').forEach(card => {
            card.addEventListener('click', function() {
                // Remove selected state from others
                document.querySelectorAll('.chunky-card').forEach(c => {
                    c.classList.remove('border-primary-container', 'bg-primary-fixed');
                    c.querySelector('.material-symbols-outlined:last-child').innerText = 'circle';
                    c.querySelector('.material-symbols-outlined:last-child').classList.remove('text-primary');
                });
                
                // Add selected state
                this.classList.add('border-primary-container', 'bg-primary-fixed');
                const icon = this.querySelector('.material-symbols-outlined:last-child');
                icon.innerText = 'check_circle';
                icon.classList.add('text-primary');
                icon.style.fontVariationSettings = "'FILL' 1";
            });
        });

        // Speaker click animation
        const speaker = document.querySelector('.audio-pulse');
        speaker.addEventListener('click', () => {
            speaker.style.transform = 'scale(0.9) translateY(4px)';
            setTimeout(() => {
                speaker.style.transform = 'scale(1) translateY(0)';
            }, 100);
        });
    </script>
</body></html>

<!-- Quiz Nivel 4: Nueva Zelanda -->
<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="en"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/>
<title>Flag Adventure - Quiz Level 4</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "unit": "8px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        body { font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; }
        .material-symbols-outlined { font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48; }
        
        /* Tactical Skeuomorphic Buttons */
        .btn-chunky-primary {
            @apply relative bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container font-label-bold text-label-bold py-4 px-8 rounded-lg transition-all duration-100;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        .btn-chunky-primary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #004b71;
        }

        .btn-chunky-secondary {
            @apply relative bg-surface-container-lowest text-primary font-label-bold text-label-bold py-4 px-8 rounded-lg transition-all duration-100 border border-outline-variant;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #bec8d3;
        }
        .btn-chunky-secondary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #bec8d3;
        }

        /* Quiz Card Interaction */
        .quiz-card {
            @apply relative bg-surface-container-lowest p-card-padding rounded-lg transition-all duration-100 cursor-pointer border-2 border-transparent;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 0 0 #dee3e9;
        }
        .quiz-card:hover { @apply border-primary-container; }
        .quiz-card:active {
            transform: translateY(6px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #dee3e9;
        }

        /* Pulse Animation for Audio */
        @keyframes soft-pulse {
            0% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #b38f00; }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 8px 12px 0 rgba(115, 92, 0, 0.3); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #b38f00; }
        }
        .audio-pulse {
            animation: soft-pulse 2s infinite ease-in-out;
            background-color: #fccc00;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #b38f00;
        }
    </style>
<style>
    body {
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);
    }
  </style>
  </head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background min-h-screen flex flex-col">
<!-- TopAppBar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky z-50 bg-surface-container-low flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit">
<div class="flex items-center gap-4">
<button class="active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 text-primary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary font-bold">Flag Adventure</h1>
</div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-2 bg-secondary-container rounded-full px-3 py-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-secondary-container">120</span>
</div>
<button class="active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 text-primary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">volume_up</span>
</button>
</header>
<main class="flex-1 px-container-margin pt-gutter pb-32 max-w-2xl mx-auto w-full">
<!-- Progress Bar Section -->
<div class="mb-8">
<div class="flex justify-between items-end mb-2">
<span class="font-label-bold text-primary">Level 4</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">70% Complete</span>
</div>
<div class="h-4 w-full bg-surface-container-highest rounded-full overflow-hidden">
<div class="h-full bg-tertiary-container rounded-full transition-all duration-500 shadow-inner" style="width: 70%"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Question Section -->
<div class="text-center mb-10">
<div class="mb-6 flex justify-center">
<button aria-label="Listen to question" class="audio-pulse w-24 h-24 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center transition-transform active:scale-95">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white text-5xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
<h2 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md mb-2">¿Cuál es la bandera de Nueva Zelanda?</h2>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-surface-variant">Which is the flag of New Zealand?</p>
</div>
<!-- Quiz Options (Bento Style Grid) -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
<!-- New Zealand (Correct) -->
<div class="quiz-card flex flex-col items-center gap-4 group" onclick="selectOption(this)">
<div class="w-full aspect-video rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-outline-variant bg-white">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="The flag of New Zealand, featuring a deep blue field with the Union Jack in the upper left corner and four red five-pointed stars outlined in white on the right side. The style is clean, vibrant, and educational with soft lighting to emphasize the texture of the fabric.
