The overall aesthetic is premium and minimalist against a soft grey studio background." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuDYAMid8yOMwT5mxqL6vZ-RblKGCknnAGOHmdo6BZNnAx27JOxAxjFycgu7PLCOue7vcUOA5J4ldgS6P4tDtwYqi4PoJUm_HcvF1WmNZdxsONVkPrALWmIxf_YFri74SjrQgNmmCBJIoLn_TXsr66LsP7DkgLFpqKEayCx2nsy-ERBaONqXoHbfMc5pG2TKTRyKfrb7_0zwvugi9DBGMmrRTI8aLuqhtHFrm6FQwgRFefwtIDfBRzE9Pj5kdoQxill7AnTBXnttJyw"/>
</div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface-variant text-lg">New Zealand</span>
</div>
<!-- Australia -->
<div class="quiz-card flex flex-col items-center gap-4 group" onclick="selectOption(this)">
<div class="w-full aspect-video rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-outline-variant bg-white">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="The flag of Australia, showing a deep blue field with the Union Jack in the canton, a large white seven-pointed star below it, and five white stars representing the Southern Cross on the right. The image is rendered in a high-fidelity, educational style with vibrant saturation and soft shadows. The lighting is balanced and modern, fitting a premium children's learning interface." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuBsyZ6hrT4hlzfsczip0Pm94WCtLSqdtt3O5V5_IF9VX3gElvbK7Q6ETE2EipbCIOFp77NUIGssOWA6A2MoxO044ukLiEyciH30RbvUHv5eLL3P2pvI-4zekCmRrakEn4tR6vnEoOggj8PdL2iZwHt9Y4dEMsqkiER62wo0oBHUmFrX-OrdCy5QgNXDMoCg7CHcrLTt5pvm59MNRFdTAIEdeWwq_8tsIpvckiXwLeONXzQ457GZf-1po9DbBkGNn2LxR7yj9DuJbmA"/>
</div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface-variant text-lg">Australia</span>
</div>
<!-- United Kingdom -->
<div class="quiz-card flex flex-col items-center gap-4 group" onclick="selectOption(this)">
<div class="w-full aspect-video rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-outline-variant bg-white">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="The Union Jack flag of the United Kingdom, featuring overlapping red and white crosses on a blue background. The colors are bold and saturated for high legibility for young learners. The visual style is tactile and clean, presented as a high-quality physical learning card with rounded corners and premium texture. The setting is bright and cheerful." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuC0iBd0x3tliPWsNB6K1UnMpSVF7yhO37yYjOuuTZj9eHs3IOObC-aGqXc6RFDvPBPEv9jWsEqXAC04QL_bwruCbadK0XgTxKs21DGpibFcPjt8q1NuYrEU5KlypxHt6jsYh6p-IRBI3yzmAZgQndCV5JzvQEZ7H_zlHBCn9DFkRmCTq2V9A9Rkm4CAbMo3z-f8b4ceN5BORrgrhMgJJR4Uld1ZItY_dFCA2mljWWe4GA8xHgunIlQq6sx5hqak1I4h3n1o59GzyhY"/>
</div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface-variant text-lg">United Kingdom</span>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Action Button -->
<div class="mt-12 flex justify-center">
<button class="btn-chunky-primary w-full max-w-sm">
                COMPROBAR / CHECK
            </button>
</div>
</main>
<!-- BottomNavBar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg border-t-4 border-surface-variant rounded-t-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0 hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
</nav>
<script>
        function selectOption(el) {
            // Remove selection from others
            document.querySelectorAll('.quiz-card').forEach(card => {
                card.classList.remove('border-primary-container', 'bg-primary-fixed');
                card.style.borderColor = 'transparent';
            });
            // Highlight selected
            el.classList.add('bg-primary-fixed');
            el.style.borderColor = '#2bb1ff';
        }

        // Simple audio feedback simulation
        const audioBtn = document.querySelector('.audio-pulse');
        audioBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            audioBtn.style.transform = 'scale(0.9)';
            setTimeout(() => { audioBtn.style.transform = 'scale(1)'; }, 100);
            console.log("Playing audio: ¿Cuál es la bandera de Nueva Zelanda?");
        });
    </script>
</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (México) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="en" style=""><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport">
<title>Flag Adventure - México</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@400;500;700&amp;family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@100..900&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                "surface-tint": "#006495",
                "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                "on-background": "#171c21",
                "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                "on-error": "#ffffff",
                "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                "secondary": "#735c00",
                "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                "outline": "#6e7882",
                "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                "primary": "#006495",
                "on-surface": "#171c21",
                "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                "error": "#ba1a1a",
                "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                "background": "#f7f9ff",
                "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                "surface-dim": "#d6dae1"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                "lg": "2rem",
                "xl": "3rem",
                "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                "container-margin": "24px",
                "card-padding": "20px",
                "gutter": "16px",
                "touch-target-min": "48px",
                "unit": "8px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                "body-lg": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        body { font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; }
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 24;
            display: inline-block;
            vertical-align: middle;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-primary { box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #004b71; }
        .chunky-shadow-primary:active { transform: translateY(4px); box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #004b71; }
        
        .chunky-shadow-secondary { box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #dee3e9; }
        .chunky-shadow-secondary:active { transform: translateY(4px); box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #dee3e9; }

        .chunky-shadow-tertiary { box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #1f5100; }
        .chunky-shadow-tertiary:active { transform: translateY(4px); box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #1f5100; }

        .chunky-shadow-yellow { box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #b38f00; }
        .chunky-shadow-yellow:active { transform: translateY(4px); box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #b38f00; }

        .chunky-shadow-error { box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #93000a; }
        .chunky-shadow-error:active { transform: translateY(4px); box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #93000a; }

        .flag-canvas {
            aspect-ratio: 1.6 / 1;
            background: #ffffff;
            border: 4px solid #dee3e9;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .pulse-audio { animation: pulse 2s infinite; }
        @keyframes pulse {
            0% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); }
        }

        .confetti-piece { position: absolute; width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; opacity: 0; }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background min-h-screen pb-32">
<!-- Top AppBar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky z-50 bg-surface-container-low flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit h-16">
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary" data-icon="menu">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary tracking-tight">México</h1><button class="group flex items-center gap-2 bg-secondary-container px-4 py-2 rounded-full chunky-shadow-yellow active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
  <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container" data-icon="notifications_active">notifications_active</span>
  <span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-secondary-container">¡Alarma!</span>
</button><button class="flex items-center gap-2 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container px-4 py-2 rounded-full chunky-shadow-yellow active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 hover:bg-surface-variant group">
  <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl" data-icon="notifications_active">notifications_active</span>
  <div class="flex flex-col items-start leading-none">
    <span class="font-label-bold text-[12px]">¡Alarma!</span>
    <span class="font-body-md text-[10px] opacity-80">Sound Alarm</span>
  </div>
</button>
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</button>
</header>
<main class="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-container-margin pt-gutter flex flex-col gap-8">
<!-- Level & Progress Section -->
<div class="flex items-center justify-between bg-surface-container rounded-lg p-card-padding">
<div class="flex flex-col">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">Level 5</span>
<span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-primary">Master Painter</span>
</div>
<div class="w-48 bg-outline-variant h-4 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
<div class="bg-tertiary-container h-full w-4/5 rounded-full"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Main Workspace: Asymmetric Layout -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-gutter items-start">
<!-- Left Side: Paint & Mascot -->
<div class="lg:col-span-4 flex flex-col gap-6 order-2 lg:order-1">
<!-- Mascot Area -->
<div class="bg-primary-fixed rounded-lg p-card-padding flex items-center gap-4 relative overflow-hidden">
<img class="w-24 h-24 object-contain z-10" data-alt="A cute, friendly panda mascot with large expressive eyes, wearing a tiny red beret and holding a colorful paintbrush. The style is 3D-claymorphism with soft, rounded edges and vibrant saturated colors, standing in a studio with soft studio lighting. Minimalist clean background." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuCqx2L1TaoN_odIkWwvzsmWFQCOLoNxXOeC2r-OnDBPiLVlXHe18Bw1i3lyQUhwrTem8npBFHX9YumT4Y6wjZJAxly_-YBC2zONrXgI1TCzp_nkNieScvGfsbejapFYgjXReX_uqKyf-3bHjUq50GlB2525_o_UtZ1oMY5nW0O8lve1ifPAn1csZ5hqK9anFXKV6rf3QI8iDi7p6Zb3gHmEmJVNaF0XDd4bKDG6j3iSIijnt6WNDjQCNq36hdZ61ADFPEnZp3PTUfY">
<div class="flex flex-col z-10">
<p class="font-body-md text-body-md text-on-primary-fixed-variant leading-tight">¡Hola! Let's paint the flag!</p>
</div>
<!-- Decorative background shapes -->
<div class="absolute -right-4 -bottom-4 w-16 h-16 bg-primary-container opacity-30 rounded-full"></div>
</div>
<!-- Palette Section -->
<div class="flex flex-col gap-4">
<h3 class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface-variant px-2">Choose a color:</h3>
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4">
<!-- Verde -->
<button class="group flex items-center justify-between bg-white p-4 rounded-lg border-2 border-surface-variant chunky-shadow-secondary transition-all" id="btn-verde">
<div class="flex items-center gap-4">
<div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-[#006847] border-2 border-on-surface-variant"></div>
<span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-[#006847]">Verde</span>
</div>
<div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-secondary-container flex items-center justify-center pulse-audio chunky-shadow-yellow group-active:translate-y-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</div>
</button>
<!-- Blanco -->
<button class="group flex items-center justify-between bg-white p-4 rounded-lg border-2 border-surface-variant chunky-shadow-secondary transition-all" id="btn-blanco">
<div class="flex items-center gap-4">
<div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-white border-2 border-surface-variant"></div>
<span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-on-surface-variant">Blanco</span>
</div>
<div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-secondary-container flex items-center justify-center pulse-audio chunky-shadow-yellow group-active:translate-y-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</div>
</button>
<!-- Rojo -->
<button class="group flex items-center justify-between bg-white p-4 rounded-lg border-2 border-surface-variant chunky-shadow-secondary transition-all" id="btn-rojo">
<div class="flex items-center gap-4">
<div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-[#CE1126] border-2 border-on-surface-variant"></div>
<span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-[#CE1126]">Rojo</span>
</div>
<div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-secondary-container flex items-center justify-center pulse-audio chunky-shadow-yellow group-active:translate-y-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</div>
</button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Right Side: Flag Canvas -->
<div class="lg:col-span-8 flex flex-col gap-6 order-1 lg:order-2">
<div class="flag-canvas rounded-lg shadow-xl" id="flag-station">
<div class="grid grid-cols-3 h-full">
<!-- Left Panel (Green) -->
<div class="h-full border-r-2 border-surface-variant flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer transition-colors duration-300" id="panel-left">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-surface-variant text-6xl opacity-20" data-icon="brush">brush</span>
</div>
<!-- Center Panel (White) -->
<div class="h-full border-r-2 border-surface-variant flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer relative transition-colors duration-300" id="panel-center">
<img class="w-24 h-24 object-contain opacity-20 transition-opacity" data-alt="A stylized, simplified heraldic eagle perched on a cactus with a snake in its beak, representing the national coat of arms of Mexico. Flat design, bold outlines, minimalist educational style for children. Vibrant colors with soft shadows." id="eagle-seal" src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuBmfV_XDDI1BbsDoYEcA__TMp3s3ovs0Ww4jngphIJzafyaAREyIV-gueRIn20WbBvCN6HxmffUH_ufDR80j7mpN2Dx5QBytfJNkuawtKly2J71koFRhldox6Ajt3TJ5iYqngz14t-xHXKAYO3_Z6EfeSh0qA-jY1WjeTafySUJDspgz5Tjnpz00RiVUAyXmaDyE0Li1JQfoF8caD4PhqsKfA2C4L4QukdsweD8vIyJqrMtSt6acp6Vs7hSACFbZ-21s1-G2BuYYa8">
</div>
<!-- Right Panel (Red) -->
<div class="h-full flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer transition-colors duration-300" id="panel-right">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-surface-variant text-6xl opacity-20" data-icon="brush">brush</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Fact Card -->
<div class="bg-secondary-fixed rounded-lg p-card-padding flex gap-4 items-start border-b-8 border-secondary-fixed-dim">
<div class="bg-white p-2 rounded-lg shadow-sm">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-secondary text-3xl" data-icon="lightbulb">lightbulb</span>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-secondary-fixed">Fun Fact!</span>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-secondary-fixed-variant leading-tight">"El águila en la bandera vive en las montañas."</p>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Action Button -->
<button class="w-full py-6 bg-primary rounded-lg text-white font-headline-md chunky-shadow-primary flex items-center justify-center gap-3" id="finish-btn">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="check_circle" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">check_circle</span>
                    Ready to Fly!
                </button>
</div>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg border-t-4 border-surface-variant rounded-t-lg">
<div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="map">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="menu_book">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0 hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="quiz">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</div>
</nav>
<script>
        let selectedColor = null;
        let panelsColored = { left: false, center: false, right: false };

        const colors = {
            verde: '#006847',
            blanco: '#FFFFFF',
            rojo: '#CE1126'
        };

        const buttons = {
            verde: document.getElementById('btn-verde'),
            blanco: document.getElementById('btn-blanco'),
            rojo: document.getElementById('btn-rojo')
        };

        const panels = {
            left: document.getElementById('panel-left'),
            center: document.getElementById('panel-center'),
            right: document.getElementById('panel-right')
        };

        const seal = document.getElementById('eagle-seal');

        // Color selection logic
        Object.keys(buttons).forEach(color => {
            buttons[color].addEventListener('click', () => {
                selectedColor = color;
                // Reset visual state of all buttons
                Object.values(buttons).forEach(btn => btn.classList.replace('chunky-shadow-yellow', 'chunky-shadow-secondary'));
                // Highlight active
                buttons[color].classList.replace('chunky-shadow-secondary', 'chunky-shadow-yellow');
                
                // Play hypothetical audio feedback
                console.log(`Playing audio for: ${color}`);
            });
        });

        // Panel painting logic
        panels.left.addEventListener('click', () => {
            if (selectedColor === 'verde') {
                panels.left.style.backgroundColor = colors.verde;
                panels.left.innerHTML = '';
                panelsColored.left = true;
                checkCompletion();
            }
        });

        panels.center.addEventListener('click', () => {
            if (selectedColor === 'blanco') {
                panels.center.style.backgroundColor = colors.blanco;
                seal.classList.remove('opacity-20');
                seal.classList.add('opacity-100');
                panelsColored.center = true;
                checkCompletion();
            }
        });

        panels.right.addEventListener('click', () => {
            if (selectedColor === 'rojo') {
                panels.right.style.backgroundColor = colors.rojo;
                panels.right.innerHTML = '';
                panelsColored.right = true;
                checkCompletion();
            }
        });

        function checkCompletion() {
            if (panelsColored.left && panelsColored.center && panelsColored.right) {
                const finishBtn = document.getElementById('finish-btn');
                finishBtn.classList.replace('bg-primary', 'bg-tertiary-container');
                finishBtn.classList.add('chunky-shadow-tertiary');
                createConfetti();
            }
        }

        function createConfetti() {
            const container = document.getElementById('flag-station');
            for(let i=0; i<30; i++) {
                const conf = document.createElement('div');
                conf.className = 'confetti-piece';
                conf.style.left = Math.random() * 100 + '%';
                conf.style.top = Math.random() * 100 + '%';
                conf.style.backgroundColor = ['#006847', '#FFFFFF', '#CE1126', '#FCCC00'][Math.floor(Math.random()*4)];
                container.appendChild(conf);
                
                conf.animate([
                    { transform: 'translateY(0) rotate(0)', opacity: 1 },
                    { transform: `translateY(-${Math.random()*100 + 50}px) rotate(${Math.random()*360}deg)`, opacity: 0 }
                ], {
                    duration: 1000 + Math.random()*1000,
                    easing: 'ease-out'
                });
            }
        }
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Quiz Nivel 4: Filipinas -->
<!DOCTYPE html>

<html class="light" lang="en"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport"/>
<title>Flag Adventure - Level 4 Quiz</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@300;400;500;600;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "unit": "8px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif;
            -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
        }

        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }

        /* Tactile Button Styling */
        .btn-primary-tactile {
            background-color: #006495;
            color: white;
            border-bottom: 6px solid #004163;
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
        }
        .btn-primary-tactile:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            border-bottom-width: 0px;
        }

        .btn-secondary-tactile {
            background-color: #ffffff;
            color: #006495;
            border-bottom: 4px solid #dee3e9;
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
        }
        .btn-secondary-tactile:active {
            transform: translateY(2px);
            border-bottom-width: 0px;
        }

        /* Flag Card Tactical Feel */
        .flag-card {
            background: white;
            border: 2px solid #dee3e9;
            border-bottom: 8px solid #dee3e9;
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .flag-card:active {
            transform: translateY(6px);
            border-bottom-width: 2px;
        }
        .flag-card.selected {
            border-color: #006495;
            border-bottom-color: #004163;
            background-color: #cbe6ff;
        }

        /* Pulse animation for audio */
        @keyframes pulse-yellow {
            0% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(252, 204, 0, 0.7); }
            70% { transform: scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 0 0 15px rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
        }
        .audio-pulse {
            animation: pulse-yellow 2s infinite;
        }

        /* Progress Bar Animation */
        .progress-fill {
            transition: width 1s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1);
        }
    </style>
<style>
    body {
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);
    }
  </style>
  </head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background min-h-screen flex flex-col">
<!-- Top Navigation Bar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky bg-surface-container-low z-40 flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit h-16">
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<button class="p-2 active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container text-primary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0;">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary tracking-tight">Flag Adventure</h1>
</div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-3">
<div class="bg-secondary-container px-3 py-1 rounded-full flex items-center gap-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-sm" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">stars</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-secondary-container">Level 4</span>
</div>
<button class="p-2 active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container text-primary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0;">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</header>
<main class="flex-grow container mx-auto px-container-margin py-6 flex flex-col gap-8 max-w-2xl">
<!-- Progress Section -->
<div class="w-full space-y-2">
<div class="flex justify-between items-end mb-1">
<span class="font-label-bold text-primary flex items-center gap-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-lg" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">explore</span>
                    Casi llegamos!
                </span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">90%</span>
</div>
<div class="h-5 w-full bg-surface-container-highest rounded-full overflow-hidden border-2 border-surface-variant p-0.5">
<div class="progress-fill h-full bg-tertiary-container rounded-full" style="width: 90%;"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Question Section -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center text-center gap-6">
<div class="space-y-2">
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-primary">¿Cuál es la bandera de Filipinas?</h2>
<p class="font-body-md text-on-surface-variant italic">Which is the flag of Philippines?</p>
</div>
<!-- Large Interactive Audio Button -->
<button class="audio-pulse w-24 h-24 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center border-b-8 border-secondary active:border-b-0 active:translate-y-2 transition-all duration-75" onclick="playAudioPrompt()">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-5xl text-on-secondary-container" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
<!-- Quiz Options (Asymmetric Layout/Large Targets) -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-gutter mt-4">
<!-- Option 1: Philippines (Correct) -->
<div class="flag-card group rounded-lg p-card-padding flex flex-col items-center gap-4" onclick="selectOption(this)">
<div class="w-full aspect-[3/2] rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-outline-variant bg-surface-container shadow-inner">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="The national flag of the Philippines featuring a white equilateral triangle with a golden-yellow sun and three stars, a horizontal blue stripe on top, and a horizontal red stripe on the bottom. Minimalist clean lines with vibrant primary colors and a subtle fabric texture under studio lighting." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuBO-EPooAm41CKd_TWCPeIubzA6R3BqtAIeuA49w9agfbwr6geNk3XFn9yVFC7WcL08lIFLrzlGWugoJRPxTztibypa73IGq2T3hMIFD6Vv89fQWEjm8Bn8CMlC8cMyytFJYcDTLiFOBVoJsakv_IdCzRKLt5hYW-SwhqpqTXnzdYrFDM-zkud8YezFt0ONoUof-jhklZJODULT8qo69ppnHGgUzHPplj4vgmztkkW1uejqzqW5oH8EmnqXZOCF2kCC8pwBGzWQNIo"/>
</div>
<div class="text-center">
<p class="font-headline-md text-primary">Philippines</p>
<p class="font-body-md text-on-surface-variant">Filipinas</p>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Option 2: Vietnam -->
<div class="flag-card group rounded-lg p-card-padding flex flex-col items-center gap-4" onclick="selectOption(this)">
<div class="w-full aspect-[3/2] rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-outline-variant bg-surface-container shadow-inner">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="The national flag of Vietnam featuring a bright red background with a single large golden-yellow five-pointed star centered in the middle. The composition is clean and minimalist, using high-saturation colors that stand out against the white interface of a children educational app." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuCRepa-hZjUOBXtpXhCzFg5O3G1mibRGSYE6M4iriIzD45ZbIAyc1pZ0_vhOnp0hZs0gyFYCSHM4C9jXW4DTiFFinNZ3bs54OQwooG_BY2gXHwaJr0H1vM7HK8XR09m8hchC4IB29orOuXMsHc4XAW4QPnrQ2sEu6DFLq_GENx4K2tTgwIKPPLOh0pc0KwHO7c9fuWgsPjWJaJV2tT3nTH8osgdACwa7xH-DAKi_kQRZCvESBNO_zZFJ14QaCbzRWfoBE0fqS6V9o8"/>
</div>
<div class="text-center">
<p class="font-headline-md text-primary">Vietnam</p>
<p class="font-body-md text-on-surface-variant">Vietnam</p>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Option 3: China -->
<div class="flag-card group rounded-lg p-card-padding flex flex-col items-center gap-4" onclick="selectOption(this)">
<div class="w-full aspect-[3/2] rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-outline-variant bg-surface-container shadow-inner">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="The national flag of China featuring a vibrant red field with five golden stars in the upper-left corner. One large star is surrounded by four smaller stars arranged in an arc. The visual style is premium digital educational content with a soft glow and precise graphic elements." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuB3gSeqd-vVbvxzw4N5gcHGmv-6f8NqWdLg_wnC2OEEe2Bhi5TxHm_PeMZrDiISVmJ7OhjCZp-3fxitNYj97xOhUqAKegNOX3kSUiiVecK2xRQKzn-FhJSqHTa_pias5-wHk2KVBi1PxUNrwDdkmkBFluc9qQe9F6p4NljBjJwWGx5j-MbS2Vkm-9hzB7z1waDihnVL_u-S20quWqt5eDFemNnE8C29piNCs1kp3J0BdP1sJKOzn8Rvyuoe7m1jWxUX3_bRaJT5ozg"/>
</div>
<div class="text-center">
<p class="font-headline-md text-primary">China</p>
<p class="font-body-md text-on-surface-variant">China</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Action Button -->
<div class="mt-8 flex justify-center">
<button class="btn-primary-tactile w-full max-w-sm py-4 px-8 rounded-lg font-headline-md text-center opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed" disabled="" id="check-button">
                ¡Comprobar!
            </button>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Spacer for Bottom Nav -->
<div class="h-24"></div>
<!-- Bottom Navigation Bar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg border-t-4 border-surface-variant">
<!-- Explore Tab -->
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1 hover:bg-surface-variant rounded-lg" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0;">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</a>
<!-- Passport Tab -->
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1 hover:bg-surface-variant rounded-lg" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0;">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</a>
<!-- Play Tab (Active) -->
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0 shadow-sm" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
</nav>
<script>
        function selectOption(element) {
            // Remove selection from all cards
            document.querySelectorAll('.flag-card').forEach(card => {
                card.classList.remove('selected');
            });
            // Add selection to clicked card
            element.classList.add('selected');
            
            // Enable Check Button
            const btn = document.getElementById('check-button');
            btn.disabled = false;
            btn.classList.remove('opacity-50', 'cursor-not-allowed');
            
            // Interaction feedback
            if (window.navigator.vibrate) {
                window.navigator.vibrate(10);
            }
        }

        function playAudioPrompt() {
            // Simple visual feedback for audio play
            const btn = document.querySelector('.audio-pulse');
            btn.classList.remove('audio-pulse');
            void btn.offsetWidth; // Trigger reflow
            btn.classList.add('audio-pulse');
            
            console.log("Playing: ¿Cuál es la bandera de Filipinas?");
        }

        // Logic for checking (mock behavior)
        document.getElementById('check-button').addEventListener('click', function() {
            const selected = document.querySelector('.flag-card.selected');
            if (selected) {
                const country = selected.querySelector('.font-headline-md').innerText;
                if (country === 'Philippines') {
                    selected.classList.add('bg-tertiary-fixed-dim');
                    alert('¡Excelente! ✨ You found the flag of the Philippines!');
                } else {
                    selected.classList.add('bg-error-container');
                    alert('¡Oh no! Keep trying! Inténtalo de nuevo.');
                }
            }
        });
    </script>
</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Canadá) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport">
<title>Canadá - Flag Adventure</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        .filled-icon {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;
        }
        /* Custom Tactile Button Styles */
        .btn-primary {
            background-color: #006495; /* primary */
            border-bottom: 6px solid #004163; /* on-primary-container-ish for shadow */
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
        }
        .btn-primary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            border-bottom-width: 0px;
        }
        .btn-secondary {
            background-color: #ffffff;
            border-bottom: 6px solid #dee3e9;
            color: #006495;
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
        }
        .btn-secondary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            border-bottom-width: 0px;
        }
        /* Flag Painting Logic */
        .paint-target {
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: fill 0.3s ease;
        }
        /* Squishy interaction for cards */
        .squishy-card {
            border-bottom: 8px solid #eaeef5;
            transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275);
        }
        .squishy-card:active {
            transform: scale(0.98) translateY(4px);
            border-bottom-width: 2px;
        }
    </style>
<script id="tailwind-config">
        tailwind.config = {
            darkMode: "class",
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    "colors": {
                        "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                        "surface-tint": "#006495",
                        "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                        "on-background": "#171c21",
                        "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                        "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                        "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                        "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                        "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                        "on-error": "#ffffff",
                        "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                        "secondary": "#735c00",
                        "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                        "outline": "#6e7882",
                        "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                        "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                        "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                        "primary": "#006495",
                        "on-surface": "#171c21",
                        "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                        "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                        "error": "#ba1a1a",
                        "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                        "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                        "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                        "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                        "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                        "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                        "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                        "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                        "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                        "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                        "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                        "background": "#f7f9ff",
                        "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                        "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                        "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                        "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                        "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                        "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                        "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                        "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                        "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                        "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                        "surface-dim": "#d6dae1"
                    },
                    "borderRadius": {
                        "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                        "lg": "2rem",
                        "xl": "3rem",
                        "full": "9999px"
                    },
                    "spacing": {
                        "container-margin": "24px",
                        "card-padding": "20px",
                        "gutter": "16px",
                        "touch-target-min": "48px",
                        "unit": "8px"
                    },
                    "fontFamily": {
                        "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                        "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                        "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                        "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                        "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                        "body-lg": ["Quicksand"]
                    },
                    "fontSize": {
                        "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                        "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                        "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                        "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                        "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                        "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}]
                    }
                },
            },
        }
    </script>
<style>
    body {
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);
    }
  </style>
  </head>
<body class="bg-background font-body-md text-on-background min-h-screen flex flex-col pb-24 overflow-x-hidden">
<!-- TopAppBar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky z-40 bg-surface-container-low flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit h-16 shadow-none">
<div class="flex items-center gap-4">
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 text-primary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary tracking-tight">Flag Adventure</h1>
</div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<div class="bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container px-4 py-1 rounded-full font-label-bold flex items-center gap-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined filled-icon text-sm">stars</span>
<span class="">Nivel 5</span>
</div>
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 text-primary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</header>
<main class="flex-grow px-container-margin py-6 max-w-4xl mx-auto w-full">
<!-- Level Progress -->
<div class="mb-8">
<div class="flex justify-between items-end mb-2">
<span class="font-label-bold text-primary">¡Pinta la bandera!</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">80%</span>
</div>
<div class="h-4 w-full bg-surface-container-highest rounded-full overflow-hidden">
<div class="h-full bg-tertiary-container w-4/5 rounded-full"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Header Section -->
<section class="text-center mb-8">
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-on-surface mb-2">Canadá</h2>
<div class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-primary-fixed px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-on-primary-fixed-variant squishy-card">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">lightbulb</span>
<p class="font-body-md">"La hoja de la bandera es de un árbol de Arce."</p>
</div>
<div class="mt-4 flex justify-center">
    <button class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container px-6 py-3 rounded-lg squishy-card font-label-bold hover:bg-surface-variant transition-all duration-100">
        <span class="material-symbols-outlined filled-icon">notifications_active</span>
        <span class="">¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm</span>
    </button>
</div></section>
<!-- Canvas Area -->
<div class="relative bg-white rounded-lg p-6 shadow-xl border-2 border-surface-variant mb-8 aspect-[2/1] flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden">
<svg class="w-full h-full drop-shadow-md" id="canada-flag-svg" viewBox="0 0 200 100">
<!-- Left Red Strip -->
<rect class="paint-target" fill="#f0f4fb" height="100" id="left-rect" onclick="paintElement('left-rect')" stroke="#dee3e9" stroke-width="0.5" width="50" x="0" y="0"></rect>
<!-- Right Red Strip -->
<rect class="paint-target" fill="#f0f4fb" height="100" id="right-rect" onclick="paintElement('right-rect')" stroke="#dee3e9" stroke-width="0.5" width="50" x="150" y="0"></rect>
<!-- Middle White Section -->
<rect class="paint-target" fill="#ffffff" height="100" id="mid-rect" onclick="paintElement('mid-rect')" stroke="#dee3e9" stroke-width="0.5" width="100" x="50" y="0"></rect>
<!-- Maple Leaf -->
<path class="paint-target" d="M100 20 L103 30 L115 28 L112 38 L122 38 L115 48 L120 60 L108 55 L108 65 L100 65 L100 75 L100 65 L92 65 L92 55 L80 60 L85 48 L78 38 L88 38 L85 28 L97 30 Z" fill="none" id="maple-leaf" onclick="paintElement('maple-leaf')" stroke="#6e7882" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"></path>
</svg>
</div>
<!-- Color Palette Selection -->
<section class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-gutter mb-12">
<button class="color-btn relative flex items-center gap-4 p-card-padding bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-lg border-b-8 border-red-800 transition-all hover:bg-surface-container-low active:translate-y-1 active:border-b-0" onclick="selectColor('#ba1a1a', this)">
<div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-[#ba1a1a] shadow-inner flex items-center justify-center">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white hidden" id="check-red">check</span>
</div>
<div class="text-left">
<p class="font-headline-md text-on-surface">Rojo</p>
<p class="text-on-surface-variant font-label-bold">¡Pinta aquí!</p>
</div>
</button>
<button class="color-btn relative flex items-center gap-4 p-card-padding bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-lg border-b-8 border-surface-container-highest transition-all hover:bg-surface-container-low active:translate-y-1 active:border-b-0" onclick="selectColor('#ffffff', this)">
<div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-white border-2 border-outline-variant shadow-inner flex items-center justify-center">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary hidden" id="check-white">check</span>
</div>
<div class="text-left">
<p class="font-headline-md text-on-surface">Blanco</p>
<p class="text-on-surface-variant font-label-bold">¡Color de nieve!</p>
</div>
</button>
</section>
<!-- Action Buttons -->
<div class="flex flex-col gap-4">
<button class="w-full py-6 rounded-lg btn-primary text-white font-headline-md uppercase tracking-wider flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined filled-icon">celebration</span>
                ¡LISTO!
            </button>
<button class="w-full py-4 rounded-lg btn-secondary text-primary font-headline-md flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">restart_alt</span>
                Empezar de nuevo
            </button>
</div>
</main>
<!-- BottomNavBar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg border-t-4 border-surface-variant rounded-t-lg">
<button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</button>
<button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</button>
<button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0 hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined filled-icon">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</button>
</nav>
<!-- Success Feedback (Hidden by default) -->
<div class="fixed inset-0 bg-secondary-container/90 z-[100] flex flex-col items-center justify-center hidden pointer-events-none" id="celebration-overlay">
<div class="animate-bounce">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[120px] text-on-secondary-container">stars</span>
</div>
<h2 class="font-headline-lg text-on-secondary-container mt-4">¡Excelente!</h2>
<p class="font-body-lg text-on-secondary-container">Has pintado la bandera de Canadá</p>
</div>
<script>
        let selectedColor = null;

        function selectColor(color, btn) {
            selectedColor = color;
            
            // UI Feedback for color selection
            document.querySelectorAll('.color-btn').forEach(b => {
                b.classList.remove('ring-4', 'ring-primary-container');
                b.querySelector('span').classList.add('hidden');
            });
            
            btn.classList.add('ring-4', 'ring-primary-container');
            btn.querySelector('span').classList.remove('hidden');

            // Haptic-like visual feedback
            btn.style.transform = "scale(1.05)";
            setTimeout(() => btn.style.transform = "scale(1)", 100);
        }

        function paintElement(id) {
            if (!selectedColor) {
                alert("¡Primero elige un color!");
                return;
            }
            const el = document.getElementById(id);
            el.setAttribute('fill', selectedColor);
            el.setAttribute('stroke', selectedColor); // Remove outlines on paint
            
            // Check for completion
            checkCompletion();
        }

        function checkCompletion() {
            const left = document.getElementById('left-rect').getAttribute('fill');
            const right = document.getElementById('right-rect').getAttribute('fill');
            const leaf = document.getElementById('maple-leaf').getAttribute('fill');
            const mid = document.getElementById('mid-rect').getAttribute('fill');

            // Simplified win condition: all painted correctly
            if (left === '#ba1a1a' && right === '#ba1a1a' && leaf === '#ba1a1a' && mid === '#ffffff') {
                showCelebration();
            }
        }

        function showCelebration() {
            const overlay = document.getElementById('celebration-overlay');
            overlay.classList.remove('hidden');
            setTimeout(() => {
                overlay.classList.add('hidden');
            }, 3000);
        }

        // Initialize with prompt hint
        window.onload = () => {
            console.log("Flag Station Initialized for Level 5: Canada");
        };
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Corea del Sur) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="es" style=""><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport">
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@400;500;600;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "unit": "8px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        body { font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; }
        .tactile-shadow { border-bottom-width: 6px; }
        .tactile-active:active { transform: translateY(4px); border-bottom-width: 0px; margin-bottom: 6px; }
        .glass-panel { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); }
        .flag-path { transition: fill 0.3s ease; cursor: pointer; }
        .selected-brush { transform: scale(1.1) translateY(-8px); box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); }
        .swatch-active { outline: 4px solid #2bb1ff; outline-offset: 4px; }
        
        /* Particle animation for celebration */
        @keyframes float {
            0% { transform: translateY(0px) rotate(0deg); opacity: 1; }
            100% { transform: translateY(-100vh) rotate(360deg); opacity: 0; }
        }
        .particle { position: absolute; pointer-events: none; animation: float 3s linear forwards; }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background min-h-screen flex flex-col overflow-x-hidden">
<!-- TopAppBar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky bg-surface-container-low z-40">
<div class="flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit h-16">
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 hover:bg-primary-container rounded-full">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary tracking-tight">Corea del Sur</h1><button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 hover:bg-primary-container rounded-lg px-2 py-1">
  <span class="material-symbols-outlined">notifications_active</span>
  <span class="font-label-bold text-[10px] leading-tight">¡Alarma!</span>
</button><button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 hover:bg-primary-container rounded-lg px-2 py-1">
  <span class="material-symbols-outlined">notifications_active</span>
  <span class="font-label-bold text-[10px] leading-tight">¡Alarma!</span>
</button>
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 hover:bg-primary-container rounded-full">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</header>
<main class="flex-grow flex flex-col items-center px-container-margin pb-32">
<!-- Progress Bar Section -->
<div class="w-full max-w-md mt-6 mb-8 px-4">
<div class="flex justify-between items-end mb-2">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-primary">Nivel 5</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">Pintor de Banderas</span>
</div>
<div class="w-full h-4 bg-surface-variant rounded-full overflow-hidden">
<div class="w-3/4 h-full bg-tertiary-container rounded-full shadow-inner transition-all duration-1000 ease-out"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Canvas Area -->
<div class="relative w-full max-w-2xl aspect-[3/2] bg-white rounded-lg border-2 border-surface-variant shadow-lg p-6 mb-8 group overflow-hidden">
<!-- Animated Background Shader (Subtle texture) -->

<svg class="w-full h-full drop-shadow-md" id="flag-canvas" viewBox="0 0 900 600">
<!-- White Background Field -->
<rect class="flag-path" data-part="field" fill="#f0f4fb" height="600" stroke="#dee3e9" stroke-width="2" width="900"></rect>
<!-- Taegeuk (Center Symbol) -->
<g id="taegeuk">
<!-- Red Top -->
<path class="flag-path" d="M 450,300 m -150,0 a 150,150 0 1,1 300,0 a 75,75 0 1,1 -150,0 a 75,75 0 1,0 -150,0" data-part="taegeuk-red" fill="#f0f4fb" stroke="#dee3e9" stroke-width="2"></path>
<!-- Blue Bottom -->
<path class="flag-path" d="M 450,300 m -150,0 a 150,150 0 1,0 300,0 a 75,75 0 1,0 -150,0 a 75,75 0 1,1 -150,0" data-part="taegeuk-blue" fill="#f0f4fb" stroke="#dee3e9" stroke-width="2"></path>
</g>
<!-- Trigrams (Kwae) -->
<!-- Top Left: Heaven -->
<g class="trigram" transform="rotate(-33.69, 450, 300) translate(225, 210)">
<rect class="flag-path" data-part="kwae" fill="#f0f4fb" height="20" stroke="#dee3e9" stroke-width="1" width="150" x="0" y="0"></rect>
<rect class="flag-path" data-part="kwae" fill="#f0f4fb" height="20" stroke="#dee3e9" stroke-width="1" width="150" x="0" y="30"></rect>
<rect class="flag-path" data-part="kwae" fill="#f0f4fb" height="20" stroke="#dee3e9" stroke-width="1" width="150" x="0" y="60"></rect>
</g>
<!-- Bottom Right: Earth -->
<g class="trigram" transform="rotate(-33.69, 450, 300) translate(525, 210)">
<rect class="flag-path" data-part="kwae" fill="#f0f4fb" height="20" stroke="#dee3e9" stroke-width="1" width="70" x="0" y="0"></rect> <rect class="flag-path" data-part="kwae" fill="#f0f4fb" height="20" stroke="#dee3e9" stroke-width="1" width="70" x="80" y="0"></rect>
<rect class="flag-path" data-part="kwae" fill="#f0f4fb" height="20" stroke="#dee3e9" stroke-width="1" width="70" x="0" y="30"></rect> <rect class="flag-path" data-part="kwae" fill="#f0f4fb" height="20" stroke="#dee3e9" stroke-width="1" width="70" x="80" y="30"></rect>
<rect class="flag-path" data-part="kwae" fill="#f0f4fb" height="20" stroke="#dee3e9" stroke-width="1" width="70" x="0" y="60"></rect> <rect class="flag-path" data-part="kwae" fill="#f0f4fb" height="20" stroke="#dee3e9" stroke-width="1" width="70" x="80" y="60"></rect>
</g>
<!-- Top Right: Water -->
<g class="trigram" transform="rotate(33.69, 450, 300) translate(525, 210)">
<rect class="flag-path" data-part="kwae" fill="#f0f4fb" height="20" stroke="#dee3e9" stroke-width="1" width="70" x="0" y="0"></rect> <rect class="flag-path" data-part="kwae" fill="#f0f4fb" height="20" stroke="#dee3e9" stroke-width="1" width="70" x="80" y="0"></rect>
<rect class="flag-path" data-part="kwae" fill="#f0f4fb" height="20" stroke="#dee3e9" stroke-width="1" width="150" x="0" y="30"></rect>
<rect class="flag-path" data-part="kwae" fill="#f0f4fb" height="20" stroke="#dee3e9" stroke-width="1" width="70" x="0" y="60"></rect> <rect class="flag-path" data-part="kwae" fill="#f0f4fb" height="20" stroke="#dee3e9" stroke-width="1" width="70" x="80" y="60"></rect>
</g>
<!-- Bottom Left: Fire -->
<g class="trigram" transform="rotate(33.69, 450, 300) translate(225, 210)">
<rect class="flag-path" data-part="kwae" fill="#f0f4fb" height="20" stroke="#dee3e9" stroke-width="1" width="150" x="0" y="0"></rect>
<rect class="flag-path" data-part="kwae" fill="#f0f4fb" height="20" stroke="#dee3e9" stroke-width="1" width="70" x="0" y="30"></rect> <rect class="flag-path" data-part="kwae" fill="#f0f4fb" height="20" stroke="#dee3e9" stroke-width="1" width="70" x="80" y="30"></rect>
<rect class="flag-path" data-part="kwae" fill="#f0f4fb" height="20" stroke="#dee3e9" stroke-width="1" width="150" x="0" y="60"></rect>
</g>
</svg>
</div>
<!-- Palette Section -->
<div class="flex gap-gutter mb-8 overflow-x-auto pb-4 w-full justify-center">
<button class="color-swatch flex flex-col items-center gap-2 group transition-all duration-200 swatch-active" onclick="selectColor('#ffffff', this)">
<div class="w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-white border-4 border-surface-variant shadow-md tactile-shadow border-b-[8px] tactile-active flex items-center justify-center">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">format_paint</span>
</div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface">Blanco</span>
</button>
<button class="color-swatch flex flex-col items-center gap-2 group transition-all duration-200" onclick="selectColor('#cd2e3a', this)">
<div class="w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-[#cd2e3a] border-4 border-[#8b1f28] shadow-md tactile-shadow border-b-[8px] tactile-active flex items-center justify-center">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">format_paint</span>
</div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface">Rojo</span>
</button>
<button class="color-swatch flex flex-col items-center gap-2 group transition-all duration-200" onclick="selectColor('#0047a0', this)">
<div class="w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-[#0047a0] border-4 border-[#002d66] shadow-md tactile-shadow border-b-[8px] tactile-active flex items-center justify-center">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">format_paint</span>
</div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface">Azul</span>
</button>
<button class="color-swatch flex flex-col items-center gap-2 group transition-all duration-200" onclick="selectColor('#000000', this)">
<div class="w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-[#000000] border-4 border-[#333333] shadow-md tactile-shadow border-b-[8px] tactile-active flex items-center justify-center">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">format_paint</span>
</div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface">Negro</span>
</button>
</div>
<!-- Fun Fact Card (Bento Style) -->
<div class="w-full max-w-2xl bg-primary-fixed border-4 border-primary-container rounded-lg p-card-padding shadow-md flex items-start gap-4 mb-12">
<div class="bg-primary-container p-3 rounded-full shrink-0 flex items-center justify-center">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">lightbulb</span>
</div>
<div>
<h3 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-on-primary-container mb-2">¿Sabías qué?</h3>
<p class="font-body-md text-body-md text-on-primary-container">Los símbolos negros en las esquinas se llaman <strong class="text-primary">Trigramas</strong>. Cada uno representa un elemento de la naturaleza: ¡Cielo, Tierra, Agua y Fuego! El círculo del centro muestra el equilibrio perfecto del universo.</p>
</div>
</div>
<button class="w-full max-w-md bg-tertiary-container text-on-tertiary-container font-headline-md py-4 rounded-lg tactile-shadow border-b-[8px] border-[#1a4600] tactile-active mb-12 hidden opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-500" id="finish-btn">
            ¡Terminado! 🚀
        </button>
</main>
<!-- BottomNavBar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg border-t-4 border-surface-variant">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant transition-transform active:translate-y-1 duration-75 hover:bg-surface-variant" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant transition-transform active:translate-y-1 duration-75 hover:bg-surface-variant" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0 transition-transform active:translate-y-1 duration-75" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Success Modal Overlay -->
<div class="fixed inset-0 z-[100] hidden flex items-center justify-center bg-surface-tint/40 backdrop-blur-md" id="success-modal">
<div class="bg-white p-8 rounded-xl max-w-sm w-full text-center shadow-2xl scale-0 transition-transform duration-500 border-4 border-secondary-container">
<div class="w-32 h-32 mx-auto mb-6 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white text-6xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">stars</span>
</div>
<h2 class="font-headline-lg text-headline-lg text-primary mb-4">¡Impresionante!</h2>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-surface-variant mb-8">Has completado la bandera de Corea del Sur perfectamente.</p>
<button class="w-full bg-primary py-4 rounded-lg text-white font-headline-md tactile-shadow border-b-[8px] border-on-primary-fixed-variant tactile-active" onclick="location.reload()">
                Siguiente Aventura
            </button>
</div>
</div>
<script>
        let currentColor = '#ffffff';
        const paintPaths = document.querySelectorAll('.flag-path');
        const finishBtn = document.getElementById('finish-btn');
        const successModal = document.getElementById('success-modal');
        
        const correctColors = {
            'field': '#ffffff',
            'taegeuk-red': '#cd2e3a',
            'taegeuk-blue': '#0047a0',
            'kwae': '#000000'
        };

        const currentFlagState = {
            'field': false,
            'taegeuk-red': false,
            'taegeuk-blue': false,
            'kwae_count': 0
        };

        function selectColor(color, el) {
            currentColor = color;
            document.querySelectorAll('.color-swatch').forEach(swatch => swatch.classList.remove('swatch-active'));
            el.classList.add('swatch-active');
            
            // Audio feedback
            const audio = new Audio('https://www.soundjay.com/buttons/button-37a.mp3');
            audio.volume = 0.2;
            audio.play().catch(() => {});
        }

        paintPaths.forEach(path => {
            path.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                path.setAttribute('fill', currentColor);
                path.setAttribute('stroke', 'none');
                
                const part = path.getAttribute('data-part');
                checkProgress(part, currentColor);
            });
        });

        function checkProgress(part, color) {
            if (part === 'kwae') {
                if (color === '#000000') currentFlagState.kwae_count++;
            } else {
                if (color === correctColors[part]) currentFlagState[part] = true;
            }

            // Simple check logic
            if (currentFlagState['field'] && currentFlagState['taegeuk-red'] && 
                currentFlagState['taegeuk-blue'] && currentFlagState.kwae_count >= 12) {
                showFinishButton();
            }
        }

        function showFinishButton() {
            finishBtn.classList.remove('hidden');
            setTimeout(() => {
                finishBtn.classList.remove('opacity-0');
                finishBtn.classList.add('opacity-100');
            }, 50);
        }

        finishBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            successModal.classList.remove('hidden');
            setTimeout(() => {
                successModal.querySelector('div').classList.remove('scale-0');
                successModal.querySelector('div').classList.add('scale-100');
                celebrate();
            }, 100);
        });

        function celebrate() {
            const colors = ['#fccc00', '#2bb1ff', '#59be1b', '#ba1a1a'];
            for (let i = 0; i < 50; i++) {
                const p = document.createElement('div');
                p.className = 'particle material-symbols-outlined';
                p.style.left = Math.random() * 100 + 'vw';
                p.style.top = '100vh';
                p.style.color = colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)];
                p.style.fontSize = (Math.random() * 20 + 20) + 'px';
                p.style.animationDelay = (Math.random() * 2) + 's';
                p.innerText = 'star';
                p.style.fontVariationSettings = "'FILL' 1";
                document.body.appendChild(p);
                
                setTimeout(() => p.remove(), 5000);
            }
        }
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Egipto) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport">
<title>Flag Adventure - Egipto</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
