                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "unit": "8px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}]
            }
          }
        }
      }
    </script>
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 24;
        }
        
        /* Tactical Shadows for Buttons */
        .btn-chunky-primary {
            @apply transition-all duration-75 active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        .btn-chunky-secondary {
            @apply transition-all duration-75 active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #bec8d3;
        }
        .btn-chunky-yellow {
            @apply transition-all duration-75 active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #b38f00;
        }

        /* Paint Interaction Styles */
        .paint-surface {
            transition: background-color 0.3s ease;
        }
        .color-active {
            transform: scale(1.1) translateY(-4px);
            outline: 4px solid #006495;
        }

        @keyframes pulse-audio {
            0% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); }
        }
        .animate-audio {
            animation: pulse-audio 2s infinite ease-in-out;
        }
    </style>
<style>
    body {
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);
    }
  </style>
  </head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background font-body-md min-h-screen pb-32">
<!-- Top App Bar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky z-50 bg-surface-container-low flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit">
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container active:translate-y-1 transition-all">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary">Flag Adventure</h1>
</div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-4">
<div class="bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container px-4 py-1 rounded-full font-label-bold flex items-center gap-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[20px]" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">stars</span>
<span class="">Nivel 5</span>
</div>
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container active:translate-y-1 transition-all">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</header>
<main class="max-w-md mx-auto px-container-margin pt-6 flex flex-col gap-6">
<!-- Header Section -->
<section class="text-center">
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-on-surface mb-2">Egipto</h2>
<p class="text-body-md text-on-surface-variant">¡Pinta la bandera para ganar tu medalla!</p>
<button class="mt-4 mx-auto w-16 h-16 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center btn-chunky-yellow animate-audio gap-1">
  <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-3xl">notifications_active</span>
  <span class="text-[10px] font-label-bold leading-none">¡Alarma!</span>
</button></section>
<!-- Flag Canvas -->
<section class="relative bg-white rounded-lg border-4 border-surface-variant p-4 shadow-sm">
<div class="aspect-[3/2] flex flex-col cursor-pointer overflow-hidden rounded-md border-2 border-outline-variant" id="flag-canvas">
<!-- Top Stripe -->
<div class="flex-1 paint-surface bg-surface-container-highest border-b-2 border-outline-variant flex items-center justify-center" id="stripe-top">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-surface-variant opacity-20 text-6xl">format_paint</span>
</div>
<!-- Middle Stripe -->
<div class="flex-1 paint-surface bg-white relative flex items-center justify-center" id="stripe-middle">
<!-- Eagle Emblem -->
<div class="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center pointer-events-none">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-fixed-variant text-7xl opacity-80" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">cable</span>
</div>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-surface-variant opacity-20 text-6xl">format_paint</span>
</div>
<!-- Bottom Stripe -->
<div class="flex-1 paint-surface bg-surface-container-highest border-t-2 border-outline-variant flex items-center justify-center" id="stripe-bottom">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-surface-variant opacity-20 text-6xl">format_paint</span>
</div>
</div>
</section>
<!-- Palette Selection -->
<section class="flex justify-between items-center bg-surface-container p-card-padding rounded-lg">
<div class="flex gap-4">
<!-- Red -->
<button class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-[#ba1a1a] border-4 border-white shadow-md active:translate-y-1 transition-all" onclick="selectColor('bg-[#ba1a1a]', this)"></button>
<!-- White -->
<button class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-white border-4 border-outline-variant shadow-md active:translate-y-1 transition-all" onclick="selectColor('bg-white', this)"></button>
<!-- Black -->
<button class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-[#171c21] border-4 border-white shadow-md active:translate-y-1 transition-all" onclick="selectColor('bg-[#171c21]', this)"></button>
</div>
<button class="w-16 h-16 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center btn-chunky-yellow animate-audio">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-3xl">record_voice_over</span>
</button>
</section>
<!-- Fun Fact Card -->
<div class="bg-primary-fixed text-on-primary-fixed p-card-padding rounded-lg flex items-start gap-4">
<div class="bg-primary p-2 rounded-xl text-white">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">lightbulb</span>
</div>
<div>
<h3 class="font-label-bold mb-1">¿Sabías que?</h3>
<p class="font-body-md">¡En Egipto hay pirámides gigantes!</p>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Action Button -->
<button class="w-full py-5 bg-primary text-white font-headline-md rounded-lg btn-chunky-primary flex items-center justify-center gap-2" id="check-flag">
<span class="">¡Revisar Bandera!</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">check_circle</span>
</button>
<!-- Contextual Visual (Pyramids) -->
<section class="mt-4 rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm border-2 border-surface-variant">
<div class="bg-cover bg-center h-48 w-full" data-alt="A vibrant and playful digital illustration of the Great Pyramids of Giza under a clear blue sky. The style is educational and child-friendly with soft, rounded geometric shapes and a cheerful, warm lighting. Tiny cartoon camels graze nearby. The colors are predominantly sandy yellows and deep sky blues, matching a premium educational app aesthetic." style="background-image: url('https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuDLy0ddAgCoLiBiQ3KYjYzIw_ZgjXjHSix51JRGZV1eWugy4RHRBVFITTwMwlAU80k41vmnFvgSCb5rfHoMBLeI0zrrQvEzuZ-KlMfOacSCsYe0kxjxO_fQq3NtRUdWJ35Ra5jV-VO7JjpuVkKIbu0YZ-ELKt-PQ_1FaYqRJ3oigzGoKNdxtwjZxGCIAfnCUz0L_PmPS5cGa6g4O1OMOWPRWAnvv-cGj8FJ_40eQxEFzp4gG7le5FnIkmnisCj03gcav25AKOrYFhY')"></div>
</section>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation Bar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg border-t-4 border-surface-variant rounded-t-lg">
<div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0 hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</div>
</nav>
<script>
        let currentColor = '';

        function selectColor(colorClass, element) {
            currentColor = colorClass;
            // Remove active state from all buttons
            document.querySelectorAll('section button').forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove('color-active'));
            // Add active state to selected
            element.classList.add('color-active');
        }

        // Apply color to flag stripes
        document.querySelectorAll('.paint-surface').forEach(stripe => {
            stripe.addEventListener('click', function() {
                if (currentColor) {
                    // Remove current bg classes
                    this.className = this.className.replace(/bg-\[[^\]]+\]|bg-white|bg-surface-container-highest/g, '').trim();
                    // Add new color class
                    this.classList.add(currentColor);
                    // Hide the "paint" icon hint
                    const icon = this.querySelector('.material-symbols-outlined');
                    if (icon) icon.style.opacity = '0';
                }
            });
        });

        // Simple feedback for the check button
        document.getElementById('check-flag').addEventListener('click', function() {
            const top = document.getElementById('stripe-top');
            const mid = document.getElementById('stripe-middle');
            const bot = document.getElementById('stripe-bottom');

            // Correct Egypt sequence: Red, White, Black
            const isCorrect = top.classList.contains('bg-[#ba1a1a]') && 
                              mid.classList.contains('bg-white') && 
                              bot.classList.contains('bg-[#171c21]');

            if (isCorrect) {
                alert('¡Excelente! ¡Has completado la bandera de Egipto!');
                this.classList.replace('bg-primary', 'bg-tertiary-container');
                this.innerHTML = '<span>¡Completado!</span> <span class="material-symbols-outlined">stars</span>';
            } else {
                alert('¡Casi lo tienes! El orden es Rojo, Blanco y Negro.');
            }
        });
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Grecia) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport">
<title>Flag Adventure - Grecia</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        .tactile-shadow-primary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        .tactile-shadow-primary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        .tactile-shadow-white {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #dee3e9;
        }
        .tactile-shadow-white:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #dee3e9;
        }
        .tactile-shadow-yellow {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #b28900;
        }
        .canvas-container {
            aspect-ratio: 3/2;
            cursor: url('https://fonts.gstatic.com/s/i/materialiconsoutlined/brush/v12/24px.svg'), auto;
        }
        .pulse-animation {
            animation: pulse 2s infinite;
        }
        @keyframes pulse {
            0% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); }
        }
        .flag-stripe {
            transition: background-color 0.3s ease;
        }
    </style>
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                "surface-tint": "#006495",
                "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                "on-background": "#171c21",
                "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                "on-error": "#ffffff",
                "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                "secondary": "#735c00",
                "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                "outline": "#6e7882",
                "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                "primary": "#006495",
                "on-surface": "#171c21",
                "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                "error": "#ba1a1a",
                "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                "background": "#f7f9ff",
                "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                "surface-dim": "#d6dae1"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                "lg": "2rem",
                "xl": "3rem",
                "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                "container-margin": "24px",
                "card-padding": "20px",
                "gutter": "16px",
                "touch-target-min": "48px",
                "unit": "8px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                "body-lg": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}]
            }
          }
        }
      }
    </script>
</head>
<body class="bg-background font-body-md text-on-background min-h-screen flex flex-col overflow-x-hidden">
<!-- Top Navigation -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky bg-surface-container-low z-40 flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit h-16">
<div class="flex items-center gap-4">
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-2xl">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary font-bold">Flag Adventure</h1>
</div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<div class="bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container px-4 py-1 rounded-full font-label-bold flex items-center gap-2">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
                Level 5
            </div>
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-2xl">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</header>
<main class="flex-grow flex flex-col items-center px-container-margin py-unit gap-gutter max-w-2xl mx-auto w-full">
<!-- Header Section -->
<section class="w-full text-center mt-4">
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-primary-container drop-shadow-sm mb-2">¡Pintemos Grecia!</h2><div class="flex justify-center mb-4"><button class="flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-2 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-full font-label-bold tactile-shadow-yellow hover:brightness-110 active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">notifications_active</span><span class="">¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm</span></button></div>
<div class="bg-primary-fixed text-on-primary-fixed-variant px-6 py-3 rounded-lg font-body-md inline-block shadow-sm">
                Grecia tiene miles de islas rodeadas de mar azul. 🌊
            </div>
</section>
<!-- Interactive Paint Station Canvas -->
<section class="w-full relative flex flex-col items-center">
<div class="canvas-container w-full bg-white border-4 border-surface-variant rounded-lg overflow-hidden shadow-xl relative grid grid-cols-1 grid-rows-9" id="flag-canvas">
<!-- Greece Flag Structure: 9 stripes + canton -->
<div class="flag-stripe bg-surface-container-low border-b border-surface-variant/20" data-id="1" data-part="stripe"></div>
<div class="flag-stripe bg-white border-b border-surface-variant/20" data-id="2" data-part="stripe"></div>
<div class="flag-stripe bg-surface-container-low border-b border-surface-variant/20" data-id="3" data-part="stripe"></div>
<div class="flag-stripe bg-white border-b border-surface-variant/20" data-id="4" data-part="stripe"></div>
<div class="flag-stripe bg-surface-container-low border-b border-surface-variant/20" data-id="5" data-part="stripe"></div>
<div class="flag-stripe bg-white border-b border-surface-variant/20" data-id="6" data-part="stripe"></div>
<div class="flag-stripe bg-surface-container-low border-b border-surface-variant/20" data-id="7" data-part="stripe"></div>
<div class="flag-stripe bg-white border-b border-surface-variant/20" data-id="8" data-part="stripe"></div>
<div class="flag-stripe bg-surface-container-low" data-id="9" data-part="stripe"></div>
<!-- Canton with Cross -->
<div class="absolute top-0 left-0 w-[44.4%] h-[55.5%] bg-surface-container-low border-r-2 border-b-2 border-surface-variant flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden" data-part="canton">
<!-- Cross Vertical -->
<div class="absolute w-[20%] h-full bg-white" data-part="cross-v"></div>
<!-- Cross Horizontal -->
<div class="absolute h-[20%] w-full bg-white" data-part="cross-h"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Selection Indicator -->
<div class="absolute -top-4 -right-4 bg-tertiary-container text-white p-2 rounded-full shadow-lg z-10 hidden" id="paint-indicator">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">brush</span>
</div>
</section>
<!-- Color Palette Bento -->
<section class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-gutter w-full mt-4 h-auto">
<!-- Azul Selector -->
<button class="color-btn group flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-white p-card-padding rounded-lg tactile-shadow-white border-2 border-surface-variant transition-all h-36" onclick="selectColor('#006495', 'azul')">
<div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-primary mb-2 shadow-inner border-4 border-white group-[.active]:ring-4 group-[.active]:ring-primary-container"></div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-primary">Azul</span>
</button>
<!-- Blanco Selector -->
<button class="color-btn group flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-white p-card-padding rounded-lg tactile-shadow-white border-2 border-surface-variant transition-all h-36" onclick="selectColor('#ffffff', 'blanco')">
<div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-white mb-2 shadow-inner border-4 border-surface-variant group-[.active]:ring-4 group-[.active]:ring-primary-container"></div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">Blanco</span>
</button>
</section>
<!-- Progress and Actions -->
<section class="w-full flex items-center justify-between bg-surface-container-highest/30 p-card-padding rounded-xl mt-4">
<div class="flex-grow mr-6">
<div class="flex justify-between mb-2">
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">Progreso</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-primary" id="progress-text">0%</span>
</div>
<div class="h-4 bg-surface-variant rounded-full overflow-hidden">
<div class="h-full bg-tertiary-container transition-all duration-500 w-0" id="progress-bar"></div>
</div>
</div>
<button class="px-8 py-4 bg-primary text-white font-headline-md rounded-lg opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed transition-all duration-300 tactile-shadow-primary flex items-center gap-2" disabled="" id="finish-btn">
                ¡Listo! <span class="material-symbols-outlined">check_circle</span>
</button>
</section>
<!-- Visual Context -->
<section class="w-full mt-8 mb-24 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-gutter">
<div class="relative rounded-lg overflow-hidden h-48 shadow-lg">
<div class="w-full h-full bg-cover bg-center" data-alt="A cinematic photo of the vibrant Greek coastline with white buildings and bright blue rooftops overlooking a crystalline turquoise Mediterranean sea. The lighting is bright and warm, capturing a summery midday atmosphere. Minimalist and premium photography style for children's education." style="background-image: url('https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuDA9F-5Q_ULERRmAfS-SKTkfEAxODVT3TT5oS3DPhedperpRDYVdbirPH4prFi6s0sT78ok-hEWzpBkeI1a3X1zIlwWGwobLpIdU8T4-JXLNyrn4M_vfU0vLWMo69wUZ0r3XRxCcRF9opBRcW9u1vz064_imeSXXZCCQiLANrmhjwTK9k2e9-XUOZAe6HxHHZK7dAE_wDVMiu1vNu-p1J3QcvpsydGIJ3eCbYH5UhrEbUoO5wPkZ1YTxRCuLMX739Ru6gtlGG_cwhU')"></div>
<div class="absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm p-3 text-white font-label-bold">
                    Islas Griegas
                </div>
</div>
<div class="bg-secondary-fixed text-on-secondary-fixed-variant p-card-padding rounded-lg flex items-center gap-4">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-4xl pulse-animation" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">quiz</span>
<p class="font-body-md">¿Sabías que el azul de la bandera representa el mar y el cielo de Grecia?</p>
</div>
</section>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation Bar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg border-t-4 border-surface-variant rounded-t-lg">
<button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-75">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</button>
<button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-75">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</button>
<button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0 hover:bg-surface-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-75">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</button>
</nav>
<!-- Success Modal -->
<div class="fixed inset-0 z-[100] hidden flex items-center justify-center p-container-margin" id="success-modal">
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-secondary/80 backdrop-blur-md"></div>
<div class="bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-xl p-8 max-w-sm w-full relative z-10 text-center shadow-2xl tactile-shadow-white">
<div class="w-32 h-32 bg-secondary-container rounded-full mx-auto mb-6 flex items-center justify-center pulse-animation">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-6xl text-on-secondary-container" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">workspace_premium</span>
</div>
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-secondary mb-2">¡Increíble!</h2>
<p class="font-body-lg text-on-surface-variant mb-8">Has completado la bandera de Grecia perfectamente. ¡Eres un experto!</p>
<button class="w-full py-4 bg-tertiary-container text-white font-headline-md rounded-lg tactile-shadow-yellow hover:brightness-110" onclick="location.reload()">
                ¡Siguiente Nivel!
            </button>
</div>
</div>
<script>
        let currentColor = null;
        let paintedCount = 0;
        const totalParts = 12; // 9 stripes + canton + 2 cross parts
        const paintedParts = new Set();

        function selectColor(color, name) {
            currentColor = color;
            document.querySelectorAll('.color-btn').forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove('active', 'border-primary-container', 'ring-4', 'ring-primary-container'));
            event.currentTarget.classList.add('active', 'border-primary-container', 'ring-4', 'ring-primary-container');
            document.getElementById('paint-indicator').classList.remove('hidden');
        }

        document.querySelectorAll('.flag-stripe, [data-part="canton"], [data-part="cross-v"], [data-part="cross-h"]').forEach(el => {
            el.addEventListener('click', function() {
                if (!currentColor) return;
                
                this.style.backgroundColor = currentColor;
                
                const partId = this.dataset.part + (this.dataset.id || '');
                if (!paintedParts.has(partId)) {
                    paintedParts.add(partId);
                    updateProgress();
                }

                // Add "painted" visual haptic
                this.classList.add('brightness-125');
                setTimeout(() => this.classList.remove('brightness-125'), 200);
            });
        });

        function updateProgress() {
            const progress = Math.min(Math.round((paintedParts.size / totalParts) * 100), 100);
            document.getElementById('progress-bar').style.width = progress + '%';
            document.getElementById('progress-text').innerText = progress + '%';

            if (progress >= 100) {
                const btn = document.getElementById('finish-btn');
                btn.disabled = false;
                btn.classList.remove('opacity-50', 'cursor-not-allowed');
                btn.classList.add('pulse-animation', 'cursor-pointer');
            }
        }

        document.getElementById('finish-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
            document.getElementById('success-modal').classList.remove('hidden');
        });

        // Initialize sparkles on success background logic (visual only)
        function createSparkle() {
            if (document.getElementById('success-modal').classList.contains('hidden')) return;
            const sparkle = document.createElement('div');
            sparkle.className = 'absolute bg-white rounded-full w-2 h-2 animate-ping';
            sparkle.style.left = Math.random() * 100 + '%';
            sparkle.style.top = Math.random() * 100 + '%';
            document.querySelector('#success-modal .absolute').appendChild(sparkle);
            setTimeout(() => sparkle.remove(), 1000);
        }
        setInterval(createSparkle, 300);
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Noruega) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="es" style=""><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport">
<title>Flag Adventure - Noruega</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@300;400;500;600;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "unit": "8px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 24;
            user-select: none;
        }
        
        .chunky-button-primary {
            @apply bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container border-b-[6px] border-primary active:translate-y-[4px] active:border-b-0 transition-all duration-75;
        }
        
        .chunky-card {
            @apply bg-surface-container-lowest border-2 border-surface-variant border-b-[8px] rounded-lg;
        }

        .nordic-cross-container {
            aspect-ratio: 22 / 16;
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        .paint-active {
            filter: drop-shadow(0 0 12px rgba(0, 100, 149, 0.4));
            transform: scale(1.05);
        }

        .sparkle-particle {
            position: absolute;
            pointer-events: none;
            animation: fly 0.8s ease-out forwards;
        }

        @keyframes fly {
            0% { transform: translate(0, 0) scale(1); opacity: 1; }
            100% { transform: translate(var(--tw-translate-x), var(--tw-translate-y)) scale(0); opacity: 0; }
        }
    </style>
<style>
    body {
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);
    }
  </style>
  <style>
            @keyframes shake {
                0%, 100% { transform: translateX(0); }
                25% { transform: translateX(-5px); }
                75% { transform: translateX(5px); }
            }
            .animate-shake { animation: shake 0.2s cubic-bezier(.36,.07,.19,.97) both 2; }
        </style></head>
<body class="bg-background font-body-md text-on-background selection:bg-primary-container min-h-screen pb-32">
<!-- Top App Bar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky z-40 flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit bg-surface-container-low">
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 hover:bg-primary-container rounded-full">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="menu">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary tracking-tight">Flag Adventure</h1>
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 hover:bg-primary-container rounded-full">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</button>
</header>
<main class="max-w-md mx-auto px-container-margin pt-gutter">
<!-- Header Section -->
<div class="flex justify-between items-end mb-gutter">
<div>
<p class="text-tertiary font-label-bold mb-1">Nivel 5</p>
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-on-surface">Noruega</h2>
</div>
<div class="bg-secondary-container px-4 py-2 rounded-full border-b-4 border-secondary flex items-center gap-2">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container" data-icon="star" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-secondary-container">125</span>
</div>
<button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-1 group active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
  <div class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container border-b-4 border-primary rounded-full hover:brightness-95">
    <span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="notifications_active">notifications_active</span>
  </div>
  <span class="text-[10px] font-label-bold text-primary uppercase tracking-wider">¡Alarma!</span>
</button><button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-1 group active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
  <div class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container border-b-4 border-secondary rounded-full hover:brightness-95">
    <span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="notifications_active">notifications_active</span>
  </div>
  <span class="text-[10px] font-label-bold text-secondary uppercase tracking-wider">¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm</span>
</button></div>
<!-- Progress Bar -->
<div class="w-full h-4 bg-surface-container-highest rounded-full mb-8 overflow-hidden">
<div class="h-full bg-tertiary-container w-2/3 rounded-full transition-all duration-500"></div>
</div>
<!-- Canvas Area -->
<div class="chunky-card p-card-padding mb-8 bg-white relative overflow-hidden">
<div class="nordic-cross-container w-full relative border-2 border-surface-variant overflow-hidden rounded-md bg-surface-container-high transition-transform" id="flag-canvas">
<!-- Norway Flag Structure (Nordic Cross) -->
<!-- Background (Red Area) -->
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-surface-container hover:brightness-95 transition-all" id="part-red" onclick="paintPart(this, 'bg-error')"></div>
<!-- White Cross -->
<div class="absolute left-[27%] top-0 bottom-0 w-[18%] bg-surface-container-highest hover:brightness-95 transition-all" id="part-white-v" onclick="paintPart(this, 'bg-white')"></div>
<div class="absolute top-[37%] left-0 right-0 h-[25%] bg-surface-container-highest hover:brightness-95 transition-all" id="part-white-h" onclick="paintPart(this, 'bg-white')"></div>
<!-- Blue Inner Cross -->
<div class="absolute left-[31.5%] top-0 bottom-0 w-[9%] bg-surface-dim hover:brightness-95 transition-all" id="part-blue-v" onclick="paintPart(this, 'bg-primary')"></div>
<div class="absolute top-[44%] left-0 right-0 h-[12%] bg-surface-dim hover:brightness-95 transition-all" id="part-blue-h" onclick="paintPart(this, 'bg-primary')"></div>
</div>
<div class="mt-6 flex justify-center items-center gap-2 text-on-surface-variant">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="touch_app">touch_app</span>
<span class="text-label-bold">¡Toca para pintar!</span>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Palette Section -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-gutter mb-8">
<button class="color-swatch flex flex-col items-center gap-2 group" onclick="selectColor('bg-error', this)">
<div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-error border-b-[6px] border-red-900 group-active:translate-y-1 group-active:border-b-0 transition-all outline outline-offset-4 outline-transparent" id="swatch-red"></div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface">Rojo</span>
</button>
<button class="color-swatch flex flex-col items-center gap-2 group" onclick="selectColor('bg-white', this)">
<div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-white border-2 border-surface-variant border-b-[6px] border-surface-dim group-active:translate-y-1 group-active:border-b-0 transition-all outline outline-offset-4 outline-transparent" id="swatch-white"></div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface">Blanco</span>
</button>
<button class="color-swatch flex flex-col items-center gap-2 group" onclick="selectColor('bg-primary', this)">
<div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-primary border-b-[6px] border-primary-container group-active:translate-y-1 group-active:border-b-0 transition-all outline outline-offset-4 outline-transparent" id="swatch-blue"></div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface">Azul</span>
</button>
</div>
<!-- Fun Fact Card -->
<div class="chunky-card bg-primary-fixed p-card-padding flex items-start gap-4 mb-8">
<div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-primary-container flex items-center justify-center shrink-0">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white" data-icon="lightbulb" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">lightbulb</span>
</div>
<div>
<h4 class="font-label-bold text-on-primary-fixed-variant mb-1">¿Sabías que...?</h4>
<p class="text-body-md text-on-primary-fixed-variant">En Noruega hay montañas gigantes llenas de nieve ¡donde puedes esquiar incluso en verano! 🏔️❄️</p>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Secondary Action -->
<div class="flex gap-4">
<button class="flex-1 chunky-button-primary py-4 px-6 rounded-lg font-label-bold flex items-center justify-center gap-2" onclick="checkFlag()">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="check_circle">check_circle</span>
                ¡LISTO!
            </button>
<button class="w-16 h-16 flex items-center justify-center bg-white border-2 border-surface-variant border-b-4 rounded-lg active:translate-y-1 active:border-b-0 transition-all text-primary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="refresh">refresh</span>
</button>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation Bar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg border-t-4 border-surface-variant rounded-t-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="map">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="menu_book">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0 transition-transform" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="quiz">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Success Modal (Hidden by default) -->
<div class="fixed inset-0 z-[100] hidden flex items-center justify-center p-container-margin" id="success-modal">
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-on-background/60 backdrop-blur-sm"></div>
<div class="relative chunky-card w-full max-w-sm bg-white p-8 text-center flex flex-col items-center gap-6 overflow-hidden">
<!-- Animated Rays via CSS -->
<div class="absolute inset-0 -z-10 bg-[radial-gradient(circle,rgba(252,204,0,0.2)_0%,transparent_70%)] animate-pulse"></div>
<div class="w-24 h-24 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center border-b-8 border-secondary scale-110">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container scale-[2.5]" data-icon="workspace_premium" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">workspace_premium</span>
</div>
<div>
<h3 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-on-surface mb-2">¡Increíble!</h3>
<p class="text-body-lg text-on-surface-variant">Has completado la bandera de Noruega. ¡Eres un experto explorador!</p>
</div>
<div class="w-full flex flex-col gap-3">
<button class="w-full chunky-button-primary py-4 px-6 rounded-lg font-label-bold" onclick="location.reload()">SIGUIENTE AVENTURA</button>
<button class="w-full py-2 font-label-bold text-primary" onclick="closeModal()">Ver mi obra</button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<script>
        let selectedColor = null;

        function selectColor(colorClass, el) {
            selectedColor = colorClass;
            
            // Visual feedback for palette selection
            document.querySelectorAll('.color-swatch div').forEach(swatch => {
                swatch.classList.remove('outline-primary');
            });
            el.querySelector('div').classList.add('outline-primary');
        }

        function paintPart(el, colorClass) {
            if (!selectedColor) {
                // Shake if no color selected
                el.parentElement.classList.add('animate-shake');
                setTimeout(() => el.parentElement.classList.remove('animate-shake'), 400);
                return;
            }

            // Remove existing bg classes
            const bgClasses = ['bg-surface-container', 'bg-surface-container-highest', 'bg-surface-dim', 'bg-error', 'bg-white', 'bg-primary'];
            el.classList.remove(...bgClasses);
            el.classList.add(selectedColor);

            // Visual feedback
            createSparkles(el);
            el.classList.add('paint-active');
            setTimeout(() => el.classList.remove('paint-active'), 300);
        }

        function createSparkles(el) {
            for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
                const sparkle = document.createElement('span');
                sparkle.className = 'material-symbols-outlined sparkle-particle text-secondary';
                sparkle.innerText = 'star';
                sparkle.style.setProperty('--tw-translate-x', `${(Math.random() - 0.5) * 100}px`);
                sparkle.style.setProperty('--tw-translate-y', `${(Math.random() - 0.5) * 100}px`);
                sparkle.style.left = '50%';
                sparkle.style.top = '50%';
                el.appendChild(sparkle);
                setTimeout(() => sparkle.remove(), 800);
            }
        }

        function checkFlag() {
            const red = document.getElementById('part-red').classList.contains('bg-error');
            const whiteV = document.getElementById('part-white-v').classList.contains('bg-white');
            const whiteH = document.getElementById('part-white-h').classList.contains('bg-white');
            const blueV = document.getElementById('part-blue-v').classList.contains('bg-primary');
            const blueH = document.getElementById('part-blue-h').classList.contains('bg-primary');

            if (red && whiteV && whiteH && blueV && blueH) {
                document.getElementById('success-modal').classList.remove('hidden');
                document.getElementById('success-modal').classList.add('flex');
            } else {
                alert("¡Casi! Sigue pintando con los colores de Noruega: Rojo, Blanco y Azul.");
            }
        }

        function closeModal() {
            document.getElementById('success-modal').classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('success-modal').classList.remove('flex');
        }

        // Add shake animation style
        const style = document.createElement('style');
        style.textContent = `
            @keyframes shake {
                0%, 100% { transform: translateX(0); }
                25% { transform: translateX(-5px); }
                75% { transform: translateX(5px); }
            }
            .animate-shake { animation: shake 0.2s cubic-bezier(.36,.07,.19,.97) both 2; }
        `;
        document.head.appendChild(style);
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Turquía) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport">
<title>Turquía - Flag Adventure</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
            user-select: none;
        }
        
        body {
            font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif;
            touch-action: manipulation;
            -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
        }

        /* Tactile Shadow Buttons */
        .button-primary {
            @apply bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container border-b-[6px] border-primary active:border-b-0 active:translate-y-[6px] transition-all duration-75;
        }
        
        .button-secondary {
            @apply bg-surface-container-lowest text-primary border-b-[6px] border-surface-variant active:border-b-0 active:translate-y-[6px] transition-all duration-75;
        }

        /* Paint Interaction */
        .paint-target {
            transition: fill 0.3s ease, stroke 0.3s ease;
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        /* Audio Pulse Animation */
        @keyframes audio-pulse {
            0% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(252, 204, 0, 0.7); }
            70% { transform: scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 0 0 15px rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
        }
        .pulse-audio {
            animation: audio-pulse 2s infinite;
        }

        .canvas-bg {
            background-image: radial-gradient(#dee3e9 1px, transparent 1px);
            background-size: 24px 24px;
        }
    </style>
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "unit": "8px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-surface min-h-screen flex flex-col overflow-x-hidden">
<!-- TopAppBar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky z-40 bg-surface-container-low flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit transition-all duration-100">
<div class="flex items-center gap-4">
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary">Flag Adventure</h1>
</div>
<div class="flex items-center">
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</header>
<main class="flex-1 px-container-margin py-6 pb-32 canvas-bg">
<!-- Level Progress -->
<div class="mb-8 max-w-xl mx-auto">
<div class="flex justify-between items-end mb-2">
<span class="text-label-bold font-label-bold text-primary">Level 5: Turquía</span>
<span class="text-label-bold font-label-bold text-secondary">80% Master</span>
<button class="flex items-center gap-2 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container px-4 py-2 rounded-full shadow-md active:translate-y-1 transition-all hover:bg-primary-container" onclick="playAudio('alarm')"><span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">notifications_active</span><span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">¡Alarma!</span></button></div>
<div class="h-4 w-full bg-surface-container-highest rounded-full overflow-hidden">
<div class="h-full bg-tertiary-container w-[80%] rounded-full transition-all duration-500"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Main Interaction Area -->
<div class="max-w-2xl mx-auto grid grid-cols-1 gap-6">
<!-- Flag Canvas Card -->
<div class="bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-lg border-b-[8px] border-surface-variant p-card-padding flex flex-col items-center justify-center relative overflow-hidden">
<div class="absolute top-4 left-4">
<button class="w-14 h-14 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center pulse-audio shadow-lg" onclick="playAudio('turquia')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
<div class="w-full aspect-[3/2] max-w-md bg-white border-2 border-surface-variant rounded-lg overflow-hidden shadow-inner flex items-center justify-center p-4">
<svg class="w-full h-full drop-shadow-sm" id="turkey-flag" viewBox="0 0 1200 800">
<!-- Flag Background -->
<rect class="paint-target" fill="#f0f4fb" height="800" id="flag-bg" onclick="paint('flag-bg')" stroke="#dee3e9" stroke-width="4" width="1200" x="0" y="0"></rect>
<!-- Moon -->
<path class="paint-target" d="M400,400 m-200,0 a200,200 0 1,0 400,0 a200,200 0 1,0 -400,0 M450,400 m-160,0 a160,160 0 1,0 320,0 a160,160 0 1,0 -320,0" fill="#f0f4fb" fill-rule="evenodd" id="flag-moon" onclick="paint('flag-moon')" stroke="#dee3e9" stroke-width="4"></path>
<!-- Star -->
<path class="paint-target" d="M680,400 L717.3,427.1 L703.1,383.3 L740.4,356.2 L694.3,356.2 L680,312.5 L665.7,356.2 L619.6,356.2 L656.9,383.3 L642.7,427.1 Z" fill="#f0f4fb" id="flag-star" onclick="paint('flag-star')" stroke="#dee3e9" stroke-width="4"></path>
</svg>
</div>
<div class="mt-6 text-center">
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-on-surface mb-2">Pintar la Bandera</h2>
<p class="font-body-md text-body-md text-on-surface-variant">¡Toca un color y luego toca la bandera!</p>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Color Palette Bento Grid -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
<button class="group relative bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-lg p-6 flex flex-col items-center justify-center border-b-[8px] border-surface-variant active:border-b-0 active:translate-y-[8px] transition-all" onclick="selectColor('#ba1a1a', 'Rojo')">
<div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-[#ba1a1a] mb-3 shadow-md ring-4 ring-transparent group-focus:ring-primary-container"></div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Rojo</span>
</button>
<button class="group relative bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-lg p-6 flex flex-col items-center justify-center border-b-[8px] border-surface-variant active:border-b-0 active:translate-y-[8px] transition-all" onclick="selectColor('#ffffff', 'Blanco')">
<div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-white border-2 border-surface-variant mb-3 shadow-md ring-4 ring-transparent group-focus:ring-primary-container"></div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Blanco</span>
</button>
</div>
<!-- Fun Fact Card -->
<div class="bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container rounded-lg p-card-padding flex gap-4 items-start shadow-lg">
<div class="w-12 h-12 shrink-0 bg-white/20 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">lightbulb</span>
</div>
<div>
<h3 class="font-label-bold text-label-bold mb-1">Dato Curioso:</h3>
<p class="font-body-md text-body-md">La luna y la estrella brillan en el cielo de Turquía.</p>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Action Button -->
<button class="w-full py-6 rounded-lg bg-tertiary-container text-on-tertiary-container font-headline-md text-headline-md border-b-[8px] border-tertiary active:border-b-0 active:translate-y-[8px] transition-all" id="check-btn">
                ¡Revisar Bandera!
            </button>
</div>
</main>
<!-- BottomNavBar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg border-t-4 border-surface-variant">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0 transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Success Modal (Hidden by default) -->
<div class="fixed inset-0 z-[100] bg-secondary-container hidden flex-col items-center justify-center p-container-margin text-center" id="success-modal">

<div class="relative z-10 scale-0 transition-transform duration-500 ease-out flex flex-col items-center" id="modal-content">
<div class="w-48 h-48 bg-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-6 shadow-2xl border-8 border-tertiary-container">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-tertiary-container text-[120px]" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
</div>
<h2 class="font-headline-lg text-headline-lg text-on-secondary-container mb-4">¡Excelente!</h2>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-secondary-container mb-8">Has completado la bandera de Turquía.</p>
<button class="px-12 py-6 bg-white text-primary font-headline-md text-headline-md rounded-full shadow-xl border-b-[8px] border-surface-variant active:border-b-0 active:translate-y-[8px] transition-all" onclick="closeModal()">
                Siguiente Aventura
            </button>
</div>
</div>
<script>
        let selectedColor = null;

        function selectColor(color, name) {
            selectedColor = color;
            console.log("Color selected:", name);
            
            // Haptic-like visual feedback on palette
            document.querySelectorAll('button div').forEach(div => div.classList.remove('ring-primary-container'));
        }

        function paint(elementId) {
            if (!selectedColor) {
                alert("¡Primero elige un color!");
                return;
            }
            const el = document.getElementById(elementId);
            el.setAttribute('fill', selectedColor);
            el.setAttribute('stroke', selectedColor);
        }

        function playAudio(term) {
            console.log("Playing audio for:", term);
            // In a real app, this would trigger an MP3
        }

        const checkBtn = document.getElementById('check-btn');
        const modal = document.getElementById('success-modal');
        const modalContent = document.getElementById('modal-content');

        checkBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            const bg = document.getElementById('flag-bg').getAttribute('fill');
            const moon = document.getElementById('flag-moon').getAttribute('fill');
            const star = document.getElementById('flag-star').getAttribute('fill');

            // Simplified check logic for Level 5
            if (bg === '#ba1a1a' && moon === '#ffffff' && star === '#ffffff') {
                showSuccess();
            } else {
                alert("¡Casi lo tienes! Recuerda: Fondo Rojo, Luna y Estrella Blancas.");
            }
        });

        function showSuccess() {
            modal.classList.remove('hidden');
            modal.classList.add('flex');
            setTimeout(() => {
                modalContent.classList.remove('scale-0');
                modalContent.classList.add('scale-100');
            }, 50);
        }

        function closeModal() {
            modalContent.classList.remove('scale-100');
            modalContent.classList.add('scale-0');
            setTimeout(() => {
                modal.classList.add('hidden');
                modal.classList.remove('flex');
                location.reload(); // Reset for next play
            }, 300);
        }
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Portugal) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="es" style=""><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport">
<title>Flag Adventure - Portugal</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-primary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-secondary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #e4e8ef;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-tertiary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #1f5100;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-yellow {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #b38f00;
        }
        .pressed {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 transparent !important;
        }
        .canvas-bg {
            background-image: radial-gradient(#bec8d3 1px, transparent 1px);
            background-size: 24px 24px;
        }
        @keyframes pulse-soft {
            0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
        }
        .audio-pulse {
            animation: pulse-soft 2s infinite ease-in-out;
        }
    </style>
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "unit": "8px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background font-body-md min-h-screen flex flex-col">
<!-- Top Navigation -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky z-40 bg-surface-container-low flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit h-16">
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full text-primary hover:bg-primary-container active:translate-y-1 transition-all">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="menu">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary text-center">Portugal</h1><button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-primary hover:bg-primary-container active:translate-y-1 transition-all px-2 rounded-lg group">
    <span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="notifications_active">notifications_active</span>
    <span class="text-[10px] font-label-bold leading-none mt-1">¡Alarma!</span>
</button><button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-primary hover:bg-primary-container active:translate-y-1 transition-all px-2 rounded-lg group">
    <span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="notifications_active">notifications_active</span>
    <span class="text-[10px] font-label-bold leading-none mt-1">¡Alarma!</span>
</button>
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full text-primary hover:bg-primary-container active:translate-y-1 transition-all">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</button>
</header>
<main class="flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-container-margin pb-32">
<!-- Progress Tracker -->
<div class="mt-4 flex items-center gap-4 bg-surface-container rounded-full p-2 pr-6">
<div class="bg-tertiary-container text-on-tertiary px-4 py-1 rounded-full font-label-bold">Nivel 5</div>
<div class="flex-1 h-4 bg-surface-variant rounded-full overflow-hidden">
<div class="w-2/3 h-full bg-tertiary transition-all duration-500 rounded-full"></div>
</div>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-secondary" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
</div>
<!-- Painting Canvas Area -->
<div class="mt-8 relative canvas-bg border-4 border-dashed border-outline-variant rounded-lg p-6 bg-white min-h-[300px] flex flex-col items-center justify-center">
<!-- Blank Flag with Shield -->
<div class="relative w-full max-w-md aspect-[3/2] bg-white border-2 border-surface-dim rounded-lg shadow-inner overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300" id="flag-container">
<!-- Left Vertical (Green) Area -->
<div class="absolute left-0 top-0 h-full w-[40%] border-r border-surface-dim cursor-pointer hover:bg-surface-container transition-colors" id="part-green" onclick="applyColor('green')"></div>
<!-- Right Vertical (Red) Area -->
<div class="absolute right-0 top-0 h-full w-[60%] cursor-pointer hover:bg-surface-container transition-colors" id="part-red" onclick="applyColor('red')"></div>
<!-- Central Shield -->
<div class="absolute top-1/2 left-[40%] -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-24 h-28 cursor-pointer z-10" id="part-shield" onclick="applyColor('yellow')">
<img class="w-full h-full object-contain" data-alt="A clean, high-contrast vector illustration of the Portuguese national coat of arms simplified for children. The shield features white inner shields and red borders with gold castles, styled with thick, friendly outlines and bright, solid colors. The background of the flag is currently white to emphasize the paint-station concept, following a premium educational aesthetic for young learners." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuCGTT54kQUisYwoWuM-rl7LL6vJ7fuoBkEnW4MRMneOZjEGp_ZnwrmARJIDxzWJAVNd3cqpNpE5tQHiNfJvGIPi4AwubITWnLcIHcEsTNB9zzc-8aiaLGG06Bx3x2pn2Oyw1dnZv73WmO3Q8JjfEjx6MwEmRngerzLEgKGmJTvYGfSxloPzMQYVIr1w-3t72YU_CUxyQJnnpZIQoyDsGK8VIudqF8UmF663bTUuSehH1OutP29UW_D9rXcUeZ7Htin5EaLKUNqW_VI">
</div>
</div>
<!-- Instructions Overlay -->
<div class="mt-4 bg-primary-container/20 text-on-primary-container px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-label-bold flex items-center gap-2">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">brush</span>
                ¡Toca una parte de la bandera para pintarla!
            </div>
</div>
<!-- Color Palette (Tactile Buttons) -->
<div class="mt-8 flex justify-center gap-4">
<button class="w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-[#1f5100] chunky-shadow-tertiary border-4 border-white active:translate-y-1 transition-all flex items-center justify-center group" id="btn-green" onclick="selectColor('green')">
<span class="text-white font-label-bold">Verde</span>
</button>
<button class="w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-[#ba1a1a] chunky-shadow-tertiary border-4 border-white active:translate-y-1 transition-all flex items-center justify-center" id="btn-red" onclick="selectColor('red')" style="box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #6e0000;">
<span class="text-white font-label-bold">Rojo</span>
</button>
<button class="w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-secondary-container chunky-shadow-yellow border-4 border-white active:translate-y-1 transition-all flex items-center justify-center" id="btn-yellow" onclick="selectColor('yellow')">
<span class="text-on-secondary-container font-label-bold">Amarillo</span>
</button>
</div>
<!-- Fun Fact Section -->
<section class="mt-10 bg-secondary-fixed text-on-secondary-fixed p-card-padding rounded-lg flex gap-4 items-start shadow-sm">
<div class="w-16 h-16 bg-white rounded-full flex-shrink-0 flex items-center justify-center audio-pulse chunky-shadow-yellow">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-secondary" style="font-size: 32px;">campaign</span>
</div>
<div>
<h3 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md mb-1">¿Sabías que?</h3>
<p class="text-body-lg font-body-lg">Portugal es famoso por sus barcos y el mar. 🚢🌊</p>
</div>
</section>
<!-- Ocean Scenery Bottom -->
<div class="mt-12 h-40 relative rounded-xl overflow-hidden bg-primary-container/10">

<div class="absolute bottom-4 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 text-center">
<button class="bg-primary text-white font-headline-md px-10 py-4 rounded-full chunky-shadow-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all flex items-center gap-2">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">check_circle</span>
                    ¡Listo!
                </button>
</div>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation Bar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg border-t-4 border-surface-variant">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="map">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="menu_book">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="quiz" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
</nav>
<script>
        let selectedColor = null;

        function selectColor(color) {
            // Reset all buttons
            document.querySelectorAll('button[id^="btn-"]').forEach(btn => {
                btn.classList.remove('pressed', 'ring-4', 'ring-primary');
            });
            
            selectedColor = color;
