            const activeBtn = document.getElementById(`btn-${color}`);
            activeBtn.classList.add('pressed', 'ring-4', 'ring-primary');

            // Haptic simulation
            if (window.navigator.vibrate) window.navigator.vibrate(20);
        }

        function applyColor(part) {
            if (!selectedColor) {
                alert("¡Primero elige un color de la paleta! 🎨");
                return;
            }

            const element = document.getElementById(`part-${part}`);
            const colors = {
                'green': '#1f5100',
                'red': '#ba1a1a',
                'yellow': '#fccc00'
            };

            if (part === 'green' && selectedColor === 'green') {
                element.style.backgroundColor = colors.green;
                element.classList.remove('hover:bg-surface-container');
            } else if (part === 'red' && selectedColor === 'red') {
                element.style.backgroundColor = colors.red;
                element.classList.remove('hover:bg-surface-container');
            } else if (part === 'shield' && selectedColor === 'yellow') {
                element.style.backgroundColor = 'rgba(252, 204, 0, 0.4)';
                element.style.borderRadius = '50%';
            } else {
                // Shake effect for wrong color
                element.animate([
                    { transform: 'translateX(0px)' },
                    { transform: 'translateX(-5px)' },
                    { transform: 'translateX(5px)' },
                    { transform: 'translateX(0px)' }
                ], { duration: 200 });
            }

            checkCompletion();
        }

        function checkCompletion() {
            const green = document.getElementById('part-green').style.backgroundColor;
            const red = document.getElementById('part-red').style.backgroundColor;
            
            if (green && red) {
                console.log("Flag looking good!");
            }
        }
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Israel) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="es" style=""><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport">
<title>Flag Adventure - Israel</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>

<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {

                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "unit": "8px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        body { font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; overflow-x: hidden; }
        .material-symbols-outlined { font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48; }
        
        .chunky-button-primary {
            background-color: #2bb1ff;
            border-bottom: 6px solid #004b71;
            transition: all 0.1s;
        }
        .chunky-button-primary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            border-bottom-width: 0;
        }

        .chunky-button-secondary {
            background-color: #ffffff;
            border-bottom: 6px solid #dee3e9;
            color: #006495;
            transition: all 0.1s;
        }
        .chunky-button-secondary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            border-bottom-width: 0;
        }

        .color-well {
            transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275);
        }
        .color-well:hover { transform: scale(1.1); }
        .color-well.active { ring: 6px solid #fccc00; transform: scale(1.15); }

        .flag-path { transition: fill 0.3s ease; cursor: pointer; }
        .flag-path:hover { opacity: 0.8; }

        @keyframes pulse-yellow {
            0% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(252, 204, 0, 0.7); }
            70% { transform: scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 0 0 15px rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
        }
        .pulse-audio { animation: pulse-yellow 2s infinite; }

        .celebration-bg {
            background: radial-gradient(circle, #ffe084 0%, #fccc00 100%);
        }
    </style>
<style>
    body {
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);
    }
  </style>
  </head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background min-h-screen flex flex-col pb-24">
<!-- Top Navigation Header -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky z-40 bg-surface-container-low flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit h-16">
<div class="flex items-center gap-3">
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary tracking-tight">Israel</h1><button class="flex items-center gap-2 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full border-b-4 border-secondary-fixed active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-75 shadow-md ml-2" onclick="playAudio('¡Alarma! Sound Alarm')"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-xl">notifications_active</span><span class="font-label-bold text-sm">¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm</span></button><button class="flex items-center gap-2 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full border-b-4 border-secondary-fixed active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-75 shadow-md ml-2" onclick="playAudio('¡Alarma! Sound Alarm')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-xl">notifications_active</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-sm">¡Alarma!</span>
</button>
</div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-4">
<div class="hidden md:flex items-center gap-6 mr-4">
<a class="text-primary font-label-bold" href="#">Explore</a>
<a class="text-on-surface-variant font-label-bold" href="#">Passport</a>
<a class="text-on-surface-variant font-label-bold" href="#">Play</a>
</div>
<div class="flex items-center bg-primary-container/20 px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full border-2 border-primary-container">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary mr-2" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">stars</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-primary-container">Nivel 5</span>
</div>
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</header>
<!-- Main Canvas -->
<main class="flex-grow flex flex-col items-center justify-center px-container-margin py-8 gap-8">
<!-- Interactive Flag Area -->
<div class="relative w-full max-w-2xl bg-white p-card-padding rounded-lg shadow-xl border-2 border-surface-variant">
<!-- Progress Bar -->
<div class="absolute -top-10 left-0 w-full px-4">
<div class="flex justify-between items-end mb-1">
<span class="font-label-bold text-primary">¡Casi listo!</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-primary">80%</span>
</div>
<div class="w-full h-4 bg-surface-container-high rounded-full overflow-hidden border-2 border-surface-variant">
<div class="h-full bg-tertiary-container rounded-full" style="width: 80%"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Blank Flag SVG (Interactive) -->
<div class="aspect-[3/2] w-full flex items-center justify-center bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-md overflow-hidden shadow-inner border-2 border-dashed border-outline-variant">
<svg class="w-full h-full drop-shadow-md" id="israel-flag" viewBox="0 0 220 160">
<!-- Top Stripe -->
<rect class="flag-path" fill="#f0f4fb" height="20" id="stripe-top" onclick="paintPath(this)" stroke="#bec8d3" stroke-width="0.5" width="220" x="0" y="20"></rect>
<!-- Middle Area -->
<rect fill="white" height="80" width="220" x="0" y="40"></rect>
<!-- Bottom Stripe -->
<rect class="flag-path" fill="#f0f4fb" height="20" id="stripe-bottom" onclick="paintPath(this)" stroke="#bec8d3" stroke-width="0.5" width="220" x="0" y="120"></rect>
<!-- Magen David -->
<path class="flag-path" d="M110 50 L125 75 L150 75 L130 90 L135 115 L110 100 L85 115 L90 90 L70 75 L95 75 Z" fill="none" id="star-of-david" onclick="paintPath(this)" stroke="#bec8d3" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2"></path>
<!-- Note: simplified star for clarity, using Magen David structure usually requires two interlocking triangles -->
<g class="flag-path" id="magen-david" onclick="paintPath(this)">
<path d="M110 52 L132 90 L88 90 Z" fill="none" stroke="#bec8d3" stroke-width="2.5"></path>
<path d="M110 108 L132 70 L88 70 Z" fill="none" stroke="#bec8d3" stroke-width="2.5"></path>
</g>
</svg>
</div>
<div class="mt-6 flex items-center gap-4 bg-surface-container rounded-xl p-4">
<button class="w-14 h-14 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center pulse-audio shadow-md" onclick="playAudio('La estrella de la bandera se llama Estrella de David.')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-3xl">volume_up</span>
</button>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-surface">
<span class="font-bold text-primary">¿Sabías qué?</span> <br>
                    La estrella de la bandera se llama Estrella de David.
                </p>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Color Palette Station -->
<div class="w-full max-w-xl bg-surface-container-high rounded-xl p-6 shadow-md border-b-8 border-surface-dim">
<h2 class="text-center font-headline-md text-headline-md text-on-surface-variant mb-6">¡Elige un color!</h2>
<div class="flex justify-center gap-8 md:gap-12">
<!-- Color: Azul -->
<button class="color-well group flex flex-col items-center gap-3" onclick="selectColor('#006495', this)">
<div class="w-20 h-20 md:w-24 md:h-24 rounded-full bg-primary border-4 border-white shadow-xl flex items-center justify-center">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white text-4xl opacity-0 group-[.active]:opacity-100">brush</span>
</div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface text-lg">Azul</span>
</button>
<!-- Color: Blanco -->
<button class="color-well group flex flex-col items-center gap-3 active" onclick="selectColor('#ffffff', this)">
<div class="w-20 h-20 md:w-24 md:h-24 rounded-full bg-white border-4 border-white shadow-xl flex items-center justify-center ring-4 ring-primary-container">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-4xl">brush</span>
</div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface text-lg">Blanco</span>
</button>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Action Buttons -->
<div class="flex gap-4 w-full max-w-md">
<button class="chunky-button-secondary flex-1 py-4 rounded-xl font-headline-md flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">refresh</span>
                Reiniciar
            </button>
<button class="chunky-button-primary flex-1 py-4 rounded-xl font-headline-md text-white flex items-center justify-center gap-2" onclick="showCelebration()">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">check_circle</span>
                ¡Listo!
            </button>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation Bar (Predicted from JSON) -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg border-t-4 border-surface-variant md:hidden">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-75" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-75" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Success Modal (Celebration) -->
<div class="fixed inset-0 z-[100] hidden celebration-bg flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-8 text-center" id="celebration-modal">
<div class="absolute inset-0 overflow-hidden pointer-events-none opacity-50">
<!-- Celebration rays effect placeholder -->
<div class="absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-[200%] aspect-square bg-[conic-gradient(from_0deg,#ffffff,transparent_15deg)] animate-[spin_20s_linear_infinite]"></div>
</div>
<div class="relative z-10 scale-0 transition-transform duration-500 ease-out" id="modal-content">
<div class="w-48 h-48 bg-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-2xl mb-8 mx-auto border-8 border-secondary-fixed">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-9xl text-secondary-container" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">workspace_premium</span>
</div>
<h2 class="font-headline-lg text-headline-lg text-on-secondary-container mb-4">¡Increíble Trabajo!</h2>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-secondary-container max-w-md mx-auto mb-10">
                Has completado la bandera de Israel y aprendido sobre la Estrella de David. ¡Eres un experto en banderas!
            </p>
<button class="chunky-button-primary px-12 py-5 rounded-full font-headline-md text-white text-2xl shadow-2xl" onclick="hideCelebration()">
                ¡Siguiente Aventura!
            </button>
</div>
</div>
<script>
        let currentColor = '#ffffff';

        function selectColor(color, element) {
            currentColor = color;
            // Clear active states
            document.querySelectorAll('.color-well').forEach(well => {
                well.classList.remove('active');
                well.querySelector('.w-20, .w-24').classList.remove('ring-4', 'ring-primary-container');
                well.querySelector('span').classList.add('opacity-0');
            });
            // Set active state
            element.classList.add('active');
            const innerCircle = element.querySelector('.w-20, .w-24');
            innerCircle.classList.add('ring-4', 'ring-primary-container');
            element.querySelector('span').classList.remove('opacity-0');
        }

        function paintPath(element) {
            // If it's the group (star), paint children
            if (element.tagName === 'g') {
                const paths = element.querySelectorAll('path');
                paths.forEach(p => {
                    p.setAttribute('fill', currentColor === '#ffffff' ? 'none' : currentColor);
                    p.setAttribute('stroke', currentColor);
                });
            } else {
                element.setAttribute('fill', currentColor);
                element.setAttribute('stroke', currentColor);
            }
            
            // Haptic feedback simulation
            element.style.transform = 'scale(0.98)';
            setTimeout(() => element.style.transform = 'scale(1)', 100);
        }

        function playAudio(text) {
            // Synthetic voice feedback (kids' tone simulation)
            if ('speechSynthesis' in window) {
                const utterance = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text);
                utterance.lang = 'es-ES';
                utterance.pitch = 1.2;
                utterance.rate = 0.9;
                window.speechSynthesis.speak(utterance);
            }
        }

        function showCelebration() {
            const modal = document.getElementById('celebration-modal');
            const content = document.getElementById('modal-content');
            modal.classList.remove('hidden');
            setTimeout(() => {
                content.classList.remove('scale-0');
                content.classList.add('scale-100');
            }, 10);
            playAudio("¡Increíble Trabajo! Has completado la bandera de Israel.");
        }

        function hideCelebration() {
            const modal = document.getElementById('celebration-modal');
            modal.classList.add('hidden');
        }
    </script>


</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Portugal) - Actualizada -->
<!DOCTYPE html>

<html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/>
<title>Estación de Pintura (Portugal)</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        body { font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; }
        
        .chunky-button {
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
        }
        .chunky-button:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
        }

        .flag-section {
            transition: background-color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        .brush-active {
            filter: drop-shadow(0 0 10px rgba(0, 100, 149, 0.4));
        }

        @keyframes pulse-audio {
            0% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(252, 204, 0, 0.7); }
            70% { transform: scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 0 0 10px rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
        }
        .pulse-audio { animation: pulse-audio 2s infinite; }

        .confetti {
            position: absolute;
            pointer-events: none;
        }
    </style>
<style>
    body {
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background min-h-screen pb-24">
<!-- Top Navigation -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky bg-surface-container-low z-50 flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit">
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[32px]">arrow_back</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary font-bold">Estación de Pintura</h1>
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[32px]">volume_up</span>
</button>
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center text-secondary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100" title="¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[32px]">notifications_active</span></button></header>
<main class="px-container-margin py-6 max-w-4xl mx-auto">
<!-- Fun Fact Card -->
<div class="bg-primary-container/10 border-2 border-primary-container rounded-lg p-card-padding mb-8 flex items-center gap-4">
<div class="bg-secondary-container p-3 rounded-full flex-shrink-0">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container">sailing</span>
</div>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-primary-container">
<strong>Portugal</strong> es famoso por sus barcos y el mar.
            </p>
</div>
<!-- Canvas Area -->
<div class="relative bg-white rounded-lg p-8 shadow-sm border-2 border-surface-variant mb-8 flex flex-col items-center">
<h2 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-primary mb-6">¡Pinta la bandera!</h2>
<!-- Flag Interactive Silhouette -->
<div class="relative w-full aspect-[3/2] max-w-md border-8 border-surface-variant rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-inner bg-surface-dim" id="flag-canvas">
<svg class="w-full h-full" viewbox="0 0 300 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<!-- Left Section (Green) -->
<rect class="flag-section" fill="#E5E7EB" height="200" id="rect-green" onclick="paintSection('green')" width="120" x="0" y="0"></rect>
<!-- Right Section (Red) -->
<rect class="flag-section" fill="#F3F4F6" height="200" id="rect-red" onclick="paintSection('red')" width="180" x="120" y="0"></rect>
<!-- Shield Emblem (Gold/Center) -->
<circle class="flag-section" cx="120" cy="100" fill="#D1D5DB" id="shield-base" onclick="paintSection('gold')" r="35"></circle>
<!-- Inner details (simplified for kids) -->
<circle cx="120" cy="100" fill="none" r="25" stroke="#9CA3AF" stroke-width="2"></circle>
</svg>
</div>
<!-- Smart Brush Selection -->
<div class="flex gap-4 mt-8">
<button class="brush-btn w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-[#006633] border-4 border-white shadow-lg chunky-button flex items-center justify-center" onclick="selectColor('green', this)">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white text-[32px]">brush</span>
</button>
<button class="brush-btn w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-[#FF0000] border-4 border-white shadow-lg chunky-button flex items-center justify-center" onclick="selectColor('red', this)">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white text-[32px]">brush</span>
</button>
<button class="brush-btn w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-[#FFCC00] border-4 border-white shadow-lg chunky-button flex items-center justify-center" onclick="selectColor('gold', this)">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white text-[32px]">brush</span>
</button>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Bilingual Audio Section -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
<button class="flex flex-col items-center gap-3 bg-white p-6 rounded-lg border-b-8 border-tertiary-container shadow-sm active:translate-y-1 active:border-b-4 transition-all" onclick="playAudio('verde')">
<div class="w-16 h-16 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center pulse-audio">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-4xl">volume_up</span>
</div>
<div class="text-center">
<span class="block font-headline-md text-headline-md text-tertiary">Verde</span>
<span class="block font-body-md text-body-md text-outline">Green</span>
</div>
</button>
<button class="flex flex-col items-center gap-3 bg-white p-6 rounded-lg border-b-8 border-error-container shadow-sm active:translate-y-1 active:border-b-4 transition-all" onclick="playAudio('rojo')">
<div class="w-16 h-16 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-4xl">volume_up</span>
</div>
<div class="text-center">
<span class="block font-headline-md text-headline-md text-error">Rojo</span>
<span class="block font-body-md text-body-md text-outline">Red</span>
</div>
</button>
</div>
<!-- Artistic Decoration Image -->
<div class="mt-12 rounded-lg overflow-hidden border-4 border-white shadow-xl rotate-1">
<img class="w-full h-48 object-cover" data-alt="A cheerful, child-friendly illustration of a traditional Portuguese caravela sailing boat on a vibrant blue ocean with a bright cartoon sun. The style is 2D vector art with bold outlines and bright colors like sky blue, warm yellow, and deep navy. Gentle waves splash against the wooden hull of the ship, which features white sails with red crosses. The atmosphere is joyful and adventurous, set under a clear sky." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuDquDfgSyzmfM8ojkukQ06yC5u0YifL5Qkyeyq7Fl-WM0yBSy3WUhCH5B_vphLCLl_m-b_1pEvoLoe4sDf1IILbSt7Uc07qNEwXVSf5JCsC6qcGRVPaHmmOfEsUkhxl_sohuKIOX9LmP9bJ_hLtF0vEQ8a-EWq6wk24aMc2nDu1uOQtJ-9-zPifbPE_0VUH9gN_vIH-kbIwsVrhUkMhMYsXhj-LrBvhdBoafrtnRdBnxQV1dESbDw4n2wKFJtQsuw2j32V1JUwgzd4"/>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Navigation Shell -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg border-t-4 border-surface-variant">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Confetti Overlay Container -->
<div class="fixed inset-0 pointer-events-none z-[100]" id="confetti-container"></div>
<script>
        let selectedColor = null;
        let paintedCount = 0;
        const totalSections = 3;

        function selectColor(color, btn) {
            selectedColor = color;
            // Clear previous brush highlights
            document.querySelectorAll('.brush-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('ring-4', 'ring-primary', 'scale-110'));
            // Highlight current
            btn.classList.add('ring-4', 'ring-primary', 'scale-110');
            
            // Audio feedback for selection
            const audioMap = {
                'green': 'Verde!',
                'red': 'Rojo!',
                'gold': '¡Dorado!'
            };
            console.log("Selected color: " + audioMap[color]);
        }

        function paintSection(sectionId) {
            if (!selectedColor) {
                alert("¡Primero elige un color con el pincel!");
                return;
            }

            const element = document.getElementById('rect-' + sectionId) || document.getElementById('shield-base');
            
            if (sectionId === 'green' && selectedColor === 'green') {
                element.setAttribute('fill', '#006633');
                checkProgress();
            } else if (sectionId === 'red' && selectedColor === 'red') {
                element.setAttribute('fill', '#FF0000');
                checkProgress();
            } else if (sectionId === 'gold' && selectedColor === 'gold') {
                element.setAttribute('fill', '#FFCC00');
                checkProgress();
            } else {
                // Shake effect or feedback for wrong color
                element.classList.add('animate-pulse');
                setTimeout(() => element.classList.remove('animate-pulse'), 500);
            }
        }

        function checkProgress() {
            paintedCount++;
            if (paintedCount >= totalSections) {
                celebrate();
            }
        }

        function celebrate() {
            const container = document.getElementById('confetti-container');
            for (let i = 0; i < 50; i++) {
                const confetti = document.createElement('div');
                confetti.className = 'confetti';
                confetti.style.left = Math.random() * 100 + 'vw';
                confetti.style.top = '-10px';
                confetti.style.width = '10px';
                confetti.style.height = '10px';
                confetti.style.backgroundColor = ['#006633', '#FF0000', '#FFCC00'][Math.floor(Math.random() * 3)];
                confetti.style.transform = `rotate(${Math.random() * 360}deg)`;
                
                container.appendChild(confetti);

                const animation = confetti.animate([
                    { transform: `translateY(0) rotate(0deg)`, opacity: 1 },
                    { transform: `translateY(100vh) rotate(${Math.random() * 720}deg)`, opacity: 0 }
                ], {
                    duration: 2000 + Math.random() * 1000,
                    easing: 'cubic-bezier(0, .9, .57, 1)'
                });

                animation.onfinish = () => confetti.remove();
            }
        }

        function playAudio(word) {
            console.log("Playing pronunciation for: " + word);
            // In a real app, this would trigger an actual audio file
        }
    </script>
</body></html>

<!-- Estación de Pintura (Tailandia) -->
<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="es" style=""><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport">
<title>Flag Adventure - Tailandia</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                "surface-tint": "#006495",
                "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                "on-background": "#171c21",
                "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                "on-error": "#ffffff",
                "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                "secondary": "#735c00",
                "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                "outline": "#6e7882",
                "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                "primary": "#006495",
                "on-surface": "#171c21",
                "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                "error": "#ba1a1a",
                "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                "background": "#f7f9ff",
                "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                "surface-dim": "#d6dae1"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                "lg": "2rem",
                "xl": "3rem",
                "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                "container-margin": "24px",
                "card-padding": "20px",
                "gutter": "16px",
                "touch-target-min": "48px",
                "unit": "8px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                "body-lg": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}]
            }
          }
        }
      }
    </script>
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        
        .chunky-button-primary {
            @apply bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container font-label-bold text-label-bold py-4 px-8 rounded-lg active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        .chunky-button-primary:active {
            box-shadow: 0 0px 0 0 #004b71;
        }

        .chunky-button-secondary {
            @apply bg-surface-container-lowest text-primary font-label-bold text-label-bold py-4 px-8 rounded-lg active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #bec8d3;
        }
        .chunky-button-secondary:active {
            box-shadow: 0 0px 0 0 #bec8d3;
        }

        .color-well {
            @apply w-20 h-20 rounded-full cursor-pointer flex items-center justify-center transition-transform duration-200;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 0 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        .color-well:active {
            @apply translate-y-1;
            box-shadow: 0 0px 0 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        .color-well.selected {
            @apply ring-4 ring-primary ring-offset-4 scale-110;
        }

        .flag-stripe {
            @apply border-2 border-surface-variant flex-1 transition-colors duration-300 cursor-pointer;
        }
        .flag-stripe-double {
            @apply flex-[2];
        }

        .audio-pulse {
            animation: pulse 2s infinite;
        }
        @keyframes pulse {
            0% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(252, 204, 0, 0.7); }
            70% { transform: scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 0 0 15px rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
        }
    </style>
<style>
    body {
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);
    }
  </style>
  </head>
<body class="bg-background font-body-md text-on-background min-h-screen flex flex-col">
<!-- TopAppBar -->
<header class="bg-surface-container-low w-full top-0 sticky z-40 flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit h-16 shadow-none">
<button class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary p-2 hover:bg-primary-container rounded-lg active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">menu</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary">Flag Adventure</h1>
<button class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary p-2 hover:bg-primary-container rounded-lg active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">volume_up</button>
<button class="flex items-center gap-1 bg-tertiary-container text-on-tertiary-container px-4 py-2 rounded-full border-b-4 border-on-tertiary-fixed-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-lg"><span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">notifications_active</span><span class="font-label-bold text-[10px] uppercase tracking-tighter">¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm</span></button><button class="flex items-center gap-1 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container px-4 py-2 rounded-full border-b-4 border-on-secondary-fixed-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-lg"><span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">notifications_active</span><span class="font-label-bold text-[10px] uppercase tracking-tighter">¡Alarma! / Sound Alarm</span></button></header>
<main class="flex-1 px-container-margin pb-32 pt-6">
<!-- Level & Progress -->
<div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
<div class="flex flex-col">
<span class="text-on-surface-variant font-label-bold text-label-bold">NIVEL 5</span>
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-primary">Tailandia</h2>
</div>
<button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-1 mr-2">
  <div class="w-16 h-16 bg-tertiary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center audio-pulse border-b-4 border-on-tertiary-fixed-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-all">
    <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-tertiary-container" style="font-size: 32px;">notifications_active</span>
  </div>
  <span class="text-label-bold font-label-bold text-primary text-[10px] uppercase tracking-tighter">¡Alarma!</span>
</button><div class="w-16 h-16 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center audio-pulse border-b-4 border-on-secondary-fixed-variant">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container" style="font-size: 32px;">volume_up</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="w-full bg-surface-container-high h-4 rounded-full mb-8 overflow-hidden">
<div class="w-4/5 h-full bg-tertiary-container rounded-full"></div>
</div>
<!-- Interactive Canvas Card -->
<div class="bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-lg p-card-padding shadow-none border-b-8 border-surface-variant mb-8 flex flex-col items-center">
<div class="w-full aspect-[3/2] flex flex-col rounded-lg overflow-hidden border-2 border-outline-variant bg-white mb-6" id="flag-canvas">
<!-- Thailand Flag Structure: 5 stripes (1-1-2-1-1 ratio) -->
<div class="flag-stripe bg-white" data-index="0" onclick="paintStripe(this)"></div>
<div class="flag-stripe bg-white" data-index="1" onclick="paintStripe(this)"></div>
<div class="flag-stripe flag-stripe-double bg-white" data-index="2" onclick="paintStripe(this)"></div>
<div class="flag-stripe bg-white" data-index="3" onclick="paintStripe(this)"></div>
<div class="flag-stripe bg-white" data-index="4" onclick="paintStripe(this)"></div>
</div>
<p class="text-center font-body-md text-on-surface-variant mb-6 px-4">
                ¡Pinta la bandera de Tailandia con los colores correctos!
            </p>
<!-- Color Palette -->
<div class="flex gap-gutter mb-6">
<div class="color-well selected" onclick="selectColor('#ba1a1a', this)" style="background-color: #ba1a1a;">
<span class="text-white font-label-bold">Rojo</span>
</div>
<div class="color-well" onclick="selectColor('#ffffff', this)" style="background-color: #ffffff; border: 2px solid #bec8d3;">
<span class="text-on-surface-variant font-label-bold">Blanco</span>
</div>
<div class="color-well" onclick="selectColor('#004163', this)" style="background-color: #004163;">
<span class="text-white font-label-bold">Azul</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Fun Fact Section -->
<div class="flex gap-gutter items-start bg-secondary-fixed rounded-lg p-card-padding border-b-8 border-on-secondary-fixed-variant">
<div class="w-12 h-12 bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shrink-0">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-secondary" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">lightbulb</span>
</div>
<div>
<h3 class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-secondary-fixed mb-1">¿Sabías que...?</h3>
<p class="font-body-md text-on-secondary-fixed-variant">En Tailandia hay templos muy brillantes.</p>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Contextual Image -->
<div class="mt-8 rounded-lg overflow-hidden border-b-8 border-surface-variant">
<div class="w-full h-48 bg-cover bg-center" data-alt="A cinematic, vibrant digital illustration of a golden Thai temple glistening under a warm tropical sun. The architecture is intricate with tiered roofs and ornate carvings, reflecting light in a premium educational style. The background features lush green palms and a soft blue sky. The overall mood is peaceful, bright, and inviting for children, utilizing the primary blue and secondary yellow tones from the palette." style="background-image: url('https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuCgImgH84odyI4q_FtBvxgzUO_IHd6tf88e0SLPEuptnTUIqH5Qf-6bOnrVxz3sCF3fkAHrlpA-IM6l4LXEX7uxZ1HhFgUTcQbjQ-NP072Lic-iTgF7HKhJfYOtDGawG2c1jIYOs3A4woWeSBauHyMLT2krIUbvqNWAhSVBPSc1Cv4r-C8yhSW9xIgiumy95_VTWFdGprj289HL17CEWj2SZMu-w-E0Vbe75gEFohQtCv9eyWEyxvZ7MEJaU45QLUh60BqGwCvOuwk')"></div>
</div>
<div class="mt-10 flex flex-col gap-4">
<button class="chunky-button-primary w-full" onclick="checkFlag()">¡LISTO!</button>
<button class="chunky-button-secondary w-full" onclick="resetFlag()">REPETIR</button>
</div>
</main>
<!-- BottomNavBar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg border-t-4 border-surface-variant">
<button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-75">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</button>
<button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-75">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</button>
<button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0 active:translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-75">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</button>
</nav>
<!-- Success Modal (Hidden by default) -->
<div class="fixed inset-0 z-[100] hidden flex items-center justify-center p-container-margin" id="success-modal">
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-primary opacity-60 backdrop-blur-sm"></div>
<div class="relative bg-surface-container-lowest w-full max-w-sm rounded-lg p-card-padding text-center border-b-8 border-tertiary-container">
<div class="w-32 h-32 bg-secondary-container rounded-full mx-auto mb-6 flex items-center justify-center border-b-8 border-on-secondary-fixed-variant">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container" style="font-size: 64px; font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
</div>
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-primary mb-2">¡Increíble!</h2>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-surface-variant mb-8">Has completado la bandera de Tailandia. ¡Eres un experto!</p>
<button class="chunky-button-primary w-full" onclick="closeModal()">SIGUIENTE AVENTURA</button>
</div>
</div>
<script>
        let currentColor = null;
        const correctPattern = ['#ba1a1a', '#ffffff', '#004163', '#ffffff', '#ba1a1a'];

        function selectColor(color, element) {
            currentColor = color;
            document.querySelectorAll('.color-well').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('selected'));
            element.classList.add('selected');
        }

        function paintStripe(stripe) {
            if (currentColor) {
                stripe.style.backgroundColor = currentColor;
                stripe.classList.remove('bg-white');
                
                // Interaction feedback
                stripe.animate([
                    { transform: 'scale(1)', opacity: 0.8 },
                    { transform: 'scale(1.02)', opacity: 1 },
                    { transform: 'scale(1)', opacity: 1 }
                ], { duration: 200 });
            }
        }

        function resetFlag() {
            const stripes = document.querySelectorAll('.flag-stripe');
            stripes.forEach(s => {
                s.style.backgroundColor = '#ffffff';
                s.classList.add('bg-white');
            });
        }

        function checkFlag() {
            const stripes = document.querySelectorAll('.flag-stripe');
            let isCorrect = true;
            
            stripes.forEach((stripe, index) => {
                const bg = stripe.style.backgroundColor;
                // Basic check logic (convert RGB to Hex for simplicity)
                if (!bg || bg === 'white' || bg === 'rgb(255, 255, 255)') {
                    isCorrect = false;
                }
            });

            if (isCorrect) {
                document.getElementById('success-modal').classList.remove('hidden');
                triggerConfetti();
            } else {
                alert("¡Casi! Sigue pintando hasta llenar todas las franjas.");
            }
        }

        function closeModal() {
            document.getElementById('success-modal').classList.add('hidden');
        }

        function triggerConfetti() {
            // Minimalist visual feedback for children
            console.log("Confetti triggered!");
        }

        // Initialize with first color
        window.onload = () => {
            selectColor('#ba1a1a', document.querySelector('.color-well'));
        }
    </script>




</body></html>

<!-- Quiz Phase (Names only) - France -->
<!DOCTYPE html>

<html class="light" lang="en"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport"/>
<title>Flag Explorer - Quiz Review</title>
<!-- Font: Quicksand for a friendly, rounded feel -->
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@400;500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<!-- Material Symbols -->
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "card-padding": "20px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif;
            background-color: #f7f9ff;
            overflow-x: hidden;
        }

        /* Tactile Button Styles */
        .tactile-button-primary {
            @apply relative transition-all duration-100;
            background-color: #2bb1ff; /* primary-container approx or custom sky blue */
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #006495;
            border-radius: 1.5rem;
        }
        .tactile-button-primary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #006495;
        }

        .tactile-button-secondary {
            @apply relative transition-all duration-100;
            background-color: #ffffff;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #dee3e9;
            border-radius: 1.5rem;
        }
        .tactile-button-secondary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #dee3e9;
        }

        /* Correct State Highlight */
        .correct-choice {
            background-color: #92fc58 !important; /* tertiary-fixed */
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #2b6c00 !important;
            border: 4px solid #ffffff;
        }

        /* Progress Bar Animation */
        .progress-fill {
            transition: width 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1);
        }

        /* Confetti Canvas */
        #confetti-canvas {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 100;
        }

        /* Pulse for Audio Icons */
        @keyframes subtle-pulse {
            0% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); }
        }
        .pulse-audio {
            animation: subtle-pulse 2s infinite ease-in-out;
        }

        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        .fill-icon {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;
        }
    </style>
<style>
    body {
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="min-h-screen flex flex-col text-on-surface">
<!-- TopAppBar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky bg-surface dark:bg-on-surface border-b-4 border-surface-container-highest dark:border-outline flex justify-between items-center px-container-margin py-unit h-touch-target-min z-40">
<div class="flex items-center gap-3">
<div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-primary-container flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden border-2 border-white shadow-sm">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A cute, vibrant 3D stylized rank badge for a children's educational app. It features a friendly golden star with a explorer's hat, set against a bright blue circular background with a subtle glossy plastic texture." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuD7Wu399DNjlJUXF1oNOKlkGtsx0CqOH67L_eztVJSiWu1L0aAIFhZz52TDinorB2g-qtPE3WwK_hBhMqs5Q07KNwkcarTIP6xHTUFLMvmz3Wwrs3GplZhjvxxbeh1i6VL7hfLT5WkBsoQxVrtqhrsgdfLNzwEEjfht-xW6cGsJAAPJp1Q8uoKzaELJvMb6hZmsfz8olixXRVzlnXSXcHYtX_lvW3S4ILk-fAtJooLbnx-yrQA50E3baSavpNdtuXav4gVxjjpybj4"/>
</div>
<h1 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md font-bold text-primary dark:text-primary-fixed">Flag Explorer</h1>
</div>
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex flex-col items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container hover:opacity-80 transition-all active:translate-y-1 shadow-[0_4px_0_0_#6d5700] mr-2">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">notifications_active</span>
<span class="text-[8px] font-bold uppercase leading-none">¡Alarma!</span>
</button><button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center text-primary dark:text-inverse-primary hover:scale-105 transition-transform active:translate-y-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[32px]">volume_up</span>
</button>
</header>
<main class="flex-1 flex flex-col items-center px-container-margin py-8 gap-8 max-w-2xl mx-auto w-full pb-32">
<!-- Progress Bar Section -->
<div class="w-full">
<div class="flex justify-between items-end mb-2">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-primary">Question 1/10</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-tertiary">Keep going!</span>
</div>
<div class="w-full h-4 bg-surface-container-highest rounded-full overflow-hidden">
<div class="progress-fill h-full bg-tertiary-container w-[10%] rounded-full shadow-inner"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Flag Review Card -->
<div class="w-full bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-lg p-6 flex flex-col items-center gap-4 shadow-sm border border-outline-variant relative overflow-hidden">
<!-- Decorative recessed pattern -->
<div class="absolute inset-0 opacity-5 pointer-events-none" style="background-image: radial-gradient(#006495 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 16px 16px;"></div>
<div class="w-full aspect-[3/2] max-w-sm rounded-lg overflow-hidden border-4 border-white shadow-lg z-10 transition-transform duration-500 hover:scale-[1.02]">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A clean, high-resolution graphic of the national flag of France, featuring three vertical stripes of blue, white, and red. The flag is displayed with a slight fabric texture and subtle lighting to appear high-quality and professional for a children's learning interface." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuBAafoujHy4bGMWVRYEl9BZvoEUV8VQZLH2A0jDic73TgFF5jHIBHmlHF2xhLE0dBNUYqw-33jJDCPb5MfJ6JHrdZ2aCNmbi1VjNtf7jyhzYnkWwyOcML9tECZlSXtdD9i2WggvhnTNI4wqDeZJc4BIdXeTlwCEc9CBjN5n8DCvbJWAheJtpOXWZmDLLaOhJugXowqZ4s1UhUHZ8aTuWBl3VTsVu0cjApXNds8-ORTFTKBqvUm1CSQRtodzLlCIC-FOLuD1KIn1zLE"/>
</div>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-surface-variant z-10 text-center">Which country is this?</p>
</div>
<!-- Choice Buttons Grid -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 w-full">
<!-- Option 1: Italy -->
<button class="tactile-button-secondary w-full min-h-[96px] flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-4" onclick="handleChoice(this, false)">
<div class="flex items-center gap-6">
<div class="flex flex-col items-start"><span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-primary">Italia</span><span class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-surface-variant">Italy</span></div>
</div>
<div class="w-16 h-16 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-md pulse-audio">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-4xl fill-icon">volume_up</span>
</div>
</button>
<!-- Option 2: France (Correct) -->
<button class="tactile-button-secondary w-full min-h-[96px] flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-4" onclick="handleChoice(this, true)">
<div class="flex items-center gap-6">
<div class="flex flex-col items-start"><span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-primary">Francia</span><span class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-surface-variant">France</span></div>
</div>
<div class="w-16 h-16 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-md pulse-audio">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-4xl fill-icon">volume_up</span>
</div>
</button>
<!-- Option 3: Germany -->
<button class="tactile-button-secondary w-full min-h-[96px] flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-4" onclick="handleChoice(this, false)">
<div class="flex items-center gap-6">
<div class="flex flex-col items-start"><span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-primary">Alemania</span><span class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-surface-variant">Germany</span></div>
</div>
<div class="w-16 h-16 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-md pulse-audio">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-4xl fill-icon">volume_up</span>
</div>
</button>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation Shell -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-gutter pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest dark:bg-on-surface border-t-4 border-surface-container-highest dark:border-outline shadow-lg rounded-t-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-colors" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold mt-1">Explore</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-colors" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold mt-1">Passport</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container rounded-xl px-4 py-1 translate-y-[-4px] active:scale-95 transition-transform duration-150" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl fill-icon">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold mt-1">Play</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Confetti Canvas -->
<canvas id="confetti-canvas"></canvas>
<script>
        function handleChoice(button, isCorrect) {
            if (isCorrect) {
                button.classList.remove('tactile-button-secondary');
                button.classList.add('correct-choice');
                triggerConfetti();
                
                // Audio feedback (Simulation)
                const audio = new Audio(); // Placeholder for sound effect
                console.log("Playing: Francia / France!");
                
                // Vibrate if available
                if (window.navigator.vibrate) {
                    window.navigator.vibrate([100, 30, 100]);
                }

                // Wait 2 seconds then "next question"
                setTimeout(() => {
                    alert("Super! You found France! Ready for the next one?");
                    window.location.reload();
                }, 2500);
            } else {
                button.style.transform = "translateX(10px)";
                button.classList.add('bg-error-container');
                setTimeout(() => {
                    button.style.transform = "";
                    button.classList.remove('bg-error-container');
                }, 200);
            }
        }

        // Basic Confetti Implementation
        function triggerConfetti() {
            const canvas = document.getElementById('confetti-canvas');
            const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
            canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
            canvas.height = window.innerHeight;

            let particles = [];
            const colors = ['#fccc00', '#2bb1ff', '#92fc58', '#ffdad6', '#ffffff'];

            for (let i = 0; i < 150; i++) {
                particles.push({
                    x: Math.random() * canvas.width,
                    y: canvas.height + Math.random() * 100,
                    size: Math.random() * 8 + 4,
                    color: colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)],
                    speedY: Math.random() * -10 - 10,
                    speedX: Math.random() * 10 - 5,
                    rotation: Math.random() * 360,
                    rotSpeed: Math.random() * 10 - 5
                });
            }

            function animate() {
                ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
                particles.forEach((p, i) => {
                    p.y += p.speedY;
                    p.x += p.speedX;
                    p.speedY += 0.25; // Gravity
                    p.rotation += p.rotSpeed;

                    ctx.save();
                    ctx.translate(p.x, p.y);
                    ctx.rotate(p.rotation * Math.PI / 180);
                    ctx.fillStyle = p.color;
                    ctx.fillRect(-p.size / 2, -p.size / 2, p.size, p.size);
                    ctx.restore();

                    if (p.y > canvas.height + 50) {
                        particles.splice(i, 1);
                    }
                });

                if (particles.length > 0) {
                    requestAnimationFrame(animate);
                }
            }

            animate();
        }
    </script>
</body></html>

<!-- Quiz Phase (Names only) - South Africa -->
<!DOCTYPE html>

<html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport"/>
<title>Flag Adventure - Level 2</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@400;500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",

                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif;
            -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
        }

        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 24;
        }

        /* Tactile Shadow Buttons */
        .btn-tactile-primary {
            @apply transition-all duration-75 active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        
        .btn-tactile-secondary {
            @apply transition-all duration-75 active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 0 0 #d1d5db;
        }

        .card-tactile {
            @apply transition-all duration-100 hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-95 cursor-pointer;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #dee3e9;
        }

        .card-tactile:active {
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #dee3e9;
            transform: translateY(4px);
        }

        @keyframes pulse-yellow {
            0% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 4px 0 0 #a38400, 0 0 0 0px rgba(252, 204, 0, 0.4); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 4px 0 0 #a38400, 0 0 0 15px rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 4px 0 0 #a38400, 0 0 0 0px rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
        }

        .audio-pulse {
            animation: pulse-yellow 2s infinite;
        }

        .confetti-slow {
            pointer-events: none;
            position: absolute;
        }
    </style>
<style>
    body {
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background min-h-screen pb-24">
<!-- Top App Bar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky bg-surface-container-low flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit z-50">
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<button class="p-2 active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary font-bold">Flag Adventure</h1>
</div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<div class="bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container px-3 py-1 rounded-full font-label-bold flex items-center gap-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[18px]" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
<span>Level 2</span>
</div>
<button class="p-2 active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</header>
<main class="max-w-md mx-auto px-container-margin pt-6 pb-12 flex flex-col gap-8">
<!-- Progress Bar -->
<div class="w-full">
<div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-2 px-1">
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">Pregunta 4 de 10</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-tertiary">40%</span>
</div>
<div class="h-4 w-full bg-surface-container-highest rounded-full overflow-hidden">
<div class="h-full bg-tertiary-container rounded-full w-[40%] transition-all duration-500 shadow-sm border-r-2 border-white/20"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Question Section -->
<section class="flex flex-col items-center gap-6 text-center">
<!-- Large Audio Button -->
<button class="audio-pulse w-24 h-24 rounded-full bg-secondary-container flex items-center justify-center text-on-secondary-container transition-transform active:scale-90" onclick="playQuestion()" style="box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #a38400;">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-5xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</button>
<div class="space-y-2">
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-on-surface leading-tight px-4">
                    ¿Cuál es la bandera de Sudáfrica?
                </h2>
<p class="font-body-md text-on-surface-variant italic">
                    "Which is the flag of South Africa?"
                </p>
</div>
</section>
<!-- Flag Options Grid -->
<section class="grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 mt-4">
<!-- Option 1: Colombia -->
<div class="card-tactile bg-surface-container-lowest p-card-padding rounded-lg border-2 border-surface-variant flex items-center gap-6 group" onclick="selectFlag(this, false)"><div class="flex items-center justify-between w-full"><div class="flex flex-col text-left"><p class="font-headline-md text-primary font-bold">Colombia</p><p class="font-body-md text-on-surface-variant italic">Colombia</p></div><button class="p-2 bg-secondary-container rounded-full text-on-secondary-container shadow-sm active:scale-90 transition-transform"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">volume_up</span></button></div></div>
<!-- Option 2: South Africa (Correct) -->
<div class="card-tactile bg-surface-container-lowest p-card-padding rounded-lg border-2 border-surface-variant flex items-center gap-6 group" onclick="selectFlag(this, true)"><div class="flex items-center justify-between w-full"><div class="flex flex-col text-left"><p class="font-headline-md text-primary font-bold">Sudáfrica</p><p class="font-body-md text-on-surface-variant italic">South Africa</p></div><button class="p-2 bg-secondary-container rounded-full text-on-secondary-container shadow-sm active:scale-90 transition-transform"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">volume_up</span></button></div></div>
<!-- Option 3: Greece -->
