<div class="card-tactile bg-surface-container-lowest p-card-padding rounded-lg border-2 border-surface-variant flex items-center gap-6 group" onclick="selectFlag(this, false)"><div class="flex items-center justify-between w-full"><div class="flex flex-col text-left"><p class="font-headline-md text-primary font-bold">Grecia</p><p class="font-body-md text-on-surface-variant italic">Greece</p></div><button class="p-2 bg-secondary-container rounded-full text-on-secondary-container shadow-sm active:scale-90 transition-transform"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">volume_up</span></button></div></div>
</section>
<!-- Performance Stars -->
<section class="flex justify-center items-center gap-4 py-6">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-secondary-container text-4xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-secondary-container text-6xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-outline-variant text-4xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0;">star</span>
</section>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation Bar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg border-t-4 border-surface-variant rounded-t-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Success Feedback Overlay (Hidden by default) -->
<div class="fixed inset-0 bg-background/90 z-[100] flex flex-col items-center justify-center hidden" id="success-overlay">
<div class="relative w-full h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-container-margin text-center">
<div class="absolute inset-0 overflow-hidden pointer-events-none" id="confetti-container"></div>
<div class="bg-surface-container-lowest p-10 rounded-xl shadow-2xl border-4 border-tertiary-container max-w-sm w-full animate-bounce">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-tertiary-container text-8xl mb-4" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">check_circle</span>
<h3 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-tertiary-container mb-2">¡Excelente!</h3>
<p class="font-body-lg text-on-surface mb-6">Very Good!</p>
<button class="w-full py-4 bg-primary text-on-primary rounded-lg font-headline-md btn-tactile-primary" onclick="closeOverlay()">
                    Continuar
                </button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<script>
        function selectFlag(element, isCorrect) {
            // Remove previous selections
            document.querySelectorAll('.card-tactile').forEach(card => {
                card.classList.remove('border-primary', 'border-error', 'border-tertiary-container', 'bg-tertiary-container/10');
            });

            if (isCorrect) {
                element.classList.add('border-tertiary-container', 'bg-tertiary-container/10');
                // Play correct sound effect (visual feedback)
                showSuccess();
            } else {
                element.classList.add('border-error', 'bg-error/5');
                // Small vibration/shake effect
                element.classList.add('animate-shake');
                setTimeout(() => element.classList.remove('animate-shake'), 400);
            }
        }

        function showSuccess() {
            const overlay = document.getElementById('success-overlay');
            overlay.classList.remove('hidden');
            createConfetti();
        }

        function closeOverlay() {
            const overlay = document.getElementById('success-overlay');
            overlay.classList.add('hidden');
        }

        function playQuestion() {
            // Visual feedback for clicking audio
            const btn = document.querySelector('.audio-pulse');
            btn.style.transform = 'scale(1.1)';
            setTimeout(() => btn.style.transform = 'scale(1)', 200);
            
            // In a real app, window.speechSynthesis or an audio file would play here
            console.log("Playing audio: ¿Cuál es la bandera de Sudáfrica?");
        }

        function createConfetti() {
            const container = document.getElementById('confetti-container');
            const colors = ['#fccc00', '#006495', '#59be1b', '#ba1a1a'];
            for (let i = 0; i < 50; i++) {
                const confetti = document.createElement('div');
                confetti.className = 'confetti-slow';
                confetti.style.left = Math.random() * 100 + 'vw';
                confetti.style.top = '-10px';
                confetti.style.width = '10px';
                confetti.style.height = '10px';
                confetti.style.backgroundColor = colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)];
                confetti.style.borderRadius = '50%';
                container.appendChild(confetti);

                const duration = 2000 + Math.random() * 3000;
                confetti.animate([
                    { transform: 'translateY(0) rotate(0)', opacity: 1 },
                    { transform: `translateY(100vh) rotate(${Math.random() * 360}deg)`, opacity: 0 }
                ], {
                    duration: duration,
                    easing: 'cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1)'
                }).onfinish = () => confetti.remove();
            }
        }
    </script>
<style>
        @keyframes shake {
            0%, 100% { transform: translateX(0); }
            25% { transform: translateX(-8px); }
            75% { transform: translateX(8px); }
        }
        .animate-shake {
            animation: shake 0.2s cubic-bezier(.36,.07,.19,.97) both;
            border-color: #ba1a1a !important;
        }
    </style>
</body></html>

<!-- Quiz Phase (Names only) - India -->
<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="en"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/>
<title>Flag Adventure - Quiz Level 2</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        body { font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; }
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
            display: inline-block;
            vertical-align: middle;
        }
        .tactile-btn {
            box-shadow: 0 4px 0 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
        }
        .tactile-btn:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
        }
        .flag-card {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #e4e8ef;
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
        }
        .flag-card:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #e4e8ef;
        }
        .audio-pulse {
            animation: pulse 2s infinite;
        }
        @keyframes pulse {
            0% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(252, 204, 0, 0.7); }
            70% { transform: scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 0 0 15px rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
        }
    </style>
<style>
    body {
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background min-h-screen flex flex-col overflow-x-hidden">
<!-- TopAppBar -->
<header class="bg-surface-container-low w-full top-0 sticky z-40 flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit h-16">
<div class="flex items-center gap-4">
<button class="active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 text-primary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-headline-md">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary">Flag Adventure</h1>
</div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">LVL 2</span>
<button class="active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 text-primary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-headline-md">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</header>
<!-- Main Content Canvas -->
<main class="flex-grow container mx-auto px-container-margin pt-4 pb-24 max-w-lg">
<!-- Progress Bar Section -->
<div class="mb-8">
<div class="flex justify-between items-end mb-2">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">Quest Progress</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-primary">4/10</span>
</div>
<div class="h-4 w-full bg-surface-container-highest rounded-full overflow-hidden">
<div class="h-full bg-tertiary-container w-[40%] rounded-full transition-all duration-500"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Question Section -->
<section class="text-center mb-8 space-y-4">
<div class="relative inline-block mb-4">
<button class="audio-pulse w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-secondary-container flex items-center justify-center tactile-btn text-on-secondary-container" onclick="playAudioPrompt()">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined !text-4xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
<div class="space-y-2">
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-on-background">¿Cuál es la bandera de la India?</h2>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-surface-variant italic">Which is the flag of India?</p>
</div>
</section>
<!-- Options Grid -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 mb-12">
<!-- Option A: Argentina -->
<button class="flag-card group bg-surface-container-lowest border-2 border-surface-variant rounded-lg p-card-padding flex items-center gap-6 text-left" onclick="selectOption('wrong')"><div class="flex items-center justify-between w-full"><div class="flex flex-col"><span class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-on-surface">Argentina</span><span class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-surface-variant italic">Argentina</span></div><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary !text-4xl">volume_up</span></div></button>
<!-- Option B: India (Correct) -->
<button class="flag-card group bg-surface-container-lowest border-2 border-primary-container rounded-lg p-card-padding flex items-center gap-6 text-left" onclick="selectOption('correct')"><div class="flex items-center justify-between w-full"><div class="flex flex-col"><span class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-on-surface">India</span><span class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-surface-variant italic">India</span></div><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary !text-4xl">volume_up</span></div></button>
<!-- Option C: South Africa -->
<button class="flag-card group bg-surface-container-lowest border-2 border-surface-variant rounded-lg p-card-padding flex items-center gap-6 text-left" onclick="selectOption('wrong')"><div class="flex items-center justify-between w-full"><div class="flex flex-col"><span class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-on-surface">Sudáfrica</span><span class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-surface-variant italic">South Africa</span></div><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary !text-4xl">volume_up</span></div></button>
</div>
<!-- Performance Stars -->
<div class="flex justify-center items-center gap-4 py-4 bg-surface-container-low rounded-xl">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined !text-4xl text-secondary-container" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined !text-5xl text-secondary-container" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined !text-4xl text-outline-variant" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0;">star</span>
</div>
</main>
<!-- BottomNavBar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 bg-surface-container-lowest flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 shadow-lg rounded-t-lg border-t-4 border-surface-variant">
<!-- Explore -->
<button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-75">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="map">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</button>
<!-- Passport -->
<button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant active:translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-75">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="menu_book">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</button>
<!-- Play (Active) -->
<button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-75">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="quiz" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</button>
</nav>
<!-- Correct/Wrong Micro-interactions -->
<div class="fixed inset-0 pointer-events-none flex items-center justify-center z-[60] opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-300" id="feedback-overlay">
<div class="p-8 rounded-full bg-white shadow-2xl scale-50 transition-transform duration-500" id="feedback-content">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined !text-9xl" id="feedback-icon"></span>
</div>
</div>
<script>
        function selectOption(type) {
            const overlay = document.getElementById('feedback-overlay');
            const content = document.getElementById('feedback-content');
            const icon = document.getElementById('feedback-icon');
            
            overlay.classList.remove('opacity-0');
            content.classList.remove('scale-50');
            content.classList.add('scale-100');

            if(type === 'correct') {
                icon.innerText = 'check_circle';
                icon.className = 'material-symbols-outlined !text-9xl text-tertiary-container';
                // Success Audio Trigger Simulation
            } else {
                icon.innerText = 'cancel';
                icon.className = 'material-symbols-outlined !text-9xl text-error';
            }

            setTimeout(() => {
                overlay.classList.add('opacity-0');
                content.classList.add('scale-50');
                content.classList.remove('scale-100');
            }, 1000);
        }

        function playAudioPrompt() {
            console.log("Playing audio: ¿Cuál es la bandera de la India? Which is the flag of India?");
            // Add a temporary animation effect to show audio is "playing"
            const btn = document.querySelector('.audio-pulse');
            btn.classList.remove('audio-pulse');
            void btn.offsetWidth; // trigger reflow
            btn.classList.add('audio-pulse');
        }
    </script>
</body></html>

<!-- Quiz Phase (Names only) - New Zealand -->
<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="en"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/>
<title>Flag Adventure - Quiz Level 4</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "unit": "8px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        body { font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; }
        .material-symbols-outlined { font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48; }
        
        /* Tactical Skeuomorphic Buttons */
        .btn-chunky-primary {
            @apply relative bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container font-label-bold text-label-bold py-4 px-8 rounded-lg transition-all duration-100;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        .btn-chunky-primary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #004b71;
        }

        .btn-chunky-secondary {
            @apply relative bg-surface-container-lowest text-primary font-label-bold text-label-bold py-4 px-8 rounded-lg transition-all duration-100 border border-outline-variant;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #bec8d3;
        }
        .btn-chunky-secondary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #bec8d3;
        }

        /* Quiz Card Interaction */
        .quiz-card {
            @apply relative bg-surface-container-lowest p-card-padding rounded-lg transition-all duration-100 cursor-pointer border-2 border-transparent;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 0 0 #dee3e9;
        }
        .quiz-card:hover { @apply border-primary-container; }
        .quiz-card:active {
            transform: translateY(6px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #dee3e9;
        }

        /* Pulse Animation for Audio */
        @keyframes soft-pulse {
            0% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #b38f00; }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 8px 12px 0 rgba(115, 92, 0, 0.3); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #b38f00; }
        }
        .audio-pulse {
            animation: soft-pulse 2s infinite ease-in-out;
            background-color: #fccc00;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #b38f00;
        }
    </style>
<style>
    body {
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background min-h-screen flex flex-col">
<!-- TopAppBar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky z-50 bg-surface-container-low flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit">
<div class="flex items-center gap-4">
<button class="active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 text-primary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary font-bold">Flag Adventure</h1>
</div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-2 bg-secondary-container rounded-full px-3 py-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-secondary-container">120</span>
</div>
<button class="active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 text-primary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">volume_up</span>
</button>
</header>
<main class="flex-1 px-container-margin pt-gutter pb-32 max-w-2xl mx-auto w-full">
<!-- Progress Bar Section -->
<div class="mb-8">
<div class="flex justify-between items-end mb-2">
<span class="font-label-bold text-primary">Level 4</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">70% Complete</span>
</div>
<div class="h-4 w-full bg-surface-container-highest rounded-full overflow-hidden">
<div class="h-full bg-tertiary-container rounded-full transition-all duration-500 shadow-inner" style="width: 70%"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Question Section -->
<div class="text-center mb-10">
<div class="mb-6 flex justify-center">
<button aria-label="Listen to question" class="audio-pulse w-24 h-24 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center transition-transform active:scale-95">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white text-5xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
<h2 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md mb-2">¿Cuál es la bandera de Nueva Zelanda?</h2>
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-surface-variant">Which is the flag of New Zealand?</p>
</div>
<!-- Quiz Options (Bento Style Grid) -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
<!-- New Zealand (Correct) -->
<div class="quiz-card flex flex-col items-center gap-4 group" onclick="selectOption(this)">
<div class="w-full aspect-video rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-outline-variant bg-white">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="The flag of New Zealand, featuring a deep blue field with the Union Jack in the upper left corner and four red five-pointed stars outlined in white on the right side. The style is clean, vibrant, and educational with soft lighting to emphasize the texture of the fabric. The overall aesthetic is premium and minimalist against a soft grey studio background." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuDYAMid8yOMwT5mxqL6vZ-RblKGCknnAGOHmdo6BZNnAx27JOxAxjFycgu7PLCOue7vcUOA5J4ldgS6P4tDtwYqi4PoJUm_HcvF1WmNZdxsONVkPrALWmIxf_YFri74SjrQgNmmCBJIoLn_TXsr66LsP7DkgLFpqKEayCx2nsy-ERBaONqXoHbfMc5pG2TKTRyKfrb7_0zwvugi9DBGMmrRTI8aLuqhtHFrm6FQwgRFefwtIDfBRzE9Pj5kdoQxill7AnTBXnttJyw"/>
</div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface-variant text-lg">Nueva Zelanda / New Zealand</span>
</div>
<!-- Australia -->
<div class="quiz-card flex flex-col items-center gap-4 group" onclick="selectOption(this)">
<div class="w-full aspect-video rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-outline-variant bg-white">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="The flag of Australia, showing a deep blue field with the Union Jack in the canton, a large white seven-pointed star below it, and five white stars representing the Southern Cross on the right. The image is rendered in a high-fidelity, educational style with vibrant saturation and soft shadows. The lighting is balanced and modern, fitting a premium children's learning interface." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuBsyZ6hrT4hlzfsczip0Pm94WCtLSqdtt3O5V5_IF9VX3gElvbK7Q6ETE2EipbCIOFp77NUIGssOWA6A2MoxO044ukLiEyciH30RbvUHv5eLL3P2pvI-4zekCmRrakEn4tR6vnEoOggj8PdL2iZwHt9Y4dEMsqkiER62wo0oBHUmFrX-OrdCy5QgNXDMoCg7CHcrLTt5pvm59MNRFdTAIEdeWwq_8tsIpvckiXwLeONXzQ457GZf-1po9DbBkGNn2LxR7yj9DuJbmA"/>
</div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface-variant text-lg">Australia / Australia</span>
</div>
<!-- United Kingdom -->
<div class="quiz-card flex flex-col items-center gap-4 group" onclick="selectOption(this)">
<div class="w-full aspect-video rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-outline-variant bg-white">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="The Union Jack flag of the United Kingdom, featuring overlapping red and white crosses on a blue background. The colors are bold and saturated for high legibility for young learners. The visual style is tactile and clean, presented as a high-quality physical learning card with rounded corners and premium texture. The setting is bright and cheerful." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuC0iBd0x3tliPWsNB6K1UnMpSVF7yhO37yYjOuuTZj9eHs3IOObC-aGqXc6RFDvPBPEv9jWsEqXAC04QL_bwruCbadK0XgTxKs21DGpibFcPjt8q1NuYrEU5KlypxHt6jsYh6p-IRBI3yzmAZgQndCV5JzvQEZ7H_zlHBCn9DFkRmCTq2V9A9Rkm4CAbMo3z-f8b4ceN5BORrgrhMgJJR4Uld1ZItY_dFCA2mljWWe4GA8xHgunIlQq6sx5hqak1I4h3n1o59GzyhY"/>
</div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface-variant text-lg">Reino Unido / United Kingdom</span>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Action Button -->
<div class="mt-12 flex justify-center">
<button class="btn-chunky-primary w-full max-w-sm">
                COMPROBAR / CHECK
            </button>
</div>
</main>
<!-- BottomNavBar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg border-t-4 border-surface-variant rounded-t-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0 hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
</nav>
<script>
        function selectOption(el) {
            // Remove selection from others
            document.querySelectorAll('.quiz-card').forEach(card => {
                card.classList.remove('border-primary-container', 'bg-primary-fixed');
                card.style.borderColor = 'transparent';
            });
            // Highlight selected
            el.classList.add('bg-primary-fixed');
            el.style.borderColor = '#2bb1ff';
        }

        // Simple audio feedback simulation
        const audioBtn = document.querySelector('.audio-pulse');
        audioBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            audioBtn.style.transform = 'scale(0.9)';
            setTimeout(() => { audioBtn.style.transform = 'scale(1)'; }, 100);
            console.log("Playing audio: ¿Cuál es la bandera de Nueva Zelanda?");
        });
    </script>
</body></html>

<!-- Quiz Phase (Names only) - Switzerland -->
<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/>
<title>Flag Adventure - Quiz Level 4</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<script id="tailwind-config">
        tailwind.config = {
          darkMode: "class",
          theme: {
            extend: {
              "colors": {
                      "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                      "surface-tint": "#006495",
                      "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                      "on-background": "#171c21",
                      "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                      "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                      "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                      "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                      "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                      "on-error": "#ffffff",
                      "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                      "secondary": "#735c00",
                      "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                      "outline": "#6e7882",
                      "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                      "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                      "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                      "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                      "primary": "#006495",
                      "on-surface": "#171c21",
                      "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                      "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                      "error": "#ba1a1a",
                      "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                      "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                      "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                      "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                      "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                      "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                      "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                      "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                      "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                      "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                      "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                      "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                      "background": "#f7f9ff",
                      "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                      "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                      "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                      "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                      "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                      "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                      "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                      "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                      "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                      "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                      "surface-dim": "#d6dae1"
              },
              "borderRadius": {
                      "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                      "lg": "2rem",
                      "xl": "3rem",
                      "full": "9999px"
              },
              "spacing": {
                      "container-margin": "24px",
                      "card-padding": "20px",
                      "gutter": "16px",
                      "touch-target-min": "48px",
                      "unit": "8px"
              },
              "fontFamily": {
                      "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                      "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                      "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                      "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                      "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                      "body-lg": ["Quicksand"]
              },
              "fontSize": {
                      "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                      "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                      "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                      "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                      "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                      "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}]
              }
            },
          },
        }
    </script>
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
            user-select: none;
        }
        .chunky-button-shadow {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
        }
        .chunky-button-primary {
            background-color: #2bb1ff;
            border-bottom: 6px solid #006495;
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
        }
        .chunky-button-primary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            border-bottom-width: 2px;
        }
        .chunky-card {
            border: 2px solid #dee3e9;
            border-bottom: 8px solid #dee3e9;
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
        }
        .chunky-card:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            border-bottom-width: 4px;
        }
        .audio-pulse {
            animation: pulse 2s infinite;
            background-color: #fccc00;
            border-bottom: 6px solid #735c00;
        }
        @keyframes pulse {
            0% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); }
        }
        .progress-track {
            height: 16px;
            background-color: #dee3e9;
            border-radius: 999px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .progress-fill {
            height: 100%;
            background-color: #59be1b;
            border-radius: 999px;
            transition: width 0.5s ease-out;
        }
    </style>
<style>
    body {
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background font-body-md text-on-surface min-h-screen flex flex-col">
<!-- Top App Bar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky bg-surface-container-low flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit z-40">
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 text-primary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="menu">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary font-bold">Level 4</h1>
</div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 text-primary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</header>
<main class="flex-grow container mx-auto max-w-lg px-container-margin py-6 flex flex-col gap-8">
<!-- Progress Section -->
<div class="w-full flex flex-col gap-2">
<div class="flex justify-between items-end">
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">Question 4 of 10</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-tertiary">40%</span>
</div>
<div class="progress-track">
<div class="progress-fill" style="width: 40%"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Question Section -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center text-center gap-4 py-4">
<!-- Audio Speaker -->
<button class="w-32 h-32 rounded-full audio-pulse flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg active:translate-y-1 transition-transform">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white" data-icon="volume_up" data-weight="fill" style="font-size: 64px;">volume_up</span>
</button>
<div class="mt-4">
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-on-surface mb-1">¿Cuál es la bandera de Suiza?</h2>
<p class="font-body-lg text-on-surface-variant">Which is the flag of Switzerland?</p>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Flag Options Bento-style Grid -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 gap-gutter">
<!-- Option 1: Switzerland -->
<button class="chunky-card bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-lg p-card-padding flex items-center gap-gutter w-full group"><div class="text-left flex-grow"><span class="font-label-bold text-primary block">A</span><span class="font-headline-md text-on-surface">Suiza / Switzerland</span></div><span class="material-symbols-outlined ml-auto text-outline-variant group-active:text-primary" data-icon="circle">circle</span></button>
<!-- Option 2: Austria -->
<button class="chunky-card bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-lg p-card-padding flex items-center gap-gutter w-full group"><div class="text-left flex-grow"><span class="font-label-bold text-primary block">B</span><span class="font-headline-md text-on-surface">Austria / Austria</span></div><span class="material-symbols-outlined ml-auto text-outline-variant" data-icon="circle">circle</span></button>
<!-- Option 3: Belgium -->
<button class="chunky-card bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-lg p-card-padding flex items-center gap-gutter w-full group"><div class="text-left flex-grow"><span class="font-label-bold text-primary block">C</span><span class="font-headline-md text-on-surface">Bélgica / Belgium</span></div><span class="material-symbols-outlined ml-auto text-outline-variant" data-icon="circle">circle</span></button>
</div>
<!-- Submit Placeholder (Optional for UX) -->
<div class="mt-4 pb-24">
<button class="chunky-button-primary w-full py-5 rounded-lg text-white font-headline-md flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
                Check Answer
                <span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="arrow_forward">arrow_forward</span>
</button>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Nav Bar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg border-t-4 border-surface-variant">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-all" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="map">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-all" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="menu_book">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0 shadow-inner" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="quiz" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Simple click interaction simulation -->
<script>
        document.querySelectorAll('.chunky-card').forEach(card => {
            card.addEventListener('click', function() {
                // Remove selected state from others
                document.querySelectorAll('.chunky-card').forEach(c => {
                    c.classList.remove('border-primary-container', 'bg-primary-fixed');
                    c.querySelector('.material-symbols-outlined:last-child').innerText = 'circle';
                    c.querySelector('.material-symbols-outlined:last-child').classList.remove('text-primary');
                });
                
                // Add selected state
                this.classList.add('border-primary-container', 'bg-primary-fixed');
                const icon = this.querySelector('.material-symbols-outlined:last-child');
                icon.innerText = 'check_circle';
                icon.classList.add('text-primary');
                icon.style.fontVariationSettings = "'FILL' 1";
            });
        });

        // Speaker click animation
        const speaker = document.querySelector('.audio-pulse');
        speaker.addEventListener('click', () => {
            speaker.style.transform = 'scale(0.9) translateY(4px)';
            setTimeout(() => {
                speaker.style.transform = 'scale(1) translateY(0)';
            }, 100);
        });
    </script>
</body></html>

<!-- Quiz Phase (Names only) - Mexico -->
<!DOCTYPE html>

<html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport"/>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@100..900&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "card-padding": "20px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        .chunky-button-primary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 #004b71;
        }
        .chunky-button-primary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 #004b71;
        }
        .chunky-card {
            box-shadow: 0 8px 0 #dee3e9;
            transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275);
        }
        .chunky-card:active {
            transform: scale(0.95) translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 #dee3e9;
        }
        .audio-pulse {
            animation: pulse-ring 2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1) infinite;
        }
        @keyframes pulse-ring {
            0% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); opacity: 0.8; }
            100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
        }
        .confetti {
            position: absolute;
            width: 10px;
            height: 10px;
            background-color: #fccc00;
            pointer-events: none;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background font-body-md overflow-x-hidden selection:bg-primary-container">
<!-- Top AppBar Component -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky z-50 bg-background border-b-4 border-surface-container-highest flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit">
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-all active:translate-y-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-3xl">arrow_back</span>
</button>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center">
<h1 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-primary">España / Spain</h1>
<div class="w-48 h-3 bg-surface-container-highest rounded-full overflow-hidden mt-1">
<div class="w-2/3 h-full bg-tertiary-container rounded-full"></div>
</div>
</div>
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-secondary-container hover:opacity-80 transition-all active:translate-y-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-3xl">volume_up</span>
</button>
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-full active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-sm border-b-2 border-secondary"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">notifications_active</span><span class="text-[8px] font-bold uppercase leading-none">Alarma</span></button><button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-full active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-sm border-b-2 border-secondary"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">notifications_active</span><span class="text-[8px] font-bold uppercase leading-none">Alarma</span></button><button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-full active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-sm border-b-2 border-secondary"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">notifications_active</span><span class="text-[8px] font-bold uppercase leading-none">Alarma</span></button><button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-full active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-sm border-b-2 border-secondary"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">notifications_active</span><span class="text-[8px] font-bold uppercase leading-none">Alarma</span></button><button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-full active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-sm border-b-2 border-secondary"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">notifications_active</span><span class="text-[8px] font-bold uppercase leading-none">Alarma</span></button><button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-full active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-sm border-b-2 border-secondary"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">notifications_active</span><span class="text-[8px] font-bold uppercase leading-none">Alarma</span></button><button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-full active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-sm border-b-2 border-secondary"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">notifications_active</span><span class="text-[8px] font-bold uppercase leading-none">Alarma</span></button><button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-full active:translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-sm border-b-2 border-secondary"><span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">notifications_active</span><span class="text-[8px] font-bold uppercase leading-none">Alarma</span></button></header>
<main class="min-h-[calc(100vh-144px)] px-container-margin pt-8 pb-32 max-w-2xl mx-auto flex flex-col items-center gap-10">
<!-- Question Section -->
<section class="w-full text-center space-y-6">
<div class="relative inline-block">
<button class="audio-pulse w-24 h-24 rounded-full bg-secondary-container flex items-center justify-center chunky-card group" onclick="playAudio()">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-5xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</button>
<div class="absolute -top-2 -right-2 bg-primary text-white text-xs font-bold px-2 py-1 rounded-full">¡ESCUCHA!</div>
</div>
<div class="space-y-2">
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-on-surface">¿Cuál es la bandera de México?</h2>
<p class="font-body-lg text-on-surface-variant italic">Which is the flag of Mexico?</p>
</div>
</section>
<!-- Quiz Options - Bento-ish Grid -->
<section class="w-full grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
<!-- Italy (Incorrect) -->
<button class="chunky-card bg-surface-container-lowest border-2 border-surface-container-highest rounded-lg p-card-padding flex flex-col items-center gap-4 group" onclick="handleSelection(false, this)">
<div class="w-full aspect-[3/2] rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-outline-variant">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A clean, vibrant digital illustration of the national flag of Italy with vertical stripes of green, white, and red. The style is educational and friendly, using bright, saturated colors suitable for a premium children's learning application. The lighting is even and soft, making the colors pop against a neutral background." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuDlDd6FdZBw3Mm-vmEpDOHUgURCVwKrY226juztADE0WQ_3nyzZLXNDTEo97eg6bWutiwyyrkbXkxpebjVle0JOqsKTZdZy4pbcKvMRerj5JnB6U3uURJbbHTm0rUTGcohV_GcPCtk0IXrCfbnazQBtrYB9tAwM3rNRfq_yi2wCNx3qPwvVyUyvpDEWyWtr4zmfA45iezGtcYjnLw20n3HYFk2gq1CTPlxWNge2tMij95bC3lDTgi1MXLnp9mZeTMRHpeDYPhCbmTU"/>
</div>
<span class="font-headline-md text-on-surface">Italia / Italy</span></button>
<!-- Mexico (Correct) -->
<button class="chunky-card bg-surface-container-lowest border-2 border-surface-container-highest rounded-lg p-card-padding flex flex-col items-center gap-4 group" onclick="handleSelection(true, this)">
<div class="w-full aspect-[3/2] rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-outline-variant">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A detailed, colorful digital depiction of the Mexican flag, showing the tricolor of green, white, and red with the coat of arms featuring an eagle on a cactus with a snake in its beak centered on the white stripe. The visual style is playful and chunky, optimized for 4-8 year old children, featuring high contrast and friendly textures." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuAaksyIA79prSiRWuDSBxV9J41itX2QpNDOfHBoQYnDRWI4sxfF9bKALQzlIwm7bDtIP7HTlnbzyan5InLfiNx6l47q9Tu2gWIHibVXsOMNCQSHCSiWh2X_z3X_fIN2VNIotBawXjPkylipySFzPQJZIVmLIpMn7w-FKwYtPe9RxsxgISPLPjoWrjOgkCdEAygXqiQrf4jtHUqdTMvygSHe-kA-vdOPG7pWehLNmmY-K3qew_wF4CkHXuTxP3VISGwzJjOd07tuCrQ"/>
</div>
<span class="font-headline-md text-on-surface">México / Mexico</span></button>
<!-- Japan (Incorrect) -->
<button class="chunky-card bg-surface-container-lowest border-2 border-surface-container-highest rounded-lg p-card-padding flex flex-col items-center gap-4 group" onclick="handleSelection(false, this)">
<div class="w-full aspect-[3/2] rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-outline-variant">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A high-quality digital illustration of the flag of Japan, consisting of a stark white rectangular field with a deep red disc in the center representing the sun. The aesthetic is clean, minimal, and vibrant, designed with soft rounded corners and tactile textures for a premium educational mobile app interface for young children." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuB7UHvituZZxmT6IF6H4Bf4iVJ5BFIqReR-LOf2UzUbG1yAUOFvwVdcdKwnTFZMYdDPAO8tCitFFZv7Zq6vOE3nDxcUbg9RWKeqrMiNgil9XFg7EGEhOkdqwBgOwNL68B079uaZFBK-ay3eErS1-ws-lGk9KaV92NruObcyrJePwWBDTxeSdzgapTJWB_AjcB9hVo5SgtilQ05kKJdcXAhsivLrOtM4RorBUnAC2nDf8uiQcL6mYq8sE2LVzW2nWSS6kwGxGzmWqAc"/>
</div>
<span class="font-headline-md text-on-surface">Japón / Japan</span></button>
</section>
<!-- Visual Encouragement Decor -->
<div class="flex gap-4">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-tertiary-container text-4xl animate-bounce" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-secondary-container text-4xl animate-bounce" style="animation-delay: 0.2s; font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary-container text-4xl animate-bounce" style="animation-delay: 0.4s; font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation Bar (Contextual) -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-touch-target-min flex justify-around items-center px-gutter pb-2 bg-surface border-t-4 border-surface-container-highest shadow-lg z-50 rounded-t-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant px-4 py-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-all active:scale-95" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">explore</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explorar</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container rounded-xl px-4 py-2 translate-y-1 active:scale-95 transition-transform" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Pasaporte</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant px-4 py-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-all active:scale-95" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">videogame_asset</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Jugar</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Feedback Modal (Hidden by default) -->
<div class="fixed inset-0 bg-white/90 z-[60] hidden flex-col items-center justify-center p-container-margin text-center" id="feedback-overlay">
<div class="bg-surface-container-lowest p-10 rounded-xl chunky-card border-4 border-primary flex flex-col items-center gap-6 max-w-sm" id="modal-content">
<div class="w-32 h-32 rounded-full bg-tertiary-container flex items-center justify-center" id="icon-container">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white text-7xl" id="feedback-icon" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">check_circle</span>
</div>
<h2 class="font-headline-lg text-headline-lg text-primary" id="feedback-title">¡Excelente!</h2>
<p class="font-body-lg text-on-surface-variant" id="feedback-subtitle">That's the flag of Mexico!</p>
<button class="w-full py-4 rounded-full bg-primary text-white font-headline-md chunky-button-primary" onclick="closeFeedback()">
                ¡SIGUIENTE!
            </button>
</div>
</div>
<script>
        function playAudio() {
            // Animation only for prototype
            const icon = document.querySelector('.audio-pulse');
            icon.classList.remove('audio-pulse');
            void icon.offsetWidth; // Trigger reflow
            icon.classList.add('audio-pulse');
            
            // Haptic-like visual feedback
            icon.style.transform = "scale(1.1) translateY(4px)";
            setTimeout(() => icon.style.transform = "", 200);
        }

        function handleSelection(isCorrect, element) {
            const overlay = document.getElementById('feedback-overlay');
            const title = document.getElementById('feedback-title');
            const subtitle = document.getElementById('feedback-subtitle');
            const icon = document.getElementById('feedback-icon');
            const iconBg = document.getElementById('icon-container');
            const modal = document.getElementById('modal-content');

            overlay.classList.remove('hidden');
            overlay.classList.add('flex');

            if (isCorrect) {
                title.innerText = "¡Excelente!";
                subtitle.innerText = "That's the flag of Mexico!";
                icon.innerText = "celebration";
                iconBg.className = "w-32 h-32 rounded-full bg-tertiary-container flex items-center justify-center";
                modal.style.borderColor = "#2b6c00";
                createConfetti();
            } else {
                title.innerText = "¡Casi!";
                subtitle.innerText = "Try again! You can do it!";
                icon.innerText = "refresh";
                iconBg.className = "w-32 h-32 rounded-full bg-secondary-container flex items-center justify-center";
                modal.style.borderColor = "#735c00";
            }
        }

        function closeFeedback() {
            document.getElementById('feedback-overlay').classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('feedback-overlay').classList.remove('flex');
        }

        function createConfetti() {
            for (let i = 0; i < 30; i++) {
                const confetti = document.createElement('div');
                confetti.className = 'confetti';
                confetti.style.left = Math.random() * 100 + 'vw';
                confetti.style.top = '-10px';
                confetti.style.backgroundColor = ['#fccc00', '#2bb1ff', '#59be1b', '#ffdad6'][Math.floor(Math.random() * 4)];
                confetti.style.transform = `rotate(${Math.random() * 360}deg)`;
                document.body.appendChild(confetti);

                const animation = confetti.animate([
                    { transform: `translate(0, 0) rotate(0)`, opacity: 1 },
                    { transform: `translate(${(Math.random() - 0.5) * 200}px, 100vh) rotate(${Math.random() * 1000}deg)`, opacity: 0 }
                ], {
                    duration: 1000 + Math.random() * 2000,
                    easing: 'cubic-bezier(0, .9, .57, 1)'
                });

                animation.onfinish = () => confetti.remove();
            }
        }
    </script>
</body></html>

<!-- Quiz Phase (Names only) - Philippines -->
<!DOCTYPE html>

<html class="light" lang="en"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport"/>
<title>Flag Adventure - Level 4 Quiz</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@300;400;500;600;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "unit": "8px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif;
            -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
        }

        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }

        /* Tactile Button Styling */
        .btn-primary-tactile {
            background-color: #006495;
            color: white;
            border-bottom: 6px solid #004163;
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
        }
        .btn-primary-tactile:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            border-bottom-width: 0px;
        }

        .btn-secondary-tactile {
            background-color: #ffffff;
            color: #006495;
            border-bottom: 4px solid #dee3e9;
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
        }
        .btn-secondary-tactile:active {
            transform: translateY(2px);
            border-bottom-width: 0px;
        }

        /* Flag Card Tactical Feel */
        .flag-card {
            background: white;
            border: 2px solid #dee3e9;
            border-bottom: 8px solid #dee3e9;
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .flag-card:active {
            transform: translateY(6px);
            border-bottom-width: 2px;
        }
        .flag-card.selected {
            border-color: #006495;
            border-bottom-color: #004163;
            background-color: #cbe6ff;
        }

        /* Pulse animation for audio */
        @keyframes pulse-yellow {
            0% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(252, 204, 0, 0.7); }
            70% { transform: scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 0 0 15px rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(252, 204, 0, 0); }
        }
        .audio-pulse {
            animation: pulse-yellow 2s infinite;
        }

        /* Progress Bar Animation */
        .progress-fill {
            transition: width 1s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1);
        }
    </style>
<style>
    body {
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background min-h-screen flex flex-col">
<!-- Top Navigation Bar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky bg-surface-container-low z-40 flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit h-16">
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<button class="p-2 active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container text-primary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0;">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary tracking-tight">Flag Adventure</h1>
</div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-3">
<div class="bg-secondary-container px-3 py-1 rounded-full flex items-center gap-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-sm" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">stars</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-secondary-container">Level 4</span>
</div>
<button class="p-2 active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container text-primary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0;">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</header>
<main class="flex-grow container mx-auto px-container-margin py-6 flex flex-col gap-8 max-w-2xl">
<!-- Progress Section -->
<div class="w-full space-y-2">
<div class="flex justify-between items-end mb-1">
<span class="font-label-bold text-primary flex items-center gap-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-lg" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">explore</span>
                    Casi llegamos!
                </span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">90%</span>
</div>
<div class="h-5 w-full bg-surface-container-highest rounded-full overflow-hidden border-2 border-surface-variant p-0.5">
<div class="progress-fill h-full bg-tertiary-container rounded-full" style="width: 90%;"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Question Section -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center text-center gap-6">
<div class="space-y-2">
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-primary">¿Cuál es la bandera de Filipinas?</h2>
<p class="font-body-md text-on-surface-variant italic">Which is the flag of Philippines?</p>
</div>
<!-- Large Interactive Audio Button -->
<button class="audio-pulse w-24 h-24 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center border-b-8 border-secondary active:border-b-0 active:translate-y-2 transition-all duration-75" onclick="playAudioPrompt()">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-5xl text-on-secondary-container" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
<!-- Quiz Options (Asymmetric Layout/Large Targets) -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-gutter mt-4">
<!-- Option 1: Philippines (Correct) -->
<div class="flag-card group rounded-lg p-card-padding flex flex-col items-center gap-4" onclick="selectOption(this)">
<div class="w-full aspect-[3/2] rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-outline-variant bg-surface-container shadow-inner">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="The national flag of the Philippines featuring a white equilateral triangle with a golden-yellow sun and three stars, a horizontal blue stripe on top, and a horizontal red stripe on the bottom. Minimalist clean lines with vibrant primary colors and a subtle fabric texture under studio lighting." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuBO-EPooAm41CKd_TWCPeIubzA6R3BqtAIeuA49w9agfbwr6geNk3XFn9yVFC7WcL08lIFLrzlGWugoJRPxTztibypa73IGq2T3hMIFD6Vv89fQWEjm8Bn8CMlC8cMyytFJYcDTLiFOBVoJsakv_IdCzRKLt5hYW-SwhqpqTXnzdYrFDM-zkud8YezFt0ONoUof-jhklZJODULT8qo69ppnHGgUzHPplj4vgmztkkW1uejqzqW5oH8EmnqXZOCF2kCC8pwBGzWQNIo"/>
</div>
<div class="text-center"><p class="font-headline-md text-primary">Filipinas / Philippines</p></div>
</div>
<!-- Option 2: Vietnam -->
<div class="flag-card group rounded-lg p-card-padding flex flex-col items-center gap-4" onclick="selectOption(this)">
<div class="w-full aspect-[3/2] rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-outline-variant bg-surface-container shadow-inner">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="The national flag of Vietnam featuring a bright red background with a single large golden-yellow five-pointed star centered in the middle. The composition is clean and minimalist, using high-saturation colors that stand out against the white interface of a children educational app." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuCRepa-hZjUOBXtpXhCzFg5O3G1mibRGSYE6M4iriIzD45ZbIAyc1pZ0_vhOnp0hZs0gyFYCSHM4C9jXW4DTiFFinNZ3bs54OQwooG_BY2gXHwaJr0H1vM7HK8XR09m8hchC4IB29orOuXMsHc4XAW4QPnrQ2sEu6DFLq_GENx4K2tTgwIKPPLOh0pc0KwHO7c9fuWgsPjWJaJV2tT3nTH8osgdACwa7xH-DAKi_kQRZCvESBNO_zZFJ14QaCbzRWfoBE0fqS6V9o8"/>
</div>
<div class="text-center"><p class="font-headline-md text-primary">Vietnam / Vietnam</p></div>
</div>
<!-- Option 3: China -->
<div class="flag-card group rounded-lg p-card-padding flex flex-col items-center gap-4" onclick="selectOption(this)">
<div class="w-full aspect-[3/2] rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-outline-variant bg-surface-container shadow-inner">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="The national flag of China featuring a vibrant red field with five golden stars in the upper-left corner. One large star is surrounded by four smaller stars arranged in an arc.
