The visual style is premium digital educational content with a soft glow and precise graphic elements." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuB3gSeqd-vVbvxzw4N5gcHGmv-6f8NqWdLg_wnC2OEEe2Bhi5TxHm_PeMZrDiISVmJ7OhjCZp-3fxitNYj97xOhUqAKegNOX3kSUiiVecK2xRQKzn-FhJSqHTa_pias5-wHk2KVBi1PxUNrwDdkmkBFluc9qQe9F6p4NljBjJwWGx5j-MbS2Vkm-9hzB7z1waDihnVL_u-S20quWqt5eDFemNnE8C29piNCs1kp3J0BdP1sJKOzn8Rvyuoe7m1jWxUX3_bRaJT5ozg"/>
</div>
<div class="text-center"><p class="font-headline-md text-primary">China / China</p></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Action Button -->
<div class="mt-8 flex justify-center">
<button class="btn-primary-tactile w-full max-w-sm py-4 px-8 rounded-lg font-headline-md text-center opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed" disabled="" id="check-button">
                ¡Comprobar!
            </button>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Spacer for Bottom Nav -->
<div class="h-24"></div>
<!-- Bottom Navigation Bar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg border-t-4 border-surface-variant">
<!-- Explore Tab -->
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1 hover:bg-surface-variant rounded-lg" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0;">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</a>
<!-- Passport Tab -->
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1 hover:bg-surface-variant rounded-lg" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0;">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</a>
<!-- Play Tab (Active) -->
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0 shadow-sm" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
</nav>
<script>
        function selectOption(element) {
            // Remove selection from all cards
            document.querySelectorAll('.flag-card').forEach(card => {
                card.classList.remove('selected');
            });
            // Add selection to clicked card
            element.classList.add('selected');
            
            // Enable Check Button
            const btn = document.getElementById('check-button');
            btn.disabled = false;
            btn.classList.remove('opacity-50', 'cursor-not-allowed');
            
            // Interaction feedback
            if (window.navigator.vibrate) {
                window.navigator.vibrate(10);
            }
        }

        function playAudioPrompt() {
            // Simple visual feedback for audio play
            const btn = document.querySelector('.audio-pulse');
            btn.classList.remove('audio-pulse');
            void btn.offsetWidth; // Trigger reflow
            btn.classList.add('audio-pulse');
            
            console.log("Playing: ¿Cuál es la bandera de Filipinas?");
        }

        // Logic for checking (mock behavior)
        document.getElementById('check-button').addEventListener('click', function() {
            const selected = document.querySelector('.flag-card.selected');
            if (selected) {
                const country = selected.querySelector('.font-headline-md').innerText;
                if (country === 'Philippines') {
                    selected.classList.add('bg-tertiary-fixed-dim');
                    alert('¡Excelente! ✨ You found the flag of the Philippines!');
                } else {
                    selected.classList.add('bg-error-container');
                    alert('¡Oh no! Keep trying! Inténtalo de nuevo.');
                }
            }
        });
    </script>
</body></html>

<!-- Quiz Phase (Names only) - Portugal -->
<!DOCTYPE html>

<html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@400;500;600;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        .filled-icon {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;
        }
        
        /* Tactile Button Effect */
        .btn-tactile-primary {
            @apply transition-all duration-75 active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 0 #004b71;
        }
        .btn-tactile-secondary {
            @apply transition-all duration-75 active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 0 #bec8d3;
        }
        .btn-tactile-yellow {
            @apply transition-all duration-75 active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 #b38f00;
        }
        
        /* Card Tactile Effect */
        .card-tactile {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 #eaeef5;
            transition: transform 0.1s ease, box-shadow 0.1s ease;
        }
        .card-tactile:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 #eaeef5;
        }

        /* Progress Bar Animation */
        @keyframes pulse-soft {
            0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
        }
        .pulse-audio {
            animation: pulse-soft 2s infinite ease-in-out;
        }
    </style>
<script id="tailwind-config">
        tailwind.config = {
            darkMode: "class",
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    "colors": {
                        "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                        "outline": "#6e7882",
                        "on-background": "#171c21",
                        "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                        "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                        "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                        "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                        "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                        "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                        "background": "#f7f9ff",
                        "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                        "secondary": "#735c00",
                        "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                        "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                        "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                        "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                        "error": "#ba1a1a",
                        "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                        "primary": "#006495",
                        "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                        "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                        "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                        "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                        "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                        "on-surface": "#171c21",
                        "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                        "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                        "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                        "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                        "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                        "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                        "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                        "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                        "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                        "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                        "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                        "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                        "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                        "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                        "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                        "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                        "surface-tint": "#006495",
                        "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                        "on-error": "#ffffff",
                        "surface-dim": "#d6dae1"
                    },
                    "borderRadius": {
                        "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                        "lg": "2rem",
                        "xl": "3rem",
                        "full": "9999px"
                    },
                    "spacing": {
                        "card-padding": "20px",
                        "touch-target-min": "48px",
                        "gutter": "16px",
                        "unit": "8px",
                        "container-margin": "24px"
                    },
                    "fontFamily": {
                        "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                        "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                        "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                        "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                        "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                        "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
                    },
                    "fontSize": {
                        "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                        "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                        "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                        "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                        "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                        "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
                    }
                },
            },
        }
    </script>
<style>
    body {
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background font-body-md text-on-background min-h-screen flex flex-col overflow-x-hidden">
<!-- TopAppBar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky z-50 bg-surface-container-low flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit h-16">
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container transition-all active:translate-y-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary font-bold">Flag Adventure</h1>
<button class="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container transition-all active:translate-y-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary">volume_up</span>
</button>
</header>
<main class="flex-1 flex flex-col items-center px-container-margin pt-4 pb-24 max-w-2xl mx-auto w-full">
<!-- Progress Bar Section -->
<div class="w-full flex items-center gap-4 mb-8">
<div class="flex-1 h-4 bg-surface-container-high rounded-full overflow-hidden border-2 border-surface-variant">
<div class="h-full bg-tertiary-container w-[40%] rounded-r-full transition-all duration-500 shadow-inner"></div>
</div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">4/10</span>
</div>
<!-- Question Section -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center text-center mb-10">
<!-- Audio Replay Button -->
<button class="pulse-audio w-24 h-24 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-6 btn-tactile-yellow group">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-5xl filled-icon">volume_up</span>
</button>
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-on-surface mb-2">
                ¿Cuál es la bandera de Portugal?
            </h2>
<p class="font-body-md text-body-md text-on-surface-variant italic">
                (Which is the flag of Portugal?)
            </p>
</div>
<!-- Flag Options Grid -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 w-full mb-12">
<!-- Option 1: Chile -->
<button class="card-tactile group relative w-full aspect-[2/1] bg-surface-container-lowest border-2 border-surface-variant rounded-lg p-4 flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden"><div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full w-full"><span class="font-headline-md-mobile text-on-surface">Chile / Chile</span></div><div class="absolute inset-0 bg-primary/10 opacity-0 group-active:opacity-100 transition-opacity"></div></button>
<!-- Option 2: Portugal (Correct) -->
<button class="card-tactile group relative w-full aspect-[2/1] bg-surface-container-lowest border-2 border-surface-variant rounded-lg p-4 flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden"><div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full w-full"><span class="font-headline-md-mobile text-on-surface">Portugal / Portugal</span></div><div class="absolute inset-0 bg-primary/10 opacity-0 group-active:opacity-100 transition-opacity"></div></button>
<!-- Option 3: Turkey -->
<button class="card-tactile group relative w-full aspect-[2/1] bg-surface-container-lowest border-2 border-surface-variant rounded-lg p-4 flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden"><div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full w-full"><span class="font-headline-md-mobile text-on-surface">Turquía / Turkey</span></div><div class="absolute inset-0 bg-primary/10 opacity-0 group-active:opacity-100 transition-opacity"></div></button>
</div>
<!-- Star Reward System -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-3">
<p class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-secondary uppercase tracking-widest">Rewards</p>
<div class="flex gap-4">
<div class="w-14 h-14 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-md border-2 border-white">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-4xl filled-icon">star</span>
</div>
<div class="w-14 h-14 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-md border-2 border-white">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-4xl filled-icon">star</span>
</div>
<div class="w-14 h-14 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-md border-2 border-white">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-4xl filled-icon">star</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</main>
<!-- BottomNavBar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg border-t-4 border-surface-variant rounded-t-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined filled-icon">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
</nav>
<script>
        // Simple micro-interaction for flag selection
        document.querySelectorAll('.card-tactile').forEach(button => {
            button.addEventListener('click', function() {
                // Audio feedback would go here in a real app
                const isCorrect = this.querySelector('img').getAttribute('data-alt').includes('Portugal');
                
                if(isCorrect) {
                    this.classList.remove('border-surface-variant');
                    this.classList.add('border-tertiary-container', 'bg-tertiary-fixed');
                    // Create simple celebration effect
                    const stars = document.querySelectorAll('.filled-icon');
                    stars.forEach(star => {
                        star.classList.add('animate-bounce');
                        setTimeout(() => star.classList.remove('animate-bounce'), 1000);
                    });
                } else {
                    this.classList.add('animate-shake');
                    this.classList.remove('border-surface-variant');
                    this.classList.add('border-error');
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        this.classList.remove('animate-shake', 'border-error');
                        this.classList.add('border-surface-variant');
                    }, 500);
                }
            });
        });

        // Add shake animation style
        const style = document.createElement('style');
        style.textContent = `
            @keyframes shake {
                0%, 100% { transform: translateX(0); }
                25% { transform: translateX(-8px); }
                75% { transform: translateX(8px); }
            }
            .animate-shake {
                animation: shake 0.2s cubic-bezier(.36,.07,.19,.97) both;
            }
        `;
        document.head.appendChild(style);
    </script>
</body></html>

<!-- Quiz Phase (Names only) - Peru -->
<!DOCTYPE html>

<html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/>
<title>Flag Adventure - Nivel 3</title>
<!-- Google Fonts: Quicksand for kid-friendly readability -->
