<!-- Material Symbols -->
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "container-margin": "24px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md-mobile": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md-mobile": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        
        /* Tactical Shadows for Buttons & Cards */
        .tactile-card {
            box-shadow: 0 8px 0 0 #dee3e9;
            transition: all 0.1s ease;
        }
        .tactile-card:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 4px 0 0 #dee3e9;
        }

        .tactile-button-primary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        .tactile-button-primary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #004b71;
        }

        .tactile-button-secondary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #bec8d3;
        }
        .tactile-button-secondary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #bec8d3;
        }

        /* Pulse animation for audio button */
        @keyframes subtle-pulse {
            0% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); }
        }
        .animate-pulse-slow {
            animation: subtle-pulse 2s infinite ease-in-out;
        }

        .correct-answer {
            border-color: #59be1b !important;
            background-color: #e8f5e9 !important;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 0 0 #2b6c00 !important;
        }

        .wrong-answer {
            border-color: #ba1a1a !important;
            background-color: #ffebee !important;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 0 0 #93000a !important;
        }
    </style>
<style>
    body {
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background font-body-md min-h-screen pb-32">
<!-- TopAppBar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky z-50 bg-surface-container-low flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit h-16">
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 hover:bg-primary-container rounded-full">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-size: 32px;">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary font-bold">Flag Adventure</h1>
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100 hover:bg-primary-container rounded-full">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-size: 32px;">volume_up</span>
</button>
</header>
<main class="max-w-md mx-auto px-container-margin pt-unit flex flex-col gap-8">
<!-- Progress Section -->
<div class="mt-4">
<div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-2">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">Level 3</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-primary">Quest 4/10</span>
</div>
<div class="w-full bg-surface-container-highest rounded-full h-4">
<div class="bg-tertiary-container h-4 rounded-full w-[40%] transition-all duration-500"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Question Section -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center text-center gap-6">
<div class="relative">
<button class="w-20 h-20 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center tactile-button-secondary border-4 border-white animate-pulse-slow" id="play-audio">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container" style="font-size: 40px; font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-on-background px-4">
                ¿Cuál es la bandera de Perú?
            </h2>
</div>
<!-- Answer Options (Bento-like layout for variety) -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 pb-8">
<!-- Correct Answer: Peru -->
<button class="tactile-card bg-surface-container-lowest border-2 border-outline-variant rounded-lg p-card-padding flex flex-col items-center gap-4 w-full" onclick="handleSelect(this, true)">
<div class="w-full aspect-[3/2] rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-surface-variant">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A clean, vibrant digital illustration of the national flag of Peru featuring three vertical stripes of red, white, and red. The white stripe is centered and clear. The style is educational and minimalist, set against a soft studio-lit background that fits a child-friendly mobile game interface with high saturation and bright lighting." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuD4d_Bc0gc2GK92T4DrsseL38WDlrjXNsxcHMALZniQqJD7W-t2eh5fTaanlMu4BX1F4GHtkpbhrvzew33akg2OB3D1dBtf6mcTEGQY7blNv2RtsHj08Yvul3Jn00S0kay3u1rjb1lyLmHW_0Jpxrxb1GP4jaM2NOXpZWW4UaqP8uc4VYiIVVHAa2boHQT_wRvlQ8kn_CdJ5lBp00TwHNrf272PsI1OEmq1eI-EFgDyheQ50V73iUuviPUrgH-je4voCMtakb9VQwg"/>
</div>
<span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-on-surface">Perú / Peru</span>
</button>
<div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
<!-- Option: Nigeria -->
<button class="tactile-card bg-surface-container-lowest border-2 border-outline-variant rounded-lg p-4 flex flex-col items-center gap-2" onclick="handleSelect(this, false)">
<div class="w-full aspect-[3/2] rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-surface-variant">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A detailed digital educational illustration of the national flag of Nigeria, consisting of three vertical bands of green, white, and green. The lighting is bright and cheerful, designed for a premium educational app for children. The colors are punchy and highly legible, maintaining a clean 3D-block aesthetic." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuDjbHZcIpm0J4TFGZXem_ZJ6VK29ap_EBnbcXaUte0cQIPMLhLOoxG4p9MFiSpGrdqaM5yke_YMI32FfE9F3TAYYipUQHSU4oiMWD8-Z6jiQlTO_BuR4RlQvTEtadg5xham9ybEs_2hKp-ZUnEhSYuc6FkS3rfWprzraQHpXclSIYRPc1vp63BM4EnkhNQQHSZGWSQTAS_iPG_nsFKSDvzRec2Nshq-qihihLoGtCQSEgrzBz5cKp8gYaK9Qo7i_LzlTZW-gFq7zZk"/>
</div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">Nigeria / Nigeria</span>
</button>
<!-- Option: Thailand -->
<button class="tactile-card bg-surface-container-lowest border-2 border-outline-variant rounded-lg p-4 flex flex-col items-center gap-2" onclick="handleSelect(this, false)">
<div class="w-full aspect-[3/2] rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-surface-variant">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A vibrant digital illustration of the national flag of Thailand, showcasing its horizontal stripes of red, white, blue, white, and red. The blue middle stripe is double the width of the others. The artwork follows a premium educational style with soft shadows and high-key lighting for young learners." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuC5q4M0tJKEtWu4uWxc22uZ-Z5PtNvhSPvrz0SOtl6uh_ahk479kQJTz-5t5Jb2CzdN2oZ2rz7_k9JjEUtEwZlUj8BWc6NPwUy_TYeuwv5Fi0bE0HJE-Ptlfp8ArIu00Qn7CEU295VgGncXL9jHu-qwh6duAt6OV8ajDBVzmDJvT2VLezhTpZ6K9spF5FON4ng9TttGtFhCmvN8I90eR0iC3OkXbzOXRSokfseDbCzi33_PR_CG30zacso96SuPuWPFYHMmLSK2WWk"/>
</div>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">Tailandia / Thailand</span>
</button>
</div>
</div>
</main>
<!-- BottomNavBar -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 bg-surface-container-lowest border-t-4 border-surface-variant shadow-lg flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="map">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="menu_book">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="quiz" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Floating Confetti Effect Layer (Hidden by default) -->
<div class="fixed inset-0 pointer-events-none z-[100] hidden" id="confetti-container"></div>
<script>
        function handleSelect(element, isCorrect) {
            // Remove previous highlights
            document.querySelectorAll('.tactile-card').forEach(card => {
                card.classList.remove('correct-answer', 'wrong-answer');
            });

            if (isCorrect) {
                element.classList.add('correct-answer');
                showConfetti();
                // Play sound logic would go here
            } else {
                element.classList.add('wrong-answer');
                // Shake effect
                element.classList.add('animate-shake');
                setTimeout(() => element.classList.remove('animate-shake'), 500);
            }
        }

        function showConfetti() {
            const container = document.getElementById('confetti-container');
            container.classList.remove('hidden');
            
            for (let i = 0; i < 50; i++) {
                const confetti = document.createElement('div');
                confetti.style.position = 'absolute';
                confetti.style.width = '10px';
                confetti.style.height = '10px';
                confetti.style.backgroundColor = ['#fccc00', '#2bb1ff', '#59be1b', '#ba1a1a'][Math.floor(Math.random() * 4)];
                confetti.style.left = Math.random() * 100 + 'vw';
                confetti.style.top = '-10px';
                confetti.style.borderRadius = '2px';
                confetti.style.transform = `rotate(${Math.random() * 360}deg)`;
                
                container.appendChild(confetti);

                const animation = confetti.animate([
                    { transform: `translate3d(0, 0, 0) rotate(0deg)`, opacity: 1 },
                    { transform: `translate3d(${(Math.random() - 0.5) * 200}px, 100vh, 0) rotate(${Math.random() * 1000}deg)`, opacity: 0 }
                ], {
                    duration: 2000 + Math.random() * 2000,
                    easing: 'cubic-bezier(0, .9, .57, 1)'
                });

                animation.onfinish = () => confetti.remove();
            }
            
            setTimeout(() => {
                container.classList.add('hidden');
            }, 4000);
        }

        // Pulse logic for audio button
        const audioBtn = document.getElementById('play-audio');
        audioBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            audioBtn.classList.remove('animate-pulse-slow');
            setTimeout(() => audioBtn.classList.add('animate-pulse-slow'), 100);
        });
    </script>
<style>
        @keyframes shake {
            0%, 100% { transform: translateX(0); }
            25% { transform: translateX(-5px); }
            75% { transform: translateX(5px); }
        }
        .animate-shake {
            animation: shake 0.2s cubic-bezier(.36,.07,.19,.97) both;
            animation-iteration-count: 2;
        }
    </style>
</body></html>

<!-- Quiz Phase (Names only) - Sweden -->
<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/>
<title>Flag Adventure - Quiz</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<!-- Tailwind Configuration -->
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "card-padding": "20px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "container-margin": "24px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        
        .tactile-button-primary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0px #004b71;
        }
        .tactile-button-primary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0px #004b71;
        }

        .tactile-button-secondary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0px #bec8d3;
        }
        .tactile-button-secondary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0px #bec8d3;
        }

        .tactile-audio {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0px #bca100;
        }
        .tactile-audio:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0px #bca100;
        }

        .flag-card {
            box-shadow: 0 8px 0px #dee3e9;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }
        .flag-card:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 4px 0px #dee3e9;
        }

        @keyframes pulse-soft {
            0% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); }
        }
        .animate-pulse-soft {
            animation: pulse-soft 2s infinite ease-in-out;
        }
    </style>
<style>
    body {
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background font-body-md text-on-background min-h-screen flex flex-col overflow-x-hidden">
<!-- Top Navigation Anchor (Shared Component: TopAppBar) -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky bg-surface-container-low flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit z-50">
<div class="flex items-center gap-4">
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="menu">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary font-bold">Flag Adventure</h1>
</div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-2">
<div class="flex items-center bg-secondary-container px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-on-secondary-container font-label-bold">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined mr-1" data-icon="star" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
                Level 3
            </div>
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-primary-container text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</button>
</div>
</header>
<!-- Main Learning Canvas -->
<main class="flex-1 container mx-auto px-container-margin py-unit max-w-lg flex flex-col items-center">
<!-- Progress Indicator -->
<div class="w-full mt-4 mb-8">
<div class="flex justify-between items-end mb-2">
<span class="text-label-bold font-label-bold text-primary">Progress</span>
<span class="text-label-bold font-label-bold text-primary">4 / 10</span>
</div>
<div class="w-full h-4 bg-surface-variant rounded-full overflow-hidden">
<div class="h-full bg-tertiary-container rounded-full" style="width: 40%"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Question Area -->
<section class="text-center mb-8">
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-on-surface mb-6">¿Cuál es la bandera de Suecia?</h2>
<!-- Large Tactile Audio Button -->
<button class="tactile-audio bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container w-24 h-24 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center animate-pulse-soft transition-transform mb-4">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[48px]" data-icon="volume_up" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
</button>
<p class="text-on-surface-variant font-label-bold">¡Escucha la pregunta!</p>
</section>
<!-- Flag Selection Grid (Chunky Pattern) -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 w-full mb-12">
<!-- Correct Option: Sweden -->
<button class="flag-card bg-surface-container-lowest border-2 border-outline-variant p-card-padding rounded-lg flex items-center gap-6 group hover:border-primary transition-colors text-left" onclick="this.classList.add('border-tertiary-container', 'bg-tertiary-container/10')">
<div class="w-32 h-20 rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-outline-variant flex-shrink-0 bg-white">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A clean, flat vector illustration of the Swedish flag featuring a yellow Nordic cross on a solid blue background. The style is educational and child-friendly with vibrant primary colors and sharp, clear lines. High contrast lighting makes the flag pop against its minimal white frame." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuAV_1OkVEyUjP7R11l2BDc_vdf0SNc0xH_TZDsEl8T3WEdiYar0oZ_UxEUPDMnWdfXzCEXVMEbtAGNnIfWupst95aQKFLtdHd_Tsuyz8DBo18hmy5DnguUOAwThSF88HpTu65l6xwtvovXfcxbFNSvRinDWko4qAIqqSfdnfyE-L8Fj1yDE4aaKqISOILbU4QUWIoreRu6Dbx6TYo6mnnaUcbG9bHDnkH50MC46wduH_gvLQQLRlFWqX0pVp-wZJZxWKgomm6pkIrQ"/>
</div>
<span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-on-surface group-hover:text-primary">Suecia / Sweden</span>
</button>
<!-- Option: Iceland -->
<button class="flag-card bg-surface-container-lowest border-2 border-outline-variant p-card-padding rounded-lg flex items-center gap-6 group hover:border-primary transition-colors text-left" onclick="this.classList.add('border-error', 'bg-error-container/10')">
<div class="w-32 h-20 rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-outline-variant flex-shrink-0 bg-white">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A clean, flat vector illustration of the Icelandic flag showing a red cross with a white border set against a deep blue field. The illustration is minimalist and educational, part of a high-quality geography learning suite for children. Bright, clear colors and simple geometry are highlighted." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuAozipQX4vnCB8bB6YH7EHhFDQzhybAMFh7-2C4QqGvJ90yRsZV81kbit7EVUAHXi9Wbv6m2Tpri-FSSrmPAOPAH007Y1dJQtmEj1__x6nQ0OJO7t-ioPNrzFY7HKKwP30BzMj5ocPqrSsExqrMz1ioksyQkJozI019PdcyC94tN_Vhzk4UW1CgrV8m6dfV4sTlf9YJUhmL9X4h_CGke4WFeUEdrKAzjf32HexwAg0m5kMNCUZg0SQmM8VW_-flHLoX7Q1hz7gpGVs"/>
</div>
<span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-on-surface group-hover:text-primary">Islandia / Iceland</span>
</button>
<!-- Option: Norway -->
<button class="flag-card bg-surface-container-lowest border-2 border-outline-variant p-card-padding rounded-lg flex items-center gap-6 group hover:border-primary transition-colors text-left" onclick="this.classList.add('border-error', 'bg-error-container/10')">
<div class="w-32 h-20 rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-outline-variant flex-shrink-0 bg-white">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A clean, flat vector illustration of the Norwegian flag with a dark blue cross outlined in white on a vibrant red field. The style is consistent with a premium educational app for young learners, emphasizing clear visual identification through saturated colors and bold shapes." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuDVqUV8ECfDXx9fw_ZDEeHEd9AGrSKxS9-1-TcKE-4hGqsJaehk2oDwJxzcv2Y7eBKo3jO-dP17it7xLMWJPcE_KMvvKbDaWSsMLGvhYdrJHxiH711YH7-mVEsqa2S4lCvFM76V8RC5QcYojg9hrntNN2AvGALrGYMndFuLlhsU5QZZevjjDISreYgfBEfiG5tTCGry7-G6-pcTNIeOQ3byFLVBBy4OuztgXmgUNKvI8PUh3-eRmLSOcczEXRcu-aWBDSJo7QAF1qg"/>
</div>
<span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-on-surface group-hover:text-primary">Noruega / Norway</span>
</button>
</div>
<!-- Mastery Stars Footer Area -->
<section class="w-full flex flex-col items-center gap-4 pb-24">
<p class="text-on-surface-variant font-label-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-[12px]">Tus Estrellas</p>
<div class="flex gap-4">
<!-- Earned Star -->
<div class="w-14 h-14 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg transform rotate-[-12deg]">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[32px]" data-icon="grade" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">grade</span>
</div>
<!-- Earned Star -->
<div class="w-14 h-14 bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg transform translate-y-[-8px]">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[32px]" data-icon="grade" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">grade</span>
</div>
<!-- Empty Star Slot -->
<div class="w-14 h-14 bg-surface-variant text-outline-variant rounded-full flex items-center justify-center transform rotate-[12deg]">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[32px]" data-icon="grade" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0;">grade</span>
</div>
</div>
</section>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation Shell (Shared Component: BottomNavBar) -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest shadow-lg border-t-4 border-surface-variant">
<!-- Explore Tab -->
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="map">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</a>
<!-- Passport Tab -->
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="menu_book">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</a>
<!-- Play Tab (ACTIVE) -->
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="quiz">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Interaction Script for feedback -->
<script>
        document.querySelectorAll('.flag-card').forEach(card => {
            card.addEventListener('click', () => {
                const audio = new Audio();
                // Placeholder logic for sound feedback
                console.log('User interaction registered for option selection');
            });
        });
    </script>
</body></html>

<!-- Quiz Phase (Names only) - USA -->
<!DOCTYPE html>

<html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/>
<title>Flag Adventure - Quiz</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@500;700&amp;family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@100..900&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-primary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #004b71;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-secondary {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #dee3e9;
        }
        .chunky-shadow-active {
            box-shadow: 0 0px 0 0 transparent !important;
            transform: translateY(6px);
        }
        .pulse-soft {
            animation: pulse-border 2s infinite;
        }
        @keyframes pulse-border {
            0% { border-color: rgba(0, 100, 149, 0.2); transform: scale(1); }
            50% { border-color: rgba(0, 100, 149, 1); transform: scale(1.02); }
            100% { border-color: rgba(0, 100, 149, 0.2); transform: scale(1); }
        }
        .star-pop {
            animation: star-pop 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275);
        }
        @keyframes star-pop {
            0% { transform: scale(0); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); }
        }
    </style>
<script id="tailwind-config">
        tailwind.config = {
            darkMode: "class",
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    "colors": {
                        "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                        "error": "#ba1a1a",
                        "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                        "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                        "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                        "background": "#f7f9ff",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                        "primary": "#006495",
                        "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                        "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                        "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                        "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                        "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                        "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                        "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                        "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                        "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                        "outline": "#6e7882",
                        "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                        "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                        "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                        "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                        "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                        "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                        "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                        "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                        "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                        "secondary": "#735c00",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                        "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                        "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                        "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                        "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                        "on-background": "#171c21",
                        "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                        "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                        "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                        "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff",
                        "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                        "on-error": "#ffffff",
                        "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                        "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                        "on-surface": "#171c21",
                        "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                        "surface-tint": "#006495",
                        "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                        "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851"
                    },
                    "borderRadius": {
                        "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                        "lg": "2rem",
                        "xl": "3rem",
                        "full": "9999px"
                    },
                    "spacing": {
                        "gutter": "16px",
                        "container-margin": "24px",
                        "unit": "8px",
                        "card-padding": "20px",
                        "touch-target-min": "48px"
                    },
                    "fontFamily": {
                        "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                        "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                        "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                        "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                        "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                        "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
                    },
                    "fontSize": {
                        "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", { "lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700" }],
                        "headline-lg": ["36px", { "lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700" }],
                        "body-md": ["18px", { "lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500" }],
                        "body-lg": ["20px", { "lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500" }],
                        "label-bold": ["16px", { "lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700" }],
                        "headline-md": ["24px", { "lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700" }]
                    }
                },
            },
        }
    </script>
<style>
    body {
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background font-body-md min-h-screen flex flex-col pb-24">
<!-- Top Navigation Bar (Shared Component Strategy) -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky bg-surface-container-low flex items-center justify-between px-container-margin py-unit z-40">
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="menu">menu</span>
</button>
<h1 class="font-headline-md-mobile text-headline-md-mobile text-primary font-bold">Flag Adventure</h1>
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center text-primary active:translate-y-1 transition-all duration-100" id="global-volume">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="volume_up">volume_up</span>
</button>
</header>
<main class="flex-1 w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto px-container-margin py-unit space-y-6">
<!-- Progress Bar Section -->
<div class="space-y-2">
<div class="flex justify-between items-center text-on-surface-variant font-label-bold text-label-bold">
<span>Progreso</span>
<span>4 / 10</span>
</div>
<div class="h-4 w-full bg-surface-container-highest rounded-full overflow-hidden">
<div class="h-full w-[40%] bg-tertiary-container rounded-full transition-all duration-500 ease-out"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Audio Question Interaction -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center space-y-4 py-4">
<button class="w-32 h-32 rounded-full bg-secondary-container flex items-center justify-center chunky-shadow-primary active:chunky-shadow-active transition-all group overflow-hidden relative" id="audio-prompt" onclick="this.classList.toggle('animate-pulse')">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container !text-6xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">volume_up</span>
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-white/20 opacity-0 group-active:opacity-100 transition-opacity"></div>
</button>
<div class="text-center space-y-1">
<h2 class="font-headline-lg-mobile text-headline-lg-mobile text-on-surface">¿Cuál es la bandera de Estados Unidos?</h2>
<p class="font-body-md text-on-surface-variant italic opacity-80">Which is the flag of the United States?</p>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Quiz Options (Bento Style Cards) -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-6 pt-4">
<!-- Option 1: United Kingdom -->
<button class="group relative bg-surface-container-lowest p-card-padding rounded-lg border-2 border-surface-variant chunky-shadow-secondary active:chunky-shadow-active transition-all hover:border-primary-container h-48 sm:h-64 flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden">
<div class="w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center p-4"><div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center space-y-2"><span class="font-headline-md-mobile text-on-surface">Reino Unido</span><span class="font-body-md text-on-surface-variant italic opacity-80">United Kingdom</span></div></div>
</button>
<!-- Option 2: USA (Correct Answer with Pulse) -->
<button class="group relative bg-surface-container-lowest p-card-padding rounded-lg border-4 border-primary/20 chunky-shadow-secondary active:chunky-shadow-active transition-all pulse-soft h-48 sm:h-64 flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden">
<div class="w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center p-4"><div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center space-y-2"><span class="font-headline-md-mobile text-on-surface">Estados Unidos</span><span class="font-body-md text-on-surface-variant italic opacity-80">United States</span></div></div>
<div class="absolute top-2 right-2 opacity-0 group-focus:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-tertiary-container !text-4xl" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">check_circle</span>
</div>
</button>
<!-- Option 3: China -->
<button class="group relative bg-surface-container-lowest p-card-padding rounded-lg border-2 border-surface-variant chunky-shadow-secondary active:chunky-shadow-active transition-all hover:border-primary-container h-48 sm:h-64 flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden">
<div class="w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center p-4"><div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center space-y-2"><span class="font-headline-md-mobile text-on-surface">China</span><span class="font-body-md text-on-surface-variant italic opacity-80">China</span></div></div>
</button>
</div>
<!-- Performance Feedback Section -->
<div class="pt-8 flex flex-col items-center space-y-4">
<p class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-on-surface-variant">Tus Estrellas</p>
<div class="flex gap-4 items-center justify-center">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-secondary-container !text-5xl star-pop" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-secondary-container !text-5xl star-pop" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-secondary-container !text-5xl star-pop" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">star</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-outline-variant !text-5xl opacity-40">star</span>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-outline-variant !text-5xl opacity-40">star</span>
</div>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation Bar (Shared Component Strategy) -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest border-t-4 border-surface-variant shadow-lg rounded-t-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="map">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Explore</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 border-b-4 border-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="menu_book">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Passport</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-lg p-2 translate-y-1 border-b-0 hover:bg-surface-variant transition-transform duration-75 active:translate-y-1" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="quiz" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold">Play</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Simple interaction script for audio and feedback -->
<script>
        document.getElementById('audio-prompt').addEventListener('click', function() {
            // Simulate speaking
            const synth = window.speechSynthesis;
            if (synth) {
                const utteranceEs = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance('¿Cuál es la bandera de Estados Unidos?');
                utteranceEs.lang = 'es-ES';
                const utteranceEn = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance('Which is the flag of the United States?');
                utteranceEn.lang = 'en-US';
                
                synth.speak(utteranceEs);
                setTimeout(() => synth.speak(utteranceEn), 2000);
            }
        });

        // Toggle volume icon state
        document.getElementById('global-volume').addEventListener('click', function() {
            const icon = this.querySelector('span');
            if (icon.innerText === 'volume_up') {
                icon.innerText = 'volume_off';
            } else {
                icon.innerText = 'volume_up';
            }
        });
    </script>
</body></html>

<!-- Quiz Phase (Names only) - France Spanish-First -->
<!DOCTYPE html>

<html class="light" lang="es"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" name="viewport"/>
<title>Explorador de Banderas - Quiz</title>
<!-- Font: Quicksand for a friendly, rounded feel -->
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@400;500;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<!-- Material Symbols -->
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<script id="tailwind-config">
      tailwind.config = {
        darkMode: "class",
        theme: {
          extend: {
            "colors": {
                    "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#004b71",
                    "on-surface": "#171c21",
                    "inverse-primary": "#90cdff",
                    "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#77de3d",
                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                    "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                    "error": "#ba1a1a",
                    "secondary-container": "#fccc00",
                    "secondary": "#735c00",
                    "surface-container-highest": "#dee3e9",
                    "secondary-fixed-dim": "#efc200",
                    "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                    "tertiary": "#2b6c00",
                    "surface": "#f7f9ff",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed": "#082100",
                    "on-surface-variant": "#3e4851",
                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                    "on-error": "#ffffff",
                    "inverse-surface": "#2c3136",
                    "on-primary-container": "#004163",
                    "surface-container-high": "#e4e8ef",
                    "surface-variant": "#dee3e9",
                    "primary-fixed": "#cbe6ff",
                    "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                    "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                    "surface-tint": "#006495",
                    "tertiary-container": "#59be1b",
                    "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#574500",
                    "on-secondary-container": "#6d5700",
                    "surface-container-low": "#f0f4fb",
                    "surface-dim": "#d6dae1",
                    "on-tertiary-container": "#1a4600",
                    "outline": "#6e7882",
                    "inverse-on-surface": "#edf1f8",
                    "surface-container": "#eaeef5",
                    "secondary-fixed": "#ffe084",
                    "on-primary-fixed": "#001e30",
                    "primary": "#006495",
                    "on-secondary-fixed": "#231b00",
                    "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#1f5100",
                    "background": "#f7f9ff",
                    "outline-variant": "#bec8d3",
                    "on-background": "#171c21",
                    "tertiary-fixed": "#92fc58",
                    "primary-container": "#2bb1ff",
                    "primary-fixed-dim": "#90cdff",
                    "surface-bright": "#f7f9ff"
            },
            "borderRadius": {
                    "DEFAULT": "1rem",
                    "lg": "2rem",
                    "xl": "3rem",
                    "full": "9999px"
            },
            "spacing": {
                    "container-margin": "24px",
                    "touch-target-min": "48px",
                    "gutter": "16px",
                    "unit": "8px",
                    "card-padding": "20px"
            },
            "fontFamily": {
                    "body-md": ["Quicksand"],
                    "label-bold": ["Quicksand"],
                    "body-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["Quicksand"],
                    "headline-md": ["Quicksand"]
            },
            "fontSize": {
                    "body-md": ["18px", {"lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "label-bold": ["16px", {"lineHeight": "20px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "body-lg": ["20px", {"lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "500"}],
                    "headline-lg": ["36px", {"lineHeight": "44px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-lg-mobile": ["28px", {"lineHeight": "34px", "fontWeight": "700"}],
                    "headline-md": ["24px", {"lineHeight": "30px", "fontWeight": "700"}]
            }
          },
        },
      }
    </script>
<style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif;
            background-color: #f7f9ff;
            overflow-x: hidden;
            min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);
        }

        /* Tactile Button Styles */
        .tactile-button-primary {
            @apply relative transition-all duration-100;
            background-color: #2bb1ff;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #006495;
            border-radius: 1.5rem;
        }
        .tactile-button-primary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #006495;
        }

        .tactile-button-secondary {
            @apply relative transition-all duration-100;
            background-color: #ffffff;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #dee3e9;
            border-radius: 1.5rem;
        }
        .tactile-button-secondary:active {
            transform: translateY(4px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 #dee3e9;
        }

        /* Correct State Highlight */
        .correct-choice {
            background-color: #92fc58 !important; /* tertiary-fixed */
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 0 #2b6c00 !important;
            border: 4px solid #ffffff;
        }

        /* Progress Bar Animation */
        .progress-fill {
            transition: width 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1);
        }

        /* Confetti Canvas */
        #confetti-canvas {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 100;
        }

        /* Pulse for Audio Icons */
        @keyframes subtle-pulse {
            0% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); }
        }
        .pulse-audio {
            animation: subtle-pulse 2s infinite ease-in-out;
        }

        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        .fill-icon {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="flex flex-col text-on-surface">
<!-- TopAppBar -->
<header class="w-full top-0 sticky bg-surface dark:bg-on-surface border-b-4 border-surface-container-highest dark:border-outline flex justify-between items-center px-container-margin py-unit h-touch-target-min z-40">
<div class="flex items-center gap-3">
<div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-primary-container flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden border-2 border-white shadow-sm">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="A cute, vibrant 3D stylized rank badge for a children's educational app. It features a friendly golden star with a explorer's hat, set against a bright blue circular background with a subtle glossy plastic texture." src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuD7Wu399DNjlJUXF1oNOKlkGtsx0CqOH67L_eztVJSiWu1L0aAIFhZz52TDinorB2g-qtPE3WwK_hBhMqs5Q07KNwkcarTIP6xHTUFLMvmz3Wwrs3GplZhjvxxbeh1i6VL7hfLT5WkBsoQxVrtqhrsgdfLNzwEEjfht-xW6cGsJAAPJp1Q8uoKzaELJvMb6hZmsfz8olixXRVzlnXSXcHYtX_lvW3S4ILk-fAtJooLbnx-yrQA50E3baSavpNdtuXav4gVxjjpybj4"/>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col leading-none">
<h1 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md font-bold text-primary dark:text-primary-fixed">Explorador de Banderas</h1>
<span class="text-[10px] text-outline font-bold uppercase tracking-wider">Flag Explorer</span>
</div>
</div>
<button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container rounded-full hover:scale-105 transition-transform active:translate-y-1 shadow-md border-b-4 border-secondary mr-2">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl fill-icon">notifications_active</span>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center leading-none">
<span class="text-[8px] font-bold uppercase">¡Alarma!</span>
<span class="text-[6px] opacity-70 uppercase">Sound Alarm</span>
</div>
</button><button class="w-touch-target-min h-touch-target-min flex items-center justify-center text-primary dark:text-inverse-primary hover:scale-105 transition-transform active:translate-y-1">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[32px]">volume_up</span>
</button>
</header>
<main class="flex-1 flex flex-col items-center px-container-margin py-8 gap-8 max-w-2xl mx-auto w-full pb-32">
<!-- Progress Bar Section -->
<div class="w-full">
<div class="flex justify-between items-end mb-2">
<div class="flex flex-col">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-primary">Pregunta 1/10</span>
<span class="text-[10px] text-outline font-bold uppercase">Question 1/10</span>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-end">
<span class="font-label-bold text-label-bold text-tertiary">¡Sigue así!</span>
<span class="text-[10px] text-outline font-bold uppercase">Keep going!</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="w-full h-4 bg-surface-container-highest rounded-full overflow-hidden">
<div class="progress-fill h-full bg-tertiary-container w-[10%] rounded-full shadow-inner"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Flag Review Card -->
<div class="w-full bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-lg p-6 flex flex-col items-center gap-4 shadow-sm border border-outline-variant relative overflow-hidden">
<!-- Decorative recessed pattern -->
<div class="absolute inset-0 opacity-5 pointer-events-none" style="background-image: radial-gradient(#006495 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 16px 16px;"></div>
<div class="w-full aspect-[3/2] max-w-sm rounded-lg overflow-hidden border-4 border-white shadow-lg z-10 transition-transform duration-500 hover:scale-[1.02]">
<img class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-alt="National flag of France" src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuBAafoujHy4bGMWVRYEl9BZvoEUV8VQZLH2A0jDic73TgFF5jHIBHmlHF2xhLE0dBNUYqw-33jJDCPb5MfJ6JHrdZ2aCNmbi1VjNtf7jyhzYnkWwyOcML9tECZlSXtdD9i2WggvhnTNI4wqDeZJc4BIdXeTlwCEc9CBjN5n8DCvbJWAheJtpOXWZmDLLaOhJugXowqZ4s1UhUHZ8aTuWBl3VTsVu0cjApXNds8-ORTFTKBqvUm1CSQRtodzLlCIC-FOLuD1KIn1zLE"/>
</div>
<div class="z-10 text-center">
<p class="font-body-lg text-body-lg text-on-surface-variant">¿Qué país es este?</p>
<p class="text-[12px] text-outline font-bold uppercase">Which country is this?</p>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Choice Buttons Grid -->
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 w-full">
<!-- Option 1: Italy -->
<button class="tactile-button-secondary w-full min-h-[112px] flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-4" onclick="handleChoice(this, false, 'Italia')"><div class="flex flex-col items-start gap-1">
<span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-primary">Italia</span>
<span class="text-[14px] text-outline font-bold uppercase tracking-wider">Italy</span>
</div>
<div class="w-20 h-20 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-md pulse-audio">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-5xl fill-icon">volume_up</span>
</div></button>
<!-- Option 2: France (Correct) -->
<button class="tactile-button-secondary w-full min-h-[112px] flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-4" onclick="handleChoice(this, true, 'Francia')"><div class="flex flex-col items-start gap-1">
<span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-primary">Francia</span>
<span class="text-[14px] text-outline font-bold uppercase tracking-wider">France</span>
</div>
<div class="w-20 h-20 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-md pulse-audio">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-5xl fill-icon">volume_up</span>
</div></button>
<!-- Option 3: Germany -->
<button class="tactile-button-secondary w-full min-h-[112px] flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-4" onclick="handleChoice(this, false, 'Alemania')"><div class="flex flex-col items-start gap-1">
<span class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-primary">Alemania</span>
<span class="text-[14px] text-outline font-bold uppercase tracking-wider">Germany</span>
</div>
<div class="w-20 h-20 bg-secondary-container rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-md pulse-audio">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-on-secondary-container text-5xl fill-icon">volume_up</span>
</div></button>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation Shell -->
<nav class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-gutter pb-4 pt-2 bg-surface-container-lowest dark:bg-on-surface border-t-4 border-surface-container-highest dark:border-outline shadow-lg rounded-t-lg">
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-colors" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">map</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-[14px] mt-0.5">Explorar</span>
<span class="text-[8px] uppercase font-bold text-outline">Explore</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant p-2 hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-colors" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl">menu_book</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-[14px] mt-0.5">Pasaporte</span>
<span class="text-[8px] uppercase font-bold text-outline">Passport</span>
</a>
<a class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container rounded-xl px-4 py-1 translate-y-[-4px] active:scale-95 transition-transform duration-150" href="#">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-2xl fill-icon">quiz</span>
<span class="font-label-bold text-[14px] mt-0.5">Jugar</span>
<span class="text-[8px] uppercase font-bold text-on-primary-container/60">Play</span>
</a>
</nav>
<!-- Confetti Canvas -->
<canvas id="confetti-canvas"></canvas>
<script>
        function handleChoice(button, isCorrect, name) {
            console.log("Diciendo: " + name);
            if (isCorrect) {
                button.classList.remove('tactile-button-secondary');
                button.classList.add('correct-choice');
                triggerConfetti();
                
                if (window.navigator.vibrate) {
                    window.navigator.vibrate([100, 30, 100]);
                }

                setTimeout(() => {
                    alert("¡Súper! ¡Encontraste a Francia! ¿Listo para la siguiente?");
                    window.location.reload();
                }, 2500);
            } else {
                button.style.transform = "translateX(10px)";
                button.classList.add('bg-error-container');
                setTimeout(() => {
                    button.style.transform = "";
                    button.classList.remove('bg-error-container');
                }, 200);
            }
        }

        function triggerConfetti() {
            const canvas = document.getElementById('confetti-canvas');
            const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
            canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
            canvas.height = window.innerHeight;

            let particles = [];
            const colors = ['#fccc00', '#2bb1ff', '#92fc58', '#ffdad6', '#ffffff'];

            for (let i = 0; i < 150; i++) {
                particles.push({
                    x: Math.random() * canvas.width,
                    y: canvas.height + Math.random() * 100,
                    size: Math.random() * 8 + 4,
                    color: colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)],
                    speedY: Math.random() * -10 - 10,
                    speedX: Math.random() * 10 - 5,
                    rotation: Math.random() * 360,
                    rotSpeed: Math.random() * 10 - 5
                });
            }

            function animate() {
                ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
                particles.forEach((p, i) => {
                    p.y += p.speedY;
                    p.x += p.speedX;
                    p.speedY += 0.25; 
                    p.rotation += p.rotSpeed;

                    ctx.save();
                    ctx.translate(p.x, p.y);
                    ctx.rotate(p.rotation * Math.PI / 180);
                    ctx.fillStyle = p.color;
                    ctx.fillRect(-p.size / 2, -p.size / 2, p.size, p.size);
                    ctx.restore();

                    if (p.y > canvas.height + 50) {
                        particles.splice(i, 1);
                    }
                });

                if (particles.length > 0) {
                    requestAnimationFrame(animate);
                }
            }
            animate();
        }
    </script>
</body></html>
